看来它之前没有胡说…这瓶酒确实价格不菲，一般人甚至连碰一下它都没有资格——这还是在梦境里。
Seems like the champagne wasn't boasting earlier... It really has a hefty price tag, and ordinary people aren't even permitted to touch it even in the Dreamscape.
金色酒瓶的声音突然又在你颅内响起，声线依然慵懒、高高在上。
The gold wine bottle's voice suddenly rings in your head. It still sounds as nonchalant and condescending as usual.
真遗憾，那位水晶杯没有选择我…不过这就是生活吧？总会有那么一两件事不会照着你想要的方向发展，倒也正常。
It's a shame that the crystal chalice didn't choose me, but c'est la vie, right? Sometimes, things just don't turn out the way you want them to. It's pretty normal.
这展览可真烦人，我就只能呆在这儿不动…下次联谊是什么时候？希望能再遇到一只和它一样漂亮——不对，最好是比它还漂亮的杯子。

This exhibition is so annoying, I have to be still as a statue the entire time... When is the next group dating session? Hopefully, I'll meet another glass that is as beautiful — or even better, twice as beautiful — as the crystal glass.
不知为何，你心中萌生出了一种想要把它砸碎的冲动。
For some reason, you feel an urge to smash it into pieces.
绿色的朗姆酒立在地上，周围歪歪扭扭地躺着些其它容器——你不知道这里发生了什么。
The bottle of green rum stands on the ground with other vessels strewn around it haphazardly. You have no clue what has taken place.
不许你们打它的主意…绝对不许……
I can't allow you to take advantage of it... None of you...
那个有些浑厚的声音再次在你脑中响起，眼前的绿色酒瓶似乎在极力压抑着自己的情绪。
Its thick, rich voice rings in your head again. The bottle of rum seems to be suppressing its emotions with great effort.
所有可能危害到它的…都由我来打倒……
I'll get rid of... everything that might harm it...
我要站在它背后，一直守护它…一直到…最后……
I'll have its back and protect it... until... the very last...
你想起一句不太文雅的流行用语：*某种动物**某个动作*到最后一无所有。但你不好评价什么，因为从某种意义上来说，这确实也是一种伟大爱意的体现。
You recall a rather inelegant popular saying: A simp always ends up with nothing. You don't want to make any comments about the rum's action. In a sense, it's an expression of great love.
在绿色酒瓶把你也当成威胁之前，你最好还是快点离开这里。
You'd better leave the place before the rum sees you as a threat.
不是说园区里没有人吗？现在的情况你又该怎么解释？！
Didn't you say there's no one in the park!? You owe us an explanation!
这…确实没有人啊。我也不知道为啥突然出现那么多怪物啊！
But... there really isn't anyone around. I have no idea why there are suddenly so many monsters here!
哎呀，现在扯那些都没用，赶紧想想怎么离开这里吧。
There's no point in dwelling on that now. We need to find a way to get out of here ASAP.
不如…我们分开来寻找出路？这样概率会大一些。
Why don't we... split up to look for a way out? We'll be more efficient that way.
我听说过那些怪物！好像是叫什么惊梦剧团，是家族的重点整治对象。落单的我们绝对没法幸存，搞不好还会被困在梦里、没法醒来……

I've heard of those monsters! They're called the Dreamjolt Troupe or something, and they have long been on The Family's radar. There's no way we can survive on our own. Even worse, we might be trapped in the dream and never wake up...
不过它们视力很差，我们只需要远远地绕过去就可以了。
One thing though, those monsters have poor eyesight. We just need to go around them from a distance.
没用的，我们回不去了…大家都会被困在这里，再也醒不过来……
It's not gonna work, and we won't be able to go back... Everyone will be trapped here forever and never wake up...
都这种时候了，你能不能别说这种丧气话啊！
Can you stop being such a negative Nancy!?
总之，大家先冷静下来吧。
唉，要是有什么能骗过怪物的伪装就好了……
Gah, if only there's something we could use to disguise ourselves...
真见鬼，我们怎么变成了这副模样？
This is ridiculous. How did we end up looking like this?
亏你还是个导游，现在可好——看看你把我们导到什么鬼地方来了？
Aren't you a tour guide? Look at the place you guided us to!
这怎么能赖我？还不是你非要碰那什么电视机…而且这么一伪装，咱们不是更好躲过那些怪物了嘛。
How is this my fault? You were the one who insisted on touching the television... Also, this disguise might just help us slip past those monsters.
我…那你不也跟着进来了？
I, well... and you just had to follow me inside?
我…我那是担心，打算豁出去跟你同生共死，结果你连句谢谢也不说…幸好咱们只是变成了哈努兄弟，除了颜值进步以外并无危险……

I... I was worried about you, so I risked my life and went through this thing with you. Yet, this is how you thanked me... It's a good thing that we're only turned into Hanu — we're better-looking now and aren't in any real danger.
哎，不对啊，哈努兄弟不是只会发出「帅气的*哼*声」嘛？为什么我们还能说话？
Wait a minute. Isn't Hanu supposed to only make cool *hmph* sounds? Why can we still speak?
你在意那些干什么？这地方穿哈努皮套的演员也会说话。重要的是我们该怎么出去啊！
Why are you concerned with that? The actors who wear the Hanu costume here can talk too. Our priority now is to find a way out!
我想起来了！这个是克劳克影业推出的游乐设施。「黄金的时刻」街头也有，记得吗？
I've got it! This is a Clock Studios amusement ride. It can also be found on the streets in the Golden Hour. Ring any bell?
这里肯定存在另一台电视，那个就是出口…咱们去对面找找看吧。
There must be another television here, which would be the exit... Let's check out the other side and see.
谁在说话？你们到底谁是谁啊？妈妈，我分不清！
Who's speaking? Holy moly, I can't tell you two apart!
没想到，我们居然还能活着出来……
It's hard to believe we managed to make it out alive...
退钱！你这个导游，明明最开始的时候说自己有影城的VIP通道，结果带我们钻小洞入园不说，里面还全是怪物。
I want a refund! As our tour guide, you told us you had VIP access to the theme park, but we ended up having to sneak into the park. And what's worse, the park was filled with monsters!
哈，哈…这些其实都是我游览规划的一部分，几位没觉得非常惊险刺激吗？
Hmm, well... Those were all part of the itinerary! Hasn't this journey been a thrill?
你少来，明明里面只有惊吓。我也要退钱。
Just cut it out. There had been nothing but fear and shock. I demand a refund as well.
咳咳…咱们都是过命的交情了，还在乎那些干啥——今天的苏乐达，我请了！大家随便开怀畅饮吧。
Ahem... Since we've been through so much together, let's put all those things behind us! Today's SoulGlad is on me! Feel free to enjoy as many bottles as you like!
其实这趟也算不上那么危险啦，咱们一路上不是都没被怪物拦下嘛……
Actually, this trip isn't as dangerous as we think. At least we haven't found ourselves running into any monsters along the way, right?
我是不想再体验第二次了…还是逛商场更适合我。
Anyway, no repeats for me... Shopping malls are more my thing.
赶紧想办法带我们离开！
Hurry up and find a way to get us out of here!
We are going to be stuck here forever...
How did we end up looking like this?
I can't believe I can make it out alive...
We've been through so much together...
洞穴里隐约传来了说话声，但寻常人的体型根本钻不进去。除非……
You hear a faint voice coming from inside the cave, but a regular-sized person could never get inside. Not unless...
瞧瞧你发现了什么，一只藏在广告牌里的折纸…大鸟，它的营养价值是牛肉的五倍。快偷偷地靠近它，给它一个惊喜。
Look what you've found! A giant... origami bird, hiding inside a billboard. Its nutritional value is five times than that of a big, juicy steak. Try sneaking up on it and giving it a shock!
该死，你忘了自己已经被缩小了——现在的你，身高还顶不过它的一根鸟毛。你真希望地上能长出一根豌豆藤，供你爬上去狠狠薅它一把。

Shucks, you completely forgot that you've been shrunk! At your current size, you're no bigger than one of its feathers. If only there was a beanstalk that would sprout from the ground and allow you to climb up and give it a good tug on the feathers.
说得好！百年三万六千日， 一日须倾三百杯！
That's right! A hundred years is just over thirty-six thousand days, and one must empty three hundred cups in a day!
大鸟似乎把你的动静当作了摇篮的韵律，悠悠然地发出呓语，和梦里的机巧鸟举杯对饮。
It seems that the giant bird feels your stirring movements as nothing more than the gentle rhythm of a rocking cradle. It let out relaxed murmurings and raise a toast to the cycranes in its dreams.
吃得个烂醉如泥好尽意！
Nothing beats a good feast and drinking to the death!
啾？早、早上好，你要一起来喝喝喝、喝一杯吗？
Tweet? M—Morning. Did'ya come to d—d—drink wiv me?
I'm here to bring you to justice!
我可没做、做过什么坏事，我只是，在这、这里享受生活而已。
I didn't— I haven't done anything wrong, I just, I'm just enjoyin' my life here, that's all I've done!
要说坏事，工作就是我，干过的，最、最、最坏的事。不能偷懒难道不是世界上最大的坏事么？
If you wanna talk 'bout bad stuff... Workin' is the ba—baddest—worst thing I've ever done! Not bein' able to take a break all the time, dontcha think that's the baddest thing ever in the world?
啾，我知道了，你也是，来、来抓我回去干活的是不是？
Tweet, I get it now. You, you're— you came to make me work again, didn't you?
醉了？哈！我——我没醉，我怎么可能醉呢。
Drunk!? Hah! I—I'm not drunk, why would I— how could I be drunk?
不过，和大树的日子比起来，这儿的生活确实舒坦得跟醉了一样。
Then again, compared to the days at the Great Tree, the life here is almost as comfortable as bein' drunk!
等等，你、你不会是来逮我回去的吧？
Wait, y—you're—you've come to take me back, haven't ya?
想、想、想让我回去，门～儿都没有。工作那破事儿谁愿意谁干，反正我懒得干。
I—If, if you wanna get me to go back, you can think again! Who'd wanna do that workin' stuff? I know I can't be bothered.
大鸟不打算听你的解释，自顾自地在「巢穴」里摸索着什么，然后惊恐地「啾」了一声。
The giant bird has no intention of listening to your explanation. It just continues to feel around for something in its "nest" as if you aren't even there, before letting out a "tweet" fearfully.
它望向你，态度似乎发生了微妙的转变，哼，善变的大鸟。
It turns to you, and its attitude seems to have changed a little... Humph, what a fickle bird...
啾，朋、朋友，你，您现在有空么？
Tweet, m—my friend, do—do you have a minute?
能给我带点东西过、过来吗？
Can you bring me something? Bring it here?
Tell me what you want me to do first.
方便的话…能帮我带点东西过、过来吗？
If you have time... Can you bring me something? Bring it here?
英雄请留步，帮帮忙吧，我什么都会做的！
Please wait, hero! Help me, I will do anything!
也不知道是哪、哪、哪个酒鬼，我只是睡、睡了一觉，库存就被他喝空了。一想到世上还有这么丢人的家伙，我都、都替他脸红。

I don't know wh—which lou— lou— which lounge-lover could've done this but I had a— I took a little nap and now my stock is empty! I—I get second-hand embarrassment just knowing that there are such shameless people in the world!
据说，这朝露小屋珍藏的陈酿，喝了比星星的歌声还要美。那润泽的琼浆，那醇美的清香，哪怕是见到它那耀眼的光泽，都让我心旷神怡。

It is said that drinkin' the ol' beverages of Dawndew Hut is more beautiful than the songs of the stars. The glossy flow of the liquid, the sweet aroma, even just the dazzling luster can bring my heart calm.
只要你能给我带一瓶最香醇的美酒回来，我就，就，听你的，回、回去工作。
If you can bring me a bottle of the finest wine, I will— I will do as you say and g—go back to work.
反正都醉了，能拿瓶苏乐达来糊弄它吗？算了，还是不要跟只鸟一般见识为好。
It's already drunk. Couldn't you just fool it with a bottle of SoulGlad? Ah, best not. You don't want to stoop down to a bird's level.
三瓶酒互相倚在一起，能看出，它们的关系真的很好。
You see three bottles of wine leaning on each other. It is clear to see that they are very close.
请问，你们谁是这里最香醇的酒？
Excuse me, which of you is the finest wine here?
哈，你问谁我们三个谁最香醇？嘿，同胞们，居然有人想要用这么低劣的手段，破坏我们三瓶的完美情谊。
Hah, you're asking which of us is the finest of wines? Hey, brothers! You see what despicable methods they use to try and break up our perfect friendship!
等到我们三瓶争个酒死瓶破，你再来坐收渔翁之利，把我们统统都倒进下水道去，自己成为最香醇的酒，你一定打着这样的算盘吧！
You would wait for us to descend into battle and smash each other to pieces, then seize your moment to pour us down the sewers and become the finest wine yourself! That must be your plan!
很可惜，此一名杀三酒的计策被识破了。今我们三瓶酒，虽不是同年同月同日生，但也要同年同月同日死。

Unfortunately for you, we have seen through your triple alcohocide plot! We three bottles, though we may not have been born on the same day, month, or year, we shall die on the same day, month, and year!
哈哈哈，我们三瓶的友谊坚不可摧！
有没有一种可能，我是人，不是酒。
Have you considered the possibility that I am not alcohol, but a person?
黄，看呐，多么恶毒的计划，因为{F#她}{M#他}不是酒，所以不会被香醇的头衔所诱惑。
Yellow, do you see {F#her}{M#his} despicable scheming? Since {F#she}{M#he} is not alcohol, {F#she}{M#he} cannot be seduced by the title of "finest wine..."
要不是当初一气之下砸碎了那瓶苏乐达，又何至于如今这副田地。
If I had not let myself get carried away with emotion and smashed that bottle of SoulGlad, we would not be in this situation.
如今因我一瓶的过错，耽误了黄和小红的前程，你们去吧，最香醇的酒非你们莫属。
Now, because of my mistake, I have delayed both of your futures, Yellow, Red. Both of you, go on ahead, the title of finest wine belongs to you.
勿要自责，阿绿，我早知道你的香醇天下无敌，纵使走遍匹诺康尼，也不可能有比你更高档的美酒。
You must not blame yourself, Green! I have always known that you are finer than any wine in the land. I could travel the entirety of Penacony and find no finer wine than you!
小红的香醇虽不如阿绿，但烈性十足，哪怕是举世无双的「钟表匠」来了，也定无法驾驭，饮上三杯便会醉倒。

Though your fragrance is no match for Green, you are extremely potent, Red! Even the incomparable Watchmaker would not be able to tame your fire! Three glasses and he would be cast to the floor, drunk.
有你这般评价，我愿一生一世做大家的小红。
Hearing such a touching assessment, I want to be your little Red forever!
不必不必，若有朝一日，你二瓶的才能得人赏识，被装进谐乐大典的酒杯里，勿要忘了曾有我这个黄便是。

Fear not, fear not! One day, your talents will receive the recognition they deserve and you shall fill the glasses of the Charmony Festival! When that day comes, just make sure that you do not forget about your friend, Yellow.
Green Wine Bottle and Red Wine Bottle
三瓶酒抱在一起，哭成一团。虽然你不知道酒瓶是怎么抱在一起的，但总之它们抱在了一起。
The three hugged each other tight and began to cry on each others' shoulders. Although you do not really understand how bottles hug each other tight, they did just that.
从今往后，只要我有一场宴会可饮，就绝对少不了你们两瓶的份。虽然不知道这位毒士是出自哪个酒厂的指示，但你放弃吧。
From this day forward, any banquet I attend shall have places for you both! I do not know which winery has sent you, foul villain, but you can give up!
我们三瓶都是这里最香醇的酒，你的阴谋绝不会得逞。
All three of us are the finest wine here, your plan shall not succeed!
哈哈哈，我们三瓶的友谊坚不可摧！
你在想，要不把它们三瓶都交给小鸟算了，但一股强烈的好奇突然涌上心头。
You begin to think, why not just take all three of them back to the bird when suddenly, an irresistible curiosity surges through you.
它们三瓶到底谁是最香醇的？今儿个你就是要让它们三瓶比划比划，分出个一二三来。
Which one of them actually is the finest wine? You have decided that today, you will have them compare and rank themselves as a clear first, second, and third.
思考，仔细思考，三瓶酒的阵线绝非严丝合缝，只需一席话语，管叫它不攻自破。
Think, think carefully. There is no way that their defenses are impenetrable. All it would take is one word to get them fighting between themselves...
黄，其实我不久前偷偷听到了它们俩私下聊天，说了一些不太好听的话。
Yellow, I've actually heard the other two talking privately about you not long ago. They said some quite nasty things.
你不要妄图挑拨我们同胞三瓶的关系。
Do not try to sow discord between we three bottles' camaraderie!
They said your manufacturer is counterfeit.
就是个名不见经传的杂牌工厂，外包了点业务，才挂了名酒的牌子。
They said you're from a no-name producer that outsourced some work and stuck on a label from a high-end brand.
哈？！就它们俩那玩意儿还好意思笑我牌子？也不倒半杯出来照照自己是什么东西。
Wha—!? Those cheap toys dare mock my label? Why don't they pour out half a glass each and see what swill they're filled with!
我凭一酒之力，辛辛苦苦把它们从外面拉进朝露公馆，现在就是这么报答我的？
I popped my cork and worked myself to the glass to bring them into Dewlight Pavilion and this is how they repay me?
我就说它们这段时间老悄咪咪地，敢情是嫌弃我这老东西牌子杂了。
I knew they had been talking in secret whispers all the time lately. They just hate me because I am such an old vintage!
你给我评评理，就说真要论最香醇的酒，有我在，还轮得到它们？
You want me to tell you which of us is the finest wine? With me around, they are nowhere near!
阿绿，其实我不久前偷偷听到了黄和小红聊天，说了些不太好听的话。
Green, I've actually heard the other two talking privately about you not long ago. They said some quite nasty things.
呵，就你这骗汽水的鬼话，还能糊弄到本酒不成？
Hah, you think you can fool me with the same lies you would a cheap soda?
They said you're made from poor ingredients.
是连苏乐达工厂都看不起的废品，低价回收来酿酒的。
They said that you're made from scraps that even SoulGlad Enterprise wouldn't use, recycled on the cheap to make wine.
什么？我原料是废品，那它们的原料就是不可回收垃圾。
What? I am made from scrap ingredients? Then their ingredients are trash that could not even be recycled!
亏我还和小红一起商量怎么给黄庆祝出厂日，它就是这么埋汰我的？
I was discussing with little Red how to help celebrate Yellow's bottling day, and this is how they insult me?
还有小红，我真是瞎了瓶盖了，能把这种酒视若己出。
And little Red! I must have had the cap pulled over my eyes to have seen her as my own vintage!
这位英雄，你就说，我这质量，它们有资格和我比试谁更香醇？
Hero, you think with my quality, they have any right to talk about whom is the finest wine here?
小红，就前段日子，我偶然听到了黄和阿绿聊天，有些不太好听的话。
Little Red, I happened to hear Yellow and Green talking, they said some pretty nasty things about you.
你这厮，想说什么就快说。
Look, buddy, just say what you want to say.
They said you were industrial alcohol.
完全不能算是酒，谁喝谁脑子进水。
They said you don't even count as wine, whoever drinks you will end up with brain damage.
工业酒精？当初赚我入伙的时候，是谁夸我是三瓶里最辣的那个？
Industrial alcohol? When they tricked me into joining, who was it that said I was the most ferocious of us all?
这么多年了，我一直自甘屈身老三的位置，还不是因为我信任它们。
After all these years, I have always allowed myself to take on the role of the youngest because I trusted them!
好哇，信任就信出这么些东西。
Alright, that trust is shattered today.
今天我就要把酒瓶撕破，看看谁才是最香醇的好酒。
Today, I will tear open some bottles and we will see who is the finest wine of the three!
在你的强烈攻势下，三瓶坚不可摧的友谊终于产生了裂隙。
Under your tireless offense, a rift has formed in the unbreakable friendship between the three bottles.
今天，我就要和各位一起，在这「朝露的时刻」，发烂发臭！
Today, in this Moment of Morning Dew, we finally will expose who is truly rotten and putrid together!
是啊，有的酒那些小心思，早就臭不可闻了。
That's right! It seems some wines have already allowed their thoughts to grow putrid!
谁是工业酒精？谁是工业酒精？你们今天就在这儿给我说清楚！
Who is industrial alcohol? Who are you calling industrial alcohol? Today, we will see who exactly that is once and for all!
看着三瓶酒吵得不可开交，你心中不由地升腾起一丝自豪的欢愉。
Seeing the three bottles locked in a fierce argument, you cannot help but become overcome with a sense of pride and joy.
英雄，多亏了你，让我看清了它们两个的真面目，今天你就来评评理，谁才是最香醇的酒。
Hero, thanks to you, I have seen their true natures at last. Today, you must be the judge and decide which of us is truly the finest of wines.
没错，真英雄慧眼识珠，就让这两个乡巴佬瞧瞧，真正的高档酒。
That's right, the hero has the discerning eye that will allow you two common bumpkins to witness what a high-quality wine truly is!
我现在谁也不服，就服你，来吧，是时候离开这里了。
I will no longer answer to anyone, except you! Come, it is time for us to leave this place.
I knew it, you have a discerning eye, hero.
在另外两个酒瓶的鄙视里，黄兴奋地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，足以把世间一切美酒踩在脚下。

Under the disdainful glance of the other two bottles, Yellow excitedly strolls into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, it is prepared to crush all other imposters under foot.
Hah, this is goodbye. See you again never!
在另外两个酒瓶的叫骂里，阿绿骄傲地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，所有的同类都入不了它的法眼。
As the other two bottles hurl out slurs and curses, Green arrogantly struts into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, no other is fit to be bathed in its warm gaze.
管谁叫工业酒精啊？谁叫工业酒精！
Who said I was industrial alcohol? Who is industrial alcohol now!?
在另外两个酒瓶的冷漠里，小红愤怒地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，可仍有团火在它的心头燃烧。
As the other two bottles fall into indifferent silence, Red angrily storms into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, the fire in its heart has been reignited.
啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!
The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.
啊！这酒高雅非凡，口感柔顺，像一股暖流涌上心头，真乃绝世罕有。
Ah! This wine has an incomparable elegance. Its flavor is smooth, like a warm current that rushes over my heart. Truly, a unique and rare sample!
能找到此等绝品，我果真没看错你。
You were able to find such a masterpiece, I knew I was right to trust you.
回味无穷，余韵悠长，感觉所有的烦恼都一下子消失无、无无踪了。
The aftertaste lingers and resonates endlessly. It feels like all of my cares and worries have melted without a trace.
啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!
The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.
哦！这酒品质绝佳，就像一位绝世的舞者，在我的心尖跳动。
Oh! This wine is truly a masterful work, it is like a world-class dancer casting their masterful steps along my heart.
现在的工厂都太注重品牌，反而忽视了酿造原料的质量，这样的极品，已经很多年没喝到了。
Factories these days are so obsessed with labels that they overlook the quality of the brewing ingredients. It has been many years since I have enjoyed a fine creation like this!
你能听见吗？它在我的胸膛里唱歌。
Can you hear that? It is singing a sweet song within my chest.
啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!
The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.
哈！这酒酒劲强韧，宛如有位格斗家一拳轰在了我的脑袋上。
Hah! This wine has a ferocious strength, drinking it is like a punch to the face from a great fighter!
单纯，真切，这就是纯粹的酒，纯粹的，纯粹的，烈！
Pure, sincere, this is pure alcohol. It is pure, pure... Strength!
我敢打包票，哪怕是猫头鹰老师来了，多半也撑不过三杯。
I would wager that not even Professor Owl themselves would be able to handle more than three glasses!
朋友，在我见过的人里，你绝对是品味最好的一个。
My friend, your taste is the finest of everyone I have ever met.
这可是最香醇的酒——小心点，别喝那么急！
This is truly the finest of wines... Careful, do not drink it too quickly!
关于回去的事，嗯，等我再喝一口就回去，就一口。
As for me returning to work. Uh, I'll just have one more sip and then I'll go back, just one sip.
大鸟摇摇晃晃地飞走了…或许它只是找了个新的地方躲起来喝酒。
The giant bird took flight and headed off, swaying and weaving... Perhaps it has just gone to find another place to hide and drink wine...
在距离很近的地方，似乎有些古怪的动静，巨大，轻盈，甚至还有点…醉意？
Somewhere nearby, you hear a strange disturbance. You can tell that whoever is making the noise is huge, light-footed and perhaps even a little... drunk?
声音的源头仿佛就在头顶，可放眼望去，除了空荡荡的广告牌，什么也没有。
The sound seems to be coming from above you. However, looking up, you see nothing but an empty billboard.
就像是，飘着一团看不见的梦。
It's like there are invisible dreams floating above you...
还好我们早就知道它心里根本没有我俩，这么想走，我们还求之不得呢。
At least we know now they never cared about us two! If they wanted to leave us that badly, they should have just said so!
哈哈哈，我们二瓶的友谊坚不可摧！
Haha, we two have an unbreakable friendship!
眼前的东西是什么？你愣在原地，大脑飞速处理起信息。
Just what is happening in front of your eyes? You stay stupefied on the spot as your brain rushes to try and make sense of the information.
答案很快揭晓——你碰上了一起性质恶劣的谋杀案。
The answer becomes clear very quickly... You have stumbled across a heinous murder!
从外形判断，死者是一盘盒式磁带。
Judging from the appearance, the deceased is a cassette tape...
凶手残忍地将它开膛破肚，大量的梦泡在尸体周边悬浮，昭示其短暂的死亡时间。
The murderer brutally disemboweled them... You can tell from the large number of dream bubbles floating around the body that the time of death was not long ago.
就在不远处，一只广告牌正在冥思苦想着什么。
Not far away, you see a billboard seemingly in deep thought about something.
年轻的朋友，很遗憾，你我的初次见面是在这种场景。
My young friend, I am sorry that our first meeting is under such dire circumstances.
自我介绍一下，我是匹诺康尼的新晋侦探——虽然还没有获得官方认证。
Allow me to introduce myself, I am Penacony's newest detective... Though I do not have official certification yet...
说来也惭愧，目前为止，我还没找到真正有用的线索。
Though I am ashamed to admit it, I've yet to discover any useful clues for this case...
犯人非常谨慎，既没有指纹，也没有任何与受害者争斗留下的痕迹。
The culprit was extremely careful. There are no fingerprints, nor are there any signs of struggle on the victim.
若非地面上散布的新鲜梦泡，我几乎要认为，凶手是在其他地点实施作案，然后用载具把尸体抛弃到了这里。
If it weren't for the fresh dream bubbles scattered across the ground, I'd almost think that the culprit committed the act somewhere else, and then used a vehicle to abandon the body here.
你有注意到那些带子吗？它们被故意缠在一起。如果犯人偷偷从里面剪去一段，也很难被发现。
Did you notice those tapes? It looks like they've been deliberately tangled up. If the culprit had secretly taken a cutting, it would not be easy to tell.
若真是如此，那段磁带大概就是他的动机。
If that's the case, that cassette tape was likely also the motive.
杀害目标，夺走证据，消除线索。犯人应该为今天的行动谋划很久了。
Kill the target, steal the evidence, and remove any clues. The culprit has likely been planning their operation today for a long time...
过奖了，只是在这方面略有涉猎。
You're too kind. I've just done a little reading into this kind of thing.
We're counting on you, great detective!
不敢当，只是个半吊子而已。
Oh no, I just dabble in this kind of thing.
如果可以，能否请您担任我的助手一职？毕竟我只是个广告牌，很多事情办起来都没有您那么方便。
Could I possibly ask you to be my assistant on this case? I'm just a billboard after all. A lot of things are a lot more convenient for you than for me.
我自知天赋愚钝，但若有您的助力，或许能为死者做到什么。
I know that I am a little slow-witted, but with your help, maybe I could at least do something for the deceased.
You can rest assured with me around.
感谢您的好心肠。我会再捋一捋线索，希望您能去周边的目击者那儿走访一遭，看看有没有重要的线索。
Thank you for your kindness. I'll try to piece the clues together. Would you be able to go and interview the witnesses around here and see whether they have any important leads?
爆米花和汽水夫妇都是这里的居民，应该会对死者有所了解。另外，有个汽水和爆米花的侦探组合也到了现场，或许能为我们拓宽思路。

The popcorn and soda couples are residents here, they should know something about our victim. Also, there's a group of popcorn and soda detectives that will be heading to the scene. Maybe they'll have some insights that can help us.
爆米花和汽水夫妇都是这里的居民，应该会对死者有所了解。另外，有个汽水和爆米花的侦探组合也到了现场，或许能为我们拓宽思路。

The popcorn and soda couples are residents here, they should know something about our victim. Also, there's a group of popcorn and soda detectives that will be heading to the scene. Maybe they'll have some insights that can help us.
瞧我说什么？那小子总有天得栽别人手里。死相这么惨，绝对是被仇家找上门了。
What're you lookin' at me for? That kid was gonna get what was comin' to him one day. Lookin' at this grisly scene, looks like one of his enemies finally got their revenge.
虽然他老在外面拈花惹草，也不至于搭上条命啊。
Just because he was always out flirting around doesn't mean he deserved to have his life taken, does it?
小小一盘磁带，好不容易摸爬滚打到这儿，还被黑心老板克扣工钱，落得个开除的下场，就算一时堕落，也是情有可原吧。

He was just a little tape that worked so hard to make it here, then he ended up having his wages cut by a cruel boss and getting fired! He may have gone off the rails for a while, but that's understandable, don't you think?
你搁哪儿听来的这版本，他自己编的吧？
Where'd ya hear that version of the story? He told ya that himself?
每天上班也不干活，就一条磁带转着放歌，老板实在忍不了才把他给踢出去的。
He never did any work. He'd just spin his tape 'n' play songs all day. The boss couldn't take it, so he gave him the boot!
据说，还因为录到了老板的什么把柄，私下从他嘴里翘出来不少钱。
Word on the streets is that he even secretly got a big payout from the boss 'cos he caught him sayin' somethin' on tape.
要我说，这案子保不齐就是那老磁带雇人干的。
If ya ask me, I reckon that tape's boss probably hired guys to take 'im out.
天杀的东西，大半夜的音量开那么大。要不是我懒得动，真想出来给他一榔头。
That darned kid, always playing songs super loud in the middle of the night! If I wasn't too lazy to move, I'd have gone out there and introduced him to my hammer.
亲爱的，你消消气，万一被谁听见，当心把你当凶手抓了！
Sweetheart, calm down. What if someone hears you and thinks you are the murderer?
咱们好好过自己的日子，不和小混混一般见识。
Let's just go on with our lives and not sink to those nasty gangsters' level.
我倒想消气，可那小杂种还借了我一千苜蓿币没还！
I'd love to calm down, but that little runt borrowed a thousand Alfalfa credits from me and hasn't returned it!
这笔钱，不是拿去赌，就是花在了和地痞流氓的花天酒地上。
If he didn't gamble that money away, he must have spent it getting drunk and partying with those local thugs!
赶紧回屋吧，昨晚他那下水道音乐闹腾得，我现在都还困着，气儿都跑没了。
Let's head back home. Last night, his terrible gutter music was so loud, I'm still exhausted. I've lost all my fizz.
你这一说那我更咽不下这气了，横竖得过去踹他小子两下。
Now you've wound me up again saying that! I should head over there and give him a good kicking!
好啦好啦，回家，别让大伙看笑话。
Alright, alright, let's go home. Don't let people see you causing a scene.
看来，大家还是缺少一双发现真相的慧眼。
It seems that they all lack the discerning eyes to see the truth.
是啊，无糖兄，口味太甜，糖甚至黏住了他们的脑袋。
Indeed, Brother Sugar-Free. They are all too sweet. The sugar in their minds has made their brains sticky.
论世间，也只有你能懂我，原味兄。
In this whole world, only you truly understand me, Brother Original-Flavor.
犯人并不是故意杀人，是驾车途中意外撞到了受害者。在不知情的前提下，受害者被车向前拖拽，所以磁带才会被扯到这么长。

The culprit did not intend to kill him. They just accidentally hit the victim with their car while driving. Unaware of what had happened, they continued to drag the victim forward with their car, which is why this tape had been stretched so far.
原味兄所言极是，但有一点需要补充。
You are correct, Brother Original-Flavor, but there is one thing I might add.
那是辆非常豪华的跑车，只有匹诺康尼最富贵的家伙才买得起的款式。
This car in particular was an extremely luxurious limousine, one that only the richest in Penacony could afford.
无糖兄真乃神探，这般细节，究竟是如何推断出来的？
You are surely a master detective, Brother Sugar-Free. Pray tell, how did you come to this conclusion for that detail?
很简单，我方才来的时候，亲眼看见它开了出去。
It is simple. I happened to witness them driving away when I arrived.
辛苦了，有您这番操劳，定能把犯人绳之以法。
Thank you. With your hard work, we will be able to bring the culprit to justice.
我看您曾在那两位爆米花身边停留，有听到什么消息吗？
I saw you standing by those two popcorns for a while. Did you overhear any information?
He and his boss have had disagreements.
你如实把听到的对话转述给侦探。
You repeat the conversation to the detective exactly as you heard it.
品行不端啊。如此看来，这位老板长期遭他勒索，是有灭口的动机。
A bit of a problematic character, huh? It seems like the boss had been blackmailed by him for some time and had reason to want to silence him.
剪掉磁带，也是为了销毁死者掌握的把柄。
Cutting the tape is also to destroy the dirt the deceased held on him.
不过，现在还不是下结论的时候，让我再看看其它线索吧。
Although, we are not ready to reach a final conclusion yet. Let's keep searching for clues.
你夸张地讲述起犯人与老板的仇怨。
You exaggeratedly explain the boss's grudge against the victim.
独到的观点，但如果是他老板，会选择这种引人注目的方式吗？一时很难判断。
A unique perspective, but if it really was his boss, would they really have killed him in a way that draws so much attention? It's hard to judge for now.
Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.
朋友，现在可不是开玩笑的时候，死者还等我们还他一个公道呢。
My friend, now is not the time for jokes. The deceased is waiting for us to bring him justice.
那对汽水夫妇呢？他们有说些什么吗？
What about that soda couple? What did they say?
They said there was loud music playing last night.
你把汽水夫妇的对话逐字逐句地转述给侦探。
You relay the soda couple's conversation to the detective word-for-word.
在高噪环境下，智慧生物的暴力行为确实更容易激发。毕竟也不是所有的犯罪都有明确的动机。
Intelligent life forms can easily grow violent under exposure to environments with loud noise. Not all crimes must have an obvious motive, after all.
但犯人的准备，我很难相信是一时兴起。音乐可能是他掩盖行踪的手段。还是再听听其他线索吧。

But with the preparation that the culprit must have gone to, it is hard to imagine that this was just a moment of passion. The music was likely a way to cover up his movements. Let's go and listen out for more clues.
你添油加醋地描绘了汽水先生的愤怒之情。
You embellish Mr. Soda's rage regarding the victim.
的确，如果那瓶汽水故意在您面前说这些话，很可能是和妻子一起演戏，好洗清身上的嫌疑。我再仔细想想。

Indeed, if the soda was deliberately having this conversation in front of you, it is likely that they were putting on an act with their wife in order to wash their hands of any suspicion. Let me think about this a little more.
Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.
朋友，贪玩虽无罪，但也要看时候啊。
My friend, though playing games is not a crime, there is a time and a place for it.
那两位跨种族的知己朋友呢？我看他们对案件似乎有所见解。
What about our different-flavored friends over there? I see they have some opinions on the case.
There was a luxury limousine that passed through here.
你把两位「大侦探」的推理转述给侦探。
You share the "great detectives' deduction" with the detective.
他们的猜想很有道理，也的确符合案发现场的环境。
Their conjecture does indeed make sense. It also fits with the circumstances found at the crime scene.
但这种地方，为什么会有豪车通过？只是路过？真撞到了死者，车主会毫无感觉？
But why would a luxury limousine be going through here? Were they just passing through? If they hit the victim, would the driver really be unaware?
这个推论有些生硬，不过我可能已经抓住了一丝头绪。
This theory is a little forced, but I might have grasped onto something.
照您这么说，也不无可能。作为侦探的我，确实是本案最难被怀疑的凶手。
With the case you've put forward, it is not impossible. As the detective on this case, I am the last person people would suspect as the culprit.
只可惜，我既没有作案时间，也没有犯罪动机。还是让我们回到正题吧。
Unfortunately, I had neither the time nor the motive to commit this murder. Let's get back to the problem at hand.
Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.
好提议，等把这个案子办完，我就抽空去放松放松。
A fine suggestion. Once this case is solved, I'll make time to get some good rest in.
关于这个案子，总有些东西在我的脑海里乱窜，想抓住，却每每与它们擦肩而过。
Some things about this case are rushing around my mind, but as soon as I reach out to put them together, they are gone again.
让我整理整理思路吧，朋友，我看您也累了，不如我们暂且别过。如果后续有消息，我也会通知您的。
Let me gather my thoughts, my friend. I see you are tired, too. Perhaps we should leave it here for now. If there is any further information, I will let you know.
广告牌侦探低着头，若有所思地离开了。
Billboard Detective hangs his head and leaves as if deep in thought.
这是一块无生命的广告牌——整个匹诺康尼恐怕只有你知道，他曾经以「广告牌侦探」的身份在这梦中活过。
This is a lifeless billboard... You are likely the only person in Penacony who knows that it once lived in the Dreamscape under the identity of "Billboard Detective."
你无从得知它为何会横尸街头…也许它找到了磁带凶杀案的真凶，结果惨遭灭口？
You have no way of knowing why they are now here, lying dead on the roadside... Perhaps they discovered the culprit behind the cassette murder case and were brutally silenced?
希望真相确实如你所想的那样，因为它生前是一位正直的侦探——它值得真相，也值得这个轰轰烈烈的结局。
Let's hope that the truth is indeed what you think because they lived as an honest and upright detective... They deserve the truth and a spectacular ending.
Did they murder them for money? Or for revenge?
If they wanted to take it away from the scene...
一幅哈努兄弟主题的挖洞合影立牌。你可以呼朋唤友，让他们把自己美貌的脸庞摆在合适的位置，与卡通立牌产生奇妙的化学反应，然后用相机记录下来。

A group photo board with face slots, featuring a Brother Hanu theme. You can call your friends and get them to place their beautiful faces in the appropriate slots to facilitate wondrous chemical reactions with the cartoon board. Then use your camera to record it!
机会难得，你想让你的朋友们试试看吗？
As you're here already, do you want to call your friends to give it a try?
第一个孔位！你应该有不少符合这个身高要求的朋友。他们是谁？
The first slot! You probably have a fair number of friends that match this height, right?
当然！和蔼的瓦尔特先生永远不会拒绝你。
Of course! Gentle Mr. Yang would never refuse you!
合影立牌啊…很久没看到过这种网红打卡点了。
A group photo board... I haven't seen a viral tourist spot like this for a long time.
螺丝咕姆？天才俱乐部的天才——这可是位大忙人…但你也可以试着联系一下。
Screwllum? Genius of the Genius Society? Now that is a busy man, but you can try contacting him?
感谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}。但愿我能为你留下难忘的回忆。
I appreciate your invitation, {NICKNAME}. I hope that this serves to create a wonderful memory for you.
这可真是让人意外。你永远可以信赖这个冰冷的男人…呃，他物理意义上的温度确实不算高，对吧？
Now that was unexpected! You can always count on that cold man... Ahem, well his biological temperature is not high, is it?
罗浮将军——相信他一定不会拒绝到神策府外透透气的。
General Jing Yuan of the Luofu... I imagine he would not turn down a chance to get out of the Seat of Divine Foresight for a breath of fresh air!
呵…背着青镞跑到这么远的地方偷闲倒是头一次。罢了，相信她能处理好工作。
Heh... This is my first time running so far to slack off behind Qingzu's back. Never mind, I'm sure she can take care of things just fine.
「纯美」骑士银枝——有传言他现在正在匹诺康尼游玩，或许是个不错的主意。
The Knight of Beauty, Argenti... Rumor has it he is currently having fun in Penacony. That might not be a bad idea!
啊，我的挚友！没想到你竟愿意邀请我前来合影…我一定不辱使命！
Ah, my dear friend! I never would have thought you would invite me for a group picture. I shall not fail my mission!
维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授？这位可不是说合影就合影的男人…但不妨试试看。
Professor Veritas Ratio? He's not the kind of person that will just take a group picture when asked... But why not give it a try?
他根本没接你的电话，短信也没回复——教授或许正在上课，还是算了吧。
He never even picked up the phone. He didn't reply to your message, either... Forget it. Maybe he's teaching a class right now.
噢，真可惜…那你快去多交点朋友吧。
Ah, that's a shame... Better go and make some more friends, then!
接下来是第二个孔位。符合这个要求的人可不多，你得好好想想了。
Next is the second slot. There aren't many people that would meet the requirements for this one. You'll need to think carefully.
这位卜者一定很乐于接受你的邀请——尤其是上班时间内——但希望那位太卜能放她一马。
I'm sure the diviner would be more than happy to accept your invitation... Especially if it is during work hours... Let's just hope the Master Diviner lets her get away for a moment.
我来啦！哟，正好四个孔啊…来一盘帝垣琼玉吗？
I'm here! Ah, there are exactly four slots... Fancy a game of Celestial Jade?
如不出意外，这位持明女孩现在应该在丹鼎司深宫中仰望天空…她真的有办法溜之大吉吗？
If everything is as usual, the young Vidyadhara girl is most likely at the Alchemy Commission depths, looking at the sky... Do you think she'll be able to sneak away?
小菜一碟！这就是传说中的美梦乐园吗？真厉害……
Piece of cake! So this is the legendary Sweetdream Paradise? Amazing...
...We should expect no less of her...
邀请星核猎手？这可真是个绝妙的主意。
Invite a Stellaron Hunter? That's an amazing idea!
「很忙，在团战，」她听起来既咬牙切齿又敷衍，「下次一定。」看来你今天是没机会了。
"I'm busy, in a raid." She sounds like she's speaking through gritted teeth and trying to get the conversation finished quickly. "Next time for sure." Looks like you're out of luck for today.
黑塔女士…哈，要是能请得动她，算你厉害。
Madam Herta... Ah, I'd like to see you trying to get her to come...
果然，她没接电话。意料之内。
As expected, she didn't pick up the phone. No surprise there.
你还真是锲而不舍。但黑塔就是黑塔，你明白她是怎样的一位奇女子……
You sure are persistent. But, Herta is Herta. You know what kind of quirky lady she is...
…一阵漫长的忙音后，你期待中的声音果然没有响起。这很黑塔。
...After what seemed like endless ringing, the voice you were waiting for never came to the phone. Typical Herta.
收手吧，朋友。黑塔女士是绝对不可能……
Let it go, friend. Herta will never come...
哎，真受不了…要拍快点拍，我很忙的。
Ah, you just don't give up! ...If you're taking the picture then take it. I'm busy!
哈哈…真是太阳打西边出来了。
Haha... Well well, I never thought I'd live to see such a day!
姬子小姐？为什么？她可是星穹列车最尊贵的领航员，而且身高明明…呃，没事，你说了算。
Miss Himeko? Why? She is the most respected navigator on the Astral Express? Plus, her height is clearly... Ah, never mind. You're the boss.
呵呵，原来是想要合影…没问题。怎么样，我对准了吗？
Hehe, you want to take a picture together... No problem! Well, am I in the right spot?
天啊，姬子小姐永远这么优雅又善解人意。
My, my... Miss Himeko is always so elegant and understanding.
来到第三个孔位…相信你一定能找到合适的人选。
It's time for the third slot... I just know you'll think of a suitable candidate for this.
丹恒！当然了，列车组的智库管理员兼你的好伙伴怎么能错过这种好事？
Dan Heng! Of course, the data bank administrator of the Astral Express and your good friend. How could he miss out on this?
卡芙卡，你生命中既熟悉又陌生的那个女人…也许她会答应你的请求。
Kafka, the lady in your life that you are both familiar with and yet don't know at all... Perhaps she will agree to your invitation.
「对不起，我正在执行任务，」她的声音依旧温柔，「但你一定要玩得开心，好吗？」噢…真是太可惜了。
"Sorry, I'm on a mission right now." Her voice is as soft and gentle as ever. "But I hope you have a great time!" Ah... That's a real shame.
那位巡海游侠…或者别的什么隐世高手。不知道她现在正身在何方？
The Galaxy Ranger... Or secret master or whatever. I wonder where she is right now?
用镜头记录眼前的一瞬…真是新奇的体验。
Using a lens to record a moment before your very eyes... What a novel experience!
真不知道这种既新奇又复古的文旅项目能否重燃判官大人对生活的热爱。
I wonder if this kind of novel-yet-retro tourist activity would be able to reignite the judge's passion for life?
啊，能在这儿站一会什么也不做真是太好了，而且还是离因果殿这么远的地方，一想到要回去继续工作我就忍不住希望这一刻能永远永远永远持续下去……

It's so good to stand here and do nothing. And this is so far away from the Hall of Karma. The mere thought of having to return to mountains of criminal reports makes me wish I could stand here for ever and ever and ever...
…这段台词真的很眼熟。也许是错觉吧。
...That script seemed a little familiar. Maybe I'm imagining it.
神秘优雅的黑天鹅…没准她现在就在这里，只是没显形呢。
The mysterious and elegant Black Swan... She might even already be here. She just hasn't shown herself.
我还在猜你什么时候会想起我呢…谢谢你，亲爱的。
I was wondering when you would think of me... Thank you, dear.
…她果然真就在这里。一语成谶。
...She really was already here. Seriously, speak of the Devil...
最后一个孔位。漫长的选择题就要结束了，加油！
This is the final slot. The lengthy selection process is almost over. Keep going!
还犹豫什么？这种场合当然得有三月七！
What are you waiting for? Of course March 7th needs to be here for something like this!
就是说…能不能给咱换个好看点的立牌？
I mean... Can we swap this for a prettier photo board?
相信这位热情似火的仙舟女孩一定不想错过这么热闹的场合。
That Xianzhou girl with her fiery passion would not want to miss out on a lively scene like this!
呀，这么多家人都来啦？让小桂子我好好拗个造型……
Ah, all the fam are here? Let me pull a cute pose...
天才俱乐部的阮•梅女士…记得你只和她有过一面之缘。
Madam Ruan Mei of the Genius Society... You've only met her once!
电话里传来「您呼叫的用户不在服务区」的声音。不知道这位天才女士是不是又找到了一处适合研究的世外桃源。
"The number you have called is currently out of the service area." I wonder if this genius lady has stumbled across another off-world research paradise...
冰冷的仙舟机巧少女会接到你的电话吗？
Do you think the cold Xianzhou ingenium girl will accept your call?
电话始终无人接听。看来她那副棺材隔音真的很好。
The call was never answered. Her coffin must be really well sound-proofed!
终于！想要凑齐这么多人可真不容易。是时候为大家合影了！
Finally! Getting this many people together is no mean feat. It's time to take a group picture!
尽管面对镜头微笑对一些人来说真的很难，但你还是收获了一张绝好的合影。
Though staring into a lens and smiling is very difficult for some people, you still managed to get a wonderful group picture.
（大家都回去了…和朋友们偶尔这样聚一聚也不错嘛。）
(Everyone has gone back... It's nice to get together with friends like this now and then, isn't it?)
（大家都回去了…列车组难得能在这种场合聚在一起，真好。）
(Everyone has gone back... It's not often that the Express Crew gets to get together like this, that was lovely.)
一幅仓鼠球主题的挖洞合影立牌。你可以呼朋唤友，让他们把自己美貌的脸庞摆在合适的位置，与卡通立牌产生奇妙的化学反应，然后用相机记录下来。

A group photo board with face slots, featuring a Hamster Ball theme. You can call your friends and get them to place their beautiful faces in the appropriate slots to facilitate wondrous chemical reactions with the cartoon board. Then use your camera to record it!
机会难得，你想让你的朋友们试试看吗？
As you're here already, do you want to call your friends to give it a try?
第一个孔位！满足这个身高要求的人可不算多，仔细想想吧。
The first slot! There aren't many people that would meet the height requirements for this. Have a good think...
不知道艾丝妲的空间站和你哪个更重要……
I wonder if you are more important than Asta's space station...?
我来了，{NICKNAME}。这是要我…合影么？
I'm here, {NICKNAME}. You want... to take a picture together?
恭喜你，看来确实是你更重要。
Congratulations! It seems you are more important.
少年任侠彦卿…你身为「老师」，他应该没有理由拒绝你的邀请。
The young and chivalrous Yanqing... As his teacher, he should have no reason to refuse your invitation.
又见面了，老师！别担心，我这次远行有将军特许…只要晚上训练前能回到罗浮便是。
We meet again, teacher! Fear not, I have special permission from the general for this trip... I just have to be back to the Luofu in time for evening training.
噢，真可惜…那你快去多交点朋友吧。
Ah, that's a shame... Better go and make some more friends, then!
接下来是第二个孔位，也是最后一个孔位。满足这个条件的人倒是不少，你可以仔细想想。
Next, the second and final slot... There are a lot more people that meet the requirements for this one, so think carefully.
姬子小姐！当然了，列车组的领航员怎么能错过这种好事？
Miss Himeko! Of course, how could the Express Crew navigator miss out on a treat like this?
呵呵，原来是想要合影…没问题。
Hehe, so you wanted to take a group picture... No problem.
卡芙卡，你生命中既熟悉又陌生的那个女人…也许她会答应你的请求。

...That script seemed a little familiar. Maybe I'm imagining it.

...She really was already here. Seriously, speak of the Devil...

Finally! Getting this many people together is no mean feat. It's time to take a group picture!
尽管面对镜头微笑对一些人来说真的很难，但你还是收获了一张绝好的合影。
Though staring into a lens and smiling is very difficult for some people, you still managed to get a wonderful group picture.
（大家都回去了…和朋友们偶尔这样聚一聚也不错嘛。）
(Everyone has gone back... It's nice to get together with friends like this now and then, isn't it?)
这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，请留步，容我为您介绍一下我的信仰——伟大的桶王，庇护万千桶的桶之神。
{F#Miss}{M#Sir}, please stay and allow me to introduce you to my faith — the mighty King of Cans, the God of Cans who shelters thousands of cans.
祂倾倒在寰宇间，九千只眼睛在三万个桶与六万只手臂上闪烁。其伟力令桶不再锈蚀，其注视让无机物生意盎然。

Admired by the universe, THEIR nine thousand eyes blink on the thirty thousand cans and sixty thousand arms. THEIR greatness prevents the cans from rusting, and THEIR gaze causes the inorganic things to flourish.
当然，无论是金桶银桶垃圾桶还是马桶，桶王平等地看待所有子民。
Of course, regardless of whether they are golden cans, silver cans, trashcans, or dirty cans, the King of Cans treats all the people the same.
呃…在我们的教义里，星神也不过是桶王的化身，有相似之处很正常！
Ugh... In our teachings, Aeons are just incarnations of the King of Cans. Of course, they will have some similarities!
看到我身旁的这个铁桶了吗？这就是桶王在人间的圣物，是祂踏上「桶」之命途前锈蚀的神体。
Did you see the iron can beside me? It is the King of Cans' divine object left in the mortal realm, a rusted holy body before THEY embarked on THEIR destiny as a "Can."
只要诚心诚意地信仰桶王，你的任何愿望都会实现，所有疾病都会痊愈。哪怕是随便摸摸这个铁桶，神体也会为你带来好运。

By sincerely believing in the King of Cans, all your wishes will come true and all your diseases will be cured. Even if you are casually touching this iron can, THEIR holy body will bring you good luck.
肤浅！桶王是这样的神吗？祂是在拯救你们！金钱是邪恶的，你所遭遇的一切不幸，都来源于这份有毒的诅咒。
How shallow! Is that how you see our King of Cans? THEY are saving you! Money is the root of all evil. All your misfortune originates from that toxic curse.
所以桶王降下祂的神体，只要把钱投进这个铁桶，祂就会代你承受对应的苦难。
That's why the King of Cans made THEIR holy body descend. You just need to insert your money into this iron can, and THEY will bear the suffering on your behalf.
那还能有假？要不我这第一门徒的身份哪儿来的？
Do you not believe in me? How do you think I've become THEIR first disciple?
Mommy, I want to become a trashcan!
要的就是你这股热情！不过垃圾桶这个，确实要求有点高。
That's the enthusiasm I need! However, turning into a trashcan is a bit of a tall order.
没错，纵观整个银河，还有哪位神明像桶王一般视子民为己出。
Exactly. Throughout the entire Cosmos, which other gods regarded THEIR people as THEIR own like the King of Cans?
每个人其实都是桶，只是套上了人类的躯壳。当你走上铁桶命途的道路，就会褪去伪装，呈现出真实的姿态。
Every person is just a can wearing the shell of a human. The moment you embark onto the iron can's Path, your disguise will fade away, revealing your true self.
等全人类都变成了铁桶，真正的天堂就会降临。
When the entire human population becomes iron cans, the real paradise will descend.
来吧，走出你的第一步，让我大赚——我是说，成为桶王的第二位门徒。
Come on. Take your first step, and let me get rich — I mean, let me guide you to become the second disciple of the King.
只要<unbreak>1000</unbreak>苜蓿币，你就能更早地变成铁桶，抵达祂的身边。
All you need is to insert <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits into the can, and you'll be able to turn into an iron can and reach THEM earlier.
Give some money and see what happens.
没错，就是这样！我能看到，你身上的罪孽已被神体吞进了肚子。
Yes, that's it! I can see your sins have been swallowed into the holy body.
桶王的呼唤会在每夜伴你安详入眠。
The calling of the King of Cans will accompany you every night to a peaceful sleep.
你这不识好歹的家伙！侮辱我，就是在侮辱伟大的桶王。
What an ungrateful scoundrel! Insulting me is the same as insulting our mighty King of Cans.
也就是祂老人家慈悲为怀，否则你绝对看不到明天的太阳！
You should be thankful that THEY are compassionate and forgiving, or you will never see the sun tomorrow!
亲爱的朋友，愿桶王的光辉照耀你我。
My dear friend, may the light of the King of Cans shine upon you and me.
我编得应该够逼真了呀…再想办法改改。
My story should be credible enough... I should try to improve it.
真高兴见到你，桶王的第二门徒。
I am happy to see you, Second Disciple of the King of Cans.
瞧瞧眼前这令人喜悦的景象，人们摒弃了种种不净之物，投身于桶王门下。
Look at this delightful sight! Humans are discarding various impurities in their lives and devote themselves to the King of Cans.
我能感觉到，自己的身体正愈发接近祂的国度，头颅化作桶盖，躯体化作桶身。
I can feel my body gradually getting nearer to THEM. My head shall turn into a can lid, and my body shall become a can.
要再来摸摸神体吗？不再需要钱了，铁桶之神宽恕了我的罪行，赐予所有人触摸神体的权力。
Are you here to touch the holy body again? There's no need to insert credits now. The God of Iron Can has forgiven my sins and granted all humans the right to touch THEIR holy body.
这是什么意思？难道你看不见吗？铁桶之神那投射在天空中的宏伟虚影。
What do you mean? Can't you see it? The grandiose silhouette of the God of Iron Can was projected in the sky.
You have improved on your tricks.
在桶王的福音下，我已经洗心革面，再也不会欺骗他人了。
With the teachings of the King of Cans, I've changed my ways and will never cheat others again.
Oh yeah? I don't believe you.
桶王并不会因为你的质疑就消失，祂是永恒的，并永恒地爱着我们。
The King of Cans will not disappear because of your disbelief. THEY are eternal and will love us forever.
我现在才知道，并非是我杜撰了这位神明——是我被选中了，所以才知晓了祂的一切！
Now I realize that it's not me who has chosen this God — I am the chosen one, and this is why I know everything about THEM.
他说的没错，我正是目睹了桶王的身姿，才从灵感匮乏里走出来，通过了编辑的审核！
This guy is right. I witnessed the form of the King of Cans, who rescued me from my lack of inspiration, and my work went through to the editor!
触摸了神体之后，我在赌场连赢了三回，又有钱买酒喝了。
After touching the holy body, I won three times in a row at the casino. I now have the money to buy booze again.
看啊，桶王听到了我们的赞美，祂正在注视我们！
Look, the King of Cans heard our praises for THEM. THEY are gazing at us!
That is not the King of Cans.
是不是桶王，我们看得一清二楚。莫要在这里妖言惑众，否则你必永堕桶底之狱。
We can tell with our own eyes whether that is the King of Cans. Stop spouting nonsense here, or you'll be punished at the bottom of the can for eternity.
非也，我们是觉醒了！从桶盖的缝隙中察觉到了世界的本质！
No. We are awakened! We can now perceive the nature of the world through the cracks in the lid of the can!
I am the King of Cans.
荒谬！你的外貌跟桶毫无关系，灵长目的古怪的身体怎能与桶王光滑完美的圆柱神躯相提并论！
Absurdity! Your appearance is nothing like a can. How could an odd-shaped primate body be compared to the King of Cans' smooth and perfect cylindrical body?
朋友，我对你很失望，竟然对我们的神如此不敬！
My friend, I am very disappointed in you. How can you show such disrespect to our God!?
但我不会谴责你对桶王的背叛，迷茫只是一时的，你终会通过这场试炼，回到桶王的怀抱。
But I will not condemn your betrayal of the King of Cans. Your confusion is only temporary. You'll eventually pass this trial and return to the arms of our King of Cans.
或许，你会成为比我更虔诚的信徒，成为一个优秀的铁桶，厉害的金桶，强大的垃圾桶！
Perhaps you'll become a more devout disciple than I am, becoming an excellent iron can, an astounding gold can, or even a powerful trashcan!
伟大的桶王！让我们变成铁桶吧！
Mighty King of Cans! Please turn us into iron cans!
伟大的桶王啊，让我变成铁桶吧！
Oh, mighty King of Cans. Turn me into an iron can!
这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，请留步，容我为您介绍一下我的神主，伟大的铁桶贤者，掌管世间财富的桶之神。
{F#Miss}{M#Sir}, please stay and allow me to introduce you to my Great One — the Sage of Iron Cans, the God of Cans who controls the wealth of the world.
祂有着绝美的面容，四只手臂分别掌管金属、纸币、货物和能源。这个铁桶，便是掌管金属的那只手亲自赐福的神体。
THEY have a stunningly charming face, and THEIR four arms are in charge of metal, paper money, goods, and energy. And this iron can is the holy body blessed by the arm that governs metal.
是你呀，一下子没认出来。
Oh, it's you! I didn't recognize you for a second.

Thank you for your feedback. I realized that I was awful at making up stories, and the King of Cans doesn't sound like a good scam... for making money.
所以我总结了经验教训，借鉴了现存星神的形象和宣传词，连夜赶制了这个全新版本。人形，好看，人气绝对低不了。

So I've summarized the lessons learned from my experience, and with reference to the existing Aeons' images and promotional messages, I burned the midnight oil to come out with this all-new version. With this charming appearance, their popularity can never be low.

偶像这是市场需求，市场你懂吗？大家就好这口。
An idol is what the market demands. Do you understand what's the market? Everyone likes this.

家族的人要是能追杀我到这儿来，我倒立喝苏乐达给你看。
If the members of The Family are capable of coming here to punish me, I would drink SoulGlad upside down for you.

那是什么玩意儿，听着就感觉不如铁桶贤者霸气。

对吧！我们铁桶之神，也是要注重公众形象的。
Right! Even as a God of Iron Can, public image is important too.
额，抛开部分特殊爱好，整体来说银河巨星还是更受欢迎的。
Eh, putting unique hobbies aside, a cosmic superstar is still more popular overall.
总之，诈骗就像炒股，一个路数行不通就得换一个更吃香的。

嘿嘿，腰缠万贯的明天已经在向我招手了。
Hehe, I can already see tomorrow's loaded wallet beckoning me.

Hehe, I can already see tomorrow's loaded wallet beckoning me.

原始梦境并不稳定，迷因的诞生和死去都更加频繁，在信徒们都失去意识后，大概会很快消亡吧。

The Primordial Dreamscape isn't stable, yet the frequency of the births and deaths of memes is increasing. Once the disciples have all lost consciousness, they will probably all dissipate very rapidly.
或许过段日子，你就能在哪里看到一大群失忆的人突然出现的新闻。
Maybe you'll see the news reporting about a large group of people with amnesia suddenly appearing somewhere on the street sometime later.
在梦的深处，九千只眼睛的桶王沉睡着，等待着全人类变成铁桶的那天。
In the depth of the dream, the nine-thousand-eyed King of Cans slumbers, waiting for the day when all of mankind is turned into iron cans.
你在铁桶内发现了一个小小的梦泡，不知道是哪个帮派的手笔。
In the iron can, you discover a tiny dream bubble. You wonder which lineage made it.
触摸到它的瞬间，微妙的信息也跟着传入你的脑海。
The moment you touch it, a subtle message is delivered into your head.
上面记录了「桶的令使」的诸多罪行，包括对流梦礁居民行诈、造谣「钟表匠」长得和桶一样、在酒吧赊账不还等共计十余条内容。

The message records the dozens of crimes committed by the Emanator of Cans, including extorting money from the Dreamflux Reef residents, spreading rumors that the Watchmaker's appearance is similar to that of a can, and failing to pay the bills at the bar.
想不到这小子还挺「多才多艺」的，呵，真是罪有应得。
It seems like that fellow is pretty "talented." Welp, he's getting what he deserves.
Praise the mighty King of Cans!
I want to turn into an iron can!
看来，他们已经完全被自己创造的迷因蛊惑住了。

由众人意识产生的铁桶「神」，祂会成长到何种规模？过段时间再回来看看吧。

Hey, gray hair {F#chick}{M#brat}, stop right there!
不等你有所反应，角落里立刻蹦出来几个人将你团团围住。
Before you have a chance to react, a group of people jump out from around the corner and surround you.
湮厄鹰来了拔毛，赤羽狼过了剥皮——「流梦帮」在此！
We'd pluck the Torment Eagles bald if they cross here, and skin the Redfeather Wolves if they dare to pass... We are the Dreamflux Gang!
到了我们的地盘，是走是留，你说的可就不算了——过路费，<unbreak>2000</unbreak>苜蓿币。
You're on our turf. To stay or go ain't your call no more... You gotta pay the toll. Hand over <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits.

当然，墙上的涂鸦就是我们的产权证明。
Of course. The graffiti on these walls is our property deed.
Can I buy a monthly subscription?

Huh? You think this is some kinda amusement park run by the Alfalfa? This is a robbery, {F#girl}{M#boy}!
流梦礁可是「原初梦境」，你要是在这儿出了事，可别想像美梦里一样全身而退。
Remember, Dreamflux Reef is the Primordial Dreamscape... If ya get into trouble here, don't think ya'll be gettin' out without a scratch like in a dream.
我了解你们这些闯进来的宾客，两千对你们根本算不上什么，能用这点钱买来平安，是笔很划算的买卖。
I know you intrudin' travelers. Two thousand ain't nothin' to you! A little bit of petty change for safety ain't a bad deal if you ask me.

Or you could fight back. But, if you do... then ya won't have money or a life!

明智的选择——苜蓿币不方便的话，我们也支持信用点支付。

识相的{F#小妞}{M#小子}，期待你的下次光临。

If ya wanna join the Dreamflux Gang, ya have to learn our secret signal... Our assessments are super strict y'know, don't go runnin' off now!
识相的{F#小妞}{M#小子}，期待你的下次光临。

我们向来秉承公平打劫的原则，绝不区别对待任何的过路人。
We uphold the principle of fair robbery and never give any passerby special treatment.

上次打劫后，我们学习了同行的先进经验，对单次额度进行了一定的上调。
After the last robbery, we learned from the experience of our peers n' increased our quota by a set value.
都是老熟人了，我也不多说什么，赶快交钱走人，大家都轻松。
We know each other by now, I ain't gonna keep explainin'. Pay the money n' scram n' we can all relax.
Alright, <unbreak>3,000</unbreak>. If I've got anything, it's money!
回头客就是爽快，这次还是信用点支付可以吧？

别打了，别打了，再打就要痛醒了。
Stop, stop! Beat us any harder n' we'll be beaten awake!
英雄，挨了你这一顿胖揍我算明白了，为什么我们流梦帮的业务一直没法做大做强——就是缺少一位和你一样智慧与力量并存的靠山。
O hero, this beatin' ya gave us has made me realize why the Dreamflux Gang's business ain't able to get bigger n' stronger... It's 'cos we're missin' a powerful n' intelligent backer like you!
在此，我诚恳地邀请你加入我们，让流梦帮的事业更上一层楼。
I'd like to sincerely invite ya to join us n' help the Dreamflux Gang's business reach the next level.

不不不，是被你的个人魅力与实力深深地折服了！
No, no, it's not that! We are simply just bowled over by ya strength n' charm!

Cross yer arms, spread 'em out, hands on your hips — you got that? Let's start the exam now.

虽然你这幅样子很适合去撑场子，但现在是做暗号的时候吧！

嗯，做的不错，充分传达了我们对家族的愤恨！
Yeah, not bad! It really conveys our rage toward The Family!
Put your hands on your hips.
这是下一个动作，你急什么？

同学，考试的时候不要掏手机出来！
Students should know there ain't no playin' with phones durin' an exam!
很好，短短一个动作，就诠释出了我们对流梦礁现状的无奈……
Real nice. That short, simple gesture expresses our helplessness at the current state of Dreamflux Reef...
你是我教过最好的学生，最后一个动作了，加油！
You're the best student I've ever taught! Last one. Ya got this!
我们不是在梦里吗？你怎么睡得着的？

也不知道该不该说恭喜，现在你也是流梦帮的一员了。有什么需要的，都可以来找我们，咱们帮派得互帮互助才行。
I'm not sure if I should say congratulations, but yer now a member of the Dreamflux Gang. If ya need anythin', come find us. We gang members gotta help each other out!
也不知道该不该说恭喜，现在你也是流梦帮的一员了。有什么需要的，都可以来找我们，咱们帮派得互帮互助才行。
I'm not sure if I should say congratulations, but yer now a member of the Dreamflux Gang. If ya need anythin', come find us. We gang members gotta help each other out!
Cross arms, arms spread, hands on hips.
看来你已经很熟悉我们的暗号了。
Looks like you're now real familiar with the secret signal.
Hands on hips, arms spread, cross arms.
做错了，你还是得多多学习啊。
That ain't right. Ya gotta study a bit more!
咱们虽然生活落魄，但仪式感还是要有的。
We may be pretty down'n'out, but we still need to have a sense of ceremony, y'know.
别看我们现在这么不靠谱，流梦帮以前可是这条街的守护者——那时的流梦礁还有很多居民，大家自发地组成帮派，响应「钟表匠」的号召守卫流梦礁的自由。

Don't judge us by what we look like now. The Dreamflux Gang used to be the guardians of this street... There were loads of citizens in Dreamflux Reef back then, so we responded to the call of the Watchmaker n' formed a gang on our own to protect the freedom of Dreamflux Reef.
我们帮派当初都是被美梦放逐的犯人，但「钟表匠」却接纳了我们，还帮我们找到了谋生的工作……
Our gang was made up of convicts who had been exiled by the dream world. But the Watchmaker accepted us and helped us find jobs to make a living...
托他的福，有人开了面包店、有人当了服务员、而我成了个教人防身的老师…呵呵，但你看看我现在的样子，已经不配被称为老师了。
Thanks to him, some people opened bakeries, some became waiters, and I became a self-defense teacher... Hah, but look at me now, I ain't worthy to call myself a teacher no more.
但美梦对流梦礁的侵蚀每天都在加剧，我们短暂的幸福逐渐化作泡影，那位「钟表匠」也…随着流梦礁逐渐破败，大家都纷纷离开了这里。

But the dream's corrosion of Dreamflux Reef got worse by the day... Our short-lived happiness gradually transformed into empty bubbles. Then, the Watchmaker... Well, everyone started leavin' as Dreamflux Reef started to fall apart.
没了客人，没了工作，没了家，我们就成了流浪街头的一窝老鼠，只能靠敲诈勒索为生。像我们这样的流浪者，在流梦礁比比皆是。
No customers, no work, no homes... We became a nest of rats relyin' on extortion to survive. Vagrants like us are all over the place in Dreamflux Reef.
你说，现在的流梦礁，真的还有药可救吗？
Do you think there's anythin' we can do to save Dreamflux Reef now?
You should unify the people first.
你说得对…如果我们能集合所有在城区流浪的居民，或许就能改变这里的现状。
You're right... If we can gather all the residents roamin' the city, maybe we can change things 'round here.
You should gather your resources first.
的确，把分散的资源集中起来，就能有效降低流浪生活的成本。
You're right. If we gather our scattered resources, we can effectively lower the cost of life.
你说的很有道理，我们也可以用涂鸦来宣传自己的理念，但启动资金怎么办？
You've got a point. We could also use our graffiti to spread our ideals. But how're we gonna get the funds to kick the whole thing off?
Make dream bubbles to earn money!
和其他帮派抢梦泡市场？我们几个都上过学，如果条件允许，做出的产品应该可以达到安全出售的合法标准。
Compete with other gangs on the dream bubble market? We've all been to school... If the conditions are right, the stuff we make can probably meet the legal safety standards for sale.
Go to the real world to earn money.
对哦，干嘛只把视线放在梦里呢？去现实赚了钱再回来，虽然苦了点，但总好过抢劫。
You're right. Why are we puttin' all our focus only on the dream world? Going back to the real world to earn cash might be a bit more work, but it's better than robbin'!
Steal from the rich to give to the poor!
劫富…伙计，这块地界的人都穷得响叮当，一条街的全部家当都比不上一位贵宾的钱包——还是再想想有没有其他办法吧。
The rich... Buddy, everyone in this area is dirt poor. Ya could add up the money of everyone on one street n' they ain't even gonna match a VIP's wallet... We might need another approach...
经你这么一说，我终于想明白了，太感谢你了！
After talkin' to ya, I finally know what to do. I'm so grateful!
伙计，你不仅没有因为抢劫记恨我们，反而给大家指了一条明路…在你身上，我看到了「钟表匠」先生当年的影子！
Buddy, not only didn't ya hate us for robbin' ya, ya even guided us on the right path... Seein' ya now, I can see mister Watchmaker inside ya!
不管你同不同意，从今往后，你就是我们流梦帮的老大了！
Whether ya agree or not, from now on, you're gonna be the Dreamflux Gang's boss!
老大，我们已经商量过了未来的计划，很快就能付诸实践了。
Boss, we've been discussin' our future plans, n' we're almost ready to put'em into practice.
老大，你终于回来了！根据你的建议，我们已经从抢劫犯毕业了！
Boss, yer finally back! Thanks to yer suggestion, we've finally moved on from bein' robbers!
赚到钱之后，我们也拾起了以前的工作，去帮居民解决生活问题，抓捕偷鸡摸狗的犯人，甚至来打扫这条街道的卫生…大家也不会觉得我们是坏人了。

Once we got our cash, we went back to our old jobs. We helped the residents deal with their problems, captured all the pesky criminals n' even cleaned up the street... People don't think we're bad guys no more, either!
很多无家可归的居民看到了我们的成功，也打算加入其中——以后，这里就是所有流浪者们的家了，我们会重拾曾经的责任，维护流梦礁的和平与安全。

A load of the homeless locals have seen our success n' wanna join us too... In the future, this'll be a home for all vagrants. We will take up our old responsibility n' maintain the peace n' safety of Dreamflux Reef!
那位米凯先生说，如果「钟表匠」看到了这一切，一定会为我们感到骄傲的…这都是老大你的功劳！
That Micah guy said that if the Watchmaker could see us now, he'd be real proud of us... This is all thanks to you, boss!
为了感谢老大，我们特地用赚到的第一桶金给你买了份礼物…东西很便宜，还希望你不要嫌弃。
To thank you, we used our first profits to buy ya a gift... It ain't nothin' fancy, so we hope ya don't mind.
老大，有空了记得常回来看看，大伙都很想你！
Boss, make sure ya come back n' see us when ya get time! We're all gonna miss ya!
老大，我们整合了几条街的资源，办了个小学校，我又能给孩子们上课了！
Boss, we pulled together resources from the whole block n' put together a little school! I can teach kids again!
虽然现在还没几个学生，但以后肯定会越来越多的。
There ain't many students at the moment, but there will only be more n' more in the future!
老大，你不在的这段时间，我的厨艺可是大有进步，连隔壁街的奶奶吃了都说好。
Boss, my cookin's really improved since ya been away. Even that old lady on the next street over said it was good!
等有空了，你也来尝尝我的手艺。
You gotta come try my cookin' when ya get a minute!
老大，米凯先生说，如果我们缺什么东西，都可以找他商量。
Boss, Mr. Micah said that if we need anythin', we can go talk to him.
你说，咱们现在是不是成正规组织了？
Does that mean we're like a proper organization now?
老大好，我是新加入的流浪者，以前在这片地界搞点小偷小摸的营生。
Hey, boss! I'm a new member. I used to get up to some petty theft 'round these parts.
不得不说，作为一个守法公民，重新得到尊重的感觉可真好。
I gotta say, it feels real good bein' a law-abidin' citizen n' winnin' back the respect of others.
老大好，初次见面，我是垃圾场的拾荒者，大家都叫我「小旋风」。
Hey, boss! Nice to meet ya. I'm a scavenger at the garbage dump. Everyone calls me "Little Tornado."
你有没有发现，周围的臭味都消失了？那可都是我的功劳哦。
Don't know if ya noticed that the stench 'round here has disappeared? That was my hard work!
啊！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，请允许我直视你的光辉，你的身躯比超新星还要耀眼，你的美德就连旅过千星的苦修者也无法企及。

Ah! {F#Madam}{M#Sir}, please allow me to get a good look at your brilliance! Your body is more dazzling than a supernova! Not even an ascetic who has traveled many stars could aspire to match your virtue!
一看到你，我的心里就像下了场两百万年的雨，苦寒的坚冰也化作生机的雨林。
One look at you and it feels like two million years of rain has fallen on my heart, and what was once bitterly cold and frozen has thawed to form a vibrant rainforest!
能在此时此刻相见于此地，想必也是神主希佩在可怜我的遭遇。
Meeting you here, I am certain that the Great One Xipe is taking pity on me for my tough times.
Get to the point or put a cap on it.
好一位心直口快的英豪，那我也长话短说——你听过「苏乐达海选」吗？
Such a direct and outspoken hero! Then I shall make a long story short... Have you heard of the SoulGlad Auditions?
这场海选在我们汽水界，就像你们的「盛会海选」一样有名。
The SoulGlad Auditions are to the soda world what the Festivity Auditions are to you.
全匹诺康尼最具优秀的苏乐达齐聚一堂，在疯狂的厮杀中选拔出「巨星苏乐达」。
The most outstanding SoulGlads in all of Penacony are gathered together and engage in a vicious battle to find the SoulGlad Superstar.
我本应是这届海选当之无愧的第一名，可我的死对头花了重金，在赛前请了一打包装精致的玫瑰小酒杯，诱惑我打开了瓶盖，将汽水倒入温柔乡中……

I was a shoo-in for first place this year, but one of my arch-competitors spent a fortune and hired a crate of fine rose wine bottles that seduced me into popping my cap, and pouring all of my contents into the embrace of sweetness...
等我反应过来，我最大的竞争优势——强悍的炸裂气泡已经空空如也了！
When I realized what had happened, my biggest competitive edge — my powerful bursting bubbles — were all gone!
{F#好姐姐}{M#好哥哥}，大赛在即，你忍心看到一瓶心怀高远的苏乐达就此折戟吗？
{F#Kind lady}{M#Kind sir}, the competition is imminent, can you really bear to see a SoulGlad with such lofty aspirations fall flat like this?
You want me to buy you a pressurizer?
You want me to buy you a gas pump?
现在谈这些已经来不及了，没气的苏乐达就只是瓶发腻的糖浆，但我有个古典主义的方法。
There's no time for such things now. A bottle of SoulGlad that has lost its fizz is nothing more than a bottle of gross syrup. But, I have a more traditional solution.
你来骂我，骂得越难听越好。
I want you to insult me, the harsher the better!
当愤怒达到顶点，压力膨胀，大量的气体就会从我的瓶中喷涌而出。靠着这股怒气，我便会获得无尽的气泡，一举拿下海选的桂冠。

When my anger reaches its peak, the pressure will build up and a huge amount of air will come bursting forth from my bottle. With this rage, I'll obtain infinite bubbles and snatch the audition crown!
Bring it on. Insult me to my face!
That doesn't sound like a good idea...
This is for my future. I have no problem!
等等，我得先整理一下仪表——作为未来的巨星苏乐达，挨骂也不能缺少仪式感。
Hold on, let me groom myself a little... As the future SoulGlad Superstar, I must learn to face even insults with a sense of ceremony.
苏乐达瓶子狰狞地扭动了几下，但你完全看不出变化。
The SoulGlad bottle wriggles about grotesquely a few times, but you can't see a difference at all.
这种「看起来做了什么，但其实什么也没做」的做法，可能也是一种仪式感。
Perhaps this method of "looking like it's doing something but actually did nothing" is also part of the ceremony?
它自豪地挺起胸膛，仅剩的一点气泡咕噜噜地转动，示意你可以开始骂它了。
It puffs out its chest proudly. Its remaining few bubbles stir with a gurgle to indicate that it is ready for your insults.
{F#姐}{M#哥}，我已经做好觉悟了，让咱们速战速决。
{F#Madam}{M#Sir}, I am prepared. Let us make this a swift battle!
Get ready for a taste of hell!
Wait a second. There's no rush.
可别太久，海选马上就要开始了。
Do not make me wait too long. The auditions are about to begin.
可千万别心软，放开了骂。我能不能走进收藏展柜，成为「巨星苏乐达」，就全靠你的嘴皮子了。
Don't go getting all soft on me. Give me your worst! Whether I can enter the collection display cabinet and become the SoulGlad Superstar is counting on that mouth of yours!
你知道的，我们苏乐达的情绪都比较容易激动。所以，无论中途我出了什么问题，都不要停下来，愤怒到什么程度才能取胜，我心里有数。
As you know, us SoulGlads' emotions are quite easily stimulated. So, no matter what happens to me, you must not stop! I know how mad I have to be to take victory!
来吧，让我接受你枪林弹雨的洗礼。
Come, let me feel your baptism of bullets!
慢慢慢慢，你再缓缓，我先深呼吸一下——再深呼吸一下，苏萨先生保佑，艾迪恩老板保佑。
Wait, wait, wait, wait. Slow down. Let me take a deep breath... And another one... May Mr. Sousa bless me, may Boss Aideen bless me.
你什么档次，值得我来骂？
You think cheap trash like you is worth my insults?
不是说好的吗？这时候出尔反尔算什么意思？卑鄙无耻的人类！
I thought we had an agreement? Are you saying you're going to go back on your word after all this? You wretched, shameless human!
都说人心似水，这话简直是对水最大的侮辱——看到这些气泡了吗？它们代表我对你的愤怒和蔑视！
They say the hearts of humans are like water... But I'd say that's an insult to water! You see these bubbles? They represent my rage and contempt for you!
等等，这些气泡…原来这就是你的计策啊，我悟了！
Wait, these bubbles... So that was your plan all along? I get it!
Can you still be used to clean a toilet?
If you've got no fizz left in you, that is.
说过多少次了，苏乐达洗马桶完全是种族歧视，是对我们的污名化。
How many times have I said this? SoulGlad being used to wash toilets is a racist stereotype! It's defamation of our name!
什么东西不能洗马桶？怎么不说用反物质炸弹洗呢？干净得连马桶都不剩。
What can't be used to clean a toilet? Why not use an anti-matter grenade? That'll get it so clean there won't even be a toilet left!
该死，看看这些全新的气泡，虽然你这招很老套，但效果确实不错。
Darn it, look at these fresh bubbles. That may not have been very original, but it was effective.
What flavor do you like the most?
我？当然是冰点苏乐达，那完美地停留在冻结前一刻的危险体验。
Me? Ice SoulGlad, obviously. The danger of staying in that state just before you freeze completely is perfect!
那滋味，光是想想就…不对，你得骂我啊，得骂我！
That flavor, just thinking about it makes me... No, wait. You're supposed to insult me! Insult me!
现在我连全盛的万分之一都达不到，再来！
I'm not even one ten-thousandth of my full fizz right now. Try again!
苏乐达企业真是没良心。
骂我就骂我，说到我的生产商头上就过分了，苏乐达招你惹你了？
If I say insult me, then insult me! Bringing my manufacturer into this is going too far. What did SoulGlad even do to you?
苏乐达企业可是匹诺康尼首屈一指的惠民企业，产品在数千年间都保持物美价廉，有没有良心你说的可不算！
The SoulGlad enterprise is one of the top public benefactors in Penacony! Their products have maintained excellent quality with low prices for millennia, and you say they are heartless!?
——哇！气泡涨了好多，瓶盖都要给我气飞了！好啊，你骂得好啊！
...Woah! That's got my bubbles going! My bottle cap is ready to burst! Alright, you know how to insult someone!
喝苏乐达考不上折纸大学！
You'll never get into Paperfold University by drinking SoulGlad!
怎么啥事都能怪苏乐达啊？考不上折纸大学跟饮料有啥关系？
Why are you blaming SoulGlad for everything? What does not getting into university have to do with a drink anyway?
那些宇宙中的补品饮料都炒到几十万信用点了，我们苏乐达只需要几张苜蓿币就能带走，你还不满足？

Those supplements and health tonics get sold for tens of thousands of credits elsewhere in the universe, but you can walk off with a bottle of SoulGlad for just a few Alfalfa credits! What is there to gripe about?
我都懒得跟你说，怕这瓶盖被气得飞出来打你脸——再多骂点！
I don't even want to keep talking to you anymore in case my cap bursts off with rage and hits you in the face... Insult me more!
那当然，这可是全苏乐达界最潮的一款瓶盖。
Of course, this is the most fashionable bottle cap style in all of the SoulGlad world.
不是——{F#姐}{M#哥}，是让你骂我，不是夸我！
No... {F#Lady}{M#Bro}, I said insult me, not compliment me!
我体内的气泡还远远不够，赶快再骂两句！
I've still got nowhere near enough bubbles in me! Hit me with another insult, quickly!
他气泡的！那是什么邪道饮料，宇宙怎么会容许如此亵渎的苏乐达存在？
What the BUBBLE!? What kind of cursed drink is that? How could the universe allow such a blasphemous SoulGlad to exist?
我要向博识学会举报，居然有疯狂科学家做出这种违背苏乐达伦理的口味。
I'm going to report this to the Intelligentsia Guild. I cannot believe that some mad scientist would defy the ethics of SoulGlad like this!
看看这些快让我炸开的气泡，我承认你编的故事让我愤怒了——你是编的吧？
Look at all these bubbles. I'm about to explode! I admit that this story you made up has angered me... You did make it up, right?
我真骂不下去，太尴尬了。
I can't insult you. It's too awkward.
哎，这大概就是我的命吧。
Ah, I guess this is just my fate...
让我看看时间——糟糕，要开场了！顾不上气泡够不够了，在台上失败总比来不及上场强。
Let me check the time... Oh no, the competition is starting! I've got no time to worry about whether I'm bubbly enough... Failing on stage is better than missing the competition!
再见，好心人，我在苏乐达地窖的颁奖台等你！
Farewell, kind soul. I shall await you at the podium in the SoulGlad cellar!
在你的注视下，这瓶上进苏乐达以一种诡异的姿态飞走了，希望它能如愿以偿吧。
Under your watchful gaze, the SoulGlad bottle flies off in a bizarre stance. Let's hope they get what they wish for.
啊…是你啊，我真没脸见你……
Ah... It's you. I can't bring myself to face you.
我和对手的差距太大了，那点愤怒补充的气泡根本不够。
The gap between my competition and me was far too big. I did not work up anywhere near enough rage bubbles.
果然，对于我们这种出身平凡的苏乐达来说，想要成为这个地窖的一员，还是太异想天开了。
I guess I was right. It's just a wild fantasy for a SoulGlad of ordinary origins like myself to become a member of this cellar.
别说是只存在于都市传说里的秘密窖藏，就连展柜里的那些前辈，也远非我所能企及。
I can't even hope to match my seniors in the display cabinet, let alone the secret cellar stash of urban legends!
唉，我已经不会再愤怒了，以后就老实做瓶没气的糖浆饮料，等着被倒进马桶吧。
Ah... I have no more rage left in me. From now on I will just live my life as a bottle of flat syrup and wait to be poured down the toilet.
我已经不会再愤怒了，以后就老实做瓶没气的糖浆饮料吧……
I have no more rage left in me. From now on I will just live my life as a bottle of flat syrup...
你来啦，骂人宗师，一起来庆祝巨星苏乐达的诞生吧！
You're here, master of insults! Let us celebrate the birth of a new SoulGlad Superstar together!
你是没看到，当时我把瓶盖一拧开，愤怒的气泡直接像燃料一样把我推上颁奖台，整个赛场都凝固了，一半的参赛苏乐达直接当场弃权了。
You weren't there to see it, but the moment I opened my cap, my bubbles of rage shot me onto the podium like rocket fuel! The entire stadium froze and half of the contestants dropped out on the spot!
哼，所谓的苏乐达地窖，也不过如此。
Hah, is this all the legendary "SoulGlad cellar" has to offer?
依我看，别说是展柜里那些跟不上时代的老东西，就连只存在于都市传说中的秘密窖藏，恐怕也早已被我超越了。
The way I see it, it's not just those outdated old folks in the display cabinet, but I've already far surpassed the level of even the secret cellar stash of urban legends!
趁我们还能聊天，让你沾沾喜气。等我进到那边的展柜，以后你就只有瞻仰的份了！
I shall allow you to bathe in my success while we are still able to talk. Once I enter that display cabinet, you will only be able to look up at me in admiration!
趁我们还能聊天，让你沾沾喜气。等我进到那边的展柜，以后你就只有瞻仰的份了！
I shall allow you to bathe in my success while we are still able to talk. Once I enter that display cabinet, you will only be able to look up at me in admiration!
Oh no oh no oh no.
这是一本手札。纸张边角已经泛黄，绝大部分手记已被红锈似的渍印污染，无从辨明。
A notebook — its corners are yellowed and the majority of the notes within have been rendered incomprehensible by some kind of red rust-like stains.
手札的内页隐隐留有疑似「知更鸟」字样的痕迹——或许与那位优雅的歌者小姐有关。
The journal's pages bear traces of what appears to be words resembling "Robin" — it could be related to that elegant songstress.
是我，知更鸟。这副面孔说话不太方便，稍等……
It's me. It's a bother talking with this face, hang on...
应该没人注意到这边，我们聊聊吧。怎么样，有什么发现吗？
I don't think anyone noticed us. Let's talk. Did you find anything?
虽然不易察觉，但你确实注意到她一时间似乎怔住了。但她很快恢复镇静，对你笑了笑——尽管声音依旧有些颤抖。
The reaction is almost imperceptible, but you definitely notice her momentary shock. She restores her composure very quickly, and flashes a smile at you — even if her voice trembles ever so slightly.
...Thank you. I will have a look.
你的脸色看起来不太好。
I... Sorry, I'm fine. Thank you, {NICKNAME}.
这是我唯一能找到的线索了。
This is the only clue I found.
这…确实是哥哥的笔迹，应该是他的东西没错。可这经文…《谐乐颂》里没有类似的记载。
This is... definitely my big brother's handwriting, it should be one of his belongings. But this scripture... The Odes of Harmony has nothing like this recorded in it.
还有…这些红色的污渍。他果然……
And... this red residue. So he really...
知更鸟只兀自低头，怔怔地看着怀里的笔记本，什么也没有说。半晌，她终于开口。
Robin simply bows her head, staring dumbly at the journal in her hands, and says nothing. She finally speaks after a long silence.
We might still be able to turn this thing around.
知更鸟只兀自低头，怔怔地看着怀里的笔记本，什么也没有说。半晌，她终于开口。
Robin simply bows her head, staring dumbly at the journal in her hands, and says nothing. She finally speaks after a long silence.
从我们在流梦礁重逢时起，我就隐隐有种预感。也许，我们的道路再也不会有交集了……
When we reunited at Dreamflux Reef, I had an ominous feeling. That maybe, our paths would not cross again...
只是…没想到这一天来得这么快呢。
It's just... I didn't expect this day to come so soon.
"Heaven's will"... Heh-heh, who said it wasn't.
What do you intend to do?
我…不知道。千头万绪，一时间实在是让人无所适从。
I... don't know. There are too many things happening, I'm too confused to process them right now.
明明我们每个人——你、我、我的哥哥、我们所有人——我们都怀抱善意，想要把每一件事做到最好，并为此拼尽全力…可这无数善意最终却只酿成了悲剧。

All of us — you, me, my brother, all of us — we obviously have nothing but kind intentions, to do the best we can in all we do, and to give it our all... but our countless kind acts only end up in tragedy.
这个世界…还真是一点都不美好啊。
This world... is really not very beautiful at all.
但我们可以让它变得更好。
But we can make it better.
你说的没错——我们还有许多能做的事。
You're right. There's plenty more we can do.
我们不可能总是如愿以偿。
We can't always get what we want.
你说的没错，不过…我们还有许多能做的事。
You're right, but... we still have much more to do.
美梦如今摇摇欲坠，许多不怀好意的人也闻风而动。眼下，我无论如何都得保护好这里，然后排除万难，把它建设得更好…哥哥也一定希望我这么做。

The dream is on the verge of collapse, and many sinister characters are raring to capitalize on the situation. I have to protect this place at all costs, cull it of all impurities, then turn it into something better... I'm sure Sunday would also want me to do so.
说到哥哥——虽然我们只找到了这本手记，但我觉得这并不能说明什么。直觉告诉我，哥哥现在肯定还好好的，就在美梦的某处…正在为我们共同的理想寻找新的出路。

Speaking of my brother... though we only found this journal, I don't think it means anything right now. My instincts tell me that he's definitely alive and well somewhere in this dream... and looking for a new way out for the ideal that we share.
毕竟…天空才是鸟儿的归宿呀。
I mean... the sky is where the birds belong.
愿你们的理想早日实现。
May your ideals come true soon.
嗯，承你吉言。我一定不会退缩的——一如既往。
Yes, I will gladly take your blessing. I'll never back down — nor have I ever.
无论结果如何，愿你不留遗憾。
No matter what, I hope you have no regrets.
嗯，但愿如此。不过…我一定不会退缩的——一如既往。
Yes, I hope so too. I'll never back down — nor have I ever.
在那之前，你得保护好自己。
But first, you have to protect yourself.
嗯，我明白。不过…我一定不会退缩的——一如既往。
Yes, I understand. But... I'll never back down — nor have I ever.
就先到这里吧，谢谢你陪我聊了这么久…估计那帮猎犬已经发觉我又偷偷溜出来了吧。
Let's leave it here for now. Thank you for chatting with me for so long... I'm guessing the Hounds have already discovered that I've slipped out.
不好意思，{NICKNAME}，我必须得回去啦。也愿「同谐」的光芒常伴你……
I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I have to return now. May the Harmony's light be with you...
话音未落，一张略微褪色的卡片便从笔记本的夹层中跌落。
Just before the last words drop, a faded card falls out from between the journal's folds.
这是…「盛会之星」系列收藏卡牌，不过是限量版。{RUBY_B#梦星娱乐}发行商{RUBY_E#}当年赠给我以示纪念，但我想它或许对哥哥更有纪念意义，就写上祝福语转赠给他了……

This is... a Planet of Festivities collectible card, but it's a limited edition. The {RUBY_B#Dreamstar Entertainment}distributor{RUBY_E#} gave it to me as a commemorative souvenir, but I thought it would mean more to my brother, so I wrote some kind words on it and gave it to him...
I also have a card that resembles this...
不，这张是…限量版。{RUBY_B#梦星娱乐}发行商{RUBY_E#}当年赠给我以示纪念，但我想它或许对哥哥更有纪念意义，就写上祝福语转赠给他了……

No, this is a... limited edition. The {RUBY_B#Dreamstar Entertainment}distributor{RUBY_E#} gave it to me as a commemorative souvenir, but I thought it would mean more to my brother, so I wrote some kind words on it and gave it to him...
呵呵，真没想到…他居然还留着这个……
Heh-heh, I never thought... he'd still have this...
她神情赧然，以一个不甚完美的微笑向你致歉，便低头掩面匆匆离去。
Her face flushes red, and with a less-than-perfect smile, she excuses herself and leaves in a fluster with a bowed head.
当你翻开略微有些滞涩的枯页，一丛光彩流溢的气泡兀自腾起。它们在空中滞留不多时便化作泡影——霎那间，朦胧的声音自你耳边响起……

When you flip that rather withered, brittle page, a burst of bubbles brimming with bright colors rises from it. They do not linger long in the air and shifts into mirages — at that moment, you hear a faint sound next to your ears...
胜者有胜者的义务。了结我…然后飞向天空吧。
The victor bears the responsibility of victory. Finish me... and fly into the sky.
我们…本该一起飞向天空的。
We were supposed... to fly into the sky together.
当你集中注意力，想要追索声音的来源时，却发现它们已于自帷幕中落下的天光中如晨雾般消散，杳无踪迹。
When you focus and try to track down the source of the sound, you only discover that they have disappeared like morning dew in the light that pours down from the curtains, fading without a trace.
哎，我当初就不该犹豫的。
*tut* I should never have hesitated in the first place.
点开页面的时候还显示「有货」，结果…选特典的时候多看了几眼，回过神来就售罄了，那些抢到《空气蛹》专辑的人都是什么速度啊。

When I opened the page, it still said "In Stock" — but... I lingered too long on the options when I was getting the deluxe edition, but by the time I went back to the order, it had already been sold out. The fans who managed to get the INSIDE album sure are fast.
家人，我理解你的心情。我是验证码输慢了点，后面就再也登不进去了，怎么刷新都没反应。
My man, I know just how you feel. I was just too slow with my verification code, and I couldn't log into the site again no matter how many times I refreshed the page.
明明都成功下单了，智械还不用识别人脸，却倒在了最后这步，我恨啊！
The order clearly went through and Intellitrons don't even need the facial recognition process, but I was defeated at the last step. I hate it!
What are you folks chatting about?
我说，你不会还不知道吧？能在梦境里引起这么大轰动的，当然只有一件事——知更鸟小姐的新专辑《空气蛹》终于发售了！
Surely you know, right? There's only one thing that could ever cause a big ruckus like this in the dreamscape, and that's Miss Robin finally releasing her new album, INSIDE!
围在这里的人群，都是知更鸟小姐的粉丝。哼，我没抢到新专辑，怎么想都是这群人的错。
All these people here are fans of Miss Robin. Hmph, seeing as I couldn't get my hands on the new album, it must be all these people's fault.
Is the album really hard to buy?
岂止是困难啊，简直比成功偷渡进匹诺康尼的概率还要低！
Hard to buy? Why, you'd probably have a better chance of smuggling yourself into Penacony!
不到半秒钟，所有商品库存都被抢光了。没办法，谁让全宇宙到处都是知更鸟小姐的歌迷呢，大家都在等这个时候。
All of the stock was sold out in less than half a second. It's just the way it is... Miss Robin has fans everywhere throughout the universe, and they've all been holding out for just this moment.
辛苦攒下来的钱，到头来却花不出去。就像我对知更鸟小姐的爱明明是如此热烈，却找不到释放的出口，心里实在憋得慌啊。

Scrimping and saving all that hard-earned cash, only for me to have nowhere to spend it. It's just like this burning passion I have for Miss Robin — there's nowhere for me to release any of it. I can't keep it bottled up inside.
还有其他的购买渠道吗？
Aren't there any other ways you can buy it?
你也是知更鸟小姐的粉丝？想买的话，当然能找到渠道，只是……
Are you a fan of Miss Robin too? If you want it, you can always find a way. It's just...
总有人要把手里囤的货出掉，但我不建议你找他们购买。想买这张专辑的粉丝很多，价格也自然水涨船高，另一方面……

You'll always find someone who's stockpiled the albums and can sell you one, but I don't recommend buying from them. So many fans want to get their hands on it that of course the price has been driven up. And also...
<size=28>我就是不愿意看那些倒卖贩子赚到钱！</size>
<size=28>I don't want to see any of those scalpers earn a single cent!</size>
还未来得及发表看法，你忽然感觉袖子被人轻轻扯了下。
Before you even get the chance to speak your mind, you suddenly feel a gentle tugging at your sleeve.
…朋友，刚到的货，知更鸟的新专辑《空气蛹》，要看看吗？
Psst, hey buddy, I just got these goods. It's Miss Robin's new INSIDE album. Wanna check it out?
正品保证，全新无划痕，非二次包装，价钱绝对公道。数量有限，先到先得！
Guaranteed legit, brand-new condition, in original packaging, and at an absolutely fair price. My stocks are limited — first come first served!
你就是倒卖专辑的人啊！
So you're the one who's been scalping records!
你不知道这是违法的吗？
嗨，这么认真干嘛，都是为了挣信用点。再说，要不是有我帮忙，你们还抢不到这张专辑呢。收不收？没兴趣我就去问其他人了。
Hey, why so serious? I'm just earning a few credits here. Besides, you'd never get a copy of the album without my help. Do you want it, or not? Otherwise I can always go ask someone else.
How much? Can you cut us a deal?
都好说！相遇就是缘，互相帮助是应该的。所以你看…原价的五倍怎么样？
No biggie! Karma brought us together. It's only right that we scratch each other's back. So then... what do you say — how about five times the sticker price?
想想，这才是你深切爱着知更鸟小姐的证明啊。你不收，有的是粉丝愿意收。
Think about it — this is how you can demonstrate your love for Miss Robin. If you don't want it, there are plenty of other fans who do.
好嘞。信用点稍后打到账户里就好。感谢惠顾！这位客人还在思考吗？
Nice. Pop the credits into my account soon and that'll be that. Thanks for the business! You there — still considering?
I—I'll... I'll also... take one... okay?
感谢惠顾！两位真是知更鸟小姐最忠实的粉丝啊，我深表尊敬。这位灰色的朋友怎么想呢？再不出手，货就要卖完咯？
Thanks for the business! You two truly are the most devoted fans of Miss Robin, and I sincerely take my hat off to you. What do you say then, my gray buddy? If you don't act soon, it'll be sold out.
我要向猎犬家系举报你。
I'm going to snitch you out to the Bloodhound Family.
啧，还真是冥顽不灵。罢了罢了，我再去找其他人。
Tsk, how pigheaded. That's fine. I'll just find someone else.
...How much? Can you cut us a deal?
尽管将声音压到了最低，但做出这种违反公序良俗的事，你仍然感受到了内心的煎熬。为此，你必须提交一个「崇高道德的赞许」才能解脱。
