I pride myself for having watched many horror films, but my encounters at Fyxestroll Garden left me in cold sweat... Or more accurately, caused the coolant that prevents my processing unit from overheating to evaporate.
你们遇到了什么可怕的事？
What frightening things did you run into?
我时不时能听到很尖锐的女声在唱一种不太理解的戏曲。结果周围根本没有任何音频装置，按理来说声音是通过振动发生的，所以那是什么……

I occasionally heard a sharp female voice singing the tunes of an indecipherable opera, but I could not find any audio device nearby. Technically speaking, sound is produced by vibration, so I'm not sure what I experienced...
我说那是鬼，但是铁皮脑袋不相信！
I said that it was a ghost, but this metalhead didn't believe me!
I definitely do not believe that!
其实都没有什么真正的危害。
Actually, you were not in any real danger.
我感觉比那些血浆横飞的恐怖作品更吓人，是一种心理恐怖，不要问我一个智械为什么知道心理恐怖，我就是知道。
I think that such psychological fear is much more frightening than the goriest and most gruesome film. Don't ask how an Intellitron knows what psychological fear is, I just do.
不过，这次来绥园一趟也算收获了不少创作灵感，这些素材用来做噩梦也不错！放心，我们会尽量让这样的体验控制在适度娱乐的程度……

But I've also gained quite a bit of inspiration during this trip to the Fyxestroll Garden. These materials will be ideal for a Nightmare! Don't worry, we'll do our best to ensure that the experience remains suitably enjoyable still...
剧本还没有想好，可能是因为我还没有办法好好理解「鬼魂」是什么…对了，我想问你，你相信鬼魂的存在吗？
Perhaps it's because I don't fully understand what a ghost is that I haven't managed to come up with the script... That's right, do you believe in the existence of ghosts?
我相信，很多事情都无法解释。
I believe that they exist. After all, many things in life cannot be explained.
没法解释，就要怪鬼魂了吗？
Are ghosts really to be blamed just because some things cannot be explained?
没错，我劝你还是早点走出自己的创作舒适区！
Of course. So, I advise you to just come out of your creative comfort zone.
我不信，仙舟的鬼魂都是岁阳！
I don't believe that they exist. The ghosts on Xianzhou are perhaps all heliobi!
岁阳的话，我就能理解了，谢谢你，我有些灵感了！
If they're just heliobi, then I can accept it. Thank you. I can see the ideas forming in my head!
我不管你灵感是什么，梦境游客想看的还是鬼魂啊！
I don't care what ideas you're forming. What the guests of the Dreamscape want to see are actual ghosts!
十王司的人好像对我们在这里采集素材有些不满。
It seems like the people from the Ten-Lords Commission are unhappy with us gathering material here.
我们采集得差不多了之后就早点走吧！
Let's hurry up and leave once we're more or less done!
我感觉有东西一直跟着我们。
I feel like something's following us.
这不是给我俩指路的好心人吗？真巧，在这里遇见您了。
Hey, isn't that the kind-hearted soul who showed us the way? What a coincidence, I didn't expect to see you here.
我们俩之前也是去过不少世界的海边了，鳞渊境总带给我一种特别的感觉。就像是在这里隐藏着某种巨大的力量。
Even though both of us have visited the seas of numerous worlds, the Scalegorge Waterscape still feels special to me. It feels as if there's a great and mysterious power hidden within this area.
本来随便走走，去收集些梦境素材，但是前面好像是持明族圣地，不让去。
We just wanted to loiter around and obtain some Dreamscape material, but it seems like the area ahead is the holy place of the Vidyadhara and entry is restricted.
所以，我在想这里其实也没有别人，我们是不是可以……
But since there's no one else in the area, perhaps we can...
我建议你还是不要去了。
I would suggest that you don't go there.
很合理的建议。据我推测，我们出发来这里之前，持明族和十王司已经派人来盯着我们了，这里虽然没人，但不代表着他们不知道。

A reasonable suggestion. According to my deduction, the Vidyadhara and the Ten-Lords Commission have already sent people to watch us even before we set off for this place. Even though there's no one around, it doesn't mean that they won't find out.
有道理，我们皮皮西人向来尊重其他族人，不惹麻烦。
You have a point. We Pepeshi always respect the people of other races and don't cause trouble for them.
你们去就去，千万别提我。
Just don't mention that you've met me if you're planning to go there.
你这样急于与我们撇清关系，我明白了，要是继续深入会惹上麻烦。
Judging by your eagerness to stay clear from us, I've figured out that we'll get ourselves in trouble if we proceed further.
呵呵，我们皮皮西人向来拥有生存的智慧，我们不会进去的。
Heh, survival instinct is something common among all Pepeshi, so we will not enter the area.
看到这里的波月古海潮起潮落，我感觉到一种内心的宁静，也许我们不需要剧情。
As I look at the ebb and flow of the Lunarescent Depths, I feel a sense of tranquility. Perhaps, we don't really need a plot.
剧本不用写了，剪辑也不需要，主打一个原汁原味的沉浸式体验。
Forget the script and the editing. Let's focus on an original and authentic immersive experience.
真的会有人需要这样的梦境吗？
Will there really be anyone that requires such a Dreamscape?
匹诺康尼的有钱人不缺钱，缺的是独一无二的体验。咱们提供的体验足够独特，就自然会有人需要。
In Penacony, the rich do not lack money. All they seek is a unique experience. If the experience we're providing is unique enough, naturally there will be demand.
你们这么干活，换我也能做啊。
Seeing the way the two of you work, I reckon I can do it as well.
诶，您这就不懂了。有时候「少就是多」，尤其是在匹诺康尼这样处处被填满的地方，鳞渊境的空寂会更受欢迎。
*sigh* You don't understand. Sometimes, less is more. Especially in a place like Penacony where everything is already so crammed, the serene and empty Scalegorge Waterscape will be even more popular.
我好像听到了什么巨大生物的声音，这段很震撼啊！
I think I hear sounds made by a massive creature. This part is pretty shocking!
说不定，可以用来做冥想音乐的参考……
Perhaps we can use it as a reference for meditation music...
海边真舒服啊，这时候来一瓶苏乐达就更舒服了。
The seaside feels so comfortable. It'd be even better if I had a bottle of SoulGlad.
在这里还喝什么苏乐达？你要喝鳞渊冰泉！
Why would you even drink SoulGlad here? You should be drinking Scalegorge Spring Water!
多亏了那位热心人推荐…
It's all thanks to the kind-hearted person's recommendation...
The food in Aurum Alley is too delicious.
你这样我很难向你解释…
I won't be able to explain anything to you if you continue to act this way.
Ahh, the ocean. You're made up of water...
Can't you come up with some better poetry?
就你一个人对吧，没有人跟踪你？
You're alone, right? Did anyone follow you?
...No idea. I only see myself here.
那就好，接下来的话只有你一个人听见就行。
That's good. What I'm about to say next is meant for you and you alone.
先做个自我介绍吧，你可以称呼我为「白鸟」。
First, let me introduce myself. You can call me Shiratori.
犯罪行为？我现在就去找狱卒！
Are you breaking the law? I'll go get a prison guard right now!
等等！别急嘛，你有点太「守法公民」了！你听我解释。我是阿合马铁窗集团的首席物流官，我的本体还在坐牢，别担心！

Hold on! Calm down. You don't have to be such a "law-abiding citizen"! Let me explain. I'm the Chief Logistics Officer of the Arma Correctional Group and my actual body is currently locked up in jail. You don't have to worry!
先做个自我介绍吧，你可以称呼我为「白鸟」。
First, let me introduce myself. You can call me Shiratori.
我是不是在哪里见过你，白鸟？
原来是恩人啊，我就说还有谁会在幽囚狱里闲逛呢！
Oh, I recognize you now! Thanks for helping me out the other time. Well, it all makes sense now. Nobody else would be sauntering around the Shackling Prison so casually.
听好了，我知道你有很多想问的。你先问吧，问完以后，我…我需要你的帮助。
You must have a lot of questions. Ask me whatever you want, but listen, when you're done, I... I hope you can lend me your assistance.
这里具体是干什么的地方？
你目所能及之处都是集装箱对吧？这是幽囚狱存放证物的仓库。
You see all these freight containers around us? This warehouse is where the Shackling Prison stores all the articles that were used as evidence in their cases.
我听说前段时间幽囚狱暴动，这里是重灾区，有被收押的证物活了过来，也不知道是真的还是假的……

I heard that this place was badly hit by the riot that broke out in the Shackling Prison a while ago. There are even stories about evidence in custody coming back to life, though nobody knows how much truth there is to those claims...
不过这里是幽囚狱，倒也不奇怪。
Still, given the sort of place the Shackling Prison is, I won't be surprised if they turned out to be true.
这里有什么你想要的东西？
What are you looking for in here?
这里有丰富的资源，有异化造物，甚至有某些世界旧文明遗产…全是珍贵的财富。也有狱友说，这集装箱里是紊乱的空间、怪物、以及灾难。

This place has plenty of resources, including mutant creations and even cultural relics from ancient civilizations... You can say everything in here is a treasure. I even heard from other inmates that within these containers lie things like monsters, turbulent spaces, and even calamities.
而我寻找的，只是一个保险柜，就在这证物仓库里。至于保险箱里是什么，您就不必打听了。
Myself, I'm just looking for a certain safe inside this warehouse. As for its contents... Sorry, but it's private.
为什么非得叫上我一起来？
Why do you need me to come along with you?
在幽囚狱里坐过牢的朋友应该都知道：「不要进入证物仓库的集装箱，至少，不要『独自』进入集装箱。」
Any prisoner who's been in the Shackling Prison long enough knows a certain rule: "Never enter the freight containers in the evidence storage warehouse... At least, not alone."
去往那里必须做好完全的准备，结交有实力的伙伴，以及最重要的——找到一位「认路的」，只有他们有能力将从迷宫般的集装箱里引导出来。

Anyone planning to venture within must ensure that they're as well-prepared as possible and enlist the aid of strong, dependable allies in advance. Most importantly, they must also engage a "pathfinder," someone who can guide them out of those maze-like containers.
这么重要，你就随便找个人？
You're grabbing just anyone for something so important?
这里没有其他逃犯，我也不可能找狱卒…除了你，似乎找不了其他人。
There are no other fugitives here, and it's not like I can approach the prison guards for this... You're the only option I have.
所以，你觉得我是「认路的」？
So, you think I'm a pathfinder?
I think you are... And I hope you are.
...You're the only one who can help me now.
Alright. What do you need me to do?
接下来我要从这集装箱里钻进去，去找到一个保险箱，但是这些集装箱空间紊乱，一旦走进去，没人能靠自己在里面找到方向……

In a while, I'm going to enter this freight container to look for a security safe, but as I mentioned, the space inside these containers is in chaos. Nobody that enters can orient themselves without help...
所以，*老前辈留下的路线指示*是重要的！我只能靠你了，那就是个纸条，估计是被什么多事的冥差给带到勘录舍了，你能帮我取回来吗？

...Which is why the directions left behind by past explorers are so important. Please, you're my only hope now. The directions have been written on a piece of paper, but someone — a meddling spiritfarer, I reckon — has taken it to the Scriptorium. Can you retrieve it for me?
冥差真的能让我带过来吗？
Will the spiritfarers really give me the memo?
那个上面全是「嗯嗯嗯」的密文，冥差他们看不懂的，你去拿回来就行。
The directions are written in a cipher, so all they'll see is a mess of mm's and hm's. The spiritfarers won't understand a word. All you have to do is retrieve it and bring it back to me.
*老前辈留下的路线指示*是重要的！那就是个纸条，被冥差给带到勘录舍了，你能帮我取回来吗？拜托了！

Those directions left behind by past explorers are extremely important! They have been written down on a piece of paper, but the memo has been taken to the Scriptorium by a spiritfarer. Can you retrieve it for me? Please, I beg of you!
正如你所见，这略微寒酸的纸条正是白鸟想要的。
From what you can see, this crummy piece of paper is exactly what Shiratori is looking for.
嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢？
十王司的冥差对这张纸条并不上心的原因找到了。
You now understand why the spiritfarers of the Ten-Lords Commission pay no attention to this memo.
带着它<color=#dbc291ff>去证物仓库</color>附近找找白鸟吧。
<color=#dbc291ff>Go to the evidence storage warehouse</color> with it and look for Shiratori nearby.
你回来了！怎么样，找到了我想要的纸条了吗？
You're back! How did it go? Did you find the memo I wanted?
(Hand the memo covered in letters to Shiratori)
看来应该是没有问题了！就是这个前人留下了密文和密钥。
Awesome, looks like we're good to go! This memo was written by the explorer who left behind the cipher and encryption key.
顺带一提，我不会解读前人留下的线索，就只有靠你了。
By the way, I haven't a clue about how to decrypt the hints they left behind. Can I leave that to you?
What will you do without me?
密文是：嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢。
The code is "Ehn-nah-nah, Nah-ehn-ehn, Ehn-nah-nah, Ehn-nah-nah."
然后密钥是这样的，「A」为嗯呢，「B」为呢嗯嗯嗯，「C」为呢嗯呢嗯，「D」为呢嗯嗯…「S」为嗯嗯嗯…「W」为嗯呢呢……

Here's the encryption key: "A" corresponds to "Ehn-nah," "B" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn-ehn," "C" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-nah-ehn," "D" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn"... "S" corresponds to "Ehn-ehn-ehn"... "W" corresponds to "Ehn-nah-nah," ...
我就「嗯」到这里了，你有头绪了吗？
And that's about it, mm-hmm. Have you any clue about how to go about this?
We need to decrypt the cipher.
看来你果然是懂的，就靠你来引导我了！
I knew you would know what to do! Alright, I'm counting on you to lead the way.
密文和密钥随时可以查，别担心！那…「认路的」，我出发了？
Don't worry, you can check the cipher and encryption key again anytime you want. Well, it's time for me to set off, my "pathfinding" friend.
Let's get cracking. Take care of yourself in there.
我就靠你的声音了哦，保持联系。
I'm counting on you to tell me where to go. Stay in touch!
Freight container exploration, let's do this!
Hold on, I have other things to do.
密文和密钥随时可以查，别担心！那…「认路的」，我出发了？
Don't worry, you can check the cipher and encryption key again anytime you want. Well, it's time for me to set off, my "pathfinding" friend.
Let's get cracking. Take care of yourself in there.
我就靠你的声音了哦，保持联系。
I'm counting on you to tell me where to go. Stay in touch!
Freight container exploration, let's do this!
Hold on, I have other things to do.
我已经在集装箱里了，能听见我的声音吧，从这里开始，我该怎么走？
Can you hear me? I got into the container. Where do I go from here?
Go left, up, up, and right.
Go up, right, up, and up again.
Go right, right, up, and right.
我会按照你的说顺序前进哦！
I'll move according to your instructions!
再解释一下密文和密钥！
Can you tell me about the cipher and encryption key again?
密文是：嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢。
The code is "Ehn-nah-nah, Nah-ehn-ehn, Ehn-nah-nah, Ehn-nah-nah."
密钥是：「A」为嗯呢，「B」为呢嗯嗯嗯，「C」为呢嗯呢嗯，「D」为呢嗯嗯…「S」为嗯嗯嗯…「W」为嗯呢呢……

The encryption key goes like this: "A" corresponds to "Ehn-nah," "B" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn-ehn," "C" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-nah-ehn," "D" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn"... "S" corresponds to "Ehn-ehn-ehn"... "W" corresponds to "Ehn-nah-nah," ...
这些字母又是什么意思呢？
What is the significance of these letters?
根据前人所说，这似乎与*键盘*有关系，似乎「W」为「向上」，「S」为「向下」，「D」为「向右」…剩下的我也不明白。

According to that explorer, there seems to be some kind of connection between the letters and the keyboard. The encryption key suggests that "W" corresponds to "up," "S" to "down," and "D" to "right," but I have no clue beyond that.
你先原路返回吧，下次再来。
Retrace your steps for now. We'll try again next time.
集装箱探索真是危险呐。
These freight containers are just too dangerous.
这里有一处暗门，就是这个！原来这就是正确的道路啊！
I see a hidden door... Yes, this is it! This is the correct route!
保险箱就在这里！嘿！认路的，你也沿着我刚才的路过来吧！
Aha, the security safe, there you are! My pathfinding friend, why don't you retrace my steps and join me?
你勉强回忆着刚才解读出的路线，穿过了集装箱组成的巨大迷宫。
Trying your best to recall the directions you just decoded, you make your way through the gigantic maze of freight containers.
为了找到保险箱中的东西，我可没少花力气，幸好，今天终于算是被我找到了！
This security safe really made me work for it, but all that effort has paid off. It's finally in my hands!
这都是多亏了你，我的恩人！
And it's all thanks to you, my friend! I owe you big-time!
用机巧鸟不就直接能飞过来吗？
Couldn't you have flown here with the cycrane?
And take the romanticism out of the process? Of course not!
为什么集装箱里全都是通路呢？
Why are there so many pathways in the containers?
Because that's where the path lies.
啊！一种说不清的成就感，油然而生。
Ah, this sense of achievement welling up within me!
费这么大的劲要找的是什么呢？
So, what is this thing that you worked so hard to look for?
实不相瞒，是一张存着集装箱内部空间位置的芯片。有了它，我可以将它安装在机巧鸟上，自由获取证物仓库里的赃物了！

I suppose I can be honest with you: It's a microchip containing navigation data on the spaces within the freight containers. After I install this baby on the cycrane, the spoils in the evidence storage warehouse will all be ripe for the picking!
当然，你放心，我是不会给十王司添麻烦的，我有分寸。
Before you say anything, don't worry, I know what I can do and what I can't. I won't make any trouble for the Ten-Lords Commission.
别的我不问了，报酬快交给我。
I won't say anymore, then. Now give me my reward!
你就像是用绳子牵引着我，让我在漆黑的箱子与箱子之间来回穿梭，实在是太可靠了！
I must say, the way you guided me from crate to crate in the dark, it's like you were leading me around with a rope. I've never known a more dependable ally!
这是您应得的报酬，这只小鸟也该回到囚室里了，有缘再见！
Here, you earned this. Well, it's about time for this birdie to return to his cell. May we meet again!
您原路返回就可以回去了！
To return from where you came, just double back!
这里好像什么都没有，不太对呀，会不会是密文的解读有问题？
Something's not right. There doesn't seem to be anything here... Is there a mistake with the decryption?
集装箱探索，结束！白鸟又从集装箱中回到了地面。
Freight container exploration, over! Shiratori exits the container and lands.
…我想起来了，「W」为「向上」，「S」为「向下」，「D」为「向右」，「A」为往左。其他的字母无关紧要，只用分辨它们的顺序就可以了！
...I remember now. "W" corresponds to "up," "S" to "down," "D" to "right," and "A" to "left." You only need to arrange them in the right order. The rest of the letters don't matter!
嘿，别出声，往这边来一点。
Shh, keep it down. Now come closer.
就在这里，你确定周围没有狱卒对吧？来这里。
Over here! You're sure there aren't any prison guards nearby? Come on, this way.
（白鸟要的纸条应该就在这附近……）
(The memo that Shiratori is looking for should be somewhere around here...)
你常常在大型场馆、或者会议入口，或者交通枢纽，见过这样的行李安检的传输带。为了公众的安全考虑，仔细查验包裹中是否携带违禁设备。

You often see conveyor belts like this used for baggage screening at large-scale venues, conference hall entrances, and transport hubs. Out of concern for public safety, packages are carefully screened for prohibited items.
安检机中存在射线，说得直白一些，安检机器中是有辐射的。很多人害怕机器内有辐射存在，似乎在旁边多待一秒就会致癌。实际上，辐射确实是存在的，但没有这么危险。

This security scanner uses X-rays. Put simply, the scanner emits radiation. Many are afraid of the radiation and fear that staying next to the machine for even a second longer will cause them to develop cancer. The truth is that while it does emit radiation, it doesn't pose a health risk.
若是以「骨折了，要去医院拍个片」的辐射量（不做防护措施）作比较的话，安检机中大概只有那辐射量的十分之一。所以，以后有人用安检机吓唬你时，你可以堂堂正正地反驳！

When compared to an X-ray examination at the hospital, the amount of radiation a security scanner exposes you to is only one-tenth of what you'd receive from an X-ray scan for a bone fracture (without taking precautions). So, if anyone ever tries to scare you with security scanners and the "health risks" they pose, you can now refute them with confidence!
当然，竞锋舰的安保人员不推荐任何人、以任何理由，登上传送带。
That said, the Skysplitter security team does not recommend climbing onto the conveyor belt under any circumstances, regardless of who you are.
好像并没有人看着你，包括*工作人员*。
No one, not even the staff, is looking at you.
I don't seem to have a lot of luggage.
确实。虽然说你捡到了很多宝贝，但是它们不太占地方，随取随用。
That's true. Although you've come to own many trinkets, they don't take up much space and are always within easy reach.
虽然你可能不在意，但是不妨告诉你吧，周围好像没有人盯着你。
You might not care, but I'll tell you this anyway: No one seems to be looking at you.
谢谢你的小知识，我要走了。
Thanks for the bit of trivia. I have to go.
嗯哼…再声明一次，登上传送带是一件不安全、也不符合法律法规的事情。竞锋舰的安保人员不推荐任何人、以任何理由，登上传送带。

Ahem. I repeat: Climbing onto the conveyor belt can result in bodily harm and is against the law. The Skysplitter security team does not recommend climbing onto the conveyor belt under any circumstances, regardless of who you are.
I knew I was right about you!
谢谢你的小知识，我要走了。
Thanks for the bit of trivia. I have to go.
不过，进入安检机器后你需要扮演好*一件行李*，你明白吗？一件*真正的行李*。行李是不会说话，也不会乱动的，只有经历考验的行李才能通过传送带，能做到吗？

You must play the part of luggage once you're inside the security scanner. A real piece of luggage. Remember, luggage does not speak or move, and only luggage that pass muster can make it across the conveyor belt. Can you do it?
光是口头上说说可不算。你需要用实际行动证明自己。
Action speaks louder than words. You have to walk the talk.
记住，你现在是*一件行李*。
Remember, you're now a piece of luggage.
这附近应该有一个纸板箱，带着它过来，你就能成为*一件行李*。
There should be a cardboard box nearby. Bring it over, and you'll be well on your way to becoming a piece of luggage.
在你眼前的毫无疑问是一个「空箱子」，它是如此空空如也，刚好能放下一人。
There's no doubt that the object before you is an empty box. It even has just enough space to fit a person.
进入传送带的只能是行李？哼，所谓答案啊，大概只是形式上的常识罢了。
Only luggage is allowed on the conveyor belt? Hmph. That's just what they would have you believe.
我将以箱子的形态出击！
很好看来你进入状态了！
这简直是科技与智慧的结晶…
This is the true culmination of knowledge and technology...
Thinking outside the box, if you will.
这下就天衣无缝了。根据一个经验丰富的潜行战术专家所说，没人会对一个*会动的纸板箱*产生半点怀疑。
Perfect. According to a certain master spy, nobody will ever give a moving cardboard box a second glance.
带着箱子去传送带的入口吧。
Now, take the box to the conveyor belt entrance.
看样子，你想登上传输带了。那么希望你能明白，这件事只能在竞锋舰上被允许（工作人员看着的话，也是不允许的），要是你在其他地方这样做了，你会受到惩罚。

It looks like you'll be climbing onto the conveyor belt soon. Remember, this is only allowed on the Skysplitter (and only when the staff isn't looking). If you try this anywhere else, there will be penalties to face.
只有经历考验的行李才能通过传送带，你必须成为一件*真正的行李*，能做到吗？
Only luggage that pass muster can make it across the conveyor belt. You must become a real piece of luggage. Can you do it?
那好，传送带的小冒险要开始了！
Very well. Let the conveyor belt adventure begin!
那么你不应该通过。回去吧！
Then you shall not pass. Farewell.
很快你进入到了安检机器的内部，里面什么也看不见，只有机器运作的声音。
You soon reach the inside of the security scanner. Unable to see anything, the whirring of running machinery is the only thing you hear.
随后，你听到了扬声器里传来了工作人员的声音。
A moment later, you hear a staff member's voice coming through the speaker.
什么情况？这也是一件行李吗？
Huh? Is that supposed to be luggage?
Please leave the area at once!
Please leave the area at once!
虽然说行李确实有各式各样的，如此像人的还是少见…我再问一遍，你是人吗？
I know luggage comes in all shapes and sizes, but it's not every day you see one that looks so human-like... I repeat: Are you human?
Please leave the area at once!
Please leave the area at once!
What Stellaron? Please leave the area at once!
看来真是一件行李，通…通过吧。
Huh, it really is a piece of luggage. I suppose it can pass...
只有经历考验的行李才能通过传送带，恭喜你完成了考验。
Only luggage that pass muster can make it across the conveyor belt. Congratulations, you passed the test.
你没有通过安检机器的考验。
You failed the security scanner's test.
Please stop messing around and giving us trouble!
毕竟你没有支付行李费用，你应该是不会被分拣到行李储存区的。
Since you didn't pay the luggage handling fee, you wouldn't have been sent to the luggage storage area anyway.
至此，你合格地扮演了一件行李，并成功完成了传输带冒险…就这样悄悄离开这里吧，别被认识的人发现了，祝你好运！
You've successfully played the part of luggage and completed the conveyor belt adventure. It's now time to slip away without drawing attention from anyone you know. Good luck!
这位{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，老夫一眼就看出你骨骼惊奇，气宇不凡。如同天上的救星，人间的太岁，必是位响当当的人物。

{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I can see with a sidelong glance that you wield great power, and your aura is like no other. Like a savior from the heavens or a legend among men. I am certain that you must be a figure of great renown!
就好比，好比…好比是那星穹列车的无名客。
You're almost like, like... Like a Nameless of the Astral Express!
词儿呢？辛辛苦苦排练这么久，忘了？
Get with the script! We spent all that time rehearsing, and you've forgotten already?
你写的那些台词太过于羞耻了，我光看着就浑身起鸡皮疙瘩，实在是拉不下这张老脸。
That script you wrote was way too embarrassing. Just reading it made my whole body cringe! I just can't bring myself to say it.
说吧，多半是有事相求吧？
Go on. I imagine you want help with something?
瞧，人家多聪明，不像某些人说话都磕磕绊绊，平时那股子劲儿去哪儿了？
See, look how smart they are. They don't trip over their words like someone I know. Where's that usual spirit of yours gone?
求人办事和嗑瓜子聊天，能一样嘛。
It's not like I can ask someone for help like I'm kicking back and catching up with a friend, is it?
首先声明，我不帮人跑腿！
Before you start, I don't run errands.
老白你看看，你看你把人孩子吓得！咱们一句话还没提，人家就把咱们嘴堵上了。
Look what you've done, Old Bai. You've got them all shaken up! We've not even said anything, and they've shut us down.
年轻人和你开玩笑呢，这么死板干什么。
They're just joking. Stop being so serious!
(I sense this is going to be a pain. Time to turn and leave.)
你下意识明白这俩人并无恶意，只是他们求你办的事需要些时间。
You subconsciously realize that while these two mean you no harm, what they want from you will take up a lot of time.
你面上挂着「如果有时间我会回来听你们说什么」的微笑，倒退，倒退，再倒退到了对话之外的安全区。
You give them a smile that says: "If I get time, I'll come back and hear you out," then back away, back away and keep backing away until you reach a safe zone outside of this conversation.
不过实不相瞒，我们确实有事相求，我听说星穹列车无名客总是乐于助人。
I shall not deceive you. We do indeed have something we'd like to ask of you. I hear the Nameless of the Astral Express are always happy to help others?
难道不是你认为无名客干坏事都很难被发现吗？或者是被发现了，上面也不责怪吗？
I thought you said if the Nameless were up to no good, they'd never be found out. Or even if they were, the higher-ups would never hold them responsible?
不是！你咋老揭咱自己的短？
No! Why do you keep trying to make us look bad?
你俩要不先统一下意见？
Why don't I give you a moment to get on the same page?
哥你先合上嘴…好了，这样我们就统一意见了。
Brother, shut your mouth for just a second... Alright, now we're on the same page.
说到底还是做坏事是吧？
Let's be honest. You're up to no good, aren't you?
Don't listen to him. We're do-gooders!
你们打算说多久，我找把椅子。
How long are you planning on talking? I'll grab a chair.
咳咳，先容许我先介绍一下。这位仁科老师，在退役前是带着星槎方阵接受过元帅检阅的云骑教习，虽然现在只是个话痨的机巧鸟控。

Ahem, first, please allow us to introduce ourselves. This gentleman here is Master Renke. Before he retired, he was a Cloud Knight drillmaster who led a starskiff formation to undergo marshal inspection. Although now, he is no more than a babbling cycrane operator.
而我，一位睿智而低调的工造司工程师，你脚下的这艘竞锋舰，其中火力系统的组件就是我参与设计的，只不过嘛，我现在就跟这艘大船一样，退休了。

As for myself, I am a wise and low-profile Artisanship Commission engineer. I actually collaborated on the design of a number of parts inside the firepower systems of the Skysplitter you stand upon now. However, I am now also retired, like the ship itself.
自打退役以后，它成了赛事场馆，在新的使命中焕发生机。作为老父亲，我自然是很欣慰的，但内心也是很矛盾的——我那些「多就是好，大就是美」的舰炮怎么办呢？

Ever since its retirement, it has become a venue for all sorts of competitions and flourished in its new role. Seeing myself as a father to this ship, I admire it greatly, but I am also conflicted... What is to be done about those cannons? Did we not say: "The more the better, the bigger the more beautiful?"
They are merely left there to gather dust.
这么多炮台留着不用，简直是暴殄天物！就算不放实弹，放点礼炮听个响也行啊！
Leaving so many cannons unused is just a waste of resources! Even if you don't use live ammunition, just firing off a salute and hearing them roar would do!
嘿，你猜怎么着，人家不让。
Heh, but guess what? They wouldn't let us.
所以，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，我想请你帮我个小忙。
So, {F#miss}{M#mister}, we wanted you to help us with a little favor.
我批准，您可以在竞锋舰放炮！
I give you permission. You are allowed to fire your cannons on the Skysplitter!
你批准了也不算数啊，我呢，是想让你去放炮！
Your permission doesn't mean anything. What I'm asking, is that you go and fire the cannons for us!
你不会打算让我放点炮听个响？
You're not asking me to go and fire these cannons just so you can listen to them?
不愧是年轻人，我正有此意。
I knew you'd get it, youngster! That's exactly what I hoped.
我们先听听仁科老师什么需求…
I'd like to hear what Master Renke wants from me, first...
不行，需求也分先来后到的，你得先和我对需求。
No! First come, first served. You have to do what I want first.
I've always wanted to fire those cannons!
仁科你瞧，就说这小家伙是咱的救星！
See, Renke? I told you they were our savior!
我看这{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}确实能处。
I reckon {F#miss}{M#mister} could actually handle it!
This won't cause any trouble, will it?
不会出事的话，你自己为什么不上呢？
If it isn't going to cause trouble, why don't you do it yourself?
你拿好，这枚玉兆里有我已经写好的程序。只要你将它从接入竞锋舰系统，这里面程序就会立刻接管舰炮系统，按照特定顺序对空连射二十一发，炸出个虎虎生风。

Take this. I've written a program into this jade abacus. You just need to insert it into the Skysplitter system and the program will immediately take control of the cannon systems and set off a <unbreak>21</unbreak>-gun salute in a set order. It'll be a real blast!
鉴于这充满艺术性的表现，我将这个程序命名为——演武仪典二十一响！
Given the artistic nature of this display, I've named this program... the "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute"!
等你看到那锣鼓喧天、舰炮齐鸣、旌旗招展、人山人海的场面，就能理解什么叫做「礼炮精神」了！这炮，你一定要放，非放不可，不放就后悔去吧！

Once you see them lighting up the skies, hear the cannons roaring and catch sight of the waves of people under the waving flags, you will understand what "cannon spirit" means! You have to set them off. You must! You'll regret it if you don't!
No one's going to get blown up, are they?
放心，我这「演武仪典二十一响」最厉害的就在于，没炮它也照样能响！
Relax, the amazing thing about this "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute" is that they can still roar out without even being loaded!
你只管狠狠地发射，办法由老白来想。
You just focus on firing those cannons and let me take care of the rest.
They're just going to let me fire them?
只要你装出一幅自己是来上班的样子，控制室里的人都会选择性无视你。
As long as you pretend you're working, the people in the control room will selectively ignore you.
如果还有人要来拦你，你就告诉他们，你是来修空调的。
If anyone tries to stop you, just tell them that you're there to fix the air conditioning.
不成功便成仁，这炮，咱是非放不可的。
You have to make it work. We'll fire those cannons at any cost.
我绝不会害你的，若放完这炮之后惹出祸端，你就说「那都是老白非要我放的，非要怪就怪老白吧！」他们一定会叹口气，然后放了你的。
I won't cause you trouble. If things get sticky after you fire the cannons, just tell them, "Old Bai made me do it. If you must blame someone, blame him!" They will just sigh and let you go.
你就把咱的名字供出来，让他们来抓我就好。
Just give them our names and tell them to come and get us.
这玉兆，就交到你的手里了。请务必，千万，一定要把它插进控制室的系统里。
I'll hand this jade abacus over to you. Please, you absolutely, definitely, undeniably must insert it into the control room system.
至于我的事，等你凯旋再说吧。
As for what I want, we can discuss that on your triumphant return.
你可算回来了，我、我，其实在找你……
You're finally back. I... I've been looking for you...
请务必，千万，一定要把玉兆插进控制室的控制台，一定！
Please, you absolutely, definitely, undeniably must insert it into the control room system.
至于我的事，等你凯旋再说吧。
As for what I want, we can discuss that on your triumphant return.
已经好久都没见老白来闹腾了，他不会真的安静了吧？
It's been a long time since Old Bai has come stirring up trouble. You don't think he's really given up, do you?
老白这人爱舰如命，竞锋舰既是他亲手设计的孩子，也是仙舟的脸面。
Old Bai treasures this ship like he does his own life. The Skysplitter is his child that he designed himself, and it is the face of the Xianzhou.
孩子光荣退役了，当父亲的想再看看它鸣响炮的光辉时刻，也不是不能理解。
His child has made an honorable retirement. As its father, you can understand why he would want to see it shining as it fires its cannons once more.
屁！要我说，那老头子就是爱看放炮的大场面——
Nonsense! If you ask me, that old geezer just likes watching explosions...
喂——！这位朋友，这里可不是你该随便来的地方啊。
Heyyyy! My friend, this is not a place for you to be wandering around.
(I've never seen {M#him}{F#her} before. {M#He's}{F#She's} not some kind of leadership, is {M#he}{F#she}...)
趁着二人疑惑之际，你不疾不徐走到控制台前。
As they descend into confusion, you unhurriedly approach the control station.
I'm here to fix the AC.
哦！原来是维修——所以，我们空调坏了？
Oh! You're here to fix... Wait, is our AC broken?
坏了吗？好像是坏了吧，我不确定，你让人家查查。
Is it? I think it might be. I'm not sure. Get someone to check.
在二人的注视下，你不慌不忙地掏出玉兆，假做出维修的姿态，慢慢走近控制台。
Under the gaze of the two operators, you casually pull out the jade abacus and pretend to be fixing it as you slowly approach the control station.
别开枪，是老白让我来的。
Don't shoot! Old Bai told me to come!
你看我说啥了，我倒要看看，老白还能整出什么活来。
What did I tell you! I actually want to see what Old Bai is playing at this time.
He wants me to fire the cannons.
He wants me to tell you: "I love you."
是了，我也爱他，让他别来捣乱了。
Good. I love him too. Now tell him to stop causing trouble.
What have you done? Why are you surrendering?
已经顾不得那么多了，你快步越至二人跟前，以迅雷不及掩耳之势扑向控制台。
There's no time for all this. You hurry your steps over toward the two operators and rush over to the control station.
哇——这么多插口，玉兆到底该插在哪儿？
Woah... There are so many ports. Which one is the jade abacus supposed to go into?
Forget it. Just stick it in a random one.
就像是弹奏一曲乐章，竞锋舰舰炮以既定的节律歌唱，这就是老白提到的「礼炮精神」。
The Skysplitter's cannons begin to ring out in a set rhythm like a roaring symphony. This is it! This is the "cannon spirit" that Old Bai mentioned.
在「演武仪典二十一响」的炮声里，你终于理解了——放炮一时爽，一直放炮一直爽。

In the booming of the "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute," you finally understand... One explosion can make you feel great for a moment, and constant explosions can make you feel great forever.
你一边走在舰船边缘，一边欣赏礼炮的轰鸣，不知不觉间，已然回到来处。
You walk along the border of the ship as you admire the booming salute. Before you know it, you find yourself back where you came from.
除开右舷第二组舰炮的炮声略显沉闷，其余都堪称完美。
The second group of cannons on the starboard side sounded a little dulled, but otherwise, that was perfection.
怎么样，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}感受到了「礼炮精神」吗？
Well, {F#miss}{M#mister}, did you feel the "cannon spirit"?
这就是你不懂了，按照星际惯例，鸣放二十一响是最高礼遇。
That's where you're mistaken. According to interastral custom, the <unbreak>21</unbreak>-gun salute is considered the highest courtesy.
老早就想这么做了，好爽！
I've always wanted to do that, and that feels great!
你明白了吧，这就是我找上你的原因。
Now you understand why I came to you.
放炮一时爽，坐牢悔断肠。
Setting off a cannon may be fun, but you'll regret it in prison when you're done!
你还别说，他们看到程序之后就立刻来找我了，我大方承认就是我干的。
Enough of that. As soon as they saw the program, they came looking for me and I graciously admitted that it was my work.
I won't cause you any trouble!
仁科！你不也有事情要拜托{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}吗，你倒是说两句啊！
Renke! You have something you wished to ask of the {F#girl}{M#boy}, don't you? Say something!
Make it quick. I'm charging you separately.
我会用老白的钱包打白条的。
I'll give you an IOU from Old Bai.
What? Are we not done here?
唉！年轻人，你注意过竞锋舰上面的表演方队吗？
Well! Youngster, have you ever noticed the Skysplitter display team?
但你没有注意到它们的编队飞行吧？
But you've never seen them fly in formation?
在退休前，我编队云骑阵列，在退休后，我受邀编队阵列。我设计了一套出神入化的飞行编队表演，给竞锋舰的演武仪典献礼！

Before I retired, I put together a Cloud Knight display team, and I have been invited to do the same since my retirement. I designed an unbelievable flight formation performance, especially for the Skysplitter Wardance.
「六机三角队俯冲」、「六机编队横滚」、「五机水平开花」、「四机垂直开花」…可你猜怎么着？如此精彩的表演，却根本没有人注意到！
"The six-plane triangle dive," "the six-plane side roll," "the five-plane horizontal chandelle," "the four-plane vertical chandelle..." But you know what? No one even noticed!
观众都往下看，向上看伤脖子。
The spectators were all looking down, as looking up hurts your neck.
有道理，但不足以说服我。
That may be true, but it's not enough to convince me!
这还能怪谁，彩蛋藏得太深了！
Well, who can you blame for that? Your talents are clearly too well hidden.
我曾经相信他们肯定能发现！
I used to be certain that they'd notice!
如果你站在演武仪典的擂台往上看，你能看到整整五分钟不重样的编队表演！
If you stand on the Wardance stage and look up, you can see a full five-minute flight display with no repetition!
偌大的竞锋舰，居然没有一个人懂飞行编队的魅力，这届观众到底行不行？
The Skysplitter is so vast, and you're telling me that not a single person here understands the beauty of a display team? Are you sure these spectators are even fit for the job?
仁科是这样的，一谈起飞行编队，道德水平就有些松懈。
Renke is just like this... As soon as he gets talking about his display team, his morality gets a little lax.
所以，我想让你做的事显而易见……
So, what I want you to do is obvious...
我好想看看飞行编队啊…
I really want to see the display team...
哈哈，我从见你第一面起，就知道你品味非凡了。
Haha! I knew that you had fine taste from the moment I met you!
不会是让我用炮把它打下来吧？
You're not asking me to shoot them all down with the cannons, are you?
Sheesh, who would care about watching that?
哼哼，只有没亲眼看过飞行编队表演的人，才会做出如此无知的发言。
Humph! Only someone who had never seen my display team with their own eyes would dare make such an ignorant statement.
百闻不如一见，我现在就带你去见识见识，什么叫无敌的飞行表演。
Well, seeing is believing. I will take you to go and see a truly unbelievable flying performance for yourself.
Let me catch my breath for a second.
百闻不如一见，我现在就带你去见识见识，什么叫无敌的飞行表演。
Well, seeing is believing. I will take you to go and see a truly unbelievable flying performance for yourself.
Let me catch my breath for a second.
你们来到竞锋舰的擂台中，你感觉到仁科以某种方式固定住了你的视角。
As you arrive at the Skysplitter stage, you feel Renke fix your line of sight using some strange methods.
挺胸！抬头！再抬高一点，埋着头怎么能看清天上的飞行编队呢？
Chest out! Head up! Higher! How are you going to see my display team in the skies if your head is buried like that?
仁科以他八十万云骑教习的臂力按住你的脑袋，硬生生把你的视线固定在上方。
Renke uses the arm strength he used to train <unbreak>800,000</unbreak> Cloud Knights to forcibly fix your line of sight on the skies.
这套阵型以仙舟古兵法为基础改编，退可聚拢为守，进可直进为攻，变幻无穷。
This formation is adapted from ancient Xianzhou military formations. As they retreat, they tighten ranks to defend. As they attack, they advance straight. The routine changes endlessly.
可不要觉得它就只有这点能耐，大道至简，衍化至繁，正是以这样的简单方阵为基础，才能在大规模作战上，呈现出复杂的变化。

But don't think that this is all they've got to offer. From the most simple to the most complex maneuvers, they are all based on this simple square formation to allow for complex changes in large-scale combat operations.
似乎是被你们的古怪行为吸引，更多的观众抬头看向天空，相机的快门声开始层出不穷。
Seemingly lured in by your strange behavior, more spectators have begun to raise their eyes to the skies as the sounds of camera shutters begin to snap endlessly.
我看到了，差不多可以走了吗？
I've seen it. Can we go now?
大哥，你轻点，你不是在抢劫。
Be gentler on people, that felt like a robbery.
你放心，我不要钱，我只要你抬头看。
Relax, I don't want your money. I just want you to raise your head.
当然，我也不会一直按着你的头，要求你抬头看编队表演…现在你可以自由活动，自由观察，要是看完有任何心得，请记得向我报告！

Of course, I'm not planning on holding your head the whole time and forcing you to keep watching the flight team... You are free now, free to watch as you please. If you have any thoughts to share after watching, make sure to come and tell me!
别急！最精彩的部分还没来——
Hold on! The best part is still to come —
I've memorized all the formations already.
I forgot to turn off the gas on the Express...
——等等，你看，他们终于注意到了，我那精妙的编队！
...Wait, look! They've finally noticed, my exquisite flight squad!
据说，你被仁科按着脑袋讲解阵法的视频，迅速窜上了各大门户网站的热搜榜。
Rumor has it that Renke holding your head while explaining the correct view to watch the display quickly became a trending topic on various popular sites.
就这样，仁科终于实现了愿望，真是可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
Just like that, Renke was able to fulfill his dream. Truly a joy, truly a reason to celebrate.
至此，我们俩竞锋舰老东西终于是满足愿望了。
Just like that, we two old Skysplitter veterans have fulfilled our long-held dreams.
谢谢你呀，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
确实能感受到你们的爱。
I can really feel your love for it.
我对竞锋舰的爱，不输给这里的任何一个人。
No one has a greater love for the Skysplitter than I do.
应该是没别的心愿了吧？
That's it for your wishes, surely?
I want to set off the cannons again.
你就别再难为{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}了。
Stop trying to make it difficult for {F#her}{M#him}.
我现在有一种养大的闺女嫁人的感觉，又寂寞又开心，哎……
It feels comparable to if my daughter has grown up, and I'm finally giving her away on her wedding day. It's a bittersweet happiness...
咱也将毕生所学留在了这里，希望这里的观众抬起头时，能想起她曾经的使命。
We also gave this place all of our life-long knowledge. I hope that when the spectators raise their heads to the skies, they will remember the great mission she once carried.
最后，再次感谢你，实现了我俩的心愿。
Finally, thank you again for helping to fulfill our wishes.
这是你应得的报酬，再见！
These are your much deserved rewards. Farewell!
（这里应该就是老白提到的控制室了吧。）
(This must be the control room that Old Bai mentioned.)
（看看这附近有没有适合插入玉兆的地方好了……）
(I just need to look around for a place where the jade abacus can fit...)
你听我接着讲——这套阵法的一个精髓就在于，它看似有所重复，却始终保持变化，让敌人捉摸不透。攻头则尾至，攻尾则首至，攻中则首尾俱至。

Let me explain further... The true beauty of this matrix lies in that it seems to repeat itself, but is constantly undergoing changes, preventing the enemy from predicting what lies ahead. Attack the head and the tail will lash out, attack the tail and the head will strike, attack the middle and both ends will convene on you.
战场之上，那股勃勃生机、万物竞发的境界，犹在眼前。
The thriving vitality and fierce competition of the battlefield are shown right here, before your eyes.
我…好像什么也看不见呢？
怎么可能，你再仔细看看。哦，我明白了，你肯定是用手机在看，对吧？
How? Take a closer look! Oh, I get it. You've been watching on your phone, haven't you?
怎么？我一直都是用手机。
So? I watch everything on my phone.
这就是问题的症结所在啊！
这跟手机又有什么关系呢？
What's this got to do with my phone?
It has everything to do with it!
你必须得去换一台更加强劲的设备来看飞行编队！懂了吗？手机看不见！
You need a far more powerful device to properly enjoy a flight demonstration! Do you understand me? You'll never see it on a phone!
这世界上有很多「不留心，看不见」的东西，我的飞行编队也是这样的。
There are many things in this world that just will not be seen if they are not observed closely, and my flight team is one of those things.
…不过，你不必担心，就算没有我陪着你，你自己来也能看到编队表演。记得换一台更好的设备啊！
...However, there is no need to worry. You will still be able to see my flight team's performance, even if I'm not with you. Make sure you watch it on something better than a phone, though!
飞行编队迟迟未到，你感觉身后的仁科隐隐有一些不安感。
The flight team is still yet to arrive. Behind you, you can sense a restlessness emanating from Renke.
就像是给别人吹了半天牛「某某电影天下第一」，结果到电影院后才发现它没有上院线排期——你想向世人证明的全部艺术与巧思，竟是如此的一文不值。

It's like you excitedly tell your friends about a movie being "the best thing you'll ever see, a work of art" only to get to the cinema and find out it's not even due to be released in theaters... All the artistic talent and ingenuity that you wanted to prove to the world has gone up in smoke, just like that...
你本可以转过头去给仁科说一声「算了吧，下次再来看」，但事情此时出现了转机……
Just as you planned to turn back to Renke and tell him, "Let's forget it for today. We'll try again next time..." there was a sudden turn around...
仁科引以为傲的飞行编队，它来啦！
Renke's pride and joy, the flight team, it's here!
一位云骑军在这扇门的旁边，既不像守门，又不像要进入。在他进退维谷之时看到了你，隔着头盔露出遇到了救星的目光。

Standing by the door, you see a Cloud Knight neither guarding it nor seeming to want to go inside. Just when he seems lost in his dilemma, he catches sight of you, and an attitude of seeing his savior pours forth through the gaps in his helmet.
这位{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}请留步！我知道阁下身手不错，请快来帮我个忙！
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, please wait! I know you possess considerable talent. Please help me!
眼下有个危险的犯人劫持了一名七百多岁的…老者。奇怪，仙舟上向来也不会强调七百岁能有多老来着……
There is a dangerous criminal that has taken a seven-hundred-year old... old man hostage. Strange, would anyone on the Xianzhou really stress that a seven-hundred-year old was an old man...?
我需要你协助我守住这扇门。目前犯人还没被惊动，我去搬些救兵。
I need you to help me guard this door. The criminal is not aware of us yet. I need to go and get reinforcements.
何须救兵？一根球棒足矣！
Who needs reinforcement? One baseball bat is enough for me!
虽然阁下的威名我也有所耳闻，但云骑军还是不能以人质的安危去冒险。尤其被劫持的又是位老者。
Although I have heard tell of your great strength, as a Cloud Knight, I cannot take risks when it comes to the safety of a hostage. That is especially true when the hostage is an elderly man.
太看得起我了！我哪拦得住！
I think you overestimate me! How am I supposed to stop them?
阁下多虑了，只要别打草惊蛇，那劫匪不会贸然走出这扇门。更何况人质又是一名行动不便的老者。
Rest assured, the kidnapper won't come rushing out of this door as long as we don't go alert them. Plus, their hostage is an old man with limited mobility.
Can you not just... uhh... make a phone call?
让阁下见笑了，这鬼地方的信号实在是不好…等这件事结束，我一定会参那个黑心承建商一本。
Though I'm ashamed to admit it, the signal in this place is no good... When this is all over, I will go and file a complaint against that no-good contractor.
总之还请您务必守住这扇门，如果劫匪想要破门转移，也请帮我拖延一下时间。我去去就回！
Anyway, please stay here and keep a close eye on this door. If the kidnapper tries to break the door down or make a move, please try to buy us some time. I'll be right back!
还未等你同意或拒绝，那位云骑便从你的视线中消失了。现在整个世界只留下你一个人去应对这扇门。
The Cloud Knight disappeared in front of your very eyes before you even had time to say no. Now, you are the only person left to face this mysterious door.
嗯…稍等一下！那位云骑士兵会不会是在耍你？先听听门后的情况吧。
Hmm... Wait a second! How do you know that this Cloud Knight isn't just messing you around? Maybe try listening in and seeing what's going on.
老头，刚才不是很嚣张么？
You had a lot more to say for yourself before, old man. Why so quiet now?
哼哼，年轻人别太得意。老夫虽然失手被你擒住，但老夫膝下还有七个孙子，他们各个身怀绝技。万一半天不见老夫，一定会过来寻找。

Humph, don't be so smug, youngster. I may have been careless and let you capture me, but I have seven grandsons, each of them with their own unique skills. If I go missing for a while, they're sure to come looking!
而且老夫还突然感应到，门外有位高手。
Plus, I can sense that there is a powerful someone behind that door right now.
毕竟老夫可不是什么寻常人，哼哼。
Well, I am no normal old man, hehe.
门外的高手，请你自信一点。
A little more confidence, please, master!
If that's the case, I'm coming in!
门外的的高手，请你冷静一点。
不过不劳烦您出手，老夫那几位孙子都是来参加演武仪典的种子选手，还望您给年轻人一些表现自我的机会。
There is no need for you to get involved in this. My grandsons are all seed competitors that came to take part in the Wardance. Please give these youngsters a chance to prove themselves.
别胡说八道了！你…你不过是虚张声势罢了！
Enough nonsense! Y—You're just blowing hot air!
「老夫膝下还有七个孙子」似乎言犹在耳，你回过神来，发现身后突然站了好多人。
As the words "I have seven grandsons" seem to echo through your ears, you suddenly notice a huge group of men behind you.
爷爷的行踪到这里就不见了，估计人还在附近。
Grandpa's trail ends here, so he must still be nearby.
请问，你有见过一位老者么？
Excuse me, have you seen an old man?
你们要找的人就在门后。
果然！找到了！爷爷在这里！
I knew it! We found him! Grandpa's here!
没见过，不知道你们在说什么。
No, I don't know what you're talking about?
嗯？这个味道，是谎言的味道！
Hm? That scent, it's the scent of deceit and lies!
Where did you all come from?
We come from whence we came.
And go to where we will go.
好了你们不要故弄玄虚了，快来救我！
That's enough pointless riddles! Come and save me!
门外刚来的那六个人，我数数…你们尽量站得让我能看清，哦，那就是你的七个孙子？
Those six outside that just arrived, let me count them... Stand still so I can count you properly! Oh, so these are your seven grandsons?
That's right. You're in for it now.
一、二、三、四、五…怎么才六个？难道那个灰毛也是？
One, two, three, four, five... Why are there only six? Is that one with the gray hair yours as well?
那个我不认识…但是，我知道{F#她}{M#他}是个高手！现在老夫不方便脱身，就请你来组织我的孙子们进行营救吧。
No, I don't know {F#her}{M#him}... But, I know {F#she}{M#he} is a powerful martial master! I can't escape right now, so I need you to guide my grandsons and orchestrate my rescue!
孙子们，你们要服从这个灰发高手的命令！
My grandsons, you must heed the orders of this gray-haired master!
好的，爷爷！请尽情吩咐我们吧，灰毛{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}！
Yes, grandpa! Please give us your orders, gray-haired {F#lady}{M#sir}!
灰毛{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}，我们该让谁先出战呢？
Gray-haired {F#lady}{M#sir}, who should go into battle first?
（怎么突然让我来指挥…好吧，该让谁先上呢？）
(Why am I suddenly the commander...? Fine, who should I send out first?)
哼，没想到会让我出战…可怜的劫匪，你要遭重了！我力能单手托起星槎，身形可变大变小。区区劫匪，不过蝼蚁！

Humph, I did not expect you to send me into the contest... Foolish kidnapper, you're in for it now! I can lift a starskiff with a single hand and make myself bigger or smaller as I please. I'll crush you like an ant, kidnapper!
There we go. That's the spirit!
You want me to go with you?
There is no need. I can handle this alone.
Will you not take a brother with you?
There is no need. I can handle this alone.
我早已受够了繁文缛节！
红衣武者脱去上衣，露出虬结的肌肉，独自冲进了房间。
The red-clad warrior takes off his top to expose his buff, wiry upper body and charges into the room alone.
忽然门外听到砰的一声巨响，像是什么巨大体型的生物一头撞向了天花板，然后栽倒在地。
Suddenly, you hear a huge thud from outside the door, as if a giant creature has hit its head on the ceiling and collapsed.
没想到你个小毛贼还有点手段。
I'll give it to you, leech. You have some party tricks.
喂，不关我的事啊，他自己忽然变大撞到了头，怎么怪我！
Hey, that has nothing to do with me! He suddenly enlarged himself and knocked his own head. How can you blame me for that?
Sounds like we're off to a head-start.
So he's more of a headbanger?
无妨！老夫养孙千日、用孙一时，灰毛高手，让我的下个孙子出手吧！
No need to fear! I have raised these grandsons for years for this very moment. Gray-haired master, send in my next grandson!
哼，我向来不喜暴力，对付贼人要用智取。只需让我看一眼便知贼人的破绽。招数动向，尽在掌握。
Humph, I have never been a fan of violence. Defeating a kidnapper is all about using your wits. Give me one look at this villain and I shall know his weaknesses, his movements, and his trends.
None of those sounds like attack.
You want me to go with you?
任何招数都躲不开我的法眼，你不要小看我！
No technique can escape my discerning eyes. Do not underestimate me!
Will you not take a brother with you?
任何招数都躲不开我的法眼，你不要小看我！
No technique can escape my discerning eyes. Do not underestimate me!
Believe me, I shall have victory!
橙衣武者带着洞悉一切的自信，从容地走入门中。
The orange-clad warrior calmly walked through the door, confident that he could perceive all.
放弃吧，羸弱的劫匪。你的一切招数都会被我看破。我眼观六路，看穿隐身法；耳听八方，能够收集远处的声波！
Give up now, pathetic kidnapper! I can see through any technique you may have! My eyes see in all directions and expose all stealth techniques. My ears hear all sound waves, no matter the distance!
一切花招都逃不过我的耳目。言语会骗人，但肌肉和心跳不会。
No flashy technique can deceive my eyes and ears. Though you can lie with your words, your muscles and heart rate tell the truth.
就好像你，下盘微微挪步，右手握拳蓄力。心里想的一定想趁我说话时贴近我，冲我鼻子…哎哟！
Just like how your lower body has moved slightly, and your fist is clenching tight. I am certain that you are planning to approach me while I talk and punch me in the nose... Oof!
从声音上判断，这是一记干净利落的打击。
Judging from the sound, that was a one-hit KO...
呃…还别说，你说的倒是准……
Ahh... look at that, you were right...
Sorry, I could not help myself.
哼哼，莫要嚣张！灰毛高手！放我的下一个孙子进来！
Humph, don't get so cocky! Gray-haired master! Send in my next grandson!
爷爷，别急，我这就来救你！真正的高手能让对方任何攻击都无效！
Grandpa, don't worry, I will save you! A true master will make all of their enemy's attacks completely useless!
That actually sounds like it makes sense...
You want me to go with you?
这怎么行？那可是我的爷爷！我一定要亲自营救他！
How can I allow this? That is my grandfather! I must save him myself!
Will you not take a brother with you?
我可是爷爷最喜欢的孙子！你们都别去，我一定要亲自营救他！
I am his favorite grandson! You all stay back, and I will save him myself!
想我未学走路，先学内功。任何招数都伤不到我分毫，从小到大我就不知道伤口是什么意思。爷爷稍等片刻，孙子这就来救你！
Before I learned to walk, I learned to channel my inner energy! No attack can harm me, and I have never in my life known the meaning of a wound. Wait for me, grandfather! I'm coming to save you!
劫匪老兄，你知道吗？只有坚韧的躯体才是不败法门。
Let me teach you one thing, kidnapper. Only a body that perseveres can be undefeated.
他…他在发光…这琥珀色的光芒…难道！
He... he's glowing...! That amber glow... could it be!?
没错，我这孙子修习的正是「补天神功」。一旦发动，恰如补天司命降世临凡，谁也无法伤他分毫。
That's right. This grandson of mine practices the technique of Skymending. As soon as it is activated, he is like the Firmamend Arbiter among mortals. No man can harm him!
那那那…那你要用什么招数来对付我？呵，别嚣张，我可不会怕你这装神弄鬼的小技巧！
S—s—so... how are you going to overpower me? Hah, don't be so arrogant! I'm not scared of some little supernatural magic tricks!
对付你？不。我修习的「补天神功」并不能用来战斗，只能用来防御。只要我不破功，就没人能伤我分毫。
Overpower you? No. I have mastered Skymending, but it cannot be used for offense, only defense. As long as I do not disrupt my technique, no one can harm me.
那我不管你了，你自己在这里罚站吧。
Then why should I even bother with you? Go stand in the corner.
老头，叫你的下一个孙子进来吧！
Old man, call in your next grandson!
这劫匪太狡猾了！看来只有我们兄弟同心才能解决。
This kidnapper is tricksy! It looks like we will have to use our sibling bond to deal with him!
I hope this one works for you...
期待你们热血沸腾的组合技！
Show us a hot-blooded combo attack!
Do you want me to attack with you?
抱歉，我兄弟二人合作无间，容不下第三者插手。
Sorry, our combination is seamless, and there is no room for a third to interfere.
Why don't you take a few more brothers?
抱歉，我兄弟二人合作无间，容不下第三者插手。
Sorry, our combination is seamless, and there is no room for a third to interfere.
我与五弟配合，一个能驾驭天雷，一个可以操控流水。想不到这贼人竟能使我两兄弟联手，这真是他的荣幸！

Brother Five and I have the perfect combination. One of us controls water and the other conducts lightning. I cannot believe this kidnapper has forced us to join forces. This is truly an honor for him!
你流水别把爷爷也给冲走…
你天雷别把爷爷霹成老熟人…
Don't shock your grandpa into smithereens...
莫要担心，我二人在「巡猎」的命途上钻研颇深，擅长对单作战，不会殃及无辜。
No need to fear. We have dedicated great study to the path of The Hunt. We excel at solo contest, and we will not harm the innocent.
那你们虚构叙事有难咯。
Then you might have some problems with Pure Fiction.
总之看我兄弟两人强强联手，救回爷爷吧！
Just sit back and watch our powerful combination as we save our grandpa!
你不免为门后的劫匪感到担心，从两人身上的斗气中，仿佛能感受到惊雷与海啸的怒意。
You cannot help but feel concern for the kidnapper behind the door. As you sense the fighting spirit of the two siblings, you feel as if you can sense the rage of pure lightning and roaring waves.
Why don't we talk this out...
住口，你劫持我家爷爷，早就失去交涉的权利了！
Silence. You kidnapped our grandfather, and you lost the right to negotiate a long time ago!
没错！好兄弟，我们得喊点什么壮壮胆气——
That's right! Brother, let us do a battle cry to evoke our courage...
别喊这些没有用的了，要喊招式！
Stop yelling nonsense and call out an attack!
刹那间，雷鸣闪动。竞锋舰上的灯集体频闪了几下。不多一会儿，光照又恢复正常。
At that moment, lightning strikes and thunder claps. The lights aboard the Skysplitter flickered in unison for a few moments before returning to normal.
那个…外面还有人么，他俩在地上抽搐，要不要叫个医生？
Um... Is there anyone else still out there? They're on the ground, twitching. Do you want to call a doctor or something?
别担心，这不是第一次了，他们已经习惯了……
Don't worry. This isn't the first time. They're used to it...
我第一次知道，练武术还讲究元素反应……
I never really thought that you had to consider elemental reactions when practicing martial arts...
唉…灰毛高手，请让我的下一位孙子进来吧！
Ah... Gray-haired master, please send in my next grandson!
终于到我们出场的时候了。
It's finally time for us to take the stage!
Are you looking down on me?
在紫色武者身旁的虚空中，突然传来一个略显不满的声音。
Suddenly, a slightly displeased voice starts to call out from the void behind the purple-clad warrior.
六哥，{F#她}{M#他}不是看不起你，只是看不见你。
Brother Six, {F#she}{M#he} isn't looking down on you. {F#She}{M#He} can't even see you.
哦哦，误会了，抱歉哈。我所练的是隐匿身形的本事，忘记寻常人看不见我了。
Ahh, I'm sorry. I misunderstood. I practice techniques to conceal myself, and I forget normal people cannot see me.
我虽然没什么武功，但有一个法宝紫金瓠。若我叫一句敌人的名字，只要他答应了，便会被吸入这紫金瓠中！
I may not have any martial arts skills, but I have a sacred vessel: my amethyst gold gourd! If I call my enemies' names, and they respond to me, they will be sucked inside the amethyst gold gourd!
When did this take a turn for the mystical?
你似乎听到某种细微的声响，像是某种东西被吸入时发出的气流声。
You feel like you can hear a faint sound, like the sound of air being sucked inside something.
还没完呢，六哥，咱们的高光时刻才刚刚开始！
It's not over yet, Brother Six. Our great moment to shine is just beginning!
只有一个人么？快点吧，我累了。
There's just one of you? Hurry up then, I'm getting tired.
嚯？这么嚣张。这次非要给你点厉害瞧瞧。六哥，动手吧！
Oh? So confident. Now you'll see some real power! Brother Six, now!
六哥？你个老六，人哪去了？别藏了！我刚才叫你名字的时候，你不还答应来着吗？
Brother Six? Where's he gone? Stop hiding! You responded when I called your name just now, so...
你听到了一拳将人打倒的声音，大概猜到了毫不意外的结局。
You hear the sound of a punch knocking someone to the ground and have a rough understanding of the unsurprising outcome.
…说了多少次！不要随时开着你那个破葫芦！
...How many times have I told you? Don't just leave that damn gourd open all the time!
…你也别太着急，年纪这么大了，气坏了身体可不好。
...Don't get so worked up, old man. Anger can be bad for your health at your age.
算了算了…孙子？孙子何在？快点再来个孙子！莫要辱没了我家的门风！
Forget it... Grandson? Where are you, grandson? I need another grandson! I cannot allow our family to be disgraced like this!
那…那就靠你了，灰毛高手！事成之后，我收你为我的义孙！
Then... Then I'm counting on you, gray-haired master! Complete this mission and I shall take you as my adopted grandson!
老东西，你占我便宜我就揍你！
Old man, take advantage of me like that, and I'll beat you myself!
Why don't you just call me uncle?
还是给点更实际的奖励吧…
How about a more concrete reward...
Okay, grandpa! I'm coming to save you!
这些事之后再讨论吧！先进来救救我吧！
We can discuss all this later! Come and save me first!
药王爷在上，这都什么乱七八糟的……
Great Lord of Sanctus Medicus, I can't handle this mess...
正当你准备掏出球棍冲进去时，劫匪和被绑架的老者走了出来，而增援的云骑军也到了。
Just as you prepare to draw your bat and enter the room, the kidnapper and the tied hostage walk out of the room, just in time to be greeted by the Cloud Knight reinforcements.
辛苦了！我叫了增援的部队过来援救人质…嗯？现在什么情况？
Thanks for your help! I called reinforcements to come and help save the hostage... Hm? What's going on?
真不愧是你啊，{NICKNAME}！阁下太厉害了，竟能在短时间内完成这样教科书般的人质救援！
I should have expected no less from you, {NICKNAME}! To pull off a textbook hostage rescue in such a short amount of time is truly amazing!
You have no idea. We suffered heavy losses.
军爷！快把我抓起来吧！我投降，我自首！这老头找了一帮子精神病，用车轮战来轮番折磨我啊！
Sir! Please, take me away! I surrender, I confess! This old man sent an army of crazy people to come and torture me one after another!
不，是老夫教学无方…老夫回去要给他们制定一套新的课程，让他们七位一体，团队作战，到时候再来找你试试招。
No, it was my teaching that failed me... I will return and give them a whole new education. I will teach them to fight as one. When that time comes, I will find you and test out their strength!
别别！老人家，我知错了，你放过我吧…把您家那七块活宝看好了，别再让他们出来折磨人了！求求你了！
No, please! Old man, I was wrong. Please let me go... Take your band of clowns home and keep an eye on them. Don't let them torture anyone ever again. I'm begging you!
呃…那既然罪犯已经伏法，剩下的事就交给我们吧。
Uhh... Well, as the criminal has been brought to justice, you can leave the rest to us.
{NICKNAME}，多亏了阁下的协助，我们才能毫发无损地解救出人质。非常感谢！
It is thanks to your help, {NICKNAME}, that we were able to rescue the hostage without him coming to harm. I am forever grateful!
受之有愧啊！我真的没出力！
It honestly has nothing to do with me! I didn't do anything!
坦白说我很能共情那位劫匪。
If I'm honest, I sympathize with the kidnapper.
One simple kidnapper is no trouble for me.
哈哈，不管怎么说，这点奖励算是我们的心意，还请您收下吧。我先带嫌犯和相关证人回去了。有缘再见。
Haha, be that as it may, please accept this reward as a token of our gratitude. I'll be taking the criminal and witnesses back with me. May we meet again.
What am I supposed to do with all this?
这位同学，你的相关信息并未出现在本节课程的出席名单中，请仔细核对课表，避免走错教室。
Hello, your related information isn't on the attendance list of this lecture. Please review your lesson plan and avoid the wrong classroom.
我是来检查教学质量的。
I'm here to evaluate the teaching quality.
就不允许我勤奋好学吗？
Am I not allowed to be hardworking?
…抱歉，已检索到身份为来自星穹列车的旁听生。
...Apologies, we have verified your status as a guest student from the Astral Express.
你好，{NICKNAME}同学，这间教室本日的课程安排为：财富学院的「经济学基本原理」、筑梦学院的「建筑素描基础」、谐乐学院的「作曲理论入门」。

Hello, {NICKNAME}. Today's lesson schedule for this classroom is as such: Fortune Academy's "Basic Financial Principles," Dreamweaver Academy's "Architectural Sketching Basics," and Charmony Academy's "Composition Theory for Beginners."
请确认——以上是否为你想要旁听的内容。
Please confirm if the above are the lessons you wish to audit.
That's right. I want to attend these lessons!
Sorry, I have the wrong room.
随着铃声响起，你的心绪如海潮般起伏不定，但你已经准备好迎接今日的课程了——
As the bell rings, your emotions waver like the tide, but you have already decided to take on today's lessons...
你专注地望向讲台，如饥似渴地聆听着，仿佛沙漠中偶遇绿洲的旅人，不肯放过每一滴知识的甘霖。
You focus your gaze on the lectern, listening intently like a voracious learner, as if you are a traveler who stumbles upon an oasis in the desert, greedily gulping every drop of knowledge.
但很可惜，不管你如何胸怀壮志，脑容量终究是有极限的——
A pity though, no matter how tenacious your will is, there are limits to your mind...
你搞不懂那些图形的具体含义，它们只让你想起托帕，然后是账账，再然后是大大小小的宝箱…等你终于神游匹诺康尼一周之后，课程已然过去了大半。

You are confused by the exact meanings of the drawings — they only make you think of Topaz, and then Numby, and then a myriad of big and small chests... When you're done daydreaming all over Penacony, the lesson has passed its halfway mark.
「我是谁、我在哪、今天吃什么」——正当你迷茫的小脑袋瓜开始不自觉思考起人生的终极难题时，却见讲师突然转身，双手重重拍在讲台上。

"Who am I, where am I, what should I eat today" — just as your baffled little brain starts to ruminate on the ultimate questions of life, the lecturer suddenly spins around, both his hands slamming down hard on the lectern.
你不由惊恐万分：你被发现了？难道真的有智械能读取别人的思维！
You are utterly taken aback: Were you noticed? Do Intellitrons really possess the power to read thoughts!?
现在，开始点名——威廉·威尔逊！
Now for roll call — William Wilson!
你目瞪口呆地看着灵活的皮皮西如同土拨鼠那般，从一个个空位上冒出头，用迥然相异的嗓音和语气熟练地签着到。

Flabbergasted, you stare at the lively Pepeshi. As if he is a groundhog, he's popping his head up from various empty seats, skillfully answering the roll call in completely different tones and voices.
周围的学生似乎对此司空见惯，而点名的讲师头也不抬。
The surrounding students seem to be used to this scene, and the roll calling teacher's head doesn't even look up.
直到点名结束，你眼睁睁看着方才的土拨…皮皮西从你隔壁的座位底下钻出来，爬上椅子，长长地舒了口气。
Even till the roll call ends, you're still staring wide-eyed as the groundhog... Pepeshi appears from under a seat beside you, climbs into the chair, and lets out a long sigh.
呼…每次都跟打仗似的。果然，钱难赚、课难听，学长们诚不我欺…你说是这个理吧，同学？
Phew... It's like fighting a war every time. As expected, the money is hard, the lessons are perplexing, the seniors aren't wrong... you know?
嗨，行为艺术这玩意光烧钱不赚钱，咱是正经做生意的。「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
Bah, performance art is something that just costs you money. This is legitimate business. Care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?
You can make money by helping others take attendance?
呦，直击重点啊，一看你就是个懂行的。「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
Ha, straight to the point, I knew you were a sharp one. Care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?
嘿嘿，谬赞谬赞~商业机密不便透露，不过同学你要是实在感兴趣，「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
Heh-heh, flattering will not get you trade secrets, you know? But if you're truly interested, care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?
我这里不仅可以代人签到，还出售每节课的课堂笔记，甚至承接作业代写、学院代表签字服务，至于其它的嘛…只要价钱到位，也都好商量。

I don't only take attendance for others, I also sell lecture notes for each class. I even help do assignments, signature services for the academy's rep, and much more... Everything can be negotiated for the right price.
来来来，套餐种类多样，订购越多折扣越大，同学你要不要详细了解一下……
Come, come, I have plenty of package offers. The more you buy, the bigger the discounts. Care to learn more in detail...?
你在皮皮西热情的推销中度过了余下的小半堂课。随着铃声响起，你的心绪依旧如海潮般起伏不定，却早已不似当初。
The rest of the lesson goes by as you listen to the Pepeshi's enthused pitch. As the bell rings, your emotions are still wavering like the tide, but not as much as before.
唉，果然欢乐的时光总是短暂的，说起来…我有个不情之请不知该不该讲……
*sigh* Time flies when you're having fun. Speaking of which... I have a request that I'm not sure if I should say...
Tell me, I'm the one deciding anyway.
…是这样的，其实我对你一见如故，既然难得缘分一场当了回同桌，能不能跟我合个照，再签个名？
...Actually, I felt an instant connection when I saw you. Since it's fate that we are desk mates, can we take a photograph together, then give me an autograph?
你与这位友好的皮皮西同学拍摄了合影，并慷慨地在照片后方签上了自己的名字。
You take a photo with your friendly Pepeshi classmate, and generously sign your name at the back of the photograph.
老板大气！呃…我是说非常感谢，我一定会好好收藏的！
Thank you, boss! Uh... I mean, I'm very grateful. I'll treasure it well!
I think we should forget it...
别这么谦虚嘛，相聚是缘，为了纪念我们的相遇，还是合个影吧！
Don't be so modest. It's fate that brought us together, so, to commemorate our meeting, let's take a photo together!
就这样，今天的第一堂课在讲师的「下堂课测试」以及学生们的唉声叹气中画上了圆满的句号——
Just like that, today's first lesson meets a satisfactory end with the lecturer's announcement of a class quiz for the next session along with the students' collective sighs.
什么，还不够圆满吗？你又不用考试！
What, not satisfactory enough? You don't even need to take the quiz!
我听财富学院的讲师说过了，你是来旁听的吧？课程马上就要开始了，快去找个位置坐好吧。
I heard the Fortune Academy lecturer say that you were just sitting in? The lesson is about to start. Hurry up and find a seat.
Thanks for the reminder. I'm going now.
I need to use the bathroom, teach!
俗话说得好，万事开头难。在经历过上一堂课的洗礼之后，你对接下来的课程充满信心。
As the saying goes, "the first step is always the most difficult." After enduring the previous lesson's trial by fire, you head into the next lesson with brimming confidence.
经济学需要一定的专业基础，听不懂情有可原。但画画总难不倒你吧？不就是照着……
Economics requires a certain level of basic understanding, so it's normal to not understand. But surely drawing's not a huge challenge for you? It's just copying...
好吧，是你僭越了。黑板上的图画你倒是姑且能看明白，但「定位轴线」是什么？「标高符号」是什么？「引出线」又是什么？
All right, you vastly overestimated your own abilities. You understand the drawing on the blackboard, but what's a "positioning axis"? Or an "elevation symbol"? And what's an "outlet line"?
你越是努力盯着黑板，那些线条便越是在你眼前模糊成一道道虚影——别问为什么人在梦中还会犯困，这大概就是知识的力量吧。
The harder you stare at the board, the more the lines start to blur before your eyes — don't ask why people still get tired in a dream. It's probably because of the power of knowledge.
你转头望向自己的邻座，想凭借一些亲切友好的交谈重归清醒，却只见到智械同学专注的侧脸。那人垂着头，笔尖在本子上「唰唰」扫出道道残影。

You turn to the seat beside you, hoping to return to consciousness with some friendly banter, only to see the side profile of your Intellitron classmate entrenched in deep concentration. This one has his head drooped, tracing streaks of afterimages with the intense swishing of his pen on his notebook.
你突然体会到一种近乎神圣的氛围——这人对于知识是如此虔诚、如此崇敬，以至于你想要冒昧搅扰的念头简直就是一种罪过。
You suddenly sense an almost-sacred atmosphere — this one is so devout, so respectful of knowledge, so much so that the mere notion of your offending disruption would be a sin.
{NICKNAME}同学，你来复述一下，我刚刚讲到哪了？
{NICKNAME}, would you like to repeat where I just left off?
You're asking me, but who can I ask?
…回答得很好，下节课别再来了。注意影响，课堂上别老是东张西望。
...Good answer. You're dismissed for the next class. Watch your behavior, and stop looking around during class.
谁让你做选择题了？咳，注意影响，课堂上别老是东张西望。
Who said anything about multiple choice? Ahem, watch your behavior, and stop looking around during class.
算了，旁边那个智械小子，你起来答。
Forget it. That Intellitron fella beside you, you answer.
哼…一个两个，不听课就别来上课。难不成真以为只要全勤，期末成绩就能好看？
Ugh... You lot might as well not come to class if you won't listen. You really think your grades will look nicer just because you have full attendance?
你瞧瞧黑着脸不再搭理你们的讲师，又看看始终沉默着、努力减少自己存在感的邻座——这不应该啊？
You glance at your solemn-faced lecturer who is already ignoring you two, then at your silent neighbor who is trying his darnedest to reduce his presence — this shouldn't be happening?
你当然知道好奇害死猫，但你又不是猫；更何况，你还知道好奇心同样能憋死一个开拓者。于是你趁着所有人不备，悄悄探过头去——

You, of course, know that curiosity killed the cat, but you're not a cat. You also know that curiosity can also suffocate a Trailblazer. So you catch everyone off-guard and surreptitiously peek around...
嘘！小、小点声，老师又看过来了……
Shhh! P—Pipe down! The teacher is looking over here again...
你在讲师恨铁不成钢的目光中瑟缩了一下，但随即就被眼前的画面吸引了全部注意——
You shrink under the lecturer's steely gaze, but are also wholly fascinated by the scene unfolding before you...
那流畅的线条、精美的画工、跃然纸上的角色…好家伙，原来这老兄还是个同人大佬！
Those smooth lines, exquisite penmanship, characters that leap off the page... Good golly, this person is a fanart master!
你见猎心喜，压低嗓门表达了你对钟表小子原作以及眼前同人漫画的喜爱。沉默的智械听罢不再沉默，欢快地同你小声交流起来。

Delighted by what you see, you express your love for the original Clockie works and the artist's comic before you in a hushed voice. The silent Intellitron is no longer silent at your gushing, and happily converses with you in a similarly low whisper.
这节课在你们的窃窃私语中结束，充实而欢乐。你想，你或许已经爱上上课了。
This class ends amidst your whispering, a class that's both fulfilling and joyful. You think that maybe you've fallen in love with attending classes.
啊呀，你就是那个{NICKNAME}吧？很高兴能见到本人，希望你喜欢我的课哦~
Ah, you're that {NICKNAME}, right? Glad to meet you in person, and I hope you enjoy my class!
I still want to go to the bathroom...
如此亲切的讲师，授课的内容也想必不会太过困难吧——你对接下来的课程充满期待。
Such a warm and kind teacher. You are sure the lesson won't be too hard either — you enthusiastically look forward to the class.
你是谁？你可是大明星知更鸟的好朋友，列车留声机的忠实听众，作曲这点小事能难得倒你吗？
Who are you? You are a good friend of the superstar singer Robin's, a loyal listener of the Express' phonograph. Would composing a mere melody be any challenge to you?
好吧，还真能…说实在的，已经过去两节课了，你早就该学聪明了不是吗？不如看看你邻座的同学吧，说不定又是个可以相谈甚欢的……

All right, it really is a challenge... Honestly, two classes have come and gone — you should already have learned how to be smart, right? Why not take a gander at your neighbor instead? You might have another great conversation...
What did you say? I don't understand...
当然，作为那个「被选中的无名客」，你在折纸小鸟面前素来享有特权；但这并不影响你完全无法理解眼前的小鸟究竟想要表达些什么。
Of course, as that Chosen Nameless, you've always enjoyed perks before Origami Birds, but this does not hinder the fact that you completely don't understand what this bird is trying to communicate.
Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*.
在出声的那个瞬间，你清晰地看见隔壁桌上那只折纸小鸟的眼睛里出现了高光。
The moment it makes a sound, you clearly see a glint in the Origami Bird's eyes.
你永远叫不醒一个装睡的人；同理，联觉信标永远翻译不了一句纯粹的「啾」。但现在放弃还为时尚早，或许你可以找个翻译——

You can never awaken someone who's pretending to be sleeping. Similarly, the Synesthesia Beacon will never be able to translate a bright "tweet." But it's still too early to give up. Perhaps you can find a translation...
你抬头四顾，然而偌大教室中除了你和那位讲师，竟没有一个正常的…「人」。
You look around, but apart from you and that lecturer, no one else around the classroom is a normal... person.
罢了，你累了，或许人与人之间就是永远也无法相互理解，或许这课堂之上本就无你一方容身之所……
Forget it. You're tired. Maybe people will never be able to understand each other. Maybe you never belonged in this class in the first place...
一个纸团「啪——」地落在你的桌面上。
A paper ball falls on your desk with a soft thud.
哦，你知道这个，课上悄悄话的必备项目！你的课堂体验愈发圆满了——
Oh, you know this move — an essential tool for clandestine comms in class! Your classroom experience is becoming much more fruitful now...
对啊，在梦中不就该无拘无束自由自在吗？原来格格不入的并非真正的你，而是可恶的惯性思维，你决定加入你的同学——

That's right. Shouldn't one be carefree and unfettered in a dream? You're not the one who is incapable of fitting in. It's those blasted habitual thoughts of yours. You decide to join your classmate...
嘿~滴答！我的朋友，钟表小子来了！
Heyyy tick-tock! My friend, Clockie is here!
你的表演非常还原，{NICKNAME}同学。但请小点声，不要影响大家听课哦~
Your performance is impeccable, {NICKNAME}. But please keep it down and not disrupt the class for others.
只是变换了一个形态，你们之间的壁垒便轰然瓦解——此刻你只觉与眼前的「折纸小鸟」心有灵犀、不点就通！
No sooner than you change your demeanor, the walls between you crumble — at this moment, your thoughts are one with the Origami Bird before you, absolutely in sync!
似有看不见的线将你们牵引至一处，你只觉眼前的「折纸小鸟」让你产生了家人般的亲切感。
It's as if an invisible thread connects the both of you to a single place, as you witness the origami bird form a kinship with you only reserved for familial ties.
果然，人与人之间终究还是能够相互理解，而这课堂之上总归也还有你一方容身之所！
Indeed, people can still understand one another eventually, and this class still has a place for you!
就这样，在一派和乐融融的气氛中，你的课堂体验圆满落幕——
Just like that, amidst a united, harmonious atmosphere, your classroom experience comes to a satisfactory close...
至于自始至终都没听懂的课程？说真的，除了筑梦学院那位讲师之外，谁在乎呢。
As for the class that you couldn't understand from start to end? Honestly, apart from that Dreamweaver Academy lecturer, who cares about those lessons?
Please look through the class schedule carefully...
Class is about to begin. Take your seats, everybody!
在这位同学的软磨硬泡下，你最终还是拍摄了合影，并在照片后方签上了名字。
Thanks to the student's constant pestering, in the end, you agree to take a photo together and sign on the back of it.
It's just selling an autographed photo...
不就是拍卖了盛会巨星的签名照嘛，至于闹到学校…噫，怎么你也在？！
It's just auctioning off an autographed photo of the Festive Superstar. As for the trouble at school... Huh? Why are you here as well!?
先说清楚，我没有卖出去啊…所以没从中盈利！
Let me make one thing clear: I didn't sell it to anybody, so I didn't profit from it anyway!
没有可以分给我的钱吗？
So, I don't get a cut?
哎，才挂到论坛上没多久呢，就有个自称是什么忍徒的家伙把我给举报了，帖子被删了，我也被喊来校长室，挨了好久的批评……

Well, not long after I posted the listing to the forum, somebody claiming to be a ninja initiate blew the whistle on me, causing the post to be deleted. I was also summoned to the dean's office and given a stern talking-to...
我说，那个忍徒该不会就是你吧？
Speaking of which, that ninja initiate... wasn't you, right?
No, but I do want to report you as well.
I'm not a ninja initiate. I'm a Ninja Hero!
行吧，反正已经被学校发现，是谁都无所谓了。时运不济，发财的路多灾多难啊。
Fine, since the school already discovered this, the ninja initiate's identity doesn't matter anymore. When times are bad, the road to wealth is full of potholes.
尽管不知道那位学生是谁，但你还是要在心底默默地说——谢谢你，无名的忍徒！
Even though you still don't know who that student is, you can't help but thank them silently from the bottom of your heart: Thank you, anonymous ninja initiate!
哎，这可怎么办是好…都这个时间了，再拖下去就赶不上校庆了。
*sigh* What'll we do... It's already this late, and we won't make the school anniversary if this keeps up.
You seem to have run into trouble.
是啊。我是电影放映部的成员，原本打算要在校庆上播放社团拍摄的作品来着，可部长…啊，就是预定的导演，临时退出了，目前的进度很不妙。

We have. I'm from the Film Club — we intended to play a film the club made at the anniversary, but our director... Ah, I mean the appointed director, he suddenly quit, so it's not looking good right now.
咦…你不是传说中的盛会巨星吗！我在论坛上看过好多关于你的帖子，听说你超有才的！有空的话，来帮帮我们吧！
Hey... Aren't you the legendary Festive Superstar!? I've seen so many posts of you on the forums. I heard you're really talented! Please help us if you've got time!
你们的部长为什么突然退出…
Why did your director suddenly quit...
我不太清楚，可能嫌弃我们只是个学生社团吧，没什么经费，设备和拍摄技术也很差，说是要把电影作为人生志向，却总拍些无聊透顶的片子。

I'm not too sure. Maybe he felt we were just a small new student society with no future. Our budget's meager, our equipment and filming skills are pretty bad, and for all that talk about filmmaking being our life's aspiration, we only film dumb student shorts.
部长在芮克先生的摄影棚实习过，算是见过大场面了，瞧不起这里也正常。
The director used to intern under Mr. Reca, so he's probably seen what real filming is like. It's only normal that he's scoffing at our efforts.
What do I need to do to film a movie?
很简单的，我教你！看到旁边的拼图了吗，首先，我们把场景布置好……
It's really simple. I'll teach you! See that jigsaw by the side? First, we lay out the scene...
All right... I'll think of something else.
请先完成拼图，布置好电影场景。准备就绪后，我们进行后面的拍摄步骤。
Finish the jigsaw first and lay out the scene. When you're ready, we'll go through the subsequent filming process.
好了！这就是我们的电影场景，虽然简单了点，但就这次拍摄而言也够用了。
Awright! This is our film set. It's a little plain, but enough for this filming session.
都到偷工减料的程度了。
You're cutting a few too many corners...
The budget is really this tight?
评判电影好坏的标准不在于成本，而是质量。你瞧瞧克劳克影城那么大的面积，不也没拍出几部传世佳作嘛。没事的，要相信导演的能力。

The standard for film evaluation is in its quality, not its budget. Take a look at how big Clock Studios is — they haven't really made any major hits, have they? Don't worry. Trust in the director's eye.
接下来，就请通过海选的演员入场——
Next, we'll have the actors who passed the screen test enter...
一阵清脆的碰撞声，出现在你面前的是……
A crisp bang, and the one appearing before you is...
剧组的各位，大家好。我叫阿红，从小就作为童星在电影中担任过主要角色，拥有极其丰富的演艺经验，特技是「五秒内就能喷出来」。请多指教。

Hello to everyone in the production crew. My name is Reddie. I've played main characters in movies as a child star, and I have ample acting experience. My special is "spitting it out in five seconds." I'll be in your care.
我、我叫小金…没接触过演艺圈，这是第一次参加电影拍摄。呃…谢谢。
I—I'm Goldie... I've never professionally acted, so this is the first time I'm participating in a film. Umm... Thank you.
…绿。按剧本来就好是吧？我会完成我的工作，就这些。
...Greenie. Just follow the script, yeah? I'll get my work done. That's all from me.
各位演员的特色都相当明显啊，在开拍前，导演有什么想说的吗？
Each actor's got their own unique traits. Is there anything the director would like to say before we start shooting?
Their traits sure are unique indeed...
哈哈，现在的电影讲究的就是人设突出、标签清晰！这下可不会有观众来抱怨说分不清角色谁是谁了——他该去看医生，而不是看电影！

Haha, movies nowadays are all about obvious character traits and clear stereotypes! The audience won't be griping about not being able to differentiate between characters this time — such people should be seeing a doctor, not a movie!
都是老演员了，我相信它们。
They're all veterans, and I trust them.
听起来导演和这些酒瓶很熟？那就好，瞧瞧它们饱满的姿态，即将满溢而出的热情——这就是老艺术家的从容！
Sounds like the director's very familiar with these drink bottles? That's good then. Look at their brimming poise, almost bursting with passion — that's the swagger of a seasoned artiste!
I want to chat with the actors.
当然，这是导演的权利，了解演员的性格才能更好地把控剧本走向——直接向它们问话吧。
Of course, that's only your right, to get to know the actors to better commandeer the set direction. You can speak to them directly.
阿红。我想知道，你为什么要进入演艺圈？
Reddie, I'd like to know why you joined show business.
我的话，应该是受过去经历的影响吧。我很早就接触了演员这个职业，并取得了还不错的成就，所以就沿着这条路走下来了。
It's probably because I was influenced by my past experiences. I was exposed to this industry from an early age and attained decent success, so I just decided to stick with it.
算不上有多喜欢，但绝对不讨厌。并且，这是我的工作，需要的不是无谓的热情，而是足够的能力和认真的态度。
I can't say I really love it, but it's not something that irks me. And it's my job — what's required isn't meaningless passion, but sufficient ability and a serious attitude.
（这位演员相当专业，目前没发现什么问题。）
(This actor's pretty professional. I haven't noticed any problems yet.)
小金。我想知道，你为什么要进入演艺圈？
Goldie, I'd like to know why you joined show business.
咦，在问我吗？可能是…我想成为所有人目光的中心，在大家面前闪闪发光！这是我始终的梦想，也朝这个目标一直努力到了现在。

Huh, you asking me? It's probably because... I want to be in the limelight of everyone's eyes, to shine bright in front of them! This has always been my dream, and I've been working hard to achieve this goal.
绝对要成为全梦境最著名的演员！加油啊，小金！
I must become the most famous actor in all of the Dreamscape! I can do it!
（这位演员对演艺事业相当有激情，但能力或许还有所欠缺。）
(This actor is pretty enthusiastic about acting, but its skill might be left wanting.)
绿。我想知道，你为什么想进入演艺圈？
Greenie, I'd like to know why you joined show business.
别问，问就是我有这个天赋，也有这个需要。仅此而已。
Don't ask me. My answer is that I have the talent, and there is a need for it. That's all.
（这位演员性格有些孤高，不好沟通，但或许是个实力派。）
(This actor's character is quite aloof, and is difficult to communicate with. But maybe it's the real deal.)
Without further ado, let's start the shoot.
收到！请各位演员站到指定位置，我们的拍摄马上就要开始了。
Got it! Actors at your designated spots please. We're going to start rolling.
各位演员都熟读过设定了，我们就直接开始。我来担任旁白，导演注意把控情节的走向，在必要的时候做出决定。

Now that the actors are familiar with their settings, we'll start right now. I'll be in charge of the narration. The director will control the plot's direction, and make decisions when the need arises.
时间差不多咯，准备好——摄影机，启动！
It's about time. Everyone ready... Cameras, action!
即将落幕的校庆，所有学生都在为成为舞台上的明星而奋力向前，其中，三名选手的身影尤为引人注目。它们分别是——
The school anniversary is soon to end, and all the students are clamoring forth to become stars on the stage. Among them, three candidates stand out brilliantly — they are...
看啊，那高贵的红毯正符合我的色彩，那璀璨的聚光灯正为了衬托我的光泽而亮起，那人群和呐喊声正在为我欢呼——我即是那最闪耀的星。

Look, that elegant red carpet matches my color perfectly. The glitzy lights bring out my hue and make it dazzle even shinier. The crowd's screams are their tribute to me — I am the brightest star around here.
不会让给你的！我才是…才是最适合站在舞台中心的酒瓶，没有谁能阻碍我！
I won't let you have it! I deserve it the most... The bottle most qualified to stand on stage is me! No one else will get in my way!
可笑。带着你的白日梦滚回酒窖去吧。我会击败在这的所有酒瓶，登上明星巅峰。
Pathetic. You should slink back with your daydreams. I will defeat all the bottles here and ascend the stage of stardom.
何等激烈的竞争！三位选手明显都是有备而来，对舞台的主角位置志在必得！那么，经过紧张刺激的比拼，谁将成为最终的获胜者呢？

What an intense bout! These three contenders have obviously come prepared, all for the singular goal of hogging center stage! Now then, with this thrilling clash unfolding, who will become the eventual victor?
最终会是谁呢…会是谁呢…是谁呢…是谁……
Who will it be... Will it be... Will it... be...
Director! Hurry up and make a decision!
Eh? I thought the script already decided it?
Oh, I can call the shots?
我们的剧本都是在拍摄过程中完成的，讲究的就是随机应变、敏捷开发，这样才能更好地激发出演员和剧组的创意，避免落入俗套的情节模式。

All our scripts are finished during filming. Our emphasis is on spontaneity and agile development, and that's how we can better evoke creativity from the actors and crew, to avoid the pitfalls of cliched plots.
按照导演对各位演员的理解，给出最后的结局吧，中间部分会由我来补全的！
From what you know of them, you should announce the final outcome. I'll fill up everything else in the middle!
（根据演员的性格和能力来安排剧情…这样临时改动真的没问题么？）
(Arranging the script according to the actors' personalities and abilities... Will such spur-of-the-moment changes really not present problems?)
回忆对三位演员的评价。
Recall your evaluation of the three actors.
（「阿红」相当专业，目前没发现什么问题。）
(Reddie's pretty professional. I haven't noticed any problems yet.)
（「小金」对演艺事业相当有激情，但能力或许还有所欠缺。）
(Goldie is pretty enthusiastic about acting, but its skill might be left wanting.)
（「绿」的性格有些孤高，不好沟通，但或许是个实力派。）
(Greenie's character is quite aloof, and is difficult to communicate with. But maybe it's the real deal.)
The director has decided, and it'll be...
The red bottle will play the protagonist.
毫无疑问，阿红是所有选手中综合实力最为强劲的，按常规来看，她理应成为舞台的焦点。剧情会不会如所有人预料的这般发展呢……
Without a doubt, Reddie is the most capable among all the candidates. For all intents and purposes, she should be the highlight of the stage. Will any unforeseen twists occur in the script though...?
The gold bottle will play the protagonist.
相当有魄力的选择！尽管小金选手满怀对舞台的憧憬，可她的演艺经验尚浅，这份热情能否支撑她击败所有对手，走到聚光灯的中心呢……

A choice very bold! Even with Goldie's unbridled passion for the stage, her acting experience remains lacking. Will this enthusiasm prop her up in defeating her competitors, and guide her toward the light of the center stage...?
The green bottle will play the protagonist.
故事最重要的就是悬念，不是吗？我们对绿选手几乎一无所知，正因如此，我们才相信他能为舞台带来意料外的变化。他是否能成为那最大的变数……

Suspense is imperative in a story, is it not? We know almost nothing about Greenie, and that's why we believe he will bring about the most unanticipated change on the stage. Will he turn out to be the biggest variable...?
阿红选手以压倒性的优势击败了所有对手，是的，毫无悬念，这就是绝对的实力碾压！
Reddie has defeated all opponents with its overwhelming advantage in talent. Yes, indubitably, this is what we call "not even a fair fight"!
我们的故事到这里就要结束了吗，观众们能接受如此平铺直叙的剧情吗？票房撑得住吗？
Will our story call it a day here? Will the audience accept such an obvious plot? Will ticket sales be able to hang in there?
噢！还有反转！会是怎样惊人的展开呢？所有人都等着，只见阿红选手迅捷地跳起……
Oh! A twist! What jaw-dropping display will there be? Everyone is waiting, to see Reddie dexterously jump...
然后稳稳地倒立在了舞台上！
And then do a convincing handstand on the stage!
全场爆发出雷鸣般的掌声，普通的艺人遵守规则，天生的明星引领潮流！在铺天盖地的欢呼声中，我们的故事终于迎来了尾声，符合预期却又始料未及的结局！

The whole room erupts with thundering applause — Ordinary artistes stay in their lane, while it is the gifted stars who will blaze the trail! Amidst raucous cheers and clapping, our story has finally come to an end — a most expected yet surprising ending!
咳、咳咳…咳咳…我的头很难受……
拍摄结束了，感觉还不错吧？哎呀，不愧是著名童星，临场表现能这么出色。
The shoot's over. Not bad, eh? Gosh, that was absolutely the acting chops of a child star. Such an outstanding spontaneous performance.
但你听见了红色酒瓶发出的连续不断的咳嗽声，或许是倒立这个动作对香槟来说实在过于困难——你敢肯定它现在绝对憋了一肚子的气。
But you hear the red bottle's non-stop coughing — perhaps the handstand was too much for a champagne bottle. You're sure it's definitely feeling bloated.
太敬业了，愿意为了电影效果而牺牲健康，你就是天生的演员！下次拍摄还找你！
Such dedication to your craft, to sacrifice your own health for a better scene. You are a born actor! I must have you the next time we shoot!
你不确定这种行为是否值得提倡，但至少，你绝对不希望它发生在自己身上。
