You're not sure if such behavior is worth lauding, but at the very least, you hope it never has to happen to you.
——你对舞台的强烈渴望，正是成为主角的理由。
...Your unquenchable thirst for the stage is the reason you're protagonist material.
初次对战，小金选手便迅速败下阵来。论外表的光鲜色泽，她不如阿红；论内在的沉稳气质，她也比不上绿。那她该用什么来证明自己的独特魅力？

In the first match-up, Goldie is quickly ejected off-stage. She pales in comparison to Reddie in hue and color, and she lacks the gravitas that Greenie can pull off. How then, can she flaunt her own unique charm?
小金选手思考许久，终于得出了结论：她拥有的，只有从内心深处*迸发*出的热情。
Goldie thinks for a while, finally coming to her own conclusion: What she has, is a surging passion that *sprays* forth from deep in the crevices of her desire.
是的。在最终对决的舞台上，小金爆发出了惊人的气势——她喷出的气泡，足足掀翻了舞台上方的巨大气球！谁能想到她其实是一瓶红酒呢？

Yes. In the final battle on stage, Goldie explodes with shocking poise — she spits out enough bubbles to topple a giant balloon above the stage! Who would even have thought that she is actually just a bottle of red wine?
我抓住了那颗星星，却摔得粉碎……
I caught that star, but it fell to pieces...
为了制造出最漂亮的喷泉，小金猛烈摇晃自己的身体，直至玻璃壁都四分五裂。但观众们都相信，那将会是他们此生见过的…最壮丽的景象。

To create the most beautiful fountain, Goldie violently shakes her own body, to the point where her glass walls start to crack. But the audience wholeheartedly believes that it's probably... the most magnificent sight they have ever witnessed in their lives.
拍摄结束了，感觉还不错吧？哎呀，没想到新人演员的表现能这么出色。
The shoot's over. Not bad, eh? Never thought a newcomer's performance would be so outstanding.
但你看见金色的酒瓶躺倒在桌面上——它的瓶身已经变得破碎，其中的液体正缓慢渗透出来。很明显，它已经没法再回应你的话语了。
But you see the golden bottle lying on the desk — it has been shattered, its liquid slowly seeping out. It's clear that it can no longer reply to your words.
演员为了诠释角色，将自己的生命燃烧殆尽…很符合电影剧情，我喜欢这个结局。
To fully interpret her character, the actor burnt her life to cinders... A fitting movie plot, I like this ending.
你不清楚金色酒瓶的真实想法，对它而言这样的结果算是幸福吗？
You're unsure of the gold bottle's true thoughts. Is this outcome really worth it for the bottle?
能确定的是，在折纸大学杂乱的房间里——一个酒瓶的演员梦，轻轻地碎了。
What is certain, is that in a cluttered room in Paperfold University, a bottle's acting dream has been softly smashed.
绿选手，完全的谜。我们仍未知道他的具体信息，他就像是瓶身上那抹绿色般深沉而捉摸不透。但没关系，面对这场激烈的较量，他必须拿出全力才行！

Greenie, a complete enigma. We still don't know anything about him. His character is like that green body of his — ambiguous and unfathomable. But it's fine, for in this intense battle of acting, he'll have to pull out all the stops!
约定之期已到，该告诉你们…我的真实身份了。
The appointed day has come, and it's time to tell you... my true identity.
I am actually a bottle of SoulGlad.
原来绿选手的真身是苏乐达汽水？！怪不得他始终如此自信，成竹在胸，傲视所有酒瓶！
Greenie is actually a SoulGlad bottle!? No wonder he's been exuding sheer confidence, calm and composed, lording over all other bottles!
只见变身后的绿选手随便摇了摇瓶身，喷涌出的无数气泡便将他推到了舞台顶端，那是何等迷人的姿态，任何酒瓶都无法与这份闪耀相媲美！

The now-transformed Greenie nonchalantly shakes its body, spraying forth countless bubbles that push him towards the top of the stage. That mesmerizing stance... no other bottle can achieve such a pinnacle of sparkling beauty!
喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, make your dreams a blast!
拍摄结束了，感觉还不错吧？哎呀，没想到这位特邀演员的表现能这么出色。
The shoot's over. Not bad, eh? Ah, I never thought this specially invited actor would do so brilliantly.
哼，记得把无关镜头都剪掉，只留苏乐达的内容。我们按时长付费。
Hmph, don't forget to cut out the other pointless scenes, and just leave the ones with SoulGlad in. We charge by the hour.
你总算明白了，这并非是普通的学生电影，而是苏乐达公司的广告片，其余酒瓶不过只是个陪衬，更重要的是——你似乎也成了这场商业活动中的一环。

You finally understand — this isn't some ordinary student film. It's an ad for the SoulGlad company. The other bottles were mere ornaments. More importantly, you seem to have become a cog in the business machine.
好吧，名人是非多，你也该学着去习惯这种生活了。
All right. Fame comes with its fair share of drama. It's about time you get used to this life.
This is really the end of the rope...
Please finish the jigsaw puzzle at the side first...
I have nothing else to ask.
这是你所拍摄的电影的剧照——红色酒瓶倒立在舞台的正中央，那光彩照人的模样让你莫名感到有些心酸。
This is a stage photo of the film you shot — the red bottle doing a handstand at the center of the stage, its radiance leaving you inexplicably saddened.
这是你所拍摄的电影的剧照——金色酒瓶如愿站在了舞台的最中央，但这真的值得吗？
This is a stage photo of the film you shot — the gold bottle standing center-stage, exactly what it wished for. But was it really worth it?
这是你所拍摄的电影的剧照——苏乐达汽水瓶独占了整个舞台，在它的光芒之下，任何酒瓶都黯然失色。
This is a stage photo of the film you shot — the SoulGlad soda bottle hogging the entire stage. All other bottles dimmed and faded beneath its blinding radiance.
眼前的装置像是熄灭的火炬，你望着它，没由来地生出一种亲切感。
The device before you resembles an extinguished torch. You look upon it and find yourself filled with an ineffable sense of affection.
随着你手掌的贴近，一颗澄亮璀璨的球体逐渐增大，自装置底部缓缓升起。这究竟是什么原理？你对此百思不得其解。
As your hand draws close, a pure, bright spheroid expands, rising from the bottom of the device. What principles are at work here? You find yourself utterly befuddled.
璀璨的光球复位成功，表面金黄色的液体缓缓流动下，形成奇妙的光晕。
The spheroid has successfully returned to its original position. As the golden fluid on its surface flows slowly, it forms a wondrous halo.
正当你认真观察顶部「火炬」重燃的变化之时，脚下忽然传来强烈的震动——
Just as you carefully observe the changes as the "torch" at the top is reigniting, you feel strong vibrations coming from beneath your feet...
{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，方才工坊传来一阵响动，我还以为是兽群生变，特意前来查看…没想到竟是你重新点燃了吉奥里亚的圣烛。

{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, I thought the commotion I felt in the workshop just now was something happening with the beasts down there, so I came rushing over... and I didn't realize you actually reignited Georios' holy candle.
在老头激动的讲解下，你这才明白，眼前的圣烛是吉奥里亚的信徒所供，却又因不明原因被废弃。
Through the old man's excited explanations, you realize that this holy candle is an offering from Georios' followers, but was eventually abandoned for unknown reasons.
But the chest next to it...
我可以摸摸你的宝箱吗？
Can I touch your treasure chest?
既然是你重燃圣烛，这就是吉奥里亚对你的奖赏…唔，从表面的尘土来看，这多半是深埋在地下的珍宝……
Since you rekindled the holy candle, then this must be Georios' reward... From the dust on its surface, this must be a treasure that has been buried deep...
吉奥里亚以其伟力勒令大地献上祝福——此类事项过往也有记载。
Georios once used divine powers to command the land to offer its bounty forcibly — Such events have also been recorded.
没想到传闻中的事情被我亲眼目睹…真是三生有幸。
I just didn't expect to witness the legends with my own eyes... I am truly fortunate.
好了，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，老头子我也得回去安抚兽群了，愿吉奥里亚庇护你脚下的路。
Alright, {F#little girl}{M#little boy}. This old one's gotta get back and handle his flock. May Georios bless your path.
你熄灭了吉奥里亚的圣烛，又再次点燃。
You extinguish Georios' candle and then re-light it.
但任凭你重燃多少次，你脚下也不见异动传来，你与烛光面面相觑，只有脚下的大地传来切实感，将你从种种浮想中拉回现实。

But no matter how many times you rekindle the candle, you can't find any strange movements beneath your feet. You face the candlelight and feel only the substance of the ground beneath your feet drawing you back from the depths of imagination.
顶端熠熠生辉的神秘装置，它究竟是用的什么燃料？你无从考证，只觉得此时此景，就这么开着似乎有些浪费能源……

A mysterious device that dazzles with radiance at the very top of the installation. What does it use for fuel? You are unable to confirm this. You just feel that it's a waste of energy to leave it on right now...
Turn it off and save some energy.
你无法解释这究竟是什么原理，在你触碰面前的神秘流体装置后，顶部的发光球体忽然下落，光华散尽，一切归于黑暗。
You cannot explain how it actually worked. When you touched the mysterious fluid-like construct before you, the glowing sphere above suddenly dropped and radiance was dispersed to returning darkness.
…糟了，该不会将奥赫玛的公共设置弄坏了吧？你对此感到担忧，但某种突如其来的睡意袭来。
...Oh, no. you didn't damage Okhema's public installations, did you? You feel great worry about this, but a sudden sleepiness comes upon you.
身上传来某种布料的触感，像是有人给你披上了毯子。
You feel the touch of some kind of fabric over your body, like someone sliding a blanket over you.
{F#阿姨}{M#叔叔}，你没事吧？我看你好像很困的样子，一个人在露天睡觉的话，很容易着凉的。
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}? Are you okay? I saw how tired you looked. If you're sleeping out in the open like this, it's easy to catch a cold.
小姑娘朝你做了个鬼脸。
The little girl makes a funny face at you.
对啊，不过你放心，睡相很好，没有踢被子呢，阿妈说，睡觉不踢被子的小孩就是好孩子。
Yeah. But don't worry, you slept really well. You didn't kick off the blankets. Mom says that kids that don't kick off their blankets are sweethearts.
哼哼，欧洛尼斯的圣烛和别的圣烛不一样，一旦熄灭，「永夜」就准备拉开帷幕了。
Fufu. The holy candle of Oronyx is different from other holy candles. When it's extinguished, the "eternal night" will soon rise.
所以…下次可别乱来。这里可是奥赫玛，阿妈说，我们的一举一动，泰坦都能看得见。
So... Don't do that next time. This is Okhema, after all. Mom says that the Titans can see everything we do here.
如果你要坚持露天睡觉，记得向欧洛尼斯祈祷。毕竟…我可不保证你每次都能这么幸运，在帷幕之下能遇到我噢。
If you insist on sleeping in the open, remember to pray to Oronyx. After all... I can't ensure you'll be this lucky every time and run into me under the curtains of the eternal night.
你感到有些疲惫，眼皮不知不觉地耷拉了下来，但很快你又清醒了过来。
You feel a bit fatigued and your eyelids fall in spite of you. But soon, your senses return once more.
耳边隐约传来某道声音，似乎是小孩子的声音，清脆而调皮：「愿欧洛尼斯保佑你～」。
A sound passes next to your ears, ever so faintly. It is the voice of a child, saying: "May Oronyx bless you."
你再三阅读了喷泉池外的说明石板，确信自己没有眼花——上面仔细地描述了这种叫「圣烛」的装置，能在水池中点燃。

You read the instructions on the stone slate outside the fountain over and over. Only after you're sure you didn't misunderstand anything do you confirm the description calls this device a "holy candle" capable of being lit in the pool.
你将信将疑地试了试，缓缓流动的液体自底部升起，长明不灭。
You suspend your disbelief and try it. Slowly, a fluid rises from the depths and glows with a resolute and undimming shine.
你盯着烛芯周身的光，一时间竟看痴了，下意识地屏住了呼吸，世界仿佛在这一秒静止，就连烛火也不再跃动。

You stare at the light around the candlewick and find yourself entranced. You subconsciously hold your breath. It's as if the world becomes frozen in this moment. Not even the candlelight flickers before your sight.
喷泉的池水忽然升起，水流顶端托着什么东西被喷溅开来，差点打中你的脸。
The water from the fountain rises suddenly, and something is lifted with the peaking stream, almost ramming into your face.
刚才究竟是什么东西？你低头看了看，水流已经平息，但你却意外发现喷泉池底部的许愿币不知为何正躺在你的掌心。
What was that? You lower your gaze and see the water calm, but also unexpectedly find one of the many wishing coins at the bottom of the fountain resting in your palm.
或许…这是哪位泰坦的好心馈赠，只是对方有点用力过猛。
Perhaps... This is a kind gift from a Titan, just with a bit too much power infused in it.
点燃、熄灭，圣烛在你的操纵下烛火不断变换，但喷泉池水的表面连一丝涟漪都不曾泛起。
Ignite. Extinguish. The holy candle changes constantly under your control, but the surface of the fountain remains devoid of even a single ripple.
…故事说，刻法勒的仁慈令这个城邦的幼儿们迅速成年，瞬间拥有了对抗敌人的力气。
...Legend has it that Kephale's benevolence allowed the children of this city-state to rapidly mature, granting them the strength to immediately resist their enemies.
哇，好厉害，我也想快点长大！
Whoa! Awesome! I want to grow up fast too!
你面前的装置顶部空荡荡的，这里原本是装什么的？火盆模样的造型…或许是某种热源？亦或是光源？
The installation before you looks empty at its top. What was there before? It looks like a brazier or something... Maybe it is a heat source? Or a light?
呃，年轻人，你是来观光的吗？这个圣烛年久失修，早就不亮了，恐怕你是白跑一趟了。
Oh, young one, are you here to do some sightseeing? This holy candle has been out of order for a long time. It's long ceased to be bright. You have wasted your time.
不过刻法勒的光辉在奥赫玛留下过不少痕迹，你需要的话，我可以给你推荐——
But Kephale's light has left many markings upon Okhema. If you need, I can give you recommendations...
你没有理会好心路人的劝阻，自顾自地触碰着面前的圣烛。
You ignore the kind passerby's words and touch the holy candle per your own volition.
毕竟来都来了，总不能空手回去，哪怕是失败的尝试，但摸一摸，带走一手灰也是好的。
Since you're here anyway, you can't go back empty-handed. Even if this attempt fails, rubbing away some dust from the candle still lets you claim something.
但在你触碰后，圣烛顶部竟升起璀璨的烛焰，那光芒越发强盛——
But after you touched it, a bright flame rises from the tip of the holy candle, and the radiance grows ever stronger...
I... I'm going to be a father!
刻法勒在上，请赐予我全知全能的力量吧！
Kephale above, please grant me the power of omniscience!
圣烛顶部的光华急速变化，这一次你吸取了经验，提前捂住了眼睛。
The glow atop the holy candle changes rapidly. This time, you learn from your experience and cover your eyes in advance.
Wait! Hold on! How did I turn back?
呜呜，刻法勒的祝福不见了…这根本是扎格列斯的诅咒吧？
*sob* Kephale's blessing is gone... Be this Zagreus' curse instead?
故事书里的只是故事…等等，我明白了，你老是向刻法勒大人许愿让它帮你写作业，这肯定是泰坦降下的惩罚。
A story is just a story... Wait, I get it. You're always asking great Kephale to help you do your homework. This must be a punishment from the Titans.
你看你…不许撅嘴，走走走，回家写检讨去，不能对泰坦不敬！
Alright... No pouting. Let's go home and write a report about this. We must not be disrespectful to the Titans!
在烛焰的明灭间，你努力感受着时间的变换，在某个瞬间，你领悟到了什么…可等你睁开眼，一切又消失了。

You strain yourself to feel time's passage within the flicker of the candlelight. For one moment, you feel like you gained an epiphany... But when you open your eyes, everything slips from you once more.
你不明白在浴池里摆出这种装置的用意，这是某种室内烤箱吗？亦或者是壁炉？
You're not sure why such a device has been placed in the bath. Is it some kind of indoor oven? Or a fireplace?
在你按动某个开关后，金灿灿的发光球体升起，带来暖意。
Upon pressing a certain switch, a golden sphere rises, bringing warmth.
远处传来急促的脚步声，不断朝你所在的位置靠近…该不会是这机关触发了什么东西吧，会被追责吗？你下意识地后怕。

You hear hurried footsteps rushing from afar, rapidly closing in on your location... Could you have triggered something with this mechanism? Something to hold you accountable? A fright begins to rise beneath your consciousness.
原来是这个{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}干的好事啊！
Oh, so you're the {F#young lady}{M#young fellow} who caused this to happen!
我就说呢，法吉娜在上，圣烛一燃起来，连池子里的水都香甜了。
I was just saying... Phagousa above! When the holy candle comes ablaze, even the water in the pool turns sweet as nectar.
我们在隔壁开宴会呢，正准备举杯欢庆，忽然一下子饮料就变味了——这味道还是和以前一样，我顺着味道就过来了。
We're hosting a banquet next door. We were about to raise our glasses in celebration, but the drink's flavor suddenly went bad. The smell here is the same as before, so I followed it over.
你这老狗…嘿嘿！倒也没错，从前我们有位老友，他是法吉娜忠诚的信徒，那时圣烛长明，他好几次得到了法吉娜的祝福…为我们带来狂欢的饮品。

You old dog... hehe! Right. We had an old friend once. He was a faithful follower of Phagousa. With the holy candle being constantly lit back then, he gained the Titan's blessing several times and brought us all kinds of beverages suited for carousal.
我们找过来一看，没想到圣烛还有再度点燃的一天，实在是令人怀念。
We came to take a look again and didn't expect to see the candle lit once more. Really takes us back.
可惜我们的老朋友…因为黑潮…哎……
Sadly, our old friend... he... the black tide... *sigh*
莫说这些，莫说这些，来来来，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，顺手从宴会上带了些吃的喝的，你也尝尝，就当是为我们的老朋友共同举杯吧。
Let's not talk about that. Come on, {F#young lady}{M#young fellow}, I brought some food and drink from the banquet. Try some. Let's just treat this as a toast to old friends.
你点燃圣烛，有阵阵幽香传来，连附近的食物看起来也比往常更可口了。
You light the holy candle, and a faint fragrance wafts over, making the food nearby seem ever more palatable.
你熄灭圣烛，佳肴鲜酿的幽香味散了些，你下意识地打了个饱嗝。
You extinguish the holy candle. The scent of the freshly made dishes grows muted, and you subconsciously let out a satiated belch.
浴场的工作人员或许是工作疏忽，竟没有给你准备高温浴池区的器材使用说明。
The workers at the baths might have neglected their duties and didn't offer you any instructions on how to operate the equipment in the hot bath.
你只好发挥自己的聪明才智，结合「高温区」的提示，判断出眼前的装置或许是加热池水的开关。
You can only rely on your own wits and deduce whether the device before you is for heating the pool based on the high-temperature area's indicators.
不过…望着它空荡荡的内里，你确信它并未正常运转。
However... Looking at its empty interior, you're convinced that it might not be operating normally.
你启动开关，明亮的球体升起，带来暖意。不远处的池水边升腾起白雾，温度逐渐升高，就是不知道水温如何。
You turn the device on and a glowing sphere rises, bringing warmth. Pale mists rise from the pool nearby and the temperature begins to climb. You're not sure how hot the water is right now.
那雾气氤氲，你本想走到浴池边，却觉得呼吸不畅——
The mists grow thick. You wish to approach the pool, but find yourself struggling to breathe...
你没事吧？方才你在高温浴池区晕了过去，还好其他浴池的客人发现了你……
Are you alright? You're passed out in the hot pool area. Luckily, other guests in the baths found you...
我过去看了下，圣烛是你点燃的吧？那个…它的按钮坏掉了，我们还在修，本来旁边有放告示的，不知被谁撤走了……
I went over and had a look. Are you the one who lit the holy candle? Umm... its button is broken. We're trying to repair it. There was a notice next to it, but we're not sure who removed it...
抱歉，你身体好些了吗？我们准备了一些常备药物，如果有需要的话请随意使用。要是有什么不舒服，请随时联系我们，我们会全权负责的。

Sorry. Are you feeling better? We have some common medicine for you. If you think you need them, then just go ahead. If you feel uncomfortable, let us know. We'll do everything we can to take responsibility for your health.
你来回开启圣烛装置，但周遭并无变化。你仔细观察，才发现圣烛底座下加了一行字：「圣烛检修中，部分功能已关闭。」

You return to the holy candle, but the surroundings seem unchanged. Upon careful inspection, you find a line of text below the base of the candle: "The holy candle is undergoing repairs. Certain functions have been disabled."
附近商铺的主顾们似乎有着在烛火下立誓签约的习惯，他们将这座长明的巨大烛台称之为「圣烛」。
Some clients of the nearby shops have a habit of making contracts beneath the candlelight. They refer to this giant, eternally lit candlestick, as the "holy candle."
这是供奉哪位泰坦的圣烛？你对此感到好奇，试图从底座上寻找相关的线索，却意外发现了某个开关。
Which Titan is this holy candle dedicated to? You're rather curious about that, and try to figure that out via clues gleaned from the candle's base. Yet, unexpectedly, you found a switch.
但在你手掌触碰间，圣烛顶部的光芒突然熄灭，黄金般闪耀的流体迅速下沉。
But just as you touch it, the light at the top of the candle goes off, and the golden fluid rapidly sinks.
不远处的商铺传来阵阵骚乱声——
A commotion can be heard from a nearby shop...
我钱袋呢？不是…我、我现在结不了账啊！
Where's my coin pouch? No... N—No! I can't pay for anything anymore!
等等，圣烛怎么熄灭了…你…你这家伙好晦气，这生意我们不做了！今天打烊，没了圣烛的庇佑，我心里老觉得不对劲！

Wait. Why did the holy candle go out...? You... You bringer of misfortune, you! Agh! We're not doing business today. We're closing up! Without the holy candle's blessing, something just feels wrong to me!
这、这关我什么事？我家里还等着用呢，老板你通融下嘛……
Wh—What does this have to do with me? I still have people at home who need this. Come on. Just be flexible for once...
你正准备转身一探究竟，口袋里却有陌生的响动，沉甸甸的质感与货币碰撞的声音令你背后一寒。

Just as you're about to turn around and investigate the situation, you feel a strange noise ringing in your pocket. The heaviness, texture, and unmistakable sound of jingling coins cause a chill to run down your spine.
你联想到身后的闹剧…这似乎…该不会…难道…你愣住了。
You think of the scene unfolding behind you... This can't be... can it? You find yourself dazed.
你连忙检查钱袋，钱袋上有古怪的痕迹，细看似乎是某位泰坦的标识。
You hurriedly check your pouch, and find that it has a strange marking on it. It seems to be a Titan's symbol.
你向附近商铺的顾客询问，比对过钱袋信息后，将钱袋还了回去。
You seek out the clients at the nearby shops to compare details about this pouch and finally return the money.
…我明白了，这是扎格列斯的恶作剧，这种事情偶有发生…是我慌乱之间没想起来。抱歉抱歉，错怪你了。这样吧，给你打个五折，算是赔礼。

...I understand now. This is Zagreus pulling a prank. This kind of thing does happen once in a while... I forgot about it in the chaos. Sorry. I shouldn't have blamed you. How about this? I'll give you a fifty percent discount as an apology.
谢谢你啊好心人，在下无以为报，这点礼品就当是我的一点心意了。
Thank you, kind one. There's nothing I can do to repay this good deed. All I have is this as a token of my gratitude.
圣烛底座上有着扎格列斯的标识…钱袋…想必是这位泰坦对你这种外来者的恶作剧。
The base of this holy candle seems to have a symbol of Zagreus... The pouch... This whole thing might just be a prank the Titan is playing on outsiders like yourself.
你收起钱袋就跑，急转身时却不慎摔倒，钱袋跌了出去，旁边商铺的老板在谈话间正好发现。

You take the money and run, but as you're turning, you slip and fall, and the pouch goes flying away from you. It just so happened to get noticed by a business owner of a nearby shop while they were in mid-conversation.
几番比对后，对方确认是面前顾客所丢，你站起身，装作什么也没发生地走了出去。
After a few comparisons, the pouch turns out to be the one lost by the client earlier. Meanwhile, you stand up and walk away like nothing happened.
附近的商人们喜欢在圣烛烛光下签订合约，以求得泰坦的祝福。
The merchants nearby like to sign contracts under the holy candle's light to gain the Titans' blessings.
你对此嗤之以鼻，圣烛底座上有着扎格列斯的标识，向这位泰坦祈求…还是自求多福吧。
This makes you scoff. The base of this holy candle has symbols relating to Zagreus. Praying to this Titan seems a bit... Ah. Best to wish everything turns out well.
古怪的建筑在你面前矗立，顶部的圆球里似有某种黄金般闪耀的液体在微微流动。
A strange structure stands before you. A golden, glittering fluid fluctuates within the sphere above it.
你下意识地想要触碰它，但一道声音喊住了你。
You subconsciously want to touch it, but a voice calls out to halt you.
诶，这位同学，请留步！这里是瑟希斯的「圣烛」，不容他人亵渎。
Wait! Please, hold! This is Cerces' holy candle. No one is to violate it.
How is touching it supposed to be a violation!?
就算你在底下摆再多的水果、鲜花、石板也没用，放久了发烂发臭只会有碍大家在图书馆的学习生活！
It doesn't matter how many more fruits, flowers, or slates you place here. With time, all they will do is rot and reek and affect everyone's studies in the library!
不知为何，听他这么说，望着熄灭的烛火，你心中忽然有种跃跃欲试的冲动。
You don't know why... But hearing him say that and gazing upon this extinguished candle makes you feel an impulse to give things a try.
Never mind. Best not to fiddle with it.
奥赫玛古话曾云：「泰坦赐，不可辞。」你欣然接受了泰坦内定于你的重任，将双手贴近圣烛装置——
An old saying from Okhema goes: "The Titans' offer is not one to be refused." You gladly accept the duty handed to you by the Titan and reach out to touch the holy candle with your hands...
熄灭的烛火竟瞬间被你点燃，黄金般璀璨的光芒差点闪瞎了你的双眼。
The extinguished flame is reignited by you in an instant. A glowing radiance almost leaves you blind.
天啊——我、我研究搁置了这么久，突然一下思路就开阔了，果然…果然！
My word! I've been neglecting my research for so long, and now my thoughts are clear... I... I knew it!
瑟希斯在上，愿以拙作课题献于您光芒之下，以此回报您赐下「启蒙之光」。
Cerces above, I offer my unworthy research topic before your brightness in dedication to your radiant enlightenment.
大家冷静点，不是不让你们祭拜瑟希斯啊，你们这石板啊什么的收一收啊，别人怎么走路啊！
Everyone calm down. I'm not forbidding your worship of Cerces, but I'm telling you to take back these slates. How are people supposed to walk around here!?
诶，这位{F#小姐}{M#兄弟}你还好吧？刚才看你一直傻笑，我还以为你怎么了呢…现在没事了吧？
Hey, you alright, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I saw you grinning like a loon and thought something went wrong for you... you alright now?
Who was grinning like a loon!?
呃，好吧，那换个说法——刚才见你一直露出智慧的眼神，看了就让人心里发毛。
Alright... Let's put it another way. When I saw you just now, you seemed so smart that it gave me the shivers.
诶？你不知道吗？我明明看着你重新点燃了瑟希斯的圣烛啊？
Huh? Don't you know? I watched you light the holy candle of Cerces.
咳咳，这就是…瑟希斯的伟力吗？我的思路瞬间被打开了……
Oh. Is this Cerces' power...? It's like my mind suddenly opened up...
沐浴在圣烛光晕之下，你只觉得自己头顶有些发痒，该不会是有什么泰坦秘传的知识要灌进你脑子里了吧？
Bathed in the glow of the holy candlelight, you only feel a tingling on your scalp. Might the Titan be trying to infuse your mind with some manner of secret knowledge?
你听到路人的咒骂，都是些「瑟希斯求您再度开开眼，赐福与我一定过」「瑟希斯在上，救救孩子的功课吧」之类的闲言细语，还带着哭腔。
You hear curses from passersby. They say things like "Cerces, please open your eyes once more, and bless me to pass my exam" or "Cerces above, save my child's homework" with some measure of weeping.
还好没人发现是你干的，你仔细打量四周后，这才放下心来。
Thankfully, no one discovers the deed is your doing. You survey the area carefully before finally relaxing.
一张平平无奇的纸张吸引了你的注意，上面记录着一串文字：「关注心理健康，保障平安巡航——列车组心理测试，『心理诊疗师』为您服务」。
A piece of plain paper catches your eye, with a message written on it: "For your mental well-being and safe travels — psychological assessment for the Express Crew. Psychotherapist at your service."
在大部分时间里，你都保持着良好的心理状况。但你对自己的某些特质仍怀有疑虑，例如……
Overall, you maintain a stable mental state. However, you still have lingering doubts about certain aspects of yourself, such as...
入睡时，你常陷入奇怪的梦境，尤其是列车发车时。
Often when you fall asleep, you will fall into strange dreamscapes, especially when the Express is departing.
你经常空有一身的「开拓力」，却不知道该使在哪儿。

如果打开背包没有看到足够的星琼，你就会胸闷气短，一口气提不上来。
If you open your inventory and find there's not enough Stellar Jade, a tightness grips your chest, and you struggle to catch your breath.
我的精神状况，世界第一健康！
My mental health is unbeatable — number one in the world!
现在，有一个能够「认识你自己」的机会摆在面前，你会如何选择？
Now that the chance to truly "Know Thyself" is before you, what will you choose?
My mental health really is number one in the world! The best!
因此，你乐意接受一场「心理测试」的挑战！
Hence, you are willing to accept the Psychological Assessment challenge!

哦，那你一定不能错过这个心理测试。它比外面的心理测试都要准确！
Oh, then you mustn't miss this assessment. It is more accurate than any psychological assessment you find outside!
心理测试是假的，但我喜欢！
Psychological assessments cannot be trusted, but I enjoy doing them!
你喜欢通过答题为自己领取一个标签——如果这个标签不够恰当，你甚至会考虑重新测试，直到拿到够酷的那个！

You love collecting labels for yourself by answering the questions in the assessment — and if that label isn't appropriate enough, you'll even consider re-doing the assessment until you get the coolest label!
心理测试都是骗人的玩意儿。

生活的欢悦和痛苦都使你乐在其中，你并不执着于解开这个名为「自己」的谜题。
The joys and sorrows of life captivate you, and you're not fixated on unraveling the puzzle of "thyself."
你按响了一旁的叫餐铃，那位神秘的「心理诊疗师」很快来到了你面前。
You ring the bell for service on the side, and the mysterious Psychotherapist quickly approaches you.
亲爱的开拓者，心理诊疗师「闭嘴」为您服务。
Dear Trailblazer, Psychotherapist Shush is at your service.
不必意外，亲爱的{NICKNAME}乘客，在我设计之初，「关心乘客的身心健康」就被设置为了最首要的功能。
No need to be surprised, dear passenger {NICKNAME}. "Passengers' physical and mental health care-giver" was originally designed as my prime priority.
您请放心，我在闲暇之余，已经将心理诊疗课程自学完毕。
Don't worry. I've completed the psychotherapy courses through self-study in my spare time.
等不及要做「心理测试」了！
I can't wait to take the psychological assessment!
稍安勿躁，「心理测试」马上开始！
Wait a moment. The psychological assessment will begin soon!
在开始测试前，您是否需要甜点、饮品，或是笑话？
Before we start, would you like a dessert, a drink, or a joke?
哈哈，请恕我今天都无法提供，它们带来的欢乐会影响测试的准确度，掩盖一些本就难以察觉的问题。
Haha, sorry, but I can't offer any of those today. The joy they bring will affect the accuracy of the assessment results and conceal issues that are already hard to detect.

I had three options for you — Rapid-Fire Questions, Fashion Quiz, or Brainwave Scan.
容我请问：您希望以哪一种方式展开测试呢？
May I ask: Which one would you like to start with?
占星术中遥不可及的星座早已与我们比邻而居，「答题测试」却仍不减其魅力。恭喜！您选择了一种非常传统，但也十分经典的测试方式。

The unreachable constellations of astrology have long been in close vicinity to us, but the attraction of questions and quizzes never fades. Congratulations! You've selected a very traditional yet classic assessment.
Are you ready to listen to the following questions?

Of course, you can take whichever assessment you like, or retake the assessment. Psychotherapist Shush will always be at your service.
请听题：请您想象一个场景，您的面前有一个盛放了一半的水的玻璃杯。
Please listen to the question: Let's picture a situation where you have a glass half-filled with water in front of you.
恭喜，您是一位「热血开拓者」！无论面对什么困难，你都愿意一往无前！
Congratulations, you are a Hot-Blooded Trailblazer! No matter what kind of difficulties you may face, you will march forward!
您身上有一定「悲观开拓者」的因素。但请别担心，您能够充分预见开拓途中遭遇的困难，并早早做好准备，这也是非常重要的特质。
You are a bit of a Pessimistic Trailblazer. But don't worry. That gives you an important quality, which is the foresight to prepare for challenges ahead while trailblazing.
抱歉，走神了，题目是啥来着？
Sorry, I was a little distracted. What was the question again?
抱歉，您是一位「抱歉开拓者」。
Sorry, you are an Apologetic Trailblazer.
很喜欢某位巡海游侠的一句话：「宝了个贝的，道歉要是有用，还要巡海游侠做什么？」
I love that line from a certain Galaxy Ranger: "If apologies worked, there'd be no fudging need for Galaxy Rangers."
Remember to listen to the question next time. Sorry.
看起来，传统的方式仍有其魅力。它总能用最简单的方式，折射出一个人的内心。
It seems that the traditional method still has its charms. It always reflects a person's heart in the simplest way.
所谓「时尚测验」，是根据受试者的穿搭偏好，测试受试者心象风景的心理测试手段。
The so-called Fashion Quiz is a psychological assessment that evaluates participants' inner landscape based on their tastes in outfits.
那么接下来，请回答：如果不考虑任何其他因素，以下哪种时尚造型更适合您？
Now, please answer: Which of the following fashion looks suits you best without taking into consideration any other factors?
已将您的偏好记录在册。
已将您的偏好记录在册。
没有一件是我的风格吧！
None of them are my style!
看起来，您既不喜欢黑色，也不喜欢红色。
It seems that you don't like black or red.
Is it a matter of color!?
已将您的不满记录在案——未来会增加更多可选色系。
Your dissatisfaction has been documented — more selectable colors will be added in the future.
This is not a psychological assessment at all!
这根本不是颜色的问题吧！
It's not about color at all!
已将您的偏好记录在册。
It means you like classic thick armor.
已将您的偏好记录在册。
说明您喜欢现代外骨骼机甲。
It means you like modern exoskeleton mechs.
这和「时尚」有半毛钱关系？
What does that have to do with fashion?
此言差矣。在当今社会，「强大」乃是一种新的「时尚」。
That's not true. Strength is the new fashion in today's society.
Touché, can't argue with that logic...
已将您的不满记录在案——未来会增加更多可选武装…我是说，可选时尚单品。
Your dissatisfaction has been documented — more selectable armors... I mean, selectable fashion items will be added in the future.
This is not a psychological assessment at all!
谁家时尚单品是外骨骼啊！
What kind of fashion item is an exoskeleton!?
请不要在意这些细节。至少，我确实以此加深了对您的了解。
Please don't mind the details. At least I've gained a deeper understanding of you.
喔，喔。看来我们的开拓者不愧于「开拓」的名号，热衷于尝试新鲜事物呢。
Wow. Passionate about trying new stuff. It seems that you're true to the title of Trailblazer.
我会发射微量电波扫描您的大脑，接收并检测它发出的回声，此过程中可能会有幻觉出现，但请相信，这是完全无害的。

I will emit a trace amount of electronic wavelengths to scan your brain, receiving and detecting the echoes it sends out. There may be hallucinations during the process, but please believe me, it's harmless.
I don't believe that to be the case...
当然，您可以任意选择测试方式，也可重复测试，心理诊疗师「闭嘴」将随时为您服务。
Of course, you can take whichever assessment you like, or retake the assessment. Psychotherapist Shush will always be at your service.
Now, I'm going to start the scan —
像一滴冰水划过脊背，异样的酸麻感从脑髓扩散至头皮，荡起一阵涟漪。
Like a drop of cold water rolling across your back, a strange feeling of tingling stirs ripples from your cerebral fluid to your scalp.
视野逐渐变暗，你那布满丘壑的大脑如同朝阳，在黑暗里缓缓升起——那应该是你的大脑吧？毕竟，「闭嘴」是没有大脑的。
Your vision gradually grows dim. Your brain, furrowed like valleys and hills, slowly rises in the darkness like the sun... That should be your brain, right? After all, "Shush" doesn't have a brain.
Hey hey hey, passenger {NICKNAME}, can you hear me?
Hey hey hey, passenger {NICKNAME}, can you hear me?
哦？有回音，看来「脑波扫描」成功了！
Oh? There's an echo. Looks like the Brainwave Scan was successful!
哦？有回音，看来「脑波扫描」成功了！
Oh? There's an echo. Looks like the Brainwave Scan was successful!
似乎也没那么成功…难道「你也可以成为心理诊疗大师——一百堂公开课」里的步骤是错的？

似乎也没那么成功…难道……

Before the echo ends, the sensation of tingling subsides. Your vision is restored.
抱歉，亲爱的无名客，看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
Dear Nameless, I'm sorry, but it seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.
看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
It seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.
糟糕，难道留下了「复读」的后遗症？

你才是自己身体的主人！你用意志抵抗酸麻感，直到它逐渐平息。
You are the master of your body! You use your willpower to resist the tingling until it subsides.
Hmm? This shouldn't be the case.
难道「你也可以成为心理诊疗大师——一百堂公开课」里的步骤是错的？
Is it possible that the steps in "You Can Become a Master Psychotherapist — <unbreak>100</unbreak> Open Classes" are wrong?
酸麻感忽然褪去。你的视野又重新恢复了。

抱歉，亲爱的无名客，看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
Dear Nameless, I'm sorry, but it seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.
哦，亲爱的无名客，你沉默的样子真迷人。
Oh, dear Nameless, you're so charming when you're silent.
虽然这次测试不太顺利…但我们总该给新技术一些宽容与时间，不是吗？
This assessment didn't go well... But we should always give new technology some tolerance and time, shouldn't we?
保持您的身心健康始终是我最关切的目标，欢迎随时再来。
Your physical and mental health is always my primary priority. You are always welcome here.
桌上的宣传单吸引了你的注意，你依稀记得，它邀请你进行一场「心理测试」。
The flyer on the table catches your attention. You can vaguely remember that it invited you for a psychological assessment.
It wouldn't hurt to take an assessment.

你是说，你凑巧走进派对车厢，凑巧来到宣传单面前，凑巧与它互动了？好吧，触发范围或许应该设置得再小一些。

You are saying that you accidentally walked into the Party Car, accidentally found the flyer, and accidentally interacted with it? Well, the interactive trigger range should probably be set a little smaller.
亲爱的无名客，准备好来一次「心理测试」了吗？容我请问：您希望以哪一种方式展开测试呢？
Dear Nameless, are you ready for a psychological assessment? May I ask: Which one would you like to start with?
有位哲人曾说过：「需有整个昼间的清醒，才有整个夜间的安眠。」有位诗人曾写道：「卧迟灯灭后，睡美雨声中。」
A philosopher once said, "You need to stay awake all day to sleep all night." A poet once wrote, "Lying down late after the lamp is out, sleeping soundly amid the sound of rain."
这两句话和接下来的内容没有任何关系…为什么要和你说这个来着？
These two lines have nothing to do with what's coming next... Why are we talking about this?
无论如何，在辛劳的一天过后，最大的抚慰莫过于回到自己的房间睡大觉。不必定闹钟，不必担忧睡过头，踏踏实实倒头就睡——啊，这多幸福。

Anyway, after a day's hard work, there's no greater relief than going back to your room for a good sleep. Throwing yourself onto your bed with no alarm clock and no worries about oversleeping — ah, how happy it is.
眼前温暖舒适的大床，像一个显而易见的陷阱似的引诱着你。也许你该顺从自己的本心，躺在床上，好好睡一觉。
The warm, cozy bed in front of you beckons like an obvious trap. Perhaps you should follow your heart, lie down, and get a good sleep.
It's not the time to sleep now!
哦，好吧。但切记不要太过劳累，身体是开拓的本钱。
Oh, well. But remember not to exhaust yourself. Your health is the prerequisite for trailblazing.
柔软的床垫，温暖的被子。你枕在云朵似的枕头上，困意顿时如潮水般袭来。
Soft mattress, warm quilt. As soon as your head hits the cloud-like pillow, sleepiness comes in waves.
Turn off the light and have a good sleep.
在黑暗之中，你仿佛觉醒了哺乳动物残留在基因中的本能。这里是属于你的「巢穴」，温暖、黑暗、安全，谁都无法伤害你。
It's as if the instincts lurking in your mammalian genes awakened in the darkness. This is your "lair" — warm, dark, and safe, where no one can harm you.

So, how long are you going to sleep?
明智的选择。睡眠时间并非越长越好，适度的睡眠才能更为有效地缓解疲劳。
A wise choice. Longer sleep doesn't equal better sleep. Moderate sleep is more effective in reducing fatigue.
睡得真舒服呀～又有力气出去胡闹啦！

Sleep as long as I can.
看起来你确实累坏了。请尽情休息吧，没有人会打扰你的。

…嗯？把我干哪儿来了？这还是星穹列车吗？
Hmm? Where the heck am I? Is it still the Astral Express?
{RUBY_B#注：并没有这样的研究}医学研究表明{RUBY_E#}，睡觉时间过长会导致「梦游」。
{RUBY_B#Note: There is no such study}Medical study shows{RUBY_E#} that sleeping too long can lead to sleepwalking.
要不怎么能显得您「开拓」呢！
That's why you deserve the title of Trailblazer!
别乱编医学知识，会误导别人。

In short, please note you may find yourself in strange places after waking up if you are asleep so long~
太困了！我要睡到宇宙热寂！
I'm so sleepy! I'm going to sleep until the heat death of the universe!
没问题。你将如愿睡到宇宙热寂。

就这样，{NICKNAME}睡到了宇宙热寂，连大道都磨灭了。
And so, {NICKNAME} slept until the heat death of the universe, and even the laws of physics collapsed.
没人能叫醒一个装睡的人，更没人能叫醒一个打定主意睡下去的开拓者。

For some reason, you are inexplicably confident in Phainon's math ability. Or maybe it's because he looks like someone who listens intently in class?
不小心的话，一定会认为是<unbreak>40</unbreak>万吧！
If you aren't careful, you'd think the sum is <unbreak>400,000</unbreak>!
但这里有个很明显的陷阱。标价的<unbreak>20</unbreak>万已经在买走大地兽时给商人了，接下来只要还上欠商人的钱，<unbreak>20</unbreak>万利衡币就好了。

But there's an obvious trap here. The price tag of <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> was already given to the merchant when you bought the dromas. You just need to pay what you owe to the merchant now — <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> Balance Coins is enough.
至于涨价的部分…可没有哪条法律规定这也在要还的范围内啊。
As for the price hike... nowhere in the legal constitution does it state it needs to be repaid.
错了错了，吼吼，异乡的勇士，不过如此。不接受惩罚，哪能长点见识？
Dead wrong! Ho-ho, the ability of a brave outsider exceeds {F#her}{M#his} repute. How would one learn without suffering the consequences?
好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…可是，到底哪里出了问题啊？
Owwch! Didn't expect it to bite... But, what exactly did you get wrong?
抱歉！你没事吧，需要治疗吗？！
I'm sorry! Are you all right? Do you need treatment!?
白厄为你包扎了根本没伤的手臂，带着歉意离开了……
Phainon bandages your completely unwounded arm for you, then leaves apologetically...
太过*正确*的答案。但你很清楚，这头狮子一定不会这么轻易放过你。
An overly correct answer. But you are clear that this lion won't let you off so easily.
你在通讯里向阿格莱雅复述了题目…才听完第一句，阿格莱雅便轻笑了声。
You repeat the problem to Aglaea over the comms... She chuckles right after hearing the first sentence.
大地兽是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的神圣造物，只可租赁，禁止私人售卖。
Dromases are the divine creations of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. They are only available for rental — private sale is forbidden.
好哇！敢私下买卖大地兽？
The gall! How dare you illegally sell dromases!
哦、哦吼，这、这只是故意设置的圈套…绝、绝没有亵渎泰坦神明的意思，吼吼……
Oh, oh-ho! Th—This was an intentional trap... I—I would never dare blaspheme the divine Titans, ho-ho...
恰当的缄默是美德，话不多说，本狮直接公布正确答案吧！
An appropriate silence is a virtue. Without further ado, I shall announce the right answer!
等等，这不是答题吗？最好还是不要把现实规则代入题目吧。
Hang on, isn't this a math question? It's best not to involve real-world rules in the problem.
It's better to believe in yourself!
吼吼吼！正确答案是——「根本不用还钱」！
Ho-ho-ho! The correct answer is... it doesn't cost a single coin!
因为交易的时间，不巧正处在「机缘月」。在奥赫玛的历法中，第十二个月份——「机缘月」，是属于{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的月份。

That is because the date for this deal was unfortunately during the "Month of Fortune" — In Okhema's calendar, the twelfth month is the Month of Fortune, which belongs to {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}.
不到月份的末尾，没有人知道「机缘月」究竟有多少天，会不会突然多出一天——也就是俗称的{RUBY_B#闰日}「幽灵日」{RUBY_E#}吼！
No one knows how many days the Month of Fortune would have without reaching the end of the month. There could suddenly be an extra day... which is called a {RUBY_B#Leap Day}Spirit Day{RUBY_E#}!
而你和大地兽商人约定还钱的日期，是「月末」当天。在「幽灵日」出现前，就算是奥赫玛最睿智的法官，也没法判定契约上的「月末」究竟指的是哪一天。

And the day you and the dromas merchant arranged for repayment is on the last day of the month. Before the Spirit Day appears, even the most sagacious judge in Okhema would be unable to determine which day is the "last day of the month" the contract is referring to.
人不可能在两天履行同一份契约。所以，你根本不用还钱。
No one would be able to fulfill the same contract on two different days. Thus, you don't need to fork out a single coin.
吼吼吼！一点小小的手段而已。本狮提醒过，题目里的每个字都很重要吼！
Ho-ho-ho! Just a little trick up my proverbial sleeve. I have reminded you before that every word in the question is equally important!
This isn't a math problem at all...
哦吼？岂不知多少悖论都是由数学家发现的？
Oh-ho? I wonder how many paradoxes were discovered by mathematicians?
更何况，这城中擅长玩弄悖论的何止是本狮？都是在广场、街头和法庭里学来的吼！
Moreover, I am not the only one adept at paradoxical plays in this city. I learned it from the plaza, streets, and justice court!
墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.
在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——

噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？

Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!
哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！

My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

你不想再花时间研究一头狮子的喜好了，因为这听起来真的非常奇怪，不是吗？

瞧瞧，是谁来拜访本狮了，是异乡的勇士啊，又想要接受智慧的考验了么？
Look who's come to visit this lion, a brave outsider. Back for more brain-teasers?

Ho-ho, listen well. This one's an easy one: <color=#dbc291ff>"What can only be knocked down by others, but can never stand up on its own?"</color>

寻常的答案，本狮可不喜欢。我要的是有意想不到的幽默感、能令狮子我捧腹大笑的答案，记住这一点吼！
I dislike regular answers. I want funny ones that will surprise me and send me into bursts of laughter. Remember this well!
问对人了！幽默感…你从不缺少这个东西。无论是把在场听众都整沉默的冷笑话，还是各种谐音梗，你全都信手拈来。
That's totally you! A sense of humor... You've never lacked in this department. Be it the dad jokes that silence the audience, or all sorts of puns, you know 'em all like the back of your hand.
正是银河球棒侠的武器！打倒过的对手不计其数，但…谁会有办法让球棒站起来？恐怕连那位以欺诈与鬼把戏闻名的{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}神{RUBY_E#}也做不到。

It's none other than the Galactic Baseballer's weapon itself! It has beaten down countless opponents, but... who can let a ball bat stand on its own? Even {RUBY_B#Zagreus}the Titan{RUBY_E#} renowned for their cunning and trickery would be hard-pressed to achieve this.
吼吼，有点幽默，但不太多。回答得太过宽泛，如此说来，尼卡多利的长矛岂非也是答案？

好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…你只是想抖个机灵而已……
OUCH! This lion bit you... It was just a wisecrack...
没错，答案就是眼前的这头狮子，你已经学会了以子之矛攻子之盾的答法。

喜欢用古怪的谜语刁难答题人，热衷于在智慧的层面打倒别人。不过，没有四肢和脚爪的狮子，大概是不能*站*的。
Likes to stump the answerer with bizarre riddles, eager to outsmart others in a battle of wits. But a lion without limbs and paws probably can't stand.
哼哼，虽然推论的过程没有毛病，但这个答案真是令本狮笑不出来。你，讲话太直白了吼！

它急了！虽然你输了问答，但总觉得——这把是你赢了！

At the same time, you're very sure that sloppy mud can't stick to walls.
哦吼？有趣，有趣，看来你不是个倒霉蛋，就是个恶作剧高手。无论是哪一种，都让本狮非常愉悦啊，哈哈哈……
Oh-ho? Interesting, interesting. You're either an unlucky fool or a master prankster. Either way, I am highly amused, hahaha...
算你答对了，趁本狮笑得合不拢嘴的功夫，快把手拿出去吧！
I'll consider it the right answer. While I am laughing with my jaw wide open, you should quickly take your hand out!
Boohoo, I am a humorless cretin.
好吧，最天才的喜剧大师也有词穷的时刻，你的幽默感已经山穷水尽，再想下去只会有烂梗，还是放过自己吧。

你确信奥赫玛的朋友们当中有比你更懂幽默的人，邀请谁来回答这个问题好呢？
Are you sure that you have friends in Okhema who have a better sense of humor than you? Who will you invite to answer this riddle?
…原来我在{NICKNAME}眼中是有幽默感的人吗？
Of course, I believe in you.

虽然不知道你为什么想看…但我也很好奇这种感觉是什么。

这个问题让我有些苦恼呢，答案…也许是「歪曲的逻辑」吧。

抱歉…想到的只有这些，希望能够帮到你。

听起来是挺幽默的，但用刻法勒开玩笑，你总感觉自己似乎犯了渎神的罪过。再问问其他人的看法吧。
It's pretty funny, but you feel like you've committed the sin of blasphemy by making Kephale the butt of the joke. Let's ask what someone else thinks.
你有点担心阿格莱雅不喜欢无意义的玩笑，不过，通讯里她的声音听起来并不反感，甚至…饶有兴味。
You're a little worried that Aglaea might dislike meaningless jokes, but her voice over the comms doesn't sound too perturbed. She even sounds... amused.
阿格莱雅的答案如此简单而笃定，你不禁细想起了背后的深意…元老院能靠权力打倒别人，但站不起来是指…算了，这种笑话想得太细就不好笑了。

妙答！妙答！本狮认可你的幽默感了，快快快——把手拿出去吧！

本狮和城中的其他同类不同，无论是什么答案，只要能让本狮发笑，都是正确答案。要想抓住本狮的笑点，不妨再试一次。
I am different from my brethren in the city. No matter what the answer is, as long as you make me laugh, they are all correct answers. You can make a few more attempts to see what tickles my fancy.
本狮和城中的其他同类不同，无论是什么答案，只要能让本狮发笑，都是正确答案。听到了两次有趣的回答，本狮已经心满意足了吼！
I am different from my other brethren in the city. No matter what the answer is, as long as you make me laugh, they are all correct answers. I will be satisfied when I hear two interesting answers!

「一无所有」，这个词并不陌生，毕竟在空间站醒来的时候，你就是一无所有。想想看，什么东西会让你的心情接近那一刻？
Left with nothing. This phrase is not alien to you. When you awoke in the space station, that was what you were. Think hard, what is the thing that is closest to the feeling you had back then?
An exam paper with zero points.
「零分！下一个！」——熟悉的声音在你的脑海里响起。毫无疑问，拥有了却等同于一无所有的东西，是一张被打了零分的考卷。
"Zero Points!" A familiar voice echoes in your mind. Undoubtedly, an exam paper with zero points is something that you own that equals to nothing.

好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……

A piece of gear that enhances all the wrong sub stats.
还有什么比朝错误方向强化的道具更「一无所有」的存在呢？投入所有资源，最终得到的东西却并不是你需要的，这种痛你绝对不想经历第二次。

What concept could be more "nothing" than something that ardently strengthens you in the wrong direction? Investing all your resources, only to end up with something that you don't need — You will never want to experience this pain a second time.
吼吼，很沉痛的回答，见者伤心，闻者落泪呐！可惜可惜，这样的道具只能放在自己的背包里，不能送给别人，这不是正确答案。

Ho-ho, a poignant answer. Those who see it are saddened, and those who hear it are tearing up! Alas, such an artifact should only be left in your own bag, never to be gifted to someone else. This is not the right answer.
好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...
Ask for help with the teleslate.
求己不如求人，要选择奥赫玛的哪位朋友来替你回答这个刁钻的问题呢？
There's no shame in seeking help from others. Which friend from Okhema would you like to seek help from for answering this tricky question?
How about asking Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne?
信息发出去了，孩子们回复的速度一如既往地快。
The message is sent, and they reply in their usual speedy manner.
是什么呢？是寄丢的东西吗？
What could it be? A lost package?
唔…只要是交到*我们*手里的东西，无论怎样都会送到收信人那里。
Mmm... as long as it's something left in our hands, we'll always deliver it to the receiver's hands.
除非是特别粗心的信使，把东西弄丢了。这样的话，收信人和寄信人两边都是两手空空、一无所有啦！
Unless it's a very absent-minded messenger who lost the parcel. If that's the case, the sender, and receiver will both be empty-handed, left with nothing!
是粗心的信使弄丢的东西。
It is a parcel lost by a careless messenger.
吼吼，信使弄丢的东西，根本还没来得及送到收信人手里吧？怎么能算作「在他人手中」？可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
Ho-ho, a parcel lost by a messenger never made it into the receiver's hands in the first place! How can that be considered "in their hands"? Alas, this is a wrong answer.
好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...
缇宝她们的答案暂且记作参考，再问问其他人的想法吧。
Let's take the girls' answer into consideration, and seek another's opinion in the meantime.
…以我所见过的事情来说，是「仇恨」吧。
...From what I have experienced, it is "hatred."
在「纷争世」的战场上，我曾目睹许多惨烈的画面，无数战争的起因都是城邦与城邦、人与人之间的恨意和复仇。
In the battlefields of Era Bellica, I once witnessed many tragic scenes, and countless wars were caused by hatred and vengeance between cities and people.
手握仇恨不肯放下，最后的结果便是…战争让双方都变得一无所有。
Refusing to let go of hatred in their hands would only result in... a war that leaves both parties with nothing.
没错，是无法放下的仇恨。
That's right. It's hatred that people refuse to let go.
哦吼？「仇恨」，有意思的角度，尽管不是本狮心中所想的那一样，但却毫不逊色于原本的答案呐——
Oh-ho? Hatred? An interesting perspective. Even if it's not what I was thinking, it rivals the original answer...
冤冤相报何时了，不错，本狮决定放过你的手，这不过是一次「友好」的问答交流，吼吼吼。
Vengeance only begets more vengeance. Fine, I have decided to free your hand. This is but a friendly exchange of answers, ho-ho-ho.
总觉得这头狮子更喜欢剑走偏锋的答案，再问问其他人的想法吧。
You feel that this lion prefers answers off the beaten path. Let's ask someone else's thoughts.
哼！又是这群招摇撞骗的狮子，它和它的同类还没放弃用谜语来折磨别人吗？
Hmph! More shenanigans from this bunch of trickster lions. Haven't they and their kind given up on torturing others with their despicable riddles?
我的答案是——动摇的信念。身为战士，倘若在刀尖向前的时刻产生动摇，就只剩下必死一条路了。
My answer is... a wavering will. If a warrior's heart wavers even slightly when charging at their enemy, then death would be their only outcome.
况且，信念一旦动摇，士气溃散，整个阵列都会落败，这难道不是一无所有？
Also, if one's will wavers, one's morale will dissipate, and the entire formation will break with this one weakness. Will the army not be left with nothing?
吼吼，不无道理，可惜可惜，答案只需要局限在「两个人」中间。「动摇的信念」，这不是正确答案。
Ho-ho, it is a sound argument. Alas, the answer requires that only two individuals are involved. "Wavering will" applies to one whole army and is not the right answer.
好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...
「动摇的信念」，的确是战士们必须摒弃的事物，可这头狡诈的狮子真的会认同这一点吗？再问问其他人的想法吧。
"Wavering will" is indeed a concept that soldiers need to be rid of, but will this conniving lion accept this perspective? Let's ask another person for their view.
It's better to believe in yourself!
吼吼吼，本狮只好揭露谜底，正确答案是——「债务」。
Ho-ho-ho, I have no choice but to reveal the answer. What I'm looking for is: Debt.
对债务人而言，哪怕借来的利衡币足够买下一整个城邦，法理上也不属于自己，岂不是「一无所有」？
To a debtor, even if his borrowed Balance Coins can purchase an entire city, the money does not legally belong to them. Isn't that being left with nothing?
对债权人而言，手中只有一纸欠条，钱款在债务人手里，谁也不知道债务人会不会按期还钱。拿着欠条，可不能当利衡币用，岂不也是「一无所有」？

The creditor is left with just a debt slip in hand while the money is with the debtor. Who knows if the debtor will repay the money on time? A debt slip is not equivalent to cold hard Balance Coins. Isn't that also being left with nothing?
That's not right. Where did the money go?
吼吼，钱款去哪了，很重要吗？重要的是，在本狮这番理论下，只要是债务关系存续期间，这两个人事实上都是一•无•所•有吼！
Ho-ho, does it matter where the money has gone? What's important is that in my theory, as long as the debt remains unsettled, both parties are realistically left with nothing!
墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.
在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...
(Put your hand into the lion's mouth)
噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？

Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!
哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.
求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!
吼吼，且听好：<color=#dbc291ff>「长得可可爱爱，大家喜笑颜开，门扉时搞丢了脑袋，幕匿时还能找回来」</color>。
Ho-ho, listen well: <color=#dbc291ff>"Looking adorable, everyone laughing gaily, losing its head at the Entry Hour, recovered at Curtain-Fall Hour"</color>.
这个谜题到底是在讲什么呢？想想看，想想看吼！
What is this riddle referring to? Have a think, have a think, ho!
「门扉时」和「幕匿时」…记得在翁法罗斯的历法中分别代表「清晨」和「晚上」。这东西在早晨搞丢脑袋，晚上还能找回来……

The Entry Hour and the Curtain-Fall Hour... I remember these respectively represent "dawn" and "sunset" in the Amphoreus calendar. This thing loses its head in the morning, but can retrieve it at night...
你想起在开拓经历中胖揍过的无数公司职员，他们各个都带着一副「聪慧而隐忍」的面庞。
You recall the countless IPC employees you beat to a pulp along your trailblazing expedition. All of them had a "wise yet restrained" face on them.
是啊，或许只有在下班回到居所拿起手机时，脑子才会长回他们的身体上吧。
That's right. Maybe only after they get off work, go home, and begin scrolling through their phones, will their heads return to them.
吼吼？这视角…十分有趣，但本狮无法认可你的答案！毕竟本狮压根没法下班吼！
Ho-ho? This... is a very interesting perspective. But I do not accept your answer! I never get off work after all, ho!
——好痛！不过你也戳到了它的痛处，算是扯平了？
...Owie! Then again, you also hit its sore spot. Guess that makes it even?
是啊，据你所知，猫头鹰在白天会将头缩进羽毛里呼呼大睡，看上去就像没有脑袋，到了夜晚才钻出来。「黄昏时起飞」——说的就是这个。

That's right. According to your knowledge, owls tuck their heads into their feathers and sleep the day away, so it looks like they're headless. And their heads only pop out at night. "Taking off at dusk" — that's what this is referring to.
不知道猫头鹰老师听见「可爱」这个形容，究竟会作何反应…总之，完全符合题目描述，真是个妙答。
I don't know how Professor Owl would react if he was described as "adorable"... In any case, it fits the riddle perfectly — you're a total genius.
吼吼？虽然有几分道理，但你敢说智慧的化身搞丢脑袋，实在是太没礼貌了！本狮要代替瑟希斯重重地惩罚你吼！
Ho-ho? This answer may make some sense, but it's awfully rude of you to say that the incarnation of wisdom has lost its head! I will punish you in Cerces' name!
好痛！忘了这只狮子也是瑟希斯的忠实信徒了……
That hurt! I forgot that this lion is also a loyal disciple of Cerces...
人们起床时，对枕头而言，它就失去了一个放在上面的脑袋，到晚上才能找回来。而且，蓬松的枕头人见人爱——虽说大家只是喜欢睡觉。

When people wake up, a pillow would have lost the head that laid on it, and only recover it at night. Also, a fluffy pillow is everyone's favorite, even if it's people's love for sleep that makes it so important.
吼？居然答对了？吼，吼…这样啊，吼…别以为这就算证明你的智慧超过本狮了吼？
Ho? You actually got it right? Ho, ho... I see, ho... Don't think that it makes you smarter than me, got it?
Ask for help with the teleslate.
说不定，答案会是翁法罗斯某种独特的事物，既然如此，问问当地的新朋友们或许能得到答案？
Perhaps the answer is something special that only happened in Amphoreus. If that's the case, maybe our new local friends might have an answer?
How about asking Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne?
*我们*知道！这个谜题讲的是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}！
We know! This riddle is about {RUBY_B# the Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}!
因为它有两个脑袋，所以搞丢一个也不要紧哦。
They got two heads, so it's fine to lose one of them.
听起来很可怜！但没事，大大扎是怪家伙，搞丢脑袋也不会觉得疼！
That sounds awful! But it's okay. Big Zaggy's a strange fellow — they won't feel pain even from losing their head!
吼吼，巧妙的视角，然而这并不能成为答案——没人知道扎格列斯的两副面孔是不是真的，那可是「诡计」的化身，说不定它的脑袋长在肚子里呢！
Ho-ho, an ingenious perspective, but still not an answer — no one knows if Zagreus' two heads are even real. It could be a visage of trickery. Their heads could be inside their belly for all we know!
好痛！这狮子看起来没几颗牙齿，咬起人来却格外地厉害啊……
Yowch! This lion looks like most of its fangs are gone, but its bite hurts more than usual...
把缇宝她们的答案当成是备选，再想想其他的吧。
We'll use the girls' answer as backup for now. Let's think of other possibilities.
丢了脑袋还能找回来，是死而复生吗……
To lose one's head, only to retrieve it. Is it resurrection...?
在我认识的人中，能接近这点的或许只有万敌了，他的不死之身算是人尽皆知，也确实受悬锋族人爱戴。
Among the people I know, Mydei's the only one who has abilities that even come close to this. His immortality is known to all, and he is also beloved by the Kremnos clansmen.
吼，吼吼吼…万敌大人确实能死而复生，但这「可爱」，吼吼吼吼吼……
Ho, hohoho... Lord Mydei definitely can rise from the dead, but as for the "adorable" part... hohohoho...
好久没笑到嘴疼了…吼，那个——白厄大人，虽然您没答对，但我可以不咬您，这件事您千万别跟万敌大人提，我怕他把本狮给轰杀至渣呀！

It's been a long time since my jaws have hurt from laughing... Lord Phainon, you may have gotten it wrong, but I won't bite you. Please don't mention this to Lord Mydei, or I fear he'll pound me to dust!
呵呵，放心吧，他也不是你想象的那种人。
Heh heh, don't worry. He's not that kind of person at all.
白厄继续思索着正确答案，低着头离开了……
Still trying to figure out the correct answer, Phainon departs with his head bowed...
Titans help those who help themselves!
吼吼，还是由本狮来公布正确答案吧！那就是——枕头！
Ho-ho, allow me to reveal the right answer then! It is... a pillow!
你想吼，门扉时人们起床，脑袋离开了枕头，这不就相当于枕头把脑袋给弄丢了？幕匿时上床睡觉，对枕头来说，这不就是把脑袋又找回来了？

Think about it. People wake up at the Entry Hour, and their heads leave the pillow. Doesn't that mean the pillow's lost its head? And going to sleep at the Curtain-Fall Hour, doesn't that mean a pillow has found its head once more?
这题的难点就在于，本狮可没说过，搞丢的一定是自己的脑袋吼！怎么样，怎么样？是不是忍俊不禁了吼？
The difficult part of this question is that I never said it had to be the entity's own head! How was it, eh? Eh? Are you tickled?
This lion is very similar to Shush.
吼吼？异乡的勇士还认识和本狮品味相近的才子？吼…要不是本狮没法从墙里出来，绝对要跑去认识下这位贵人吼！
Ho-ho? Warrior from outlands, you know a genius whose wit is comparable to mine? Ho... If not for the fact that I can't leave this wall, I would've run off to befriend this luminary!
What if the person doesn't go home on that day?
吼吼？想钻谜题的空子？本狮可没说具体是哪个幕匿时，无论是多么热爱冒险的勇士，总是要睡觉的吼！
Ho-ho? Trying to play with loopholes? I didn't explicitly state which Curtain-Fall Hour. Even the most adventurous warriors would have to sleep sometime!

吼，问题很简单，但却蕴含着一个深刻的道理：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西令穷人熟视无睹，富人却重金难求？」</color>
Ho, the question is simple, but contains a deeper meaning: <color=#dbc291ff>"What is something that makes the poor turn a blind eye, but is unattainable to the wealthy?"</color>
这狮子的说法…不知为何带着一股老学究的气息，说不定它想要的答案意外单纯。
This lion's tone... It's got an inexplicable scholarly air — the answer it wants might just be ironically simple.
有人会把硬币用旧，有人会把旧硬币当成宝贝…离开翁法罗斯的时候，就顺手抓一把硬币带走吧，说不定星际和平公司会很乐意收购呢。

Some will wear down their coins, others will treat old coins like artifacts... When I leave Amphoreus, I'll just grab a handful of old coins. Who knows, maybe the IPC will be more than happy to buy them.
吼？妙啊。在这历史悠久的奥赫玛，要想收集到过去使用的古币可得花费一大笔开销，而穷人们手里正巧有许多…不对吼？

Ho? Wonderful. In a land like Okhema, steeped in history, one would have to spend a pretty penny to collect ancient coins. Yet the poor probably have plenty of them jingling in their pockets... Isn't that so?
本狮差点被你绕进去了！单纯的旧硬币，和有收藏价值的古董怎么能相提并论？这个答案完全错误吼！
I was almost taken in by your wily train of thought! How could a plain old coin and a collectible antique be of comparable value? This answer is totally wrong!
好痛！这下咬得够狠，你把手抽出来看了看，还好没留下牙印……
Ouchie! What a brutal bite. You quickly take out your hand to see if any marks were left behind...
好痛！这狮子怎么连半句解释都没有就直接动口？
Ouch! This lion bit me before they even gave me a reply!
哦吼。穷人习惯了贫穷，当然熟视无睹，而富人的花销再多，也还是很有钱。不错的讽刺，但…你让本狮意识到了自己也很穷吼！
Oh-ho. The poor are used to poverty, so of course they would turn a blind eye. And the rich remain rich, no matter how much they spend. But... you have also reminded this lion of its poverty!
众所周知——时间，就是金钱。珍惜时间的人，时间才会青睐你。
Everyone knows time is money. One must treasure time for it to favor you.
吼？没想到，居然答对了…既然如此，本狮就勉为其难地表达下赞赏吧。但你也要感谢，本狮用这种方式为你揭示了一个道理吼。
Ho? I didn't think you'd get it... In that case, I will bequeath you with paltry praise. But you must also be thankful that I taught you a precious life lesson in such an interesting way.
吼，趁年轻，要像本狮这样多积累些智慧，异乡的勇士。这样再过上几万个光历年，你就能在利衡币里泡澡了吼！

Ho, you must accumulate a wealth of knowledge like me while your years are still ahead of you, warrior from outlands. That way, you'll be bathing in Balance Coins after tens of thousands of Light Calendar years!
Ask for help with the teleslate.
虽说你也可以试着自己思考，但听听新朋友们的意见总不是什么坏事。
You can try to figure it out yourself, but it's not too bad to listen to the opinions of your newfound friends.
我听够这群狮子的胡话了。按它们的品行，问题绝对不怎么正经。
I've had enough of these lions' blabber. Knowing their antics, this question has got to be another trick.
至于答案，我要说「墨涅塔的赐福」。不是常有这样的说法吗，灾厄是艺术的源泉，生活太过顺遂的人，往往都缺少对美的感受。

As for the answer, I will say "Mnestia's benediction." Isn't there that common saying: Calamity is the wellspring of all art? People whose lives are too charmed typically lack an emotional connection to beauty.
没错，就是「墨涅塔的赐福」！
吼吼，这可不像是万敌阁下能说出的答案啊。难道在本狮不知道的时候，您还经常去观赏广场上的那些悲剧演出？
Ho-ho, this doesn't sound like a usual answer from Lord Mydei. Could you have been frequenting the plaza for tragic plays behind my back?
怎么？你觉得我是个只懂得作战的莽夫？
What? You think I'm just some battle-crazed brute?
本狮不敢，不敢吼，只是随口说说而已…您还是快点把手拿出去吧！
Of course not, I wouldn't dare. It's just banter... you may bring your hand out of here as you please!
万敌瞪了狮口一眼便离开了。
Mydei gives the lion a dagger stare and leaves.
我记得城里的人们在辩论时，提到过类似的话题——答案是「机遇」。据说，这是奥赫玛每个商人都必须铭记的格言。
I remember a debate in the city mentioning something like that — the answer is "opportunity." It's apparently an aphorism that all Okheman merchants must remember.
吼？这是本狮预料之外的回答，逻辑却和标准答案如出一辙。遐蝶小姐的智慧实在令本狮刮目相看。
Ho? Not an answer I expected, but the logic is identical to the standard answer. Miss Castorice's wisdom has opened this lion's eyes.
但是，本狮是头性格古板的狮子，和标准答案不同的统统算错吼！
But, I am but an austere lion. Anything but the standard answer is wrong!
好痛！这狮子可真不懂得变通啊……
Yowch! This lion sure is a stubborn old coot...
…对不起，我没想到会是这种结果。嗯…请你稍等我一下。
...My apologies. I didn't think it would turn out this way. Mm...please wait for me.
遐蝶找来了些药膏，坚持看你敷好后才离开。
Castorice gives you some medical ointments and insists on applying them before she leaves.
Titans help those who help themselves!
吼吼，标准答案还是要等本狮来揭晓——很简单，就是「时间」！
Ho-ho, I shall reveal the correct answer then — simple, it is "time"!
对富人来说，财富是可以随时间不断增加的，拥有的时间越多，能挣到的钱就越多。贫穷的人做不到这点，才会熟视无睹吼！
To the rich, wealth can accumulate with time. The more time you have, the more money you will make. The poor can't do this, which is why they pay no heed!
传统的才是最好的。异乡的勇士还是太年轻了，不懂得智慧的精妙之处吼！
Traditional is always best. You are far too young to understand the wonders of wisdom!
穷人可以既没钱也没有时间。
The poor can have no money and time.
勇士的家乡或许如此，可在奥赫玛，再贫穷的公民都拥有悠闲泡澡的余裕吼！
It may be so in your homeland, but in Okhema, even the poorest folk have the luxury of time to spend in baths!
墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.
在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...
(Put your hand into the lion's mouth)
噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？

Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!
哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.
求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!
吼吼，题目是这样的：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西小时候很可爱，长大后大家却都不喜欢？」</color>
Ho-ho, the question is as such: <color=#dbc291ff>"What is something that is very cute when it's small, but disliked by everyone when it's grown big?"</color>
这狮子出了个怪题目…难道是脑筋急转弯吗？
This lion's asked a weird question... Could it be some brain-teasing trickery?
没错，小小的巧合能让人会心一笑，但要是离谱到了不可思议的程度，大家只会觉得是不是什么地方出错了——
That's right. A minor coincidence will put smiles on people's faces, but if it reaches an impossibly outrageous magnitude, everyone will think that something went wrong somewhere...
妙啊，但很遗憾，巧合也要分好坏，若是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}暗中作怪，撞了大霉运，可就完全不可爱了。答错了吼！

Very good. Alas, there are both good and bad coincidences. If {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} is pulling the strings behind the scenes, the outcome would be unpleasantly un-cute with a surge of bad luck. Wrong answer!
好痛！为什么就不会发生狮口正好坏掉这样的巧合呢……
It hurts so bad! Why can't the lion's maw coincidentally malfunction...
从你为数不多的养宠经验来看，任何动物在幼崽时期都很可爱，但长大后就会发生天翻地覆的变化，认不出来都是常有的事。
From your limited pet-keeping experiences, any animal is super cute when it's young and small, but it undergoes extreme changes when grown, to the point where you can't even recognize it sometimes.
吼，很传统的视角。但那些小时候调皮捣蛋，长大后却极为杰出的人类又该怎么解释？太过片面，这个答案根本不行吼！

Ho, a classic angle. But how do you explain instances where humans may be mischievous when young, but turn out to be exemplars when they're all grown up? Your answer is too poorly thought-out and therefore unacceptable!
好痛！你敢肯定这头狮子从小就很不可爱……
Painful! You're sure this lion was never cute in its youth...
Ask for help with the teleslate.
还是没头绪？你刚好认识几位适合这道题目的新朋友——
Still stuck? You just happen to know some new friends who're perfect for this question...
I wonder if Tribbie is free?
答题…需要把手放进去。但是，*我们*够不到！
You need to... put your hand in for the answer. But, we can't reach it!
可以叠高高，但是很危险。实在太高了，比小白、小敌都要高…会不会，城里很多人都够不到？看起来，除了大工匠外，根本就没人能把手放进去呢~

We can stack, but it's dangerous. It's so tall, even taller than Snowy and De... Perhaps plenty of folks in the city also can't reach it? Looks like no one will be able to put their hand in other than Grand Craftsman!
咬不到手的狮子，就只能急得干瞪眼啦！
A lion that can't bite a hand can only simmer in rage!
呜呜，还请缇宝大人不要再说了，长这么高，也不是我能决定的。到底是哪个没眼光的工匠把我造成这样的啊！
Boohoo, please stop it, Lady Tribbie. It was never my choice to be stuck at this height. It was some second-rate craftsman who made me this way!
缇宝离开后，这头狮子缓了好长一阵子才恢复精神……
After Tribbie leaves, this lion sulks for the longest time before regaining its composure...
我倒是想知道，这种问题，为什么要找我求助？
What I want to know is... why you're asking me such a question?
I just wanted to see you get bitten.
…你是想看我把这头狮子给砸了吧。
...You just want to see me smash this lion, don't you?
算了，答便答吧。我的回答是——「人的个性」。个性独特的人会受欢迎，但要是过了头，到处惹麻烦，那便让人讨厌了。
Forget it. I'll give you the answer. It is... "a person's character." People of unique character will be most welcome, but if they go overboard and cause trouble, that would incur the wrath of many.
战场上更是如此，悬锋城的军法就是为整顿纪律而设立的。狮子，满意了？
It is even more so on the battlefield. Castrum Kremnos' military code was established to instil order. Satisfied, lion?
吼？确实是很符合万敌阁下风格的回答，虽说与标准答案有差距，但既然您亲自来答题，本狮当然要给您开个后门，这口就不咬了吼！
Ho? An answer that fits Lord Mydei's character indeed. It may differ from the standard answer, but since you answered in person, I will show you some respect and dispense with the biting!
你看，这就是我说的那种人。
See, this is the kind of character I was talking about.
万敌瞪了它一眼后便离开了，你感觉到，这头狮子在瑟瑟发抖。
Mydei stares daggers at it before leaving. You can feel the lion quaking in its proverbial boots.
Titans help those who help themselves!
吼，本狮还是揭晓正确答案吧，那就是——「房间里的大地兽」。
Ho, I shall reveal the correct answer then. It is... "a dromas in a room."
试想一下，你走进一个房间，一头小小的大地兽过来迎接你，场面一定十分温馨吼！但要是它长得和房间差不多大，打开门就看见它巨大的鼻孔正对着你吹气——

Think about it: You enter a room, and are greeted by a small dromas — a cozy scene indeed! But when it grows to about the size of the room, and you open the door, only to be accosted by its giant nostrils breathing into your face...
是不是完全不可爱了？就连奥赫玛最虔诚的大地兽爱好者都会为此感到苦恼吼！
Wouldn't that be the opposite of cute? Even the most enthusiastic of dromas lovers in Okhema would be chagrined!

吼吼，题目有点长，要认真听吼——
Ho-ho, the question is a little long, so listen carefully...
…数个光历年前，当时的布拉城城主，在他出资新建成的石桥上剪彩时，桥断了，他因此落水，迎接了塞纳托斯的拥抱吼。
...Countless Light Calendar years ago, when the lord of Bura was at a ribbon-cutting ceremony for a bridge he funded, the bridge broke. He fell into the water and faced Thanatos' embrace.
可是吼，此事疑点甚多，经过塔兰顿信徒的调查，发现城主最后接触过的只有几个人，他们各自的证言如下：

But some things didn't quite add up in this accident. According to investigations by Talanton's disciples, they found that there were only a few people the lord last interacted with. These were their testimonies:
造桥的匠人阿吉说：「吉奥里亚在上，我怎敢偷工减料？哪怕石材上存在一丝裂痕，城主都不会放过我！」
The bridge builder Aji said: "By Georios above, how would I dare cut corners? The lord would have me in irons if there was even a sliver of a crack on a single stone!"
卜者阿洛说：「欧洛尼斯保佑…我早已预言了结局，却无力改变…唉。」
The diviner, Alor said: "May Oronyx protect us... I foresaw this outcome long ago, but I hadn't the power to change it... *sigh*"
值勤的卫兵阿扎说：「我早跟城主讲过了！扎格列斯昨晚给我托梦，践行时桥会断裂，可他没听我的。」
The on-duty guard, Aza said: "I already told the lord! Zagreus came to me in a dream last night, saying that the bridge would falter at the Action Hour. But he didn't listen."
祭司阿努说：「此事简单明了，乃是雅努斯的制裁——对神明不敬会招来毁灭。」
The priest Anu said: "This accident is simple. It was the judgment of Janus — blasphemy against the gods will only invite destruction."
罪恶之人就藏在他们当中。勇士，请指出唯一的那位罪人吼！
The guilty is lurking among them. Warrior, find out who the murderer is!
I want to hear it again.
吼吼，被这精妙的谜题吓坏了吧，本狮就大发善心，为你再讲一遍吼！

There's too much information, but you reckon you can't think about the lion's question the way you normally would. Have a serious think over this.
吼吼！确实，桥梁的筑造者最有可能动手脚，出了事故嫌疑最大的肯定也是他——但很遗憾，答错了吼！
Ho-ho! Indeed, the bridge builder is most likely to have tampered with it, and he would be the prime suspect if anything suspicious happens. However, that is a wrong answer!
好痛！痛到你想掏出你的球棒，但在此之前，还是听听这狮子会怎么解释吧。
Owwwww! It's so painful that you want to whip out your bat. But right now, let's hear what the lion has to say.
吼吼！确实，倒果为因，为了体现预言的正确性而在桥上动手脚，是故事里常见的情节——但很遗憾，答错了吼！
Ho-ho! Indeed, if we work backwards, tampering with the bridge to manifest the prophecy's accuracy is an occurrence common in stories. Alas, wrong answer!

吼？吼吼？厉害啊，居然答对了。但不知道你想的和答案是否一样吼！
