侮辱神使，口出狂言，无视秩序，当受天罚！
You insult the oracle, spout nonsense and disregard Order. Prepare to be judged by the heavens!
这年头，能有你这样大志向的年轻人已经不多了，我很欣慰。
Youngsters with your ambition are a rare sight in this day and age. I am comforted by your presence.
那么，我们现在就来制定新世界的法令吧——每当休息日过去，人们重新开始工作，疲惫与焦虑就会找上来，从而使他们陷入混乱。
Now then, let us lay down a new world order — when days of rest conclude and the people commence work again, fatigue and depression will encroach, causing them to be plunged into confusion.
为了永久性地解决这一难题，我认为，应该取消掉休息日，每天都是星期一——这样就不会因为休息日的结束而痛苦了。
In order to permanently resolve this problem, I believe we should cancel rest days, making every day Monday. Then they won't be suffering when the rest days end.
无视计划，擅自加班，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
Ignoring the plan, working overtime without permission, disregarding Order! Judgment be upon you!
怠惰之人，好吃懒做，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
Slackers who revel in indolence and disregard Order, may judgment be upon you!
This is just plain bad taste.
妄谈大业，藐视铁桶，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
Speaking arrogantly about the cause, defying the steel can, disregarding Order! Judgment be upon you!
对，那么多被周末浪费掉的时间和精力，把它们收集起来，将是一笔无可估量的财富。
That's right. So much time and energy have been wasted on weekends. Consolidating them all would be worth an immeasurable fortune.
到那时，宇宙将变得毫无阴霾，生命就像流水线一样奔向光明的未来。
When that time comes, the universe will be lucid, and life will flow like water, streaming toward a better future.
孩子，我已经能看到，那个只有星期一的幸福世界了。
Child, I can already see a world of joy where only Mondays exist.
自从塔塔洛夫陨落，那些刁民将我等忠良驱逐出境，这度日如年的流亡生活，也不知什么时候是个头。
Since Tatalov's fall, those unruly riff-raff have exiled me — a loyal servant — from the borders. I don't know when this aimless and excruciating life of wandering will end.
这位好心人，能打发点吗？老夫已经好久没开过荤了。
Kind-hearted stranger, spare something? I haven't had a decent meal in a while.
咕，老夫可是个有骨气的垃圾桶，说要垃圾，就只要垃圾，你怎敢用金钱来玷污我的尊严？！
I am no spineless trashcan. If I say I want trash, that's the only thing I want. How dare you use money to sully my honor!?
咕，你这是…这是对老夫赤裸裸的侮辱！这是僭越！真是气煞我也！
Ugh, this is... nothing but a stark insult to me! A travesty! This is an outrage!
咕，你这小家伙，竟然对一位前大臣如此无理，还有没有王法，有没有天道？
Bah, how dare a brat like you treat a former minister with such rudeness! Is there even any law left in this domain?
I don't have anything to spare either.
原来你也是同道中人，作为长辈，我本该接济你点垃圾，只可惜老夫一路乞讨过来，也没留下多少存货。
Ah, you're in the same plight as me. As the elder, I would share with you some of my supplies, but I had to rely on the kindness of others on my way here, and I don't have much to offer.
我见你的样子，到此地应该有段时间了。老夫初来乍到，桶生地不熟，有些事情还望你不吝赐教。
You must have been here for some time. I haven't been here long, and am unfamiliar with this place. I actually hope that you can advise me on some matters.
听说这里有些不法之徒，专门把我们这种无家可归的垃圾桶骗去回收站，当作廉价劳工，不知此事是否属实？
I hear there are outlaws around here who trick homeless trashcans like us to the recycling station to be sold as cheap labor. Is any of this true?
咕，你这小辈怎如此放肆，我那些同僚一个个铁骨铮铮，怎会去做这种事？你肯定也是骗子的同伙！
The cheek of a brat like you! My upright comrades haven't a single impurity in their steel. Why would they resort to such lowly deeds? You must be in cahoots with those fraudsters!
咕，我可是塔塔洛夫的心腹大臣，怎会去做如此不体面的事情，你怕不是在羞辱本垃圾桶！
I am a trusted minister of Tatalov. How could I be involved in such unsavory acts? Your question is an insult!
Isn't it better than your situation now?
咕，我这是效仿古代的贤者垃圾桶，享受着无拘无束的生活，你这小家伙懂什么！
I am walking in the footsteps of sage trashcans of old, enjoying a life free of burden! What do you know, brat!
看来是老夫多虑了，我看此地如此繁华，几乎能与先皇的王宫比肩，又怎会出现这般无法无天的恶徒。
Looks like I was worried for nothing then. I see that this place is prosperous, almost on par with the palace of my former emperor. I'm sure lawless ruffians would not appear here.
小友，此去一别，便不知何时才能相见…听说有个新的垃圾站，现在还没被其他垃圾桶占据，老夫就先走一步了。
Little friend, who knows when we'll meet again with this farewell... I hear there's a new trash depot that hasn't been occupied by other trashcans. I'll take my leave first.
Who can give me some trash?
I wonder where that hero is...
我听闻有位不世出的高手受邀来到「{TEXTJOIN#87}」，{F#她}{M#他}继承了塔塔洛夫的衣钵， 身手了得……
I heard that a supreme master has been invited to {TEXTJOIN#87}. Having inherited Tatalov's mantle, {F#she}{M#he} must be a skilled fighter...
在传闻中，{F#她}{M#他}头顶是灰色的，自幼吃垃圾长大，因而天赋异禀，肩膀上面能跑弹珠机。

Legend has it that the crown of {F#her}{M#his} head is gray, and that {F#she}{M#he} grew up eating trash. As a result, {F#she}{M#he} has been imbued with extraordinary talent, so much so that {F#her}{M#his} shoulders can support a pinball machine.
{F#她}{M#他}臂力极为强劲，平日里手提一根重达千斤的烧火棍到处闲逛，跟没事人似的…仅凭一人一棍便在家族手里夺下了「{TEXTJOIN#87}」的所有权。

{F#Her}{M#His} arms are incredibly strong, as {F#she}{M#he} wanders around every day, carrying a flaming bat in one hand like it's nothing. With just a single bat, {F#she}{M#he} managed to wrest control of {TEXTJOIN#87} over from The Family's grasp.
不知你是否见过这位高手？我定要拜入{F#她}{M#他}门下，求得绝世武技！
Perhaps you've seen this incredible master? I must become {F#her}{M#his} disciple and learn some skills from {F#her}{M#him}!
What the... This sounds exactly like me!
你这细胳膊细腿的，怎么好意思自比的？真是不要脸…吃我一拳！
Look at your paper-thin arms and scrawny legs... How dare you compare yourself to such a person? How shameless of you. Take this!
I've never heard of such a person...
哼！孤陋寡闻！我这一路上明明听到所有人都在讨论{F#她}{M#他}的事迹，你装什么不知道，莫不是骗我的？你什么意思？！
Pfft, ignorant! I've been hearing everybody else discussing {F#her}{M#him} just walking down the street, yet you expect me to believe that you know nothing of this matter? Do you think I'm dumb?
The person you're looking for is right in front of you. Are you not going to acknowledge your master?
是了，灰头发，烧火棍，原来你就是！
Hm... Gray hair, flaming bat... It really is you!
吃垃圾长大…这不是骂人吗？
Grew up eating trash... Isn't that an insult?
怎么说话的！在垃圾桶王国，只有最高贵的桶才有资格吃垃圾！你这是歧视，我要代表王国上下狠狠惩罚你！

Preposterous! Only the most noble of trashcans are allowed to eat trash in the Trashcan Kingdom! How dare you discriminate against trashcans... On behalf of my kingdom, I shall punish you most severely!
呃啊啊啊啊！这装束…这球棒…的确是传说中的{NICKNAME}！
Ahhhh! Your attire... Your bat... You are indeed the legendary {NICKNAME}!
…抱歉，是在下失礼了！师傅在上，请受徒儿一拜！
I sincerely apologize for my rudeness! Master, please accept me as your disciple!
垃圾桶膝下有垃圾，不许跪！
Do not bend the knee so easily, trashcan!
…我也没说要跪啊，莫非…我懂了！你竟想用这个来折辱我？讨打！
I didn't say that I would kneel, unless... I get it now! You wish to humiliate me in this fashion? You're just asking for a beating!
I do not wish to accept you as my disciple...
难道是觉得我道歉不够诚恳？还是…噢，你看不起我的资质？是，我承认我天资不如你聪颖，你竟然就因为这种事看不起我？作为高手，你的格局呢？

Perhaps you find my apology not sincere enough? Or perhaps... you do not see any potential in me? Yes, I admit that I am not as talented or as clever as you, but you're looking down on me just because of this? As a skilled master, shouldn't you be more gracious?
If I accept you as my disciple, are you going to offer me a present?
我都诚心诚意地来拜师了，还要什么礼物，你该不会连我的垃圾都想薅吧？为人师表脸皮这么厚…你、你有辱斯文！

I bear the utmost sincerity in asking for your acceptance, yet you require a gift from me? Surely you're not looking to take my trash away from me as well? Despite being a master, you're so thick-skinned... Y—you're an absolute disgrace!
徒儿请起，以后不可轻敌。
Rise, disciple. Do not underestimate your enemy next time.
我不，我既然失礼了，当然要表达我的诚意，你作为我的师傅，怎么可以这么不负责？你得对我的桶格负责！
I shall not, master. Since I was disrespectful, it is expected that I express my sincerity to you. As my master, how can you be so irresponsible? You must take responsibility for my improper conduct!
起初我还半信半疑，但现在我敢肯定…你就是传说中的高手！
Initially, I was doubtful of your abilities, but I am now certain that... you are the legendary master!
感谢师傅怜悯，放我入门拜师学艺。师傅你这身手当真了得，跟你切磋过之后，我感觉…我突然有很多感悟…浑身都在发烫，怎么回事？

Thank you for your great compassion in accepting me as your disciple, Master. After a bout with you, I have finally realized how incredible your skills are. In this instant, I am suddenly overcome by emotion... Wait, my entire body is heating up. What's going on?
…啊啊啊啊啊我的盖子痒痒的，好像…好像有什么东西要冒出来了？！
Ahhhh... My lid is itchy, as though... as though something is about to emerge from it!?
说话间，它忽然浑身颤抖，你目瞪口呆地看着它在不断变化，直到它再次起身……
As the trashcan continues to speak, it suddenly begins to tremble violently. You can only stare with your mouth agape as it continues to transform, until it finally rises again...
师傅！我已经悟了！原来真正的力量并非外形的变化，而是在于心与心的融合！
Master! I've finally understood! True power does not come from the transformation of one's appearance, but from the melding of hearts!
But I didn't teach you anything...
你说的每一句话我都视为真理，这正是我开悟的秘诀！我知道了，你信不过我，来，咱们练几招你就知道了！

My secret to enlightenment is simple: I just viewed every word that came out of your mouth as the truth! I know that you don't believe me, so... let's spar for a few rounds. You'll definitely notice the difference!
But your appearance has clearly changed...
师傅，为什么你要执着于这种肤浅的变化？哎…你着相了，弟子要打醒你！
Master, why are you placing such emphasis on superficial changes? I'll make you see sense!
I think you're making baseless assumptions.
师傅，你可以批评我，但不能这么自轻自贱！你明明教了我很多东西呀！
Master, while you can criticize me all you want, please don't belittle yourself! You clearly taught me tons of things!
不愧是我徒弟，孺子可教也。
You are indeed my disciple. There might be hope for you yet.
哈哈，师傅你说话还真实诚！
Haha, you really are frank, Master!
现在的我已经不是过去的我了，我现在能感受到每一片垃圾的声音…它们在呼唤我！
However, I am no longer the same trashcan of before. I can sense the voices of every piece of trash... They are calling out to me!
…师傅，你身上是不是揣着不少垃圾？我听到它们对我说…它们说你是最勇敢的开拓者，你可以教会我别的桶都无法接触的技艺。

... Master, you are carrying a decent amount of trash with you, right? I can hear your trash crying out to me... They say that you are the bravest Trailblazer, that you'll be able to teach me skills that no other trashcan would ever be able to master.
Master, hurry up and teach me!
师傅，你可以批评我，但不能这么羞辱我的人格！
Master, while you can criticize me all you want, you cannot insult my dignity!
好，我教你如何清理垃圾。
Alright, I'll teach you how to clean up trash.
…可是垃圾与桶本为一体，如何清理？为何清理？我不明白，请师傅给我展示展示吧！
... But trash and trashcans are one and the same, so how can I clean it? Why should I clean it? I don't understand, so please demonstrate it to me, Master!
Don't forget to train your legs as well as your body!
说得对，我这腿还不够强健…腿要怎么练？请师傅赐教！
You're right, my legs aren't quite strong enough... How should I train them? Please teach me, Master!
Ah? What did you say, Master?
徒弟没听明白…噢我懂了，你是想直接实战训练吗？没问题！
Your disciple didn't quite understand you... Ah, I see. You wish to teach me through actual combat, right? No problem!
不愧是师傅，换做其他桶，定然会因为我是只柔弱的桶就怜惜我，不敢使出真实本领。师傅你就不一样了，几番切磋下来，我筋骨都活动开了。

Master is powerful indeed. If it were any other trashcan, they'd definitely take pity and hold back from using their true power on a weak trashcan like me. However, you are not like them, Master. After a few bouts, I feel as though my muscles and joints have been thoroughly warmed up.
谢谢师傅的耐心指导，徒儿受益匪浅，容我好好消化一下！
Thank you for your patient guidance, Master. Your disciple has learned a lot from you. Give me some time to digest what you've taught me!
师傅，我已经不再是那个普通的垃圾桶了。我将用我的存在证明，即使是最不起眼的角落，也能发光发热……
Master, I am no longer that ordinary trashcan of when we first met. I shall use my existence to prove that even the most inconspicuous of corners can shine bright like a diamond...
我最近偶有感悟，融合了过往的见识，创造了一套全新的「桶之体术」，师傅你能否为我指点一二？

Recently, I've come to realize some things. By combining these realizations with my experiences, I've created a brand-new set of Trashcan Combat Techniques. Master, perhaps you could offer a few pointers?
Come, show me what you're made of!
师傅请留心，这可是徒儿最强的招式——
Master, please be careful. This is my strongest technique—
你自己琢磨去吧，我还有事。
You should ponder on it yourself. I have other matters to attend to.
好吧，师傅你的大事要紧，徒儿唯有自己多想想了。
Alright, your matter is more pressing, Master. This disciple will reflect alone.
Who am I? Where am I...?
我该去哪儿来着？这里又是什么地方？我、我我我…我怎么都想不起来了！
Where should I go? What is this place? I, I—I... I remember nothing!
我记得…我是个垃圾桶？不对…这个身份的真实性很可疑。是不是每个人，每个物体，都有可能不是他们表面上的模样，那我到底是什么……

I seem to remember that... I am a trashcan? No... It's doubtful that it's true. Could it be that every person and every object isn't what they actually look like on the outside? If so, what could I be...
路过的好心人，你瞧瞧我的模样，你觉得我是啥？
Kind passerby, could you look at me and tell me what you think I am?
我承认我在目前这个阶段，身体是垃圾桶的造型，但谁知道我下一秒会是什么呢？你给我下定义…这也太武断了！
Well, I admit that as of this moment, my body does look like a trashcan. However, who knows what it might change to in just a while? How can you make such a subjective judgment of me right now!
Either way, you don't look humanoid.
形态只是联觉信标体系之外的一种通用表达，你看我不像人，我还觉得你不像人呢！
Form is but a kind of communication beyond the Synesthesia Beacon system. You think I don't look like a human? Well, I think you are the one who doesn't look human!
真正的观察，是心灵与心灵之间的注意，你的眼睛可能有什么问题。
True observation involves paying attention to each other's souls. There might be a problem with your eyesight.
哲学家？这个称呼听起来很高端，但每个生命体不都是在用自己的方式思考世界吗？在这个意义上，每个人都是哲学家。

Philosopher? While that title sounds very highbrow, isn't every living organism trying to comprehend the world via their own methods? From this perspective, everyone could be considered as a philosopher.
这种泛滥成灾的称呼，你拿来形容我，说明你根本就不懂我，也不懂哲学……
The fact that you're using such a ubiquitous title to describe me shows that you neither understand me nor the concept of philosophy itself...
You are a bottle of SoulGlad.
太对了！我觉得我就是苏乐达！冰冷的瓶身掩盖不住我甜蜜的内心……
That's right! I think that I'm a bottle of SoulGlad too! An icy bottle of a body can't hide my sweet inner thoughts...
对了，你知道这里是什么地方吗？我怎么感觉像做梦…所有事物都很虚幻，就连你我都不例外……
Right, do you know where we are? Why do I feel as though I'm inside a dream...? Everything looks so unreal, including you and me...
Well, you are currently inside a dream.
梦里？我就说…这种晃晃悠悠的感觉，还有真正的我，只可能出现在梦里……
In a dream? I knew it... This floating feeling, as well as my true identity, could only be possible inside a dream...
「晖长石号」？你确定吗？这只是一艘空艇的名字，但我可以叫「晖长石号」，你也可以叫「晖长石号」，「晖长石号」也可以改名……

The Radiant Feldspar? Are you certain? The Radiant Feldspar is just the name of an airship. I could be called the Radiant Feldspar, you could also be called the Radiant Feldspar. In fact, the Radiant Feldspar itself could have already been renamed...
你拿一个不定期改名的旧名敷衍我？！
How dare you try to fool me with a name that changes every so often!?
我给你跪下了！你能不能不要这么说话，天哪，我的垃圾疙瘩都要掉出来了，好恶心……
I'm begging you... Can you stop talking like this? My goodness, all of my trashy goosebumps were about to fall off. How disgusting...
你是不是克劳克影业的家庭伦理剧看多了，这么恶心的话你是怎么说得出口的？！你清醒一点，人不能活在荧幕里！
Did you watch too many of Clock Studios' family dramas? How could you say such disgusting things!? Wake up! Humans shouldn't spend their lives addicted to screens!
你也不知道吗？那么，我们是否都在这个未知的空间中迷路了？无知并不可怕，可怕的是我们停止了探索和寻找答案的勇气……

You don't know as well? If so, are we all lost in this unknown space? The unknown is not a scary place, what's truly scary is how we've stopped discovering the world and our lack of courage in searching for answers...
我走了，正如我哐当哐当响地一路走来。
I'm leaving in the same way I arrived — one clattering step at a time.
如果这一切真的只是一场梦，那我希望在醒来之前，能找到属于我的答案。每个人，每个物体，都在这个宇宙中寻找着自己的位置。

If this is truly a dream, then I hope that before I awaken, I will be able to find an answer that truly belongs to me. After all, every human and every object is searching for their place in this universe.
再见，好心的路人，谢谢你给了我这么深刻的启示。或许某一天，我们会在梦境的尽头再见……
Goodbye, kind passerby. Thank you for providing me with such a profound revelation. Perhaps we'll meet again one day, at the Dreamscape's end...
谐乐学院谈灵感，一切务实靠边站。筑梦学院爱摆烂，遇到问题叉手看。财富学院是傻蛋，设下诡计自个绊。垃圾学院千千万，一旦选错就业难！

When Charmony Academy talks of a muse, all pragmatism they refuse. Dreamweaver Academy loves to slack. When problems arise, they turn their back. Fortune Academy is full of clowns, setting traps that trip themselves down. Trashcan Academy? They're a dime a dozen! Pick the wrong one, and you'll find your path frozen!
哦，一位新生！来吧，求学前路茫茫，让我「分院桶」助你理清去向！
Oh, a new student! Come, the road to learning is winding and long, allow the Sorting Can to show you where you belong!
什么？这里可是教室，禁止校外人员扰乱课堂秩序！
What? This is a classroom — outsiders are forbidden from disrupting lessons!
保安呢？！哦，原来我就是啊——
Where's security!? Oh wait, I'm security...
这由不得你，孩子。一切取决于你的品性…还有家庭条件。
It's not up to you, kid. It all boils down to your character... and your family background.
这个桶盖会扣我头上吗？
So I'll have to wear this trashcan cover?
桶盖？这可是分院的盖！入学流程岂是儿戏，要对学校的传统心怀敬意！
Trashcan cover? It's a sorting lid! The admission process isn't some child's play, respect the school's tradition, every step of the way!
Go stand out in the hallway!
新生就敢自比为尊贵的「垃圾」…实在太过妄自尊大。
A freshman dares self-proclaim themselves esteemed garbage... Sheer arrogance.
先看看你有没有办法通过我的考试吧！
Let's see you crack my test first!
莫慌，原先确实由我进行主观判断，但时代变了，流程应该也要简化。答了这道题，我们便知道你该归于何处。
Don't worry, I was originally the one who made the executive decision, but times have changed — the process should be simplified. I will know where you belong once you answer this question.
——你在路上走着，一个强壮的垃圾桶堵住了你的路，你会怎么做？
...As you are walking along a road, a brawny trashcan blocks your way. What will you do?
对生命的探究，对民众的慈悲！你一定会热爱「桶医学院」的生活！就业全然不成问题！
An inquisitive mind into life, and compassion for the public! You will surely love life at Trashmed Academy! Your employment will be assured!
只要能在一个琥珀纪之内背完三千本书上的七十万种病例就能毕业！没时间让你在这浑浑噩噩了，赶紧实习！

As long as you can memorize all seventy thousand illnesses across three thousand books within an Amber Era, you will definitely be able to graduate! No time to muddle around right now, you need to get to interning!
Beat it up before all else!
强而有力的决策！你一定能成为在垃圾桶王国有头有脸的人物！正适合新兴的「星际垃圾事务」学院！
A strong-handed decision! You will surely become a respected figure in the Trashcan Kingdom! Absolutely suited for the newly established Interstellar Garbage Affairs Academy!
一年学费够建一所新的学院，根据家系影响力来算分！来吧，第一课的课题——如何进行制裁！
Annual fees are enough to build a new school. You'll be graded according to your family's prestige! Come, the first lesson has begun — how to impose sanctions!
怎会如此…你对事物本质的理解如此透彻，正符合「桶哲学院」的入学要求！
How is this possible... Your profound understanding of the essence of matters makes you a perfect candidate for Can Philosophy Academy admission!
Ignore the trashcan and continue forward.
嗯，你的答案体现不出任何特色，我认为你没有任何特长！而最适合你的去处当然就是——
Okay, your response was pretty mid. I don't think you have any special talents! Therefore, the best place for you will be...
「桶制作学院」！为了在垃圾桶王国找份好工作总要优先考虑的学院！来吧，现在是入学考试！
Cancrafting Academy! To land a decent job in the Trashcan Kingdom, our academy should be your first consideration! Come, now is the time for the entrance exam!
我为你感到骄傲，新生。记住，找工作并不是桶生的目的！学习才是！
I'm proud of you, freshman. Remember, finding a job is not the main goal of your life as a trashcan! Learning is!
说了这么多，最后告诉你一个秘密——其实，我也没上过学！
After saying so much, let me tell you a secret — honestly, I've never attended school!
Learning, is the easiest thing to do.
塔塔洛夫说过——「享受美好的校园生活时，记得要时刻敲响警钟，毕竟校园同样是容易滋生恶念的苗床。」
Tatalov once said, "While enjoying your lovely school life, remember to always keep a vigilant eye. After all, the campus is a ripe breeding ground for malicious intentions."
昨日，我在这里看到一位柔弱的小桶，正在被恶霸的桶拳打脚踢。如果是你，会如何处理这件事？
Just yesterday, I saw a defenseless can being beaten up by a bully can, right here. If it were you, what would you do in this situation?
Join the bullying can in kicking the little can.
你做出了最难以接受的选择，即使宽宏如塔塔洛夫，怕是都无法容忍你的暴行。
You've made the most unacceptable choice. Even someone as magnanimous as Tatalov will be unable to accept your savage act.
买瓶苏乐达，找个靠前的椅子。
Buy a bottle of SoulGlad and find a seat near the front.
塔塔洛夫曾教导过我们——视若无睹，与罪人同罪。
Tatalov taught us that turning a blind eye to crime is equivalent to being complicit in it.
你应当理解柔弱之人的心境，就像…这样。
You should be more understanding of the mental state of the weak, just like... this.
Kick the bullying can together with the little can.
没错，塔塔洛夫教导我们，垃圾桶应当正直、勇敢、乐于助桶。我做出了相同的选择。
That's right, Tatalov taught us that trashcans should be righteous, brave, and helpful. I made the same decision.
Beat up both of those cans!
你这…塔塔洛夫并没有教导过遇到疯掉的桶该如何应对……
You... Tatalov did not teach us what to do if we meet a crazy can...
但没关系，修修总会好的！
But do not worry, it can be fixed!
唉，即使贤明如塔塔洛夫，校园中时常可见的霸凌行为也让他头疼不已。
*sigh* Even the wise Tatalov is troubled by the common occurrence of bullying in school.
而要根除这种现象，需要每一个垃圾桶的努力。
If we want to uproot the problem, we need the combined efforts of every trashcan.
现在换个视角，若你是那位柔弱的小桶，恶霸桶对你施加暴行，该如何应对？
Now let's change our perspective, if you were that defenseless little can, and that bully can exerts violence onto you, what would you do?
…除非你哭得足够大声，否则很难解决问题。
...Unless you cry loud enough, it probably won't solve anything.
来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!
寻求帮助是一种解决方案，但并不能一劳永逸…况且我也不是随时都有空。
Seeking help is a solution, but it's not a permanent one... Also, I'm not always free.
来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!
正确，虽然我并不提倡以暴制暴，但这是消除欺凌最直接的方案。
Correct. Although I don't advocate violence against violence, this is the most straightforward way to eliminate bullying.
很遗憾，多数不公都是因此而不断扩大。
Alas, most injustices grow bigger because of this.
来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!
重点是，不要成为加害者，也不要忍气吞声——愿你度过美好的校园生活。
The main point is, don't become a perpetrator, but don't suffer in silence — hope you have a great time in school.
回见。我要去巡视一圈，看看有没有其他需要帮助的桶。
See you later. I'm gonna go patrol around and see if there are any other cans that need my help.
I won't leave a single misdeed unchecked!
深绿色的苔痕深深地渗入了顶板，这个专为小妖精设计的信箱是如此老旧，以至于风可以毫无障碍地从裂纹中穿堂而过，如同你的目光。
Deep green moss has crept into the top plate. This mailbox, made for tiny fairies, is so old that even the wind can slip effortlessly right through the cracks, just like your gaze does.
你看见信箱里堆积如山的信件。
Inside, you see a mountain of letters lying forgotten.
道德感和好奇心的决斗尚未分出胜负，你的手就已经替你做出了选择。
Your morality wars with curiosity. Yet, your hand has already made the choice for you.
Peeking at someone else's letters is wrong!
道德感和好奇心开始短兵相接。硝烟散去，这场残酷决斗的赢家是——好奇心！它捂着伤口说：「咳，打开它，打开那封信……」
Morality and curiosity waged a fierce battle. When the smoke clears, the winner of this brutal duel is... curiosity! Clutching its wounds, it gasps: "Go on... open it. Open that letter..."
Might as well respect its wish.
这封信竟然来自<color=#dbc291ff>白厄年幼时的笔友。</color>
It's a letter from <color=#dbc291ff>Phainon's childhood pen pal.</color>
白厄，你到底有多少好伙伴！
Phainon, just how many pals do you actually have?
哀丽秘榭果然是个熟人社会。
Aedes Elysiae really is a small world, huh?
这只名叫咪发迷的小妖精一直等待着白厄回信，该怎么办呢？
This tiny fairy Mifamem has been waiting all this time for Phainon's reply. What should you do now?
如果是白厄的话，一定会这么做的。
If it were Phainon, he definitely would.
Better wait for Phainon to reply himself.
这种事可不能代劳。不如向刻法勒祷告，说不准白厄还能听到。
This isn't something you can do for someone else. Maybe pray to Kephale. Who knows, Phainon might even hear you.
可能很多人都没有意识到，你手里的羽毛笔除了战斗外还有个出人意料的用途，那就是写字。好久没写字，你简直有点按耐不住了。
Most don't realize your quill pen isn't just for battle. There's one surprise usage of it — it writes. You haven't written in ages, and honestly? You're kinda itching to start.
首先是开篇…该怎么打招呼呢？
First, addressing the recipient... how should you begin the letter?
（好伙伴，能收到你的来信，我真的很高兴……）
(Dear pal, it fills me with joy to receive your letter...)
（说起来你可能不信，我不久以前还被当作收藏品，关在一个空间站里……）
(You probably won't believe this, but not long ago, I was treated like a collection and locked away in a space station...)
然后是中间…咪发迷对冒险故事很感兴趣，给它讲什么好呢？
Now for the middle... Mifamem's into adventure stories. What should you tell them?
白厄的历险，说来话长了。
Phainon's journey is gonna take a long while to tell.
（奥赫玛、悬锋城、神悟树庭、命运重渊…这些年里，我踏足了很多地方……）
(Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove of Epiphany, Abyss of Fate... I've walked through so many places over the years...)
我有些更险象环生的故事…
I've got even wilder stories to share...
（说起难忘的冒险，那就不得不提起旅途的第一站了……）
(If we're talking unforgettable adventures, then I've got to start with my very first stop on the road...)
最后是结尾…咪发迷不知道该如何打扫树屋，替它解决困扰吧。
And for the ending... Mifamem has no clue how to clean their treehouse. Time to help them out.
Teach them how to make a "broom."
（我当年为你做的实际上名为「扫帚」……）
(What I made for you back then was actually called a "broom"...)
Just let it go. Toss it and move on!
（咪发迷，你要多想：给文明以工具，而不是给工具以文明……）
(Mifamem, remember this: give tools to civilization, not civilization to tools...)
写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.
大功告成！你把信投入信箱。不知道咪发迷收到信会是什么表情？
Mission complete! You slip the letter into the mailbox. Wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the letter?
或许明天就能收到回信，明天再来看看吧。
Maybe the reply will arrive tomorrow. Come check again then.
怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。直到某个时刻，你忽地听见了「哐当」的声响……
With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. Until, at a certain hour, you heard a sharp "clang"...
陈旧的信箱手足无措地站在这里，摇摇晃晃，好像一阵风就能吹倒。
The old mailbox stands there awkwardly, tottering as if a gentle wind might knock it over.
你小心翼翼地打开信箱的门，震下阵阵草屑。蛛网和苔藓之间，一封新的来信正躺在那摞信封的顶端。
You gently open the door, scattering bits of grass and dust. Amid the cobwebs and moss, a brand-new letter lies on top of the old stack.
从咪发迷飞扬的字迹里，可以看出它跃然纸上的欣快心情。
Mifamem's handwriting is literally leaping off the page, their delight radiating through the paper.
一字不漏，你的记性未免也太好了！
Word for word? Your memory is scary good!
Let me take a breather first.
这么久都等下来了，也不差这一两天。
After waiting all that long, what's another day or two?
首先是开篇…对于一篇文章来说如何开篇很关键。咪发迷似乎察觉到了什么，该怎么糊弄过去呢？
First up, the opening... The soul of any letter. Mifamem seems to have noticed something amiss. How to convince her otherwise?
（好伙伴，我当然是白厄！八岁那年……）
(Of course I'm Phainon, good partner! When I was eight...)
（首先，白厄被称作救世主，我也拯救过很多世界；其次……）
(First, Phainon is known as the Deliverer. I've saved plenty of worlds too. Second...)
然后是中间…中间部分是一篇文章中最关键的。咪发迷想知道怎么修理信箱，这信箱是该修修了。
Now for the middle... The heart of any letter. Mifamem wanted to know how to fix the mailbox — and honestly, it could use some fixing.
（我曾游历一个古老国度，那里的人对木工有独特的见解……）
(I once traveled to an ancient kingdom where their carpentry defied all I knew...)
（家门口的邮箱可能会坏，但电子邮箱永远不会坏……）
(Sure, the mailbox outside your door might break, but an email inbox's practically immortal...)
最后是结尾…结尾比文章的其他部分关键太多了。如果需要升华主题的话，再不动手就来不及了。
And finally, the ending. A good one makes all the difference, seriously. If you wanna make the topic of the writing more sublime, this is it.
Maybe just wrap it up nice and simple.
（修理不是一件困难的事。磋磨、雕琢、切割，和练习挥剑一样，由无数个简单至极的瞬间组成……）
(Fixing things isn't hard. Sanding, carving, shaping... it's a lot like practicing swordplay where it's composed of countless extremely simple moments...)
（手指摩挲着木纹的痕迹时，你感受到它所感受到的……）
(When your fingers trace the grain of the wood, you start to feel what it feels...)
写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.
一气呵成！不知道咪发迷收到信会是什么表情？
Written in one go! Wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the letter?
或许明天就能收到回信，明天再来看看吧。
Maybe the reply will arrive tomorrow. Come check again then.
怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。直到某个时刻，你忽地听见了「哐当」的声响……
With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. Until, at a certain hour, you heard a sharp "clang"...
信箱焕然一新了。苔痕、裂缝和穿堂风都已成过眼云烟，现在它志得意满地站在你面前，准备着你的检阅。
The mailbox has been reborn. No more moss, no more cracks, no more chilly wind whistling through. It stands proud and tall now — ready for your inspection.
你心领神会地打开信箱，新的来信果然躺在那摞信封的顶端。
You instinctively reach for the mailbox. Sure enough, a new letter rests right on top of the stack.
不必咪发迷在信里赘言，你就知道它的修理计划获得了成功。真叫人倍感欣慰。
Even without Mifamem spelling it out, you can tell: The repair project was a success. That warm sense of satisfaction washes over you.
你又欠我个人情，「救世主」！
You owe me another one now, Deliverer!
一字不漏，你的记性未免也太好了！
Word for word? Your memory is scary good!
Let me take a breather first.
生命花园的奇美拉都不带这么干活的。
Even the chimera from the Garden of Life wouldn't work this hard.
首先是开篇…咪发迷很疑惑为什么回信这么快，该怎么解释呢？
First things first: the opening. Mifamem was very puzzled by how you managed to reply so quickly. How should you explain?
（在刻法勒脚下的奥赫玛，居住着一群红色头发的信使……）
(At Kephale's feet lies Okhema, home to a group of red-haired messengers...)
（…恐怕是思念的力量吧？有些设定只能感受，不能细想。）
(...Maybe it was the power of our thoughts? Some things just feel right, you're not supposed to overthink them.)
然后是中间…咪发迷想知道怎么做饼干。吃了睡睡了吃，小妖精的生活就是这么简单。
Now for the middle part... Mifamem wants to know how to make cookies. Eat, nap, eat again... that's just how fairies live their best lives.
Teach them how to make "crisp wheat biscuits."
（我也有一阵子没有尝到过它的味道了……）
(It's been a while since I've tasted any myself...)
教它一些非同凡响的料理！
Introduce something a bit more exotic!
（行人如织的奥赫玛，同样有着非同凡响的佳肴。其中最为人称道的，便是名为「红土块」的料理……）
(The bustling streets of Okhema are also home to extraordinary cuisines. Among them lies a dish that stirs the soul, known only as the "Redsoil.")
最后是结尾…该说的都说过了，好像没什么需要回复的了。
Finally, the closing... Everything's been said. Not much left to reply to, really.
（你要好好吃饭，好好睡觉，每天都要开开心心的！）
(Make sure you're eating well, sleeping tight, and smiling every single day!)
No words left? Then best not to force it.
(I'll end it here. All is well.)
写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.
行云流水！不知道咪发迷收到回信会是什么表情？
Smooth! I wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the reply?
或许明天就能收到回信，明天再来看看吧。
Maybe the reply will arrive tomorrow. Come check again then.
怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。但这次，你等来的不是新的来信……
With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. But this time, what arrived wasn't a new letter...
来信静静躺在信箱的中央，等待着被答复。它有的是耐心，像一块石头一样沉默、平静、锲而不舍。
The letter rests quietly in the middle of the mailbox, waiting patiently for a reply — silent, calm, and stubborn as stone.
如果是白厄的话，一定会这么做的。
If it were Phainon, he definitely would.
Sorry, I don't want to write.
这也是一种锻炼勇气和真诚的方式。

（这位…莫非是一直给白厄写信的小妖精？）
(Is this... the little fairy who's been writing to Phainon all along?)
迷…风铃到底为什么不响了呢？
Me... why won't the wind chime ring anymore?
唔，是从没见过的客人迷！
Mmph? A visitor I've never seen before, memi!
这个风铃，不管多大的风、多大的雨，用多大的力气敲，都发不出声音。
No matter how strong the wind, how heavy the rain, or how hard I strike it, this wind chime won't make a sound.
所以我正在纳闷，是不是哪儿坏了迷？
So I'm wondering maybe something's broken, memi?
这只小妖精似乎很烦恼的样子， 既然都和它做了那么久的笔友，还是帮忙帮到底吧。
This little fairy seems troubled. You've been pen pals this long, might as well see it through.
迷！可以吗？那就多谢你了迷，好心的过路人！
Memi! Really? Thank you, thank you, kind passerby!
记不清河鱼洄游了多少次，露水干枯了多少次，邮差来了又走多少次…连松树爷爷的眼泪也变成了亮晶晶的琥珀，没想到，我竟然又听见了它的声音。

I've lost track of how many times the river fish have swum upstream, how many mornings the dewdrops have dried, how many visits the postman has made and gone... Even Grandpa Pine's tears have turned into shining amber. And yet, just now, I heard it again.
迷迷！和那个时候一样，还是那么清脆。
Mem! That same clear, ringing sound. Just like back then.
你就像命运为我派来的使者一样，真的太感谢你了迷！
It's like fate sent you to me. Thank you so much, memi!
我只是个路过的开拓者罢了。
这个风铃对你来说很重要吗？
That wind chime, is it really that important to you?
迷…这个风铃，是我最好的朋友送给我的。那时我们都还没有离开过家乡，约好风铃响起，就一起出发去外面的世界冒险迷！
Memi... this chime was a gift from my best friend. Back then, neither of us had ever left our home. We promised, when the chime rang, we'd head out into the world together, memi!
可是，一次急匆匆的告别之后，他就再没回过迷境，也再没有回过信。
But after a hurried goodbye, he never came back to Maze. And he never sent another letter.
我一直在想，他是不是还没有准备好，或者临行前也害怕啦，所以偷偷躲进树屋，用大叶子遮住窗，钻进被窝，一觉睡到现在还没有醒？

I kept wondering... Maybe he just wasn't ready. Or maybe, right before he left, he got scared, and quietly sneaked into the treehouse, pulled the big leaves over the window, tucked himself into bed, and fell asleep, so deeply he still hasn't woken up.
That really sounds like something he'd do.
Busy, busy, guess staying busy isn't so bad.
我也想过去迷境外面看看，但每次踏出家门，害怕的念头就又会像跳跳虫一样一蹦一蹦地跳进脑袋迷。
I've wanted to see the world outside Maze too, but every time I step out the door, scary thoughts start bouncing into my head like little jumpy bugs, memi.
家里还没收拾干净，还没做好旅行的口粮，离开太久的话家里怎么办？风铃没有响起，恐怕不是个好兆头吧？
The house still needs tidying. I haven't packed food. If I'm gone too long, what'll happen back home? And the wind chime... it hasn't rung. That can't be a good sign, can it?
迷…每次想破脑袋也想不出这些问题的答案，最后只好夹着尾巴灰溜溜地回去了。
Me... I rack my brain and never find answers. In the end, I always slink back home, tail tucked low.
不过——偷偷告诉你，我好久没有回信的好朋友，最近终于回信了迷！
But — just between us, my friend who hadn't written in so long, finally sent me a letter, memi!
是呀，还回了好多封迷！<color=#dbc291ff>他教会我打扫树屋，教会我修理信箱，教会我做好吃的，还告诉我好多外面的故事…就像当年一样。</color>

It is! He sent so many, memi! <color=#dbc291ff>He taught me how to clean the treehouse, how to fix the mailbox, how to cook delicious food, and told me so many stories about the outside world... just like before.</color>
于是，我打点好家里，修理好信箱和屋子，又做好口粮。这次我再也没有借口了，就算没有他陪我一起，我也要跨出那一步迷！
So I cleaned up the house, repaired the mailbox and the roof, and packed my food. This time, I have no more excuses. Even if he's not by my side, I'm taking that first step, memi!
迷…告诉你一个秘密，今天，我就要出发了！你…你觉得我能做到吗？
Memi... I'll let you in on a secret: Today's the day I set off! Do you... do you think I can really do it?
但是，无论你做出什么样的选择——
我相信我们会在旅途中再次相遇。
I believe we'll meet again, somewhere along the way.
嘿嘿…不知道为什么，<color=#dbc291ff>总感觉我们不是第一次见面了呢。</color>
Hehe... I don't know why, <color=#dbc291ff>but I feel like this isn't the first time we've met.</color>
The time to depart has come, memi.
虽然知道咪发迷已经踏上了旅途，但你还是打开了信箱…是过往记忆的驱使吗，还是确实期待着什么意料外的惊喜？
Even though you know Mifamem has already begun their journey, you still open the mailbox... Was it nostalgia guiding your hand? Or perhaps... hope for a surprise?
果然，信箱里静静躺着一封新的来信。
Sure enough, a new letter rests quietly inside.
咪发迷也经历了跌宕起伏的冒险，击败了坚不可摧的敌人呢！对它来说，甲壳虫也算坚不可摧了。
Mifamem has faced wild adventures and conquered unbreakable foes! Though to them, even a beetle counts as unbreakable.
它像往常一样向你提出了问题，好想告诉它，但这次好像没有可以回信的地址。
As always, they have asked you a question. You long to answer. However, this time, there's no return address.
还是相信它自己的力量吧。
Maybe it's time to trust in their strength.
毕竟，所有孩子都是要离开家乡的啊。
After all, every child must one day leave their home.
风铃铁了心默不作声。再敲一次试试？
The wind chime stays stubbornly silent. Try ringing it... one more time?
风铃发出一丝喑哑的叹息。胜利在望，再敲一次试试吧。
The wind chime lets out a hoarse little sigh. Victory is close, try ringing it one more time.
我怎么也敲不响这个风铃…没准凭你的力气，可以把它敲响？
No matter how hard I try, I can't get this wind chime to ring... Maybe with your strength, you can make it work?
这个风铃，怎么敲都敲不响呢……
No matter how to strike it, the wind chime refuses to make a sound...
风铃晃荡一阵，没有发出声音。
The wind chime swayed for a moment, but didn't make a sound.
你仔细查看风铃，一切都完好无缺。或许还缺少一些能让它响起的契机吧……
You took a closer look, and nothing seemed broken. Maybe it just needed the right moment to ring...
叮——这个承载着「启程」约定的风铃再度响起，仿佛应和着来自过去的遥远回音。
Ding — this wind chime carrying the promise of "Departure" rang again, as if echoing a distant memory from the past.
这只小海豹孤独地划着水，仿佛一尾游鱼，甚是自在。
This baby seal paddles along all on its own, like a fish in the water, calm and carefree.
…不过，为什么它的眼里会透露出一股坚毅？
...But why does it have such determination in its eyes?

软乎乎的小海豹，在水池里一摇一摆，嘟嘟的，嘟嘟的…真是可爱到不行~

风铃发出悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生。
The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that.
可惜，你还以为能召唤出小精灵呢。
Aww, and you really thought it'd summon a sprite or something.
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都——
The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Other than that, nothing—
等等，那是什么！那小小木棚承受了生命不该承受之重，它的顶端，竟然出现了一只庞然巨兽……
Hold up, what's that!? That tiny wooden hut is buckling under a massive weight... something huge just appeared on top of it!
Why is there a dromas here, of all places!?
风铃叮叮当当，就像是怦怦的心跳，好浪漫呀。
The wind chimes are ringing, just like heartbeats... It's so romantic.
别紧张！这只是人家的小魔法。我努力变出了书上的生物，它不会攻击你，也不会把木棚压塌的。
Don't panic! It's just a little spell of mine. I tried summoning a creature from the book. It won't hurt you, and the hut's sturdier than it looks!
对了，风铃上残留的魔法还没有用完，下次路过时，{NICKNAME}也可以试试。
Oh right, there's still a bit of leftover magic in the chime. Next time you walk by, {NICKNAME}, you should give it a try!
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。但这次出现的不是大地兽，而是一匹雅努斯之驹。
The chime makes a pleasant sound again. Instead of a dromas, it summons a Janus' Steed this time.
莫非这是攻城木马，里面藏着怪物，想要入侵这座美丽的村庄……
Could it be... a Trojan Horse? Maybe there's a monster inside, ready to invade this peaceful village...
仿佛是对你的回应，木马打开了，仿佛回应着你的冤枉：我的胸膛，空空荡荡……
Almost as if replying to your suspicion, the wooden horse creaks open: Its hollow chest has nothing inside...
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。这次，只变出了一只憨态可掬的小海豹。
The chime makes a pleasant sound again. And this time, a cuddly baby seal pops out.
看来风铃上的魔法是定量的，用一点少一点。也许下一次，魔法就会失灵吧。
Looks like the chime's magic is limited. The more you use it, the weaker it gets. Maybe next time, it won't work at all.
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生——昔涟留在风铃上的魔法用完了。
The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that. Looks like Cyrene's magic has finally run dry.
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生——昔涟留在风铃上的魔法用完了？
The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that. Looks like Cyrene's magic has finally run dry?
风铃发出了悦耳的声音。你知道，昔涟的魔法已经用完了，什么都变不出来——
The wind chime sings a lovely tune. You know it now that Cyrene's magic is gone. There's nothing left to summon.
等一下，变出来了一只小奇美拉！不过，怎么有点眼熟……
Wait a second, a little chimera appears! But it looks kinda familiar...
原来是你熟悉的{TEXTJOIN#237}！也许它在这附近玩耍，听见风铃声便跳出来和你打招呼呢。
Oh! It's your good ol' {TEXTJOIN#237}! Maybe it was just playing around when it heard the chime and popped out to say hi!
鲜花的芳香、绵软的草坪、叶隙中筛下的阳光……
The scent of fresh blooms, the softness of the grass, the sunlight filtering through the leaves...
之前怎么没发现这样一个休憩的圣地？
How did I never notice this perfect little haven before?
真是不可思议…哀丽秘榭的草地，竟然比私人浴宫的床铺更加舒适。
Unbelievable... The grass here at the Aedes Elysiae is even more comfortable than the beds in the private bath chamber!
阳光带来丝丝缕缕的暖意，隔着衣裳浸染肌肤……
The sunlight seeps through your clothes, wrapping your skin in a gentle warmth...
嗯？这么没防备地睡着了…可是会被坏人盯上的，要小心哦。
Hm? Dozing off like that without a care in the world... Gotta be careful, you might draw attention from the wrong sort of people!
瞧你睡得，都犯迷糊啦，是不是连人家都不认得了？
Look at you, still half-asleep. Can't even tell who I am anymore, huh?
听说在某些小角落打盹的话，会被小精灵施加沉睡的魔咒，就此长眠不醒呢。
They say if you doze off in certain hidden corners, fairies might cast a sleeping spell on you, and you'd never wake up again.
但别担心，万一发生了这种事，人家一定会使用唤醒的魔法，像今天这样把你叫醒哦？
But don't worry! If that ever happens, I'll come find you and cast a wake-up spell, just as I did like today!
这是一只「自由」的奇美拉。无需完成任何事务，只是在这广阔而寂寥的大地之上休憩，日落而息，日不落也息……
This is a chimera of freedom. No duties to fulfill, no burdens to bear — just resting under the vast, lonely sky... sleeping at sunset, or sleeping even when the sun doesn't set.
小奇美拉一溜烟地逃走了。也许正是因为它这般警惕，才能够免于劳役吧？
The little chimera darted away in a flash. Maybe it's this sharp sense of caution that's kept it free from a life of toil.
这是一只小奇美拉，不知为何会出现在神像边。如果奇美拉也信仰泰坦，它会祈祷什么？
It's a tiny chimera, for some reason, hanging out near the statue. If chimeras could believe in the Titans, what would they pray for?
是个好愿望，但看上去这就是小奇美拉的日常。
That's a good wish, but it's probably the daily routine of a little chimera.
是个好愿望，但看上去它甚至不愿统治哀丽秘榭。
That's a good wish, but this little guy doesn't even seem interested in ruling Aedes Elysiae.
它睡得如此香甜——最好不要打搅它的美梦吧。
It's sleeping so peacefully... Better not disturb its sweet dreams.
这是一只小奇美拉。或许你在哪里见过它。
It's a little chimera. Maybe you've run into it somewhere before?
好可爱的奇美拉！得给它起个甜甜的名字才行，你有什么主意吗？
What an adorable chimera! It deserves a really sweet name. Any ideas?
Let's just call it Guardian of the Wheat Field.
好浪漫的名字，小家伙窝在麦田里的样子一定很可爱吧！
Such a dreamy name! I bet it looks so cozy curled up in the fields.
Let's just call it Holy Wubbaboo.
是因为它嗷呜嗷呜地叫，所以叫呜呜伯吗？
They call it Wubbaboo because its cries go awoo-awoo, huh?
Let's just call it Curious Chimera.
是因为它一副很好奇的样子，所以叫好好奇美拉吗？
Because it's got that super curious look on its face, right?
Let's just call it Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake.
好适合的名字，小家伙看起来就软软糯糯的！
Perfect! It does look soft and squishy!
Why don't you give it a name?
真的吗？那人家可要好好斟酌一下。不如就叫……
Really? Then I better pick something special. How about...
Wait, you mean I'm a chimera!?
Not bad! It actually fits pretty well.
嘻，开个玩笑。只是觉得{NICKNAME}的名字很好听。
Hehe, just kidding. I just think {NICKNAME} is such a beautiful name.
至于小奇美拉…不如就加入哀丽秘榭小精灵的大家庭，叫「奇美啦迷」吧！
As for the little chimera... why don't we let it join the Aedes Elysiae's fairy family and name it Chimeramem?
它好像很满意自己的名字！{TEXTJOIN#237}…今后我就这么叫你啦，小家伙~
It seems really happy with its new name! {TEXTJOIN#237}... I'll be calling you that from now on, little one~
欢迎你一直来玩。如果愿意留下来，我们会给你送好吃的，你会长得比这棵大树还高……
You're welcome to visit anytime. And if you ever decide to stay, we'll bring you lots of yummy treats. You might even grow taller than that big tree over there...
诶，要是那样的话，奇美拉岂不是变成大地兽了？
Wait, if that happens, won't chimera turn into a dromas?
这是那只名为{TEXTJOIN#237}的小奇美拉。自从你们给它取了名，它便留在秋千附近。
This is the little chimera named {TEXTJOIN#237}. Ever since you named it, it's been hanging around near the swing.
美中不足，你仍然无法听懂它的语言。
Sadly, you still can't quite understand what it's saying.
你取出昔涟准备的蔬果，眼前的{TEXTJOIN#237}吃得相当欢快。
You offer the fruits and veggies Cyrene prepared. {TEXTJOIN#237} digs in happily.
你一伸手，小奇美拉便轻易地躲开了。
The moment you reach out, the little chimera dodges with ease.
...Seems like it's not ready for hugs just yet.
这是那只名为{TEXTJOIN#237}的小奇美拉。它已经在附近居住了好一段日子。
This is the little chimera named {TEXTJOIN#237}. It's been living around here for quite some time now.
有时它会衔来好看的落叶，有时它会跃入水中，和小海豹碰一碰。
Sometimes it'll bring back pretty fallen leaves, and sometimes it'll leap into the water to nuzzle the baby seals.
但更多时候，它会像现在这样打盹，仿佛这便是生命的终极答案。
But most of the time, it just dozes like this, as if it's already found the ultimate meaning of life.
奇妙的是，你逐渐听得懂它的声音了。
Strangely enough, you're starting to understand its words.
你取出昔涟准备的蔬果，眼前的{TEXTJOIN#237}吃得相当欢快。
You offer the fruits and veggies Cyrene prepared. {TEXTJOIN#237} digs in happily.
Awoo... The sun-kissed grapes are delicious!
你伸出手轻轻抚摸着它。{TEXTJOIN#237}看上去很享受。
You reach out and gently stroke it. {TEXTJOIN#237} looks like it's thoroughly enjoying it.
毫无疑问，现在它是一只热情的好奇美拉了。
No doubt about that. It's now a curious and affectionate little chimera.
散落的面粉袋拦住去路，板车翻倒在地——想必是某种强大的外力所致。
Torn sacks of flour block the road, and a cart lies overturned — clearly the result of some tremendous force.
你看不出它是什么生物留下的…话说回来，这真的是脚印吗？
You can't even tell what kind of creature left these behind... Then again, are those even footprints?
一头庞然巨兽出现在视野中。
A hulking beast appears on the horizon.
哀丽秘榭怎么会有大地兽？这显然是个问题，但眼下还有个更大的问题——
A dromas? In Aedes Elysiae? That's a big problem, but there's an even bigger one...
它正在朝村庄的方向走去！
It's heading straight for the village!
哀丽秘榭的建筑都是砖瓦结构，在大地兽眼里就像自助餐一样美味。你必须阻止它——
The village buildings are mostly made of bricks and tiles, basically an all-you-can-eat buffet for a dromas. You have to stop it...
你抄起几块泥土，打算吸引大地兽的注意力，但收效甚微……
You scoop up some clumps of dirt and try to get its attention, but... no luck.
因为那些村庄屋顶上的瓦片，显然更加可口呀！
After all, those roof tiles must look a lot tastier.
不管用。也许这头大地兽是说方言的，你听不懂。
Nope, didn't work. Maybe this dromas speaks a different dialect that you don't understand?
事已至此，只能用球棒解决问题了……
No other choice. Time to let the bat do the talking...
好神奇！我只在书上见过这种生物，一直都想骑骑看。
Amazing! I've only ever seen one in books — I've always wanted to ride one someday!
多好的孩子啊~你一定是迷路了，对不对？乖，别害怕。
What a sweet kid~ You must be lost, huh? Don't be scared, it's okay.
在少女的抚摸下，巨兽的躁动渐渐平息。难道这就是魔法？
Under the girl's gentle touch, the giant beast's restlessness slowly ebbs away. Could this be magic?
昔涟拉着你的手，爬到了大地兽背上。
Cyrene grabs your hand and climbs onto the back of the dromas.
好高好高！就像坐在山顶一样~
So high up! It's like we're sitting on top of a mountain~
呀，我可以抓紧你吗…大地兽不会突然跑起来，把人家甩出去吧？
Aah! Can I hold on to you...? The dromas won't suddenly jump up and fling me off, will it?
我们骑着它在附近遛遛弯吧，好喜欢，想多体验一下这种感觉。
Let's ride around some more. I'm enjoying this so much!
于是，你们骑着大地兽，迎着夕阳，行向远方……
And so, the two of you ride the dromas, wandering into the distance beneath the sunset...
哎呀，给我卸哪儿来了，这还是哀丽秘榭吗？
Oh, where are we now? Is this still Aedes Elysiae?
这条嫩枝低着头，像是在等什么人。当你靠近时，金色的花苞舒展开来，几颗花种落入了手中。
A tender shoot hangs low, as if waiting for someone. As you draw closer, golden buds gently bloom, releasing a few seeds into your hand.
你想起祝祭庭院有不少花盆，也许可以把它们种进去？
You recall the flowerpots in the Sacrament Courtyard — maybe you could plant them there?
被人打理过的空花盆，铺着厚厚的土。
An empty flowerpot, clearly tended to, its soil piled thick.
被人打理过的空花盆，铺着厚厚的土。
An empty flowerpot, clearly tended to, its soil piled thick.
你挖开泥土，将种子播进花盆中。
You dig into the soil and sow the seeds with care.
你好像在做很有意思的事呢。
You seem to be doing something interesting.
让我瞧瞧…嗯…孩子们都在茁壮成长。这样人家也能放心啦。
Let me see... Hmm... Looks like they are all growing healthily. That puts me at ease.
是啊，在祝祭庭院学习祷言的日子里，花草可是最重要的伙伴。
Yup. Back when I was learning the prayers at the Sacrament Courtyard, flowers were my best companions.
把种子埋进土里，等待它发芽，开出软软的花，就像是在守候一个小小的奇迹。
Planting a seed in the soil, waiting for it to sprout and its soft flower to bloom... it's like nurturing a tiny miracle.
回过神来，木架已经快摆满了。相信有朝一日，整座哀丽秘榭都会变成花海！
By the time you snap out of it, the wooden shelves are nearly full. One day, maybe the whole of Aedes Elysiae will bloom into a sea of flowers!
快快长大吧，真好奇你会开出怎样的花呢。
Grow up fast, little ones. I can't wait to see what kind of blossoms you'll become.
点点红色从叶片间绽放而出，那是新生的花朵。
Tiny specks of red peek out from between the leaves — newborn flowers awakening.
点点红色从叶片间绽放而出，那是新生的花朵。
Tiny specks of red peek out from between the leaves — newborn flowers awakening.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「绝灭大君」。
Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Lord Ravager."
…不久前，浮黎的目光掠过了翁法罗斯。加上黑塔女士此行获知的情报——
Not long ago, Fuli's gaze swept across Amphoreus. Combined with the intel Madam Herta gathered on this journey—
翁法罗斯或许将会引燃<color=#dbc291ff>一位绝灭大君的怒火</color>。
Amphoreus might soon trigger <color=#dbc291ff>the rage of a Lord Ravager</color>.
绝灭大君…此前我们在仙舟曾与绝灭大君幻胧对峙，在那之后也从仙舟处了解了一些相关信息。
Lord Ravager Phantylia... We confronted her on the Xianzhou, and later gained some relevant information from her.
不知翁法罗斯背后暗中酝酿的毁灭，是来自早已闻名寰宇的焚风、星啸、铁墓，还是像幻胧这样尚不为世人所知的大君。
I wonder if the destruction secretly brewing behind Amphoreus comes from renowned Overlords like Zephyro, Celenova, and Irontomb, or from one still unknown to the world, like Phantylia.
无论是哪位…一旦发作，必然导致生灵涂炭。
Whichever one it is... when it erupts, countless lives will surely be lost.
呵，从这个角度看，翁法罗斯或许是个安全匣呢。毕竟，三股令使级别甚至更高的命途之力，一旦擦枪走火，可比查德威克那家伙的炸药带劲多了。

Hmph, when you look at it that way, Amphoreus might be a safety box. After all, three forces at the Emanator level or even higher — if they were to come to blows, it would be far more explosive than Chadwick's bombs.
若真如此…身在翁法罗斯内部的{NICKNAME}和丹恒，岂不是相当危险？
If that's true... wouldn't {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng be in extreme danger in Amphoreus?
无论如何…我们必须联系上他们。
In any case... we must reach them somehow.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「来古士」。
Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Lygus."
听黑塔女士的叙述，那位叫来古士的智械，同样沐浴过博识尊的瞥视。有这样一位人物把守翁法罗斯，恐怕我们的计划会举步维艰。
Based on Madam Herta's account, that Intellitron named Lygus has also been bathed in Nous's gaze. Having such an entity guarding Amphoreus will likely make our plans extremely difficult to execute.
放心，我早有准备。要用魔法打败魔法，用科学打败科学……
Fear not, I've come prepared. We'll fight magic with magic, and science with science...
用机器脑袋打败机器脑袋。
Beating machine brain with machine brain.
承蒙黑塔女士信任。但在我们展开讨论之前，我仍有一个问题想要请教。
I appreciate Madam Herta's confidence in me. But before we delve into this discussion, there's something I must ask.
黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>你果真进入了翁法罗斯的世界吗？</color>
Madam Herta, <color=#dbc291ff>did you actually enter the world of Amphoreus?</color>
螺丝咕姆先生的意思是，黑塔女士进入的翁法罗斯，有可能是那位来古士构建的认知障碍…就像同谐之力那样？
Mr. Screwllum means that the Amphoreus you entered, Madam Herta, might have been a cognitive barrier constructed by Lygus... similar to the power of Harmony?
想要影响我的认知还不被我察觉…哪怕是同谐的令使也未必做得到。
Manipulating my cognition without my awareness... that might be beyond even an Emanator of Harmony.
螺丝，你想说，我所到的世界…只是一道防火墙？
Screwy, are you saying the world I entered... was just a firewall?
正是。而且，那恐怕并不是一道简单的防火墙。
Precisely. And I fear it wasn't a simple firewall at that.
翁法罗斯以空间作为第一道屏障，对黑塔女士来说，跨越这道屏障易如反掌。
Amphoreus uses space as its first barrier. For Madam Herta, crossing this barrier is child's play.
可那第二道屏障…名为时间。
However, the second barrier... is time itself.
原来如此。黑塔女士提到，她在翁法罗斯的世界里看到过两位无名客的残像，只是那看上去既像残留的忆质，又像数据的投影。
That explains it. Madam Herta mentioned observing traces of the two Nameless in the world of Amphoreus, which appeared to be both residual memoria and data materialization.
这么看来，在不同的时间，{NICKNAME}和丹恒的步履曾经与黑塔女士重叠。
Which means that at various moments, {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng's paths have overlapped with Madam Herta's.
往好处想，这至少说明他们二人确实安全降落，并且展开了较为成功的开拓。
On the bright side, this at least confirms they landed safely and made some successful progress in their Trailblaze.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「帝皇权杖」。
Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Emperor's Scepter."
以时空作为屏障的世界，在我所经历的漫长岁月中，确实曾经见到过……
In my long existence, I have certainly come across worlds that use space-time as barriers...
各位可曾听说过……<color=#dbc291ff>帝皇权杖</color>？
Are any of you familiar with... the <color=#dbc291ff>Emperor's Scepter</color>?
鲁珀特二世所拥的诸多权杖中，以反生命程式驱动、专司于模拟万千文明毁灭路径的巨型系统……
A colossal system among Emperor Rubert II's collection of scepters, operated by antilife equations and created to simulate destruction scenarios for innumerable civilizations...
即使在学派战争中，其余权杖的算力被榨干时，也无人敢动用那种不受控的智识杀器——它们要么被永久封存，要么被远弃星渊。

Even amid the Scholars' Strife, when other scepters were depleted of computing power, none dared employ such ungovernable Erudition weapons — they were either sealed forever or cast into distant stellar abysses.
螺丝，你在哪儿见过这等不祥之物？
Screwy, where did you come across such a sinister artifact?
于茫茫边星寻觅无机生命的起源时，我曾见过一台漏网之鱼。
While exploring the origins of inorganic life across distant border stars, I found one that had escaped detection.
即便其主早已在「自我加冕」中身陨，那台权杖也仍未停止运作。可怖的算力潮汐于其中涌动，却从未向外界漾出一丝波澜。
Even though its operator had perished in "Self-Coronation," that scepter continued to function. Terrifying computational tides surged within it, yet not a single ripple escaped to the outside world.
为了使演算不受外界干扰，帝皇权杖将己身隐没于凹陷空间，并主动扭曲了内部的时间流速。
To protect its extrapolations from external disruption, the Emperor's Scepter secluded itself in a concave space and deliberately warped its internal time flow.
权杖内部的世界，则在千百年的演算中逐渐趋于疯狂。我尝试向内窥探，却险些被那疯溃的数据实体扰乱了逻辑原件。

The world inside the scepter gradually descended into madness after centuries of extrapolation. When I attempted to peer inside, I nearly had my logical components disrupted by those insane data entities.
判断：倘若那台帝皇权杖运算失控，可能会再度引发一场无机生命主导的灾难。于是我花费两个琥珀纪的时间，从外部将其瘫痪。
Conclusion: Should that Emperor's Scepter's extrapolations run amok, it might instigate another calamity driven by inorganic life. Consequently, I devoted two Amber Eras to disable it from without.
推论：翁法罗斯的正身也许是一台亡佚的帝皇权杖，或其他类似的智识造物；而那位来古士便是权杖的操作员…或是隐居世外的又一位鲁珀特。
Deduction: Amphoreus's actual identity might be a lost Emperor's Scepter or similar Erudition construct, while Lygus may be its operator... or perhaps another Rubert hidden from the world.
很难想象，运算了上百个琥珀纪的权杖，其内部会是多么疯狂的光景。
It's hard to imagine the madness within a scepter that has been extrapolating for over a hundred Amber Eras.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「识刻锚」。
Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Chronocognitive Anchor."
为了探得权杖内部的讯息，我曾花费半个琥珀纪的时间，制作出一枚<color=#dbc291ff>识刻锚</color>。
To explore information inside the scepter, I once spent half an Amber Era creating a <color=#dbc291ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>.
这便是我为诸位带来的礼物。彼时，我将它嵌入帝皇权杖后，便在不摧毁其外壳的前提下，获得了一份锚定的时间坐标。
This is the gift I bring to you all. After implanting it into the Emperor's Scepter then, I secured a set of anchored temporal coordinates without compromising its shell.
即使世界内时间流遭打乱，基本的因果也不可悖反。在运算的最小单位中，其时间流向依然是有矩可循的。
Even when a world's temporal flow is disordered, basic causality remains inviolable. In the smallest computational increments, time's flow still follows discernible patterns.
逻辑：若来古士为翁法罗斯打造的防火墙与帝皇权杖的自卫机制相似，那么识刻锚也应当对其起效。
Logic: If the firewall Lygus created for Amphoreus is similar to the Emperor's Scepter's self-defense mechanism, then the Chronocognitive Anchor should be effective against it as well.
…螺丝，我上一次这么佩服你，还是一起建造模拟宇宙的时候。
Oh Screwy, the last time I was impressed was when we built the Simulated Universe together.
黑塔女士谬赞了，不过是一个食而无味、弃之可惜的小发明。
You flatter me, Madam Herta. It's just a minor invention — not satisfying to use but serves its purpose.
虽然还有些许疑惑之处，但螺丝咕姆先生带来的这份礼物，想必有助于我们联络上{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
While I still have some questions, Mr. Screwllum's gift will surely help us reach {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.
前提：我们拥有那两位勇敢无名客的时间坐标，且识刻锚确实能对翁法罗斯起效。
Premises: We have the temporal coordinates of those two brave Nameless, and the Chronocognitive Anchor actually works on Amphoreus.
前者好办。我在防火墙见到过他俩的残像，用作参照系正合适。至于后者……
The first is easy. I've seen their residual memoria in the firewall, which work perfectly as reference points. As for the latter...
Well, there's only one way to find out.
{NICKNAME}，你看，这里也和记忆中的哀丽秘榭一模一样。
{NICKNAME}, look! This place looks exactly like how I remember Aedes Elysiae.
再等一阵风经过，麦穗被吹拂的时候，还要更好看呢。要是有办法记录下来就好啦。
Once the wind blows through again and the wheat starts swaying, it'll be even more beautiful. If only we could capture it somehow.
留影石机？对喔，可以把风景分毫不差地保存下来，真是伟大的造物。
A photostone? Oh, right! It can save the scene perfectly, what a clever invention!
Too bad the memory card's full.
也就是说，它暂时装不下更多回忆了，是吗？
So... no more room for memories, huh?
没关系哦，试着拍拍看吧。在哀丽秘榭，偶尔也会有奇迹发生。
It's okay. Give it a little tap. Sometimes small miracles happen in Aedes Elysiae.
光线正好呢，可以让我试试吗？
The lighting's just right. Mind if I give it a try?
Thanks~ I knew I could count on you, {NICKNAME}.
哎呀，怎么露出惊讶的神情了？值得被铭记的瞬间里，怎么可能没有你呢？
Huh? What's with that surprised look? How could a moment worth remembering not include you?
不如说，{NICKNAME}才是这一幕的主角呢。
Honestly, {NICKNAME}, you're the star of the whole scene.
好啦好啦。笑一笑，或者做点其他喜欢的表情，要开始咯？
Alright, alright. Give me a smile, or make whatever face you like. Ready?
嘻，没想到吧？比起摆好姿势，抓拍到的意外才更令人惊喜呢。{NICKNAME}刚才的表情很棒哦。
Hehe, didn't see that coming, did you? Candid shots are way more fun than posed ones. That expression was perfect, {NICKNAME}.
只是很可惜，这台留影石机确实装不下更多回忆啦……
It's just a shame the photostone really can't save any more memories...
Yeah, the card's full, after all.
可是没关系。比起一张照片，「留影」的心情才更值得纪念。「给{NICKNAME}拍了照片」…就这么记住今天的回忆，也足够温馨啦。
But hey, it's not about the photo, it's the feeling that matters. Just thinking "I took a photo of {NICKNAME}" is enough to make today special.
{NICKNAME}不也这么认为吗？所以才会随身带着这台留影石机，有它在，就相当于同伴一直陪伴在你身边。
Don't you think so too, {NICKNAME}? Maybe that's why you always carry this photostone around. With it, it's like your friends are always right there with you.
再说啦，也可以当作是在销毁证据？没有照片留下，我就可以把自己美化得更瘦一些。
Plus, you could think of it as... destroying the evidence. No photo means I can pretend I looked a little slimmer.
你呢，{NICKNAME}？以后回想起来，会怎么想象今天的我？
What about you, {NICKNAME}? When you think back on today, how will you picture me?
嘻，本来还想说，唯独这个不可以呢。不过……
Hehe, I was gonna say "everything but that one"! But...
人家倒是不担心啦。以后我们还会遇见许多人或事，并因此回忆起今天的一些心绪……
I'm not too worried. We'll meet all kinds of people and experience all sorts of things in the future, and some of those moments will bring us right back to how we felt today...
到那时，我们也有机会，把记忆中的对方装点得更美丽些，对吧？
When that happens, we'll get to paint even lovelier versions of each other in our memories, won't we?
呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
*yawn*~ I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...
怎么在这里停下啦？难道说，{NICKNAME}对钓鱼感兴趣？
Why'd you stop here? Wait... don't tell me you're into fishing, {NICKNAME}?
Think we'll actually catch some fish?
Not like we've got anything better to do.
悄悄告诉你，哀丽秘榭的鱼儿都会读心魔法，除非心甘情愿，不然绝对不会上钩。
Wanna know a secret? The fish in Aedes Elysiae can read minds. Unless they're totally willing, they won't bite no matter what.
怎么样，要试试看吗？就当是一次魅力检定？
So? Wanna give it a try? Consider it a charm check.
下竿之后，总是免不了漫长的等待呀。
Once the line's cast, there's nothing to do but wait...
{NICKNAME}听过这样的说法吗？两个人独处时，难能可贵的不是说不完的话题，而是沉默下来也不会尴尬的默契。
Has anyone ever told you this, {NICKNAME}? When two people are alone, what's truly special isn't having endless things to talk about, it's being able to sit in silence without it feeling awkward.
就像现在，{NICKNAME}心里在想什么呢？介意与我分享吗？
Kind of like now. What's on your mind, {NICKNAME}? Want to share it with me?
对这里感到好奇吗？与世隔绝的小村庄，我的故乡，下一趟「开拓」之旅的起点……
Curious about it? A little village cut off from the world... My hometown... and the starting point of our next Trailblazing expedition.
暂时只有这些啦。更多的秘密，就等我们一起揭开吧。
That's all for now. As for the rest of the secrets, we'll uncover them together.
在沉思你为什么认识我。
I'm thinking about how you even know me.
也许答案很简单，只需小小换位思考一下：{NICKNAME}为什么认识我呢？
Maybe it's a simple answer. Try flipping the question: Why does {NICKNAME} know me?
因为我们一同经历过很多事。在朦胧的记忆里，人家可是作为要好的伙伴，在{NICKNAME}身边待了很久呢。
Because we've been through so much together. Even in those blurry memories, I was always by {NICKNAME}'s side as a close friend.
That's really all there is to it.
嗯，像这样把心里话全部说出来，就不会觉得有负担啦。
Mm. Letting it all out makes your heart feel a little lighter, doesn't it?
不过，要是人类也能学会读心魔法就好了，只要注视彼此就能传递心意……
Still, wouldn't it be nice if people could use mind-reading magic? Just one look, and you'd know exactly how someone feels...
啊，水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!
你比了比泳圈的大小和你的腰围…完全不合身。该不会是哪只小海豹落在这儿的吧？
You compare the size of that swim ring to your waist... definitely not a match. Did some baby seal leave this behind?
瞧啊，{NICKNAME}，好丰盛的果盆。看到生活中的小幸福，总是让人心情喜悦。
Look, {NICKNAME}, a whole plate of fresh fruit. Little joys like this always make me smile.
它总能提醒我，这个世界依然热热闹闹。有许多人在努力地生活。
They remind me that the world's still bustling, still full of people doing their best to live.
那，不妨来预演一下吧？假如有一天，{NICKNAME}身边的人突然消失了……
Then how about a little warm-up? Imagine someone close to {NICKNAME} suddenly disappears...
就像现在这样。你会怎么做呢？
Just like now. What would you do?
嘻，开个玩笑，只是气氛正好，想和你玩捉迷藏。提示：<color=#dbc291ff>人家就在你身边哦。</color>
Hehe, just kidding. The mood felt right, so I thought I'd play a little Hide-and-Seek. Here's a hint: <color=#dbc291ff>I'm right next to you.</color>
你环顾四周，祝祭庭院、打谷场、海边…都没有昔涟的身影。安静的村落中，只有轻风作响。
You glance around — the Sacrament Courtyard, the threshing grounds, the beach... but there's no sign of Cyrene. Just the soft rustle of wind through the quiet village.
直到你收回视线，大树、秋千、池塘，还有初次见面时她送你的稻草人……
Until your eyes returned to the tree, the swing, the pond... and the scarecrow she gave you when you first met.
果然被发现啦。你知道吗？捉迷藏是检验两个人心有灵犀的最佳方式哦。
Knew you'd find me. Hide-and-Seek's the best way to see if two people are truly connected.
就像「记忆」一样。在时间的长河里，它可能会消失，但不会离去。当内心的小角落被唤醒，回忆一定会以更美的形式再度浮现。
It's like memories. They might fade with time, but they never really go away. When the heart is stirred, those moments return, more vivid and more beautiful than before.
有，人家说的。是不是很有道理？
It is. I just said it. Makes sense, doesn't it?
也许当我们再度踏上旅途，和{NICKNAME}玩捉迷藏的就不是我，而是那触不可及的命运了。不过我相信，无论多少次，{NICKNAME}一定都能……
Maybe next time we head out on a journey, it won't be me playing Hide-and-Seek with {NICKNAME}, it'll be fate, just out of reach. But I believe, no matter how many times, {NICKNAME}'ll always...
哎呀，太沉重的话题可不适合哀丽秘榭。还是聊回捉迷藏吧，作为交换，接下来轮到我来找你咯？
Ah, but that's too heavy a thought for a place like Aedes Elysiae. Let's go back to Hide-and-Seek. Now it's my turn to find you, okay?
我会躲到你找不到的地方。
I'll hide somewhere you'll never find me.
嘻，那我就一直一直一直找下去。
Hehe, then I'll just keep looking... and looking... and looking.
Don't keep me waiting too long.
嗯，这也是人家想说的话呢。
Mm, that's exactly what I was going to say.
嗯…哪里去了呢？偷偷躲在哪个小角落里，等着我去找呢？
Hmm... Now where did it go? Hiding in some corner, waiting for me to come find it?
迷路迷境的入口，无论看多少次都觉得很梦幻……
No matter how many times I see the entrance to the Membrance Maze, it still feels like a dream...
{NICKNAME}会感同身受吗？光是站在这里，就有种将要踏上奇幻冒险的预感。
Do you feel it too, {NICKNAME}? Just standing here makes it feel like a magical adventure's about to begin.
小妖精们很害羞，据说只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
Fairies are very shy. Word has it that only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.
但我相信，{NICKNAME}一定也在受欢迎的名单中，要试试看吗？
But I trust that {NICKNAME} will be welcome. How about giving it a try?
村民不知道它的存在吗？
Don't the villagers know of its existence?
是呀。小妖精们很害羞，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
Yes, fairies are very shy. Only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.
但我相信，{NICKNAME}一定也在受欢迎的名单中，要试试看吗？
But I trust that {NICKNAME} will be welcome. How about giving it a try?
A golden butterfly... Can I catch it?
{NICKNAME}, why are you in a daze?
…算啦，这也是你的特质。据说只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
...Never mind, that's just how you are. Word has it that only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.
我相信，{NICKNAME}一定也符合受欢迎的标准，要试试看吗？
I trust that {NICKNAME} has the traits of those who can enter. How about giving it a try?
嗯哼，果然很顺利呢。就这样小心前进……
Going smoothly, just as I expected. Be careful on your way in...
Wh—What's that sound? {NICKNAME}, are you okay?
{F#她}{M#他}没受伤，我受伤迷…快起来…压到我了迷…！
{F#She's}{M#He's} fine, but I'm not mem... Get up... You're crushing me mem...
哎呀…第一次进入迷境时，「昔涟」似乎也遇见过同样的事呢。
Oh my... "Cyrene" also encountered something similar when she first entered the maze.
小妖精，真对不起，你是来欢迎新访客的吧？作为道歉，我们会用欧洛尼斯的小魔法为你治疗。
I'm sorry, little fairy. Are you here to welcome the new visitors? As an apology, we'll heal you with Oronyx's magic.
没关系，迷的身子很结实，只想要小小的补偿！
It's okay. Mem's very sturdy, but I'd just like a small compensation!
迷是来听故事的，给迷讲个外面的故事就好！要优美动听的！
Mem's here to listen to stories. Tell mem a story about the outside world and that'll do! Something wonderful and moving!
想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?
于是，昔涟讲起《如我所书》的故事……
Cyrene begins narrating the stories in "As I've Written"...
呼…小妖精满意地离开了，它平安无事就好。
Phew... The fairy is finally satisfied and willing to leave. I'm glad it wasn't hurt.
{NICKNAME}呢，习惯了讲述故事，这次作为听众感觉如何？
What about you, {NICKNAME}? How does it feel to be an audience after being a narrator for so long?
感觉你对这里还挺熟悉。
You seem familiar with this place.
真的谈不上熟悉哦？不如说…有些缺乏实感呢。
Not exactly... Rather... it feels disconnected from reality.
以前的记忆，能想起更多吗？
Can you recall more of those lost memories?
似乎不行。不如说，有些缺乏实感呢。
This won't do. Somehow, it feels disconnected from reality.
也许过去的「昔涟」在迷境经历过什么，但我的记忆却很模糊。和{NICKNAME}一样，甚至有种初次拜访的感觉……
Perhaps "Cyrene" experienced something in the maze before, but my memory is a blur. Just like {NICKNAME}, it feels like my first time visiting this place...
不过别担心，至少「迷迷」时期的记忆有好好保存下来哦，比如那段逐火之旅的细节、《如我所书》、还有……
But don't worry. My memories from being Mem have been retained. I can remember the Flame-Chase Journey, "As I've Written," and...
…还好，人家难以启齿的记忆，只有你知道呢。不提这个了，跟人家在迷境里多探索一会儿吧？
...It's okay. Only you know the memories I can't bring myself to speak of. Let's put that aside. Why don't you stay with me a little longer in this maze and explore together?
昔涟拉着你在迷境中转了许久…直到你们都累了，她打着哈欠向你道别。
Cyrene dragged you around the Maze for a good while... Eventually, both of you were worn out. She yawned and said goodbye.
（所以，到底「还有」什么？等昔涟休息好了再去问她吧……）
(So what else did she want to say after "and"? Guess you'll have to ask once she's rested...)
在微风和煦的日子里，躺在阳台上，看着风车慢悠悠地转动，别提多惬意啦。
It's such a pleasure to lie on the balcony and watch the windmills languidly turn on a sunny and breezy day.
告诉你一个秘密，这些在风中转悠的大家伙其实不是摆设哦。
Let me tell you a secret. These big contraptions that turn amidst the winds aren't just decorations.
在它们的肚子里面放着磨盘，村民会借助风车来磨碎谷物，用面粉做出香喷喷的面包。
They have mills in them. The villagers use windmills to grind grain and bake tasty bread from flour.
现在，不如就和我一起躺下来，放松地观赏风车们吧…睡着了也没关系，人家会端来面包，用热腾腾的香气叫醒你的。
Why don't we lie down and enjoy the windmills together? It's okay to fall asleep. Someone will bring you bread and the warm fragrance will wake you up.
风车转呀转，转得好慢好慢，仿佛连时间也停下来了呢……
Round and round the windmill spins, so slow, oh so slow, so slow that it's like even time itself has stopped...
{NICKNAME}，就在这边稍微坐会儿，好不好？
{NICKNAME}, can we sit here for a short while?
对了，不如…把鞋子脱掉，一起感受下水温吧。{NICKNAME}有这样试过吗？
Oh... why don't you take off your shoes and dip your feet into the water? {NICKNAME}, have you tried this before?
不觉得这样很浪漫吗？海面上的波纹就像有魔法，如果盯着看，时间不知不觉就会过去很久。
Don't you find this romantic? The ripples on the sea surface are like magic. If you stare at them, time flies by before you even realize.
{NICKNAME}，你说…海的另一头会是什么呢？
{NICKNAME}, what do you think... lies at the other end of the sea?
On the other side... there are enemies!
呀…那等他们打过来的时候，{NICKNAME}可要保护好大家哦？
Oh... Then when they attack, you'll have to protect everyone.
鳞渊境？很美妙的名字呢，真叫人浮想联翩。要是能有艘船在码头靠岸，载着我们去那里冒险就好啦……
Scalegorge Waterscape? That's a beautiful name that fuels the imagination. If only we had a ship to sail over to the docks and take us on an adventure...
Why don't you find out for yourself?
现在可不敢啦，人家本来就不会游泳。现在，甚至连飞都飞不起来了。
I'm no longer brave enough for that now, and I can't swim. In fact, I can't even fly anymore.
嘻，我也经常这么想。只要装作不知道，就可以把它想象得更美好些。
Heh, that's what I think too. As long as I feign ignorance, I can always fantasize about something better.
好像在许多故事里，大海扮演的角色都很可怕呢。不是世界的尽头，就是灾难的象征。
It seems that in many stories, the sea plays a terrifying role, signifying the end of the world or symbolizing disasters.
但那些最勇敢的水手，在征服大海后，往往都会抵达美丽的仙境，见证壮阔的星空。
But the bravest sailors who conquer the sea always reach a beautiful paradise under a magnificent starry sky.
这么说来，「星空」也经常被比作海洋呢。也许所有引人遐想的事物，本质都是相似的？
Oh, "starry sky" is often used to allude to the sea too. Perhaps the things that spark the imagination are similar in essence.
所以来自天外的{NICKNAME}，是不是也能算作一种「勇敢的水手」呢？
As for you who come from beyond the sky, are you also a kind of "brave sailor"?
好舒服的风呀，真希望生活每天都能像海面一样平静。
Wow, the breeze is so pleasant! I wish every day was as peaceful as the surface of the sea.
打谷场…要是从天上看，会不会像是一座被麦浪簇拥的小岛？
Threshing grounds... If we looked down from the sky, would this look like an island surrounded by ripples of wheat?
这么说来，哀丽秘榭到处都很安静呢。待在这种让人心静的地方，无论什么烦恼，都能一下子忘掉……
Come to think of it, Aedes Elysiae is such a quiet place. Residing in such a serene place instantly dispels all your troubles.
Do you have a lot of troubles?
当然啦。怀揣烦恼的少女，听起来就很有魅力，对吧？
Certainly. Doesn't a troubled girl sound rather charming?
Huh? Why don't I smell it...
呀，意外收获，空气里充满了别人家的炊香呢。
Oh, an unexpected discovery. The smell of cooking is in the air.
好啦，把可爱的心思收一收，我们一起在附近走走吧。
Alright, tuck your lovely thoughts aside. Let's take a walk around.
说起来，这里也有一个小稻草人。但因为太平易近人了，没什么威慑力。
Speaking of which, there's a small scarecrow here. But it looks too friendly to prove useful, lacks the fear factor.
先前我还看见小鸟飞到它肩上休息呢。嘻…不如把它也打扮成「开拓」的样子吧。
I even spotted birds perching on its shoulder. Hehe... Maybe we should dress it up like the Trailblazer.
这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.
还是交给我吧。下次见面时，{NICKNAME}的小稻草人就布置妥当啦。
Leave this to me. When we meet again, the {NICKNAME} scarecrow will be firmly in place.

看哪，白色的鸟儿们，正向着我们感慨的美景飞翔呢。

哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~

我们，在屋顶待了多久啦？

怎么，难道是…害羞了？来尝试一下嘛。

看，天空一片晴朗。望着白云飘过，岁月的脚步仿佛也变慢了。

身为开拓者，你曾目睹「黑塔」空间站的端沿起火燃烧，也见识过梦想在阿斯德纳的黑暗中闪耀……

如果把这些故事分享出来，她一定会很感兴趣吧。
If you share these stories with her, I'm sure she'll be pleased.
讲讲空间站「黑塔」的见闻。

Has anyone told you this, {NICKNAME}? You're so meticulous and focused when you tell stories, you become more captivating than the stories themselves.
真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！

谢谢你，为人家解答了疑惑——

但她静谧的睡靥明明没有变化…除了嘴角不知何时勾起的笑意。
And yet, her tranquil sleeping face hadn't changed at all... except for the faint smile that had somehow curled at the corner of her lips.
没钓上鱼，但给口还挺沉的…来看看钓了个什么吧。

呼…玩捉迷藏还挺累人的呢。你的胜负欲可真强，屋顶上、麦堆里，什么地方你都敢钻呀。
Phew... Hide-and-seek can be quite tiring. You're really competitive. You'll dive into any spot, whether it's on the roof or in a wheat pile.
可惜都被我找到了！哀丽秘榭还是站在人家这一边的嘛。

...Doesn't sound like something I should get into.

被我喊变美少女的窘迫？

迷迷糊糊地，居然睡过去了……

而在启程前，如果{NICKNAME}有心情，<color=#dbc291ff>随时可以来找我</color>。人家会在这里一直等着你的♪

真奇怪，会掉哪儿了呢…呀，{NICKNAME}？

唔…越说越奇怪了，要不，我们还是边走边想吧？

真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！

哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~

这里呀…不得不说，人家好好地苦恼了一阵子呢——我到底应不应该对它感到熟悉？

悄悄告诉你一个秘密，哀丽秘榭的麦田，会永远地留在丰收的时刻。

虽然我很想说…与你共度的这段时光，都会像这哀丽秘榭一样，<color=#dbc291ff>永远留在无人叨扰的记忆之境。</color>
Though I have to say... The times we spent together will be like Aedes Elysiae, <color=#dbc291ff>preserved in a tranquil memory space forever.</color>

Even when our memories fade, we can still traverse all distances and look back at the "past" to {RUBY_B#encounter}reunite{RUBY_E#} with those treasured moments.
等到我们拾回珍重之物，将它们装进行囊、决定翻开故事崭新一页的时候……

昔涟从海边找到的一枚缎带，与她身上所佩者模样相同，只是看上去有些磨旧，好似缝埋着岁月的低语。
A ribbon Cyrene found by the sea — just like the one she wears now, though this one's rather worn out. It feels like it's been sewn together by the whispers of time itself.
真好~有你陪着，简单的日常也变得迷人了。
This is nice~ Just having you here make even the ordinary feel enchanting.
哀丽秘榭的闲暇时光还很漫长…{NICKNAME}要经常来找人家玩哦！
There's still plenty of time for leisure in Aedes Elysiae... {NICKNAME}, you should come visit me often!
看上去你和人家一样，都很期待彼此下一次美好的同行吧？

在那「永远」之中，一定有着应当永志不忘的故事，可现在怎么追忆都找不到了。
In that "eternity," there must be stories that should never be forgotten, but now no matter how I try to recall them, I can't find them.
但幸运的是，作为迷迷，与你初见的这一世所积攒的记忆，能够成为了一点星光——照亮三千万世那灰黯的遗忘。
But fortunately, as Mem, the memories accumulated from this first encounter with you can become a guiding starlight — illuminating the dull oblivion of thirty million lifetimes.
而我们一起在哀丽秘榭度过的这段美好时光，让人家愈发觉得，与其奢望「永远」，不如相信……
And the wonderful time we spent together in Aedes Elysiae makes me feel even more that, rather than wishing for "eternity," it's better to believe...
{NICKNAME}惊讶的样子，也和记忆里如出一辙呢。
{NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.
与其说「认识」，不如说是「记得」呢。
Rather than "knowing" you, it might be better described as... I "remember" you.
嘻，好新奇的搭讪技巧呀。
Hehe, what an interesting new way to chat someone up.

我知道，{NICKNAME}一定有许多疑惑，对吗？虽然很想为你解答，但我也对现状感到手足无措……
Yes, you must be really perplexed, {NICKNAME}. I wish I could give you answers, but I feel helpless about the current situation too...
是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？

没能取回完整的记忆吗？

It's pretty unbelievable for me too. It's like I had a long, long dream. Cyrene's memories... and Mem's memories... they're all tangled together. But when I woke up... there were only broken fragments left.
我已经记不清那三千万个轮回…幸好，我还记得这一世的那些黄金裔伙伴，以及{NICKNAME}你……
I can no longer remember those thirty million cycles... Luckily, I still remember my Chrysos Heir companions from this life, and you, {NICKNAME}...
大家都为这个世界牺牲了一切，我也心系着他们的命运，想要尽快开启新的篇章。只是……
Everyone sacrificed everything for this world, and my heart is tied to their fates too. I want to start a new chapter as soon as possible. It's just that...
人家有时也会因此懊丧…不过换个角度想，在面临重要的抉择之前，静下心来整顿思路也是很重要的。正好，哀丽秘榭最适合做这事啦。

Sometimes I get frustrated because of that... but looking at it another way, it's really important to calm down and clear your head before making a big decision. And Aedes Elysiae is the perfect place for that.
卸下沉重的心情，深呼吸——然后，作为再次邂逅的纪念，请允许我为{NICKNAME}送上一份礼物吧？
Cast off your heavy feelings, take a deep breath — and as a memento of our reunion, please allow me to offer you a gift, {NICKNAME}.
瞧！这个稻草人的模样，是不是和你特别像？我可是观察了好久才做出来的。

这样一来，哀丽秘榭也种下了「开拓」的种子呢。把它当作下一段旅途的起点……
Now, we've also planted the seeds of the Trailblaze in Aedes Elysiae. Take it as the start of another journey...
等到时机成熟，我们就再回到这里，一起翻开故事的下一页吧？

I remember you had many questions for me when we first met.
那就让我们约好…在新的旅程开始的时候，要重新认识彼此，一起翻开故事的下一页哦！
Let's make a promise... When a new journey begins, we will learn about each other again and write the next page of our story together!
