对于一夜暴富的人来说，需要一种快速、外显的方式宣告自己的经济地位提升！
For those who get rich overnight, they need a quick and flashy way to announce their upgraded financial status!
这不过是社会的偏见。实际上黄金对牙龈非常友好，很少有过敏或者排异反应，不易磨损、崩裂，使用寿命极长，甚至可以用几十年。

That's actually just societal prejudice. In fact, gold is very gentle on the gums, rarely causes allergies or structural deviation, doesn't wear down easily or rupture, and has an extremely long lifespan that lasts for decades.
往坏了想，如果真有一天你不再继续开拓，流落异乡、山穷水尽之时，你会感谢自己曾有一颗金牙——至少，大金牙算是你的固定资产。
On the downside, if one day you stop trailblazing and find yourself stranded in a strange place and down on luck, you'll be thankful for that gold tooth. At least it's one asset you can count on.
「铂金焕彩计划」体验快结束了…反正都是幻造的，不如加把劲，弄一口大金牙，再印上「冲！冲！{NICKNAME}！」肯定很引人注目的。

The "Platinum Radiance Project" experience is almost over... Since it's all imagenated anyway, why not go all out? Get a huge gold tooth with "GO! GO! {NICKNAME}!" engraved on it. That'd definitely turn some heads!
生命力，自古以来就是有灵生物所求之物，即便是长生种也不例外。
Life force has long been sought after by all sentient beings since ancient times, and even the long-life species are no exception.
你「想要更加有生命力」的愿望注入到牙齿里，完成了对牙齿的幻造礼装——
Your wish "to be more full of life" was injected into your teeth, completing the Imagenated Mystic Code...
你的牙齿出现了生态系统！
There's a whole ecosystem growing in your teeth!
这对于「想要更加有生命力」的愿望来说，「牙齿变成了星球」还真是一个绝佳的实现方式！
For someone who "wanted to be more full of life," having "teeth turn into planets" is an excellent way to make it happen!
你看看你的牙齿，它已经产生了大陆板块，山川大海，各种各样的生物…那种勃勃生机、万物竞发的境界，犹在眼前。

Look at your teeth! They've developed tectonic plates, mountains, and oceans, all kinds of life forms... That vibrant ecosystem teeming with life, where everything's flourishing and thriving. It's like a whole world right before my eyes.
…好像不太对啊，你的牙齿确实有生命力了，可是生命力…完全没有分给你。
...Something's not right here. Your teeth definitely did get some life force, but that life force... wasn't shared with you at all.
「生命复苏计划」体验快结束了…反正都是幻造的，希望这段期间它们还没有实现载人航空吧。
The "Life Rejuvenation Project" experience is almost over... Since it's all imagenated anyway, I hope they haven't achieved manned flight during this period.
追求美，自古以来就是人们深层心理动机，而「明眸皓齿」是无可争议的主流审美标准。
The pursuit of beauty has been a deep psychological drive since ancient times, and "bright eyes and white teeth" has been an undisputed mainstream aesthetic standard.
你「想要更加美丽」的愿望注入到牙齿里，完成了对牙齿的幻造礼装——
Your wish "to become more beautiful" was injected into your teeth, completing the Imagenated Mystic Code...
你的牙齿走上了「纯美」的命途！
Your teeth have embarked on the Path of Beauty!
这绝非一颗凡俗的碳酸钙聚合物，这是被伊德莉拉亲吻过的钻石水晶！
This is no mere calcium carbonate aggregate, it's a diamond crystal kissed by Idrila THEMSELF!
它的形态，是天才俱乐部毕生追求的完美椭圆与黄金分割的终极结合！
Its form is the ultimate fusion of a perfect ellipse and the golden ratio that the Genius Society has pursued their entire lives!
它的釉质，比仙舟朱明御窑千挑万选的釉彩更加温润，比二相乐园的幻月更加皎洁！
Its glaze is more lustrous than the meticulously selected glazes of the Xianzhou Zhuming's imperial kiln, and more pristine than the Phantasmoon of Planarcadia!
您唇间展露的刹那，将是众生莫大的荣幸…公司应该给您的牙齿投保，那保额恐怕是天文数字……
That fleeting smile of yours would be the greatest honor for all living beings... The IPC should get insurance for those teeth, though the cost of the premium would probably be astronomical...
「纯美精神计划」体验快结束了…多照照镜子，再龇牙咧嘴地臭美一会吧。
The "Spirit of Beauty Project" experience is almost over... Go on, check yourself out in the mirror and smile smugly while you still can.
欢迎光临怒涛小酒馆。客人…看您的样子，难道说是外地来的游客？
Welcome to Roaring Tide Tavern. Say... by the looks of you, might you be a traveler from out of town?
什么意思，你们不接待游客？
What do you mean you don't accept visitors?
不不不，我们接待的，您放心，我们没有赶客的意思。
No, no, no, we'll take care of you, don't worry. We have no intention of turning you away.
外地游客？我是老二维市人。
Tourist? I'm a born and bred Duomension City local.
别开玩笑了，我一眼就看出了您不是二相乐园的人。
Cut the jokes. I can tell at a glance that you're not from Planarcadia.
是这样的，我们是二相乐园旅游发展委员会的指定合作商铺…这个我就不详细解释了，简而言之，外地的游客来我们店消费是有优惠的！

So here's the deal. We're a designated partner shop of the Planarcadia Tourism Development Committee... I won't get into the details, but long story short, out-of-town visitors get special discounts at our store!
仅限二相乐园的外地游客，可以购买本店的「二维市观光文旅消费券」。
Only visitors from outside Planarcadia can purchase our "Duomension City Cultural Tourism Vouchers."
「消费券」生效期间，在一定价格区间，您在本店产生的一切饮食消费都将由旅游发展委员会承担…所以客人希望现在就办理吗？

While the "Vouchers" are available, within a certain price range, all your food and beverage expenses at our establishment will be covered by the Tourism Development Board... So, would you like to process it now?
快办理观光消费消费券！
Nah, I'll just wait in line.
「二维市观光文旅消费券」可以免去排队叫号的等待，如果客人坚持排队的话，您的前面还有大约<unbreak>78</unbreak>桌客人，预计排队时间超过1天。

The "Duomension City Cultural Tourism Voucher" lets you skip the queue number system. If you insist on waiting in line, there are approximately <unbreak>78</unbreak> tables ahead of you, with an estimated waiting time of over 1 day.
客人您的「消费券」已经生效了，里面的空桌正在收拾，客人请稍等一下。
Your "Voucher" is now active. We're cleaning up a table inside. Please wait a moment, dear guest.
欢迎光临怒涛小酒馆。里面的空桌正在收拾，客人请稍等一下。
Welcome to Roaring Tide Tavern. We're cleaning up an empty table inside. Please wait a moment, dear guest.
让我看看你们的菜单吧。
当然，咱们店里别的不说，食材都是当季最新鲜的。您随便选，都好吃！
Of course, if nothing else, all our ingredients are the freshest of the season. Take your pick. Everything's delicious!
那么，客人您里面请，我们很快就给您上齐。
Please come in, dear guest. We'll have your order ready in no time.
暖黄色灯光下杯盘参差，隔帘透出餐台雾气，木廊尽头飘来木弦琴的余音。
Under the warm yellow lights, dishes are scattered about, steam wafts through the curtain from the dining table, and the lingering notes of a wooden lute drift from the end of the wooden corridor.
海原市特产的鲑鱼片，橘红润泽，纹理细腻柔润。入口时，冰凉滑嫩，肥腴软糯，那是海洋特有的清甜…蘸上淡酱油与芥末，鲜味甘甜，如融化在舌尖的脂膏。

The raw salmon slice, a specialty of Seafeld City, boasts a lustrous orange hue and delicate, silky texture. As it melts in your mouth, it's cool and tender, with a rich, buttery softness and that distinctive oceanic sweetness... Dipped in light soy sauce and wasabi, its umami and sweet flavors dissolve like velvet on your tongue.
那么，客人您里面请，我们很快就给您上齐。
Please come in, dear guest. We'll have your order ready in no time.
暖黄色灯光下杯盘参差，隔帘透出餐台雾气，木廊尽头飘来木弦琴的余音。
Under the warm yellow lights, dishes are scattered about, steam wafts through the curtain from the dining table, and the lingering notes of a wooden lute drift from the end of the wooden corridor.
金色脆壳在齿间绽开——匹诺康尼风味的焦香蓬勃而出，马铃薯的甜糯在酥脆掩护下悄然蔓延。
The golden crust shatters between the teeth, releasing the toasted aroma unique to Penacony, while beneath the crispness, the sugary tenderness of the potato quietly unfolds.
那么，客人您里面请，我们很快就给您上齐。
Please come in, dear guest. We'll have your order ready in no time.

Under the warm yellow lights, dishes are scattered about, steam wafts through the curtain from the dining table, and the lingering notes of a wooden lute drift from the end of the wooden corridor.
招牌深夜泡面冒着热气。雪白的面条浸在琥珀色牛羊骨高汤之中，面条麦香清韧，溏心蛋温润，酱牛肉片肥瘦相宜…实在是好滋味。

Steam rises from the Signature Late-Night Instant Noodles. The pristine white noodles bathe in amber-colored broth of beef and lamb bones, with the noodles offering a perfect wheaty chewiness, the soft-boiled egg rich and creamy, and the braised beef striking just the right balance between leanness and fattiness... truly a delectable treat.
那么，客人您里面请，我们很快就给您上齐。
Please come in, dear guest. We'll have your order ready in no time.

Under the warm yellow lights, dishes are scattered about, steam wafts through the curtain from the dining table, and the lingering notes of a wooden lute drift from the end of the wooden corridor.
甄选山野走地鸡，搭配山中菌菇，带着炭火炙烤的气息，一串肥瘦油亮。焦香气息的油脂顺着串签流淌，在唇齿之间迸发出鲜嫩的肉汁…哦，你的美，是美拉德反应的美。

Carefully selected free-range chicken, paired with wild mushrooms from the mountains, grilled with a charred aroma, each skewer glistening with the perfect balance of lean and fatty meat. The fragrant juices drip along the skewer, bursting with tender meat juices between your lips and teeth... oh, the beauty is all about the Maillard reaction.
那么，客人您里面请，我们很快就给您上齐。
Please come in, dear guest. We'll have your order ready in no time.

Under the warm yellow lights, dishes are scattered about, steam wafts through the curtain from the dining table, and the lingering notes of a wooden lute drift from the end of the wooden corridor.
暖黄灯光笼着暗色木质餐桌，炭火气与油脂的香气在空气中交织——饱腹感，那是幸福的另一个名字，你体会到了不做选择，全部都要的快乐。

The warm yellow light envelops the dark wooden dining table, as the aroma of charcoal and savory oils intertwine in the air. Satiety, that is but another name for happiness. Here, you have discovered the joy of never having to choose, for you can have it all.
有没有能带走的食物呢？
Is there any food we can take with us?
小店主打堂食，不做外卖。希望客人能够理解！
We specialize in dine-in service only, no takeout. We appreciate your understanding!
你不清楚淡蓝色隔帘后隐藏着什么，就像你不知道为何这个房间会出现在酒馆里。
You don't know what lies behind the pale blue curtain, just as you don't know why this room is even in the tavern to begin with.
但无论如何，现在，你要把床帘拉开了——
But regardless, the time has come to open the curtain—
不要拉开！不要拉开！不要拉开！
Don't open it! Don't do it! Don't!
回应声来自隔帘后的空间，可毫无疑问，透过眼前这层薄纱，你并没有见到任何人影。
The voice came from behind the curtain. But looking through the thin layer of fabric, you can see no one there.
Why can't I open the curtain?
这样…有害健康…是的，没有错。不，她一直不省人事。这样啊……
It's... bad for your health... Yes, that's right. No, she has been unconscious. I see...
对方没有回答，反而似乎正在与不知何处的某人通话。
The voice doesn't answer you, but instead seems to be talking with someone you can't see.
喂喂！请问是医生吗？是…是的，她一直没有醒来。是的…是的……
Hello? Is this the doctor? Yes... Yes, she still hasn't woken up. Yes... yes...
她一直在沉睡着。拜托你…叫醒她……
She's been asleep this whole time. Please... you have to wake her up...
那话语近乎悲鸣，轻声到难以听清的程度。你忽地想起那位医生对花火的诊断，或许，这张病床上躺着被某人遗弃的面具，也或许正好相反。

The voice was almost a whimper, so quiet you could barely make it out. You suddenly recall the doctor's diagnosis of Sparkle. Maybe there's a mask on this bed, discarded by someone... or maybe it's the other way around.
你还要拉开隔帘吗？当然，你可以交给更*适合*的人来处理。
Are you still going to open the curtain? Of course, you could always leave this for someone more... capable.
对。正所谓疑心生暗鬼，克服恐惧最好的办法，就是面对恐惧。
That's right. It's true that your own fear is the real monster. And the best way to conquer a monster is to look it in the eye.
隔帘内没有人。你只见到一只普通的舞鞋，就这么孤零零地摆在病床上。
There's no one behind the curtain. All you see is a single, ordinary dancing shoe lying on the bed.
难道刚才的对话，就是通过这只舞鞋进行的吗？你始终不得而知。
Was the conversation you heard coming from this dancing shoe? You'll never know for sure.
It's probably best to leave it alone.
很明显，问题的复杂程度已经远远超过了你的理解能力，贸然介入并没有好处。正当你打算离开时……
Clearly, this situation is far more complicated than you can comprehend, and there's no point in getting involved. Just as you decide to leave...
喂？请问是医生吗？喂？你有听见吗？…喂？喂？请问有听见吗？你是医生吧？喂？
Hello? Are you the doctor? Hello? Can you hear me? ...Hello? Is anyone there? You're the doctor, right? Hello?
…你是医生吗？！那个…我…其实，我一直很想把名字和身份从她手中夺走，因为她看起来好难受。
Are you the doctor!? The thing is... I... I've always wanted to take her name and identity from her, because she looks so miserable.
但那样做，她会很悲伤的。
But if I did that, she would be very sad.
那么，你要不要试着和大家一起去上学呢？
Well then, why don't you try going to school with everyone else?
能接触到各种事，对她也有好处，像是和同学见面，或是听课，我也会一起去的，好吗？
It would be good for her to experience new things, like meeting new classmates or going to class. I'll be there with you, alright?
此后许久，隔帘内都再没有声音传来。身旁的高中生却不知为何深深叹了口气。
For a long while after, there was only silence from behind the curtain. The high school student next to you, however, let out a deep sigh for some reason.
她…有点不一样。对存在感到怀疑，没法正确理解现实，也承受了太多不该有的压力。
She's... a little different. She questions her own existence and can't properly perceive reality. She's also under far more pressure than she should be.
没关系。我相信她会找到新的生活节奏的。人偶就算摘下面具，内在的心也不会改变。
It's alright. I'm sure she'll find her own way. Even if a puppet removes its mask, the heart inside remains the same.
再见。谢谢你陪了她这么久。
Goodbye. And thank you for staying with her all this time.
极其普通的舞鞋，看不出有任何特别。但或许，它也曾是某个女孩年幼时的珍贵之物。
A perfectly ordinary dancing shoe, with nothing special about it. Still, perhaps it was once a young girl's most prized possession.
毫无疑问，你听见了悉悉索索的声响，就从隔帘内部传来。你确定那里有什么东西。
Undoubtedly, you hear rustling sounds coming from behind the curtain. You're certain something's in there.
拉开看看吧！你的好奇心正在低语，而对此，你没有任何反对意见。于是你伸出了手——
Pull it open and take a look! Your curiosity is whispering to you, and you have no objections to that. So you reach out your hand...
意料之中的，病床上空空如也，但很显然，你并不会看漏床底下的东西。
As expected, the hospital bed is empty, but obviously, you won't miss what's under it.
你应该在房里，不该在床底。
You should be in your room, not under the bed.
床底的噗噜并未对你的话语作出反应，或许，他想把「你没看见我」这个状态坚持到底。
The ploo beneath the bed doesn't react to your words. Perhaps he's committed to maintaining his "you can't see me" state until the very end.
Speak up or I'm calling for help!
Hey... I really can see you.
别说话，我正在冥想。我在寻找失去的那一半灵魂，我知道它就在这间病房里。
Shh, I'm meditating. I'm searching for the lost half of my soul. I know it's somewhere in this ward.
好吧。我失败了。趁下轮尝试还没开始，有什么想问的快说吧。
Fine. I failed. If you've got any questions, spit them out before I start my next attempt.
明知故问。躺在病床上…不对，病床下的还能是谁，当然是需要治疗的病人。
You already know the answer. Who else could be lying in... no, under... the hospital bed other than a patient who needs treatment?
还有更多信息。这里是「世界尽头」酒馆，所以我是个愚者，在寻找我的面具，这样够清晰了吗？
There's more information. This is "World's End" Tavern, and I'm a Fool searching for my mask. Is that clear enough?
What are you doing under the bed?
哈。这个说来话长了。我来找医生看病，诊断结果是「自我迷失」，治疗方案则是……
Hah. That's quite a story. I went to see a doctor, and they diagnosed me with "loss of self." The treatment plan was...
广泛的聆听。所以我躲在床底下，窃听其余病人的诊断过程，希望藉此来找到我原本的面具。
Extensive eavesdropping. So I've been hidden under the bed, secretly listening to other patients' diagnoses, hoping to find my original mask through this.
可我发现，听到的秘密越多，窥探的隐私越多，我…好像离原本的我越来越远了。
But I've realized... the more secrets I hear, the more private matters I pry into, the further I seem to drift away from who I used to be.
我看见茫茫多窗户，每扇后面都亮着灯，房间里都住着人，但其中唯独没有我自己。我在哪？
I see countless windows, lights glowing behind each one, people living in every room, but I'm not in any of them. Where am I?
在酒馆里谈论隐私权，搞笑？那儿的马桶里塞的可全是隐私，想掏尽管去掏，没人拦着。
Privacy rights in a tavern? That's hilarious! Even the toilets here are stuffed with secrets. Feel free to dig through them if you want, nobody's stopping you.
好笑的、可笑的、可怜的、可爱的…如果不是藏在你最心底的东西，那就没意思了。
Funny, ridiculous, pitiful, adorable... if it's not hidden in the deepest part of your heart, then what's the point?
That doctor has to be a fraud, right?
你知道吗，我就是这个医生。我给我自己看病。
You know what? I am that doctor. I treat myself.
或许你在房间里的床底下。
Maybe you're under the bed in your room.
哈哈哈哈哈！好！你讲了个我喜欢的笑话，是啊，躲在床底，看到的当然是床底的世界！
Hahahahaha! Nice! Now that's my kind of joke. Of course the underside of the bed becomes your world when you're hiding beneath it!
茅塞顿开！一语点醒床底人！想在房间里找到自己，首先我就得站在房间里才行啊！
That makes sense! Quite enlightening! If I want to find myself in the room, I need to actually stand in the room first!
这个疗程就到此为止。接下来，我要堂堂正正地和来这的病人聊天，聆听他们的话语。
This course of treatment ends here. From now on, I'll have proper conversations with the patients who come here and listen to what they have to say.
别找了，那是别人的房间。
Stop looking. That's not your room.
是啊，我知道。但我不是…到处都找不到，才只好用这个办法。说不定能找到很像的呢。
Yeah, I know. But I can't... find it anywhere else, so this is my only option. Who knows, maybe I'll find something similar.
哎，行吧。这个疗程就到此为止，我该去试试新的方案了。
*sigh* Alright then. That's enough of this course of treatment. Time to try a new approach.
你也该走了。再见再见，我看得出来，你还不适合这个地方。但酒馆的病房永远欢迎你。
You should go now. Bye-bye, I can tell this place doesn't suit you well. But you're always welcome in the ward of the tavern.
先声明啊！我们禁止任何未成年人饮酒，你要是还没长大，你先长大好吧……
Disclaimer! We strictly prohibit minors from drinking alcohol. If you're not grown up yet, come back when you are...
Don't worry, I'm of legal age.
那没事了，我就是按照规定问问。
Alright then, just had to ask, protocol and all.
出酒馆左转，有自动贩卖机，那里面有各种各样甜甜的汽水。
Turn left after exiting the tavern, there's a vending machine with all kinds of sweet sodas inside.
另外，咱这是主理人酒馆，客人来喝什么饮料，得听我这主理人的建议。
Besides, this is my tavern, and when it comes to what drinks my customers should have, they ought to listen to my recommendations as the proprietor.
看在我们的交情上，我会请你一杯，但你要回答我的问题，我帮你挑，我保证是最懂你的酒保——
For old times' sake, I'll buy you a drink, but you'll have to answer my questions. I'll pick for you. I promise I'm the drinksmith who knows you best.
第一问，您来咱「世界尽头」酒馆，是为了找点乐子，还是寻找刺激，或者是…我想想，单纯想喝个饮料？
First question: What brings you to "World's End" Tavern? Are you here for some funsies, looking for a thrill, or... let me think... just want to grab a drink?
来愚者的酒馆就是找乐子的。
Coming to the Fool's tavern is all about having fun!
哦？找乐子的话，你更喜欢哪种乐子呢？假装喝酒，让嘴巴短路，还是说想来点文艺范儿？
Oh? Speaking of fun, what's your poison? Pretending to drink till your mouth short-circuits, or are you in the mood for something more... cultured?
假装在喝酒，实际是汽水儿。
Pretending to drink alcohol, but it's actually just soda.
那我推荐这杯「面包汽水」。
看着、闻着、喝着都像是酒，但实际不是酒，在愚者的酒馆里，倒也正常。
Looks like booze, smells like booze, tastes like booze, but it's not actually booze. Then again, that's pretty normal for the Fool's tavern.
来吧，恭喜您，成功用成年人的杯子，装了一杯未成年人的快乐。
Well, well, congratulations! You've successfully put a kid's joy in a grown-up's cup.
嘴巴里噼里啪啦的，来点儿。
Pop, crackle and snap in your mouth, give me some.
那我推荐这杯「噼咔白葡萄汽水」。
Then I recommend this "Pika White Grape Soda."
含在嘴里保证噼里啪啦的，您看见杯里的弹簧了吗，那是上一位智械客人短路时留下的。
Keep it in your mouth for a guaranteed pop and crackle! See that spring in the cup? That's from our last Intellitron customer who had a short circuit.
来吧，您也小心点，喝的时候会「噼咔噼咔」的，您别朝着别人吐泡泡就成。
Here you go, but be careful, because it'll go all "fizz-crackle" when you drink it. Just try not to blow bubbles at other people, alright?
电影里那些人喝啥我也喝啥…
I'll have whatever they're having in the movies...
你放心，我们这也满足那些刻板印象——来一杯「热夜之都」吧。
Don't worry, we've got all those stereotypes covered. How about a "Capital of Passion"?
喝了这杯「热夜之都」，就算你只是在这里发呆，看上去都会非常有破碎感——
After a glass of "Capital of Passion," even if you're just spacing out here, you'll look incredibly delicate and weary...
「有时如果你喜欢一个人，你就要把他当作陌生人。」
"Sometimes if you love someone, you have to treat them like a stranger."
痛，太痛了…想要这么痛，就得喝「热夜之都」。
Ouch, it hurts so bad... If you wanna feel this much pain, try drinking "Capital of Passion".
要是寻找刺激，能有多刺激？
How thrilling could looking for thrills really be?
寻找刺激，那么…你能承受什么程度的刺激？
Looking for thrills, huh... just how much excitement can you handle?
刺激肠胃的，会上吐下泻那种。
The kind that messes with your gut and makes you spew from both ends.
那我直接推荐你「催吐剂」吧。
Then I'll just recommend you the "Vomit Inducing Agent."
虽然它不在菜单上，但您既然诚心诚意地问了…我也大发慈悲地推荐给您。
Although it's not on the menu, since you asked so sincerely... I'll graciously recommend it to you.
从广义上来看，它里面装着液体，喝了也不会死，姑且也可以算是一种饮品。
Broadly speaking, it contains liquid and drinking it won't kill you, so I guess you could technically call it a beverage.
喝完记得写一下感想，我会拿去做参考的。
After you drink it, don't forget to write down your thoughts. I'll use them as reference.
到作死边缘，但不想真的死掉。
Living on the edge, but not ready to kick the bucket.
有人曾经给了我一个配方，叫「塔拉毒火焰」，大概能达到你想要的效果。
Someone once gave me a recipe called "Thalan Toxi-Flame," it should do exactly what you're looking for.
据说啊据说…反正我没有喝过。喝下去的感觉就像是生吞点燃的钢丝绒，非常惨痛。
They say that—I mean, I've never tried it myself, but they say that drinking it feels like swallowing ignited steel wool... absolutely excruciating.
您要是有幸活下来，肯定也是洪福齐天了。
If you're lucky enough to survive, you must be blessed by the heavens.
有没有那种像是被子弹打中的？
Did it feel like getting hit by a bullet?
有的，之前有位牛仔来这里给我们推荐了一个配方：「阿斯德纳白橡木」。
Yeah, a cowboy came by earlier and recommended us a recipe: "Asdana's White Oak".
尝一口，感觉跟脑袋上中了一枪也没差别了——颅骨嗡鸣，记忆短路，很有可能会流鼻血。
One bite, and it feels like getting shot in the head. Your skull buzzing, memory short-circuiting, and you'll probably end up with a nosebleed.
另外，小馋嘴要小心一点，别把杯子里的「配菜」也给吞下去了。
Also, you little glutton, be careful not to swallow the "garnish" in your cup too.
喝完之后能够登神的那种有吗？
Got anything that'll make me ascend to godhood after drinking it?
我不确定这是否算得上刺激，但是你可以试试：「仙馔蜜酒（仿品）」。
I'm not sure if this counts as exciting, but you could try: "Ambrosia (Imitation)."
传说，第一个尝到仙馔蜜酒的凡人成为了神明。在咽下的瞬间，他看见世界的规则变成了手边的丝线，他想怎么扯就怎么扯，想多拽就多拽……

Legend has it that the first mortal to taste the divine nectar became a God. In the moment they swallowed, they saw the rules of the world transform into threads at their fingertips, ready to be pulled and tugged at their whim...
可惜，我这只有仿品，您喝下去之后也许没有那么刺激。
Too bad I only have replicas here. Might not give you quite the same kick when you drink it.
我就喝个饮料而已，简单点…
I'm just getting a drink, keep it simple...
嗐，别把我当成一个到处取乐的乐子人嘛。没关系，满足你，你对味道有什么要求吗？
Hey, don't treat me like some fun lovin' goofball who's just here for laughs. No worries, I'll help you out. Got any specific preferences for flavor?
As long as it has flavor, just don't make it too weird.
您的选择非常安全，安全到…「世界尽头」酒馆也不得不拿出最后的手段。
Your choice is so safe, so safe that... even the "World's End" Tavern has to resort to their last measure.
除非您的思维中存在着某种思想钢印，咱们的矿泉水应该是绝对不会出错的选择！
Unless you've got some kind of mental seal in your consciousness, our mineral water should be an absolutely foolproof choice!
还真有，这是我上次仙舟旅行带回来的「琥珀花雕」。
Yes indeed, this is the Amber Huadiao Wine I brought back from my last trip to Xianzhou.
虽然在时髦的酒馆点一杯黄酒不太传统，但我向您保证这一口文化底蕴绝对是传统的。
While ordering yellow wine at a trendy tavern might not be a tradition, I assure you that this sip of cultural heritage is as traditional as it gets.
如果你需要，我这里还有一碟茴香豆，可以搭配着使用。
If you need it, I've got a plate of fennel seeds here that you can use as well.
恐怕没有什么比「在酒馆点一杯羊奶」更保守的选择了，这是「热浮羊奶」。
Nothing's more vanilla than "ordering a glass of goat milk at a tavern." This is steamed puffergoat milk.
虽然您不是个牛仔，但在酒馆点了羊奶。为什么不点杯烈酒，因为烈酒伤身体。
Though you're no cowboy, you ordered goat milk at the tavern. Why not get some hard liquor? Because hard liquor's bad for your health.
在酒馆的声色犬马之中，您毅然决然坚定地选择养生，您…您是这个！
Amidst all the debauchery at the tavern, you resolutely chose to stay healthy... you... you're absolutely mad!
钟珊珊说不定真是…最不懂你的酒保呢！管他的，先干为敬！
Zhongshanshan might just be... the drinksmith who understands you the least! But who cares? Let's drink to that!
牙齿比出生的时候还干净，呼吸都变清爽了，体会到刷牙的精髓。
My teeth are cleaner than when I was born, and even my breath feels much fresher now. I finally get what brushing teeth is all about!
就像换了一口新牙，原来牙齿可以这么完美！笑容也变更自信了。
It's like getting a brand new set of teeth! I never knew they could be this perfect! My smile's got so much more confidence now.
甜度恰到好处，幸福得想眯起眼睛叹气…所有不开心都被赶跑了。
The sweetness is just perfect, making me want to sigh contentedly with half-closed eyes... All the unhappiness has been chased away.
到底是多久没有在吃饭的时候又唱又跳了呢…肚子和心都填满了。
It's been forever since I last sang and danced while eating... Both my stomach and heart are full.
一杯极致的幽默在嘴里化开，变成了笑声。体会到一丝欢愉。
A sip of exquisite humor dissolves in my mouth, turning into laughter. I feel a touch of Elation.
普通的病床、普通的帘子…至少在此刻看来，它们没有任何特别之处。
Normal hospital beds, normal curtains... At least for now, there's nothing special about them whatsoever.
拉动帘子或许能为你带来快乐，但现在不是做这种事的时候。
Pulling on the curtain might bring you joy, but now's not the time for that.
你注意到隔帘边缘有不少磨损，或许，也有许多像你这样的人曾专程前来反复拉动过。
You notice the curtain is frayed at the edges. Perhaps many like you have made the trip here just to pull it back and forth over and over.
即便是在酒馆，也还是请尊重下人们的隐私权吧…至少你心中的崇高道德感是如此认为的。
Even in the tavern, a little respect for privacy ought to be observed... or at least that's what your lofty sense of morality tells you.
俗话说，愈是朦胧神秘的东西，愈能激起人们的探索欲望。而眼前薄薄的蓝色纱帘，无疑正是这个理论的最佳阐释。

As the saying goes, the more mysterious and enigmatic something is, the more it sparks our desire to explore it. And these thin, sheer blue curtains before you are undoubtedly the perfect embodiment of that expression.
新的动静出现了…怎么办，你似乎有点按捺不住自己的好奇心了，要掀开看看吗？
There's a new sound... What should you do? You seem unable to contain your curiosity... Would you like to lift the curtains and take a peek?
First, listen carefully to the sounds inside.
遇事不决，谨慎点总归是没错的。你屏息凝神，开始认真聆听起隔帘内的声响——
When in doubt, it's always better to err on the side of caution. Holding your breath, you focus intently, carefully listening to the sounds coming from behind the curtains...
漫长的寂静中，一阵微不可闻的叹息声幽幽地从其中传来。
In the long silence, a barely audible sigh drifted faintly through the air.
毫无疑问，你是个有礼貌的人，既然对方都向你搭话了，你当然没有不回应的道理。
Without a doubt, you're a polite person. Since they've taken the initiative to talk to you, there's no reason not to respond.
开场白很重要，它决定了你留给对方的第一印象，在这种关键时候，你打算说的第一句话是——
Opening lines are crucial. They determine the first impression you leave on the other person. At this crucial moment, your first words will be...
Mustn't run away, mustn't run away...
好，你极为热情地向对方打了招呼，并好奇会得到什么样的回应，这时…隔帘突然自动拉开了！
Alright, you've greeted them with extreme enthusiasm. Just as you wonder what kind of response you'll get... The curtain slides open on its own!
Just go for it, pull back that curtain!
想那么多干嘛，最坏的结果无非就是低头认个错，笑着将眼前的尴尬场景化解掉。在你那即将喷涌而出的开拓精神面前，这算不了什么，对吧？

Why overthink it? The worst that could happen is having to bow your head and apologize, then laugh it off to diffuse the awkward situation. It's nothing compared to that Trailblazing spirit about to burst forth from within you, right?
So now, it's time for you to take action.
...Get some rest. Sorry to bother you.
是啊，医务室原本便是为健康状况不佳的学生准备的，在这胡乱探索，势必会影响对方的恢复。
Yeah, the infirmary is meant for students who aren't feeling well. Snooping around this place would definitely interfere with their recovery.
这种时候，只用默默离开就好了。
At times like these, it's best to just quietly slip away.
...Get some rest. Sorry to bother you.
是啊，医务室原本便是为健康状况不佳的学生准备的，在这胡乱探索，势必会影响对方的恢复。
Yeah, the infirmary is meant for students who aren't feeling well. Snooping around this place would definitely interfere with their recovery.
这种时候，只用默默离开就好了。
At times like these, it's best to just quietly slip away.
你好。请问…这是哪，我已经不用再战斗了？
Hello. Um... Where am I? I don't have to fight anymore?
这样吗？原来冲击已经结束了，我究竟…昏迷了多久。十四年…还是更长？
Is that so? So the impact is over... How long was I out? Fourteen years... or even longer?
果然，由我引起的灾难…我的罪过，不会轻易消失。
Sure enough... The disaster I caused... My sins won't fade away easily.
谢谢你的照顾。但我…我必须去找我的朋友们了。她们或许还在月亮上，等着我去拯救。
Thank you for taking care of me. But I... I must find my friends. They might still be on the moon, waiting for me to save them.
那轮幻月，你应该看到了。那是来自天外的不明生命体，我的使命，就是消灭它。
That Phantasmoon, you must have seen it. It's an unknown lifeform from beyond the sky, and my mission is to eliminate it.
我必须坐上机铠，那是只有我能做到的事。咳…再见，陌生人。
I must pilot the mechatron, that's something only I can do. *cough* ...Farewell, stranger.
普通的医务室床位。尽管曾有人躺在这里，但如今床单和被褥早已整理得没有一丝褶皱。
A standard infirmary bed. Though someone once lay here, the sheets and bedding have since been neatly made without a single wrinkle.
祝他的旅途顺利——你在心底如此祈愿。
In your heart, you pray that they have a smooth journey.
随处可见的医务室床帘，深沉的蓝色透出一丝神秘。如今它紧紧地闭着，似乎在隐藏某个秘密。
This is the kind of infirmary curtain you can find anywhere. Colored deep blue, it exudes an air of mystery. Now it's drawn tightly shut, as if concealing some secret.
掀开看看吧！你仿佛听到了恶魔的低语。掀开看看吧！你不由自主地向隔帘伸出了手……
Take a peek! You seem to hear the devil's whispering. Take a peek! Your hand involuntarily reaches for the curtain...
哟，{F#少女}{M#少年}，你也是来寻找记忆的吗？
Yo, {F#girl}{M#boy}, are you also here to search for memories?
突如其来的话语，嗓音嘶哑而慵懒，像是从繁星遍布的暗夜传来。
The words are spoken by a hoarse and languid voice, as if carried forth from a star-studded night.
别紧张。这里现在只有我们，直到满足今天的自己为止，试着来聊聊天吧。
Don't be nervous. It's just us here now, so let's have a chat until we're satisfied with ourselves goes.
…我？城市暗处的游荡者，夜晚的主宰，以人类生命为食料的怪物。怎么称呼，随你喜欢都好。
...Me? A wanderer in the dark corners of the city, ruler of the night, a monster that feeds on human lives. Call me whatever you like.
或者你可以用个更直接的名字——吸血鬼。
Or you could just use a more straightforward name: vampire.
有意思。从哪来很重要吗？有谁说得清楚？我们在这里相遇，这件事才是最重要的吧？
Interesting. Does it really matter where we're from? Who can say for sure? What matters most is that we met here, right?
不过，我来这里，确实是为了寻找我的过去。人类都是在医院出生的对吧，或许我也不例外。
Still, it's true that I came here to search for my past. Humans are all born in hospitals, right? Maybe I'm no exception.
啊，不准说这里不是医院！我知道的，但这不是，实在找不到了，就来碰碰运气嘛。
Nuh-uh, you're not allowed to tell me this isn't a hospital! I know it's not, but I couldn't find one anywhere else, so I thought I'd try my luck here.
喂，你就不觉得这些问题很无趣嘛？就算得到了结果，又能有什么改变？
Hey, don't you think these questions are boring? Even if we get the answers, what's gonna change anyway?
行吧，我就是随便转转，运气好，能找到我要的答案。运气不好，也能带几袋暗红色的能量饮料回去。
Fine, I was just wandering around. If I'm lucky, I'll find the answers I'm looking for. If not, at least I can bring back a few bags of crimson Energy Drinks.
至于去哪…实话说，我没想好。去哪都行，总之，能看到那个月亮就好吧。
As for where to go... Honestly, I haven't decided yet. Anywhere is fine, as long as I can see that moon.
我说，你到底有完没完啊！
Come on, when are you gonna give it a rest already!
这里是医务室，禁止大声喧哗！问来问去的，烦死了。
This is the infirmary, keep your voice down! All these questions are driving me nuts.
我就是来找东西的。出生证明也好，旧照片也好，能表明我是怎么出现在这个世界上的东西都行。但什么都找不到，这太奇怪了吧？
I'm just here looking for stuff. Birth certificate, old photos, anything that could show how I came into this world. But I can't find a single thing. Isn't that super weird?
喂。你看起来很懂的样子，知道些什么吗？
Hey. You seem to know your stuff, got any insights to share?
…为什么吸血鬼会长兔耳朵啊！
奇怪？电视屏幕里，这种角色不是很多嘛？还是说…嘿，你不喜欢？
Huh? Aren't there tons of characters like that on TV? Or wait... Hey, don't tell me you don't like them?
无所谓吧，和人类长得不一样就行，至于是兔耳朵还是獠牙，不重要。
Whatever, as long as I don't look like a human. Whether I have bunny ears or fangs, it doesn't matter.
唔，我好像听过这个称呼，但是啊，这不过是用一个词解释另一个词，最终还是什么都没搞清楚，没意思。
Hmm, I think I've heard that term before. But hey, that's just semantics. In the end, we still haven't figured anything out. What's the point?
我不记得过去的事，所以怎么说都行。重要的是，我能不能认可。
I don't remember my past, so you can say whatever you want. What matters is whether I can accept it or not.
噢！有意思，怪不得我对那个月亮很有好感，原来，我是从那来的啊！
Oh! That's interesting, no wonder I felt drawn to that moon. So that's where I'm from!
我该回那去吗？又该怎么回去呢…啊啊，好复杂，想不清楚。
Should I go back there? And how would I even get back... Ugh, it's so complicated, I can't think straight.
算啦。既然在这没收获，不如回家喝几瓶胡萝卜汁，再睡大觉！哈哈。
Oh, well. Since there's nothing here for me, I might as well head home, chug some carrot juice, and hit the hay! Haha.
恭喜你认识了一名忘不掉的神秘美少女，现在我要走咯！
Congrats on meeting an unforgettable mysterious beauty! Now I gotta run!
有缘分再见吧，{F#少女}{M#少年}。
If fate allows, we'll meet again. Until next time, {F#girl}{M#boy}.
Let's get out of here quick.
消毒水味道的病房，紧闭的隔帘，从不知何处传来的话语…所有要素都隐隐透出令人恐惧的气息。
A hospital room reeking of disinfectant, tightly drawn curtains, mysterious voices coming from who knows where... Every element here exudes an unsettling, fear-inducing vibe.
趁你还没有踏入危险的漩涡，收手吧！
Back off while you still can, before you get sucked into this dangerous whirlpool!

应该…还是如我想的那样。

是吗？看来你已经搞清楚事情来龙去脉了。

对啊，毕竟能看到这么混乱的情景，确定的事情也变得不确定了。
Yeah, after witnessing such chaos, even the things we were sure about don't seem so certain anymore.
总之，我是推开了一扇门之后来到这里的。在脑子回过味之前，我就打算回去了。

无论你是过去、未来、或者是幻造出来的我，拉上帘子，我们重归各自的世界线。

看来「我」受到的冲击太大，还是我自己来吧。
Looks like "I" am too shocked to handle this, so I'll do it myself.

我不记得我有把你丢掉啊？

你是玛丽，请问玛丽是谁？

玛丽小姐来帮你回忆一下。

So, please continue to support Mary Express!
对不起，我不应该丢下你！
I'm sorry! I shouldn't have left you behind!
是的，小小玛丽其实想要听到的，只是这句话而已。现在，我已经如愿了…再见了，主人，祝你幸福。
Yes, this is all I want to hear. Now, my wish has come true... Farewell, master, and may you find happiness.
玛丽速递，马上就到你身后～
Mary Express, right behind you already~
看来在二相乐园，人工智能想要取代幻造种的工作，还需要走很长一段路……
Looks like AI in Planarcadia still has a long way to go before it can replace imagenae's work...
电话亭里的电话铃声响个不停，要去接听一下吗？
The phone in the phone booth keeps ringing. Should you answer it?
接一下，说不定有事找我呢…
Take it. Perhaps someone's looking for me...
不是我喜欢的电话，我不接。
I don't like this call, so I won't answer it.
就让电话铃继续响下去吧，城市的喧嚣声里，要是少了它可不行。
Let the phone keep ringing. The city's symphony just wouldn't be complete without it.
没有，我现在只能拨通这个电话亭……
No, I can only get through to this phone booth right now...
短暂的沉默后，旁边的答录机传来了玛丽小姐的声音。
After a brief silence, Miss Mary's voice comes from the answering machine beside.
哇——好狠心的人，又想把玛丽小姐遗弃不管了吗——
Waah— How heartless! Are you trying to abandon me again?
请帮帮玛丽小姐，我现在迷路了，这里好奇怪啊！
Please help me. I'm lost, and this place is so weird!
描述一下你现在周围的环境？
四周空空的，只有玛丽小姐脚底下有路，我感觉自己好像被压扁了！
It's empty all around, and there is only a path under my feet. I feel like I've been flattened into a pancake!
玛丽小姐刚刚在送信，但被路过的电车撞到，回过神就在这里了。
Miss Mary was just delivering mail when she got hit by a passing tram. When she came to, she found herself here.
Let's just keep moving for now.
好的，这里有点像二维市的二次元JUMP，玛丽小姐现在很慌，求求你千万不要挂电话——
Okay, this is kinda like an Interplanar Jump in Duomension City. Miss Mary is really freaking out right now, please please don't hang up—
呃…前面有个三岔路口，还有一块路牌！
Uh... There's a three-way intersection up ahead, and a road sign!
向左边的箭头旁画着一团蓝色的刺球，右边的画着一团粉色的圆球，中间的画着红色的帽子？
A spiky blue ball is drawn next to the arrow on the left. A round pink ball is drawn next to the arrow on the right. A red hat is drawn next to the arrow in the middle?
咦，我来到了一个新地方，看起来像是开发过的森林，路上还洒着很多圆环…戒指？
Huh? I've arrived at a new place. Looks like a forest that's been worked over, and there are lots of rings scattered on the path... Wait, rings?
而且…怎么到处都是过山车一样三百六十度的环形路面啊？
And why are there <unbreak>360</unbreak>-degree loop tracks like roller coasters everywhere?
只要你的速度够快就能走。
You can make it as long as you're fast enough.
你是对的，我看到蓝色的刺球正在那种路面上疾驰了。
You're right, I can see a spiky blue ball zooming across the tracks.
Pick up some rings to keep on hand.
很难想象戒指会有什么用处。等一下，我看到一个蓝色的刺球正在飞速移动——
Hard to imagine what I can use the rings for. Wait a sec, I see a blue spiky ball moving at breakneck speed—
什么？别吓我啊！等一下，我看到一个蓝色的刺球正在飞速移动——
What? Don't scare me like that! Wait a sec, I see a blue spiky ball moving at breakneck speed—
咦，怎么越来越近了，不要超速行驶——
Huh? Why is it getting closer and closer. Don't exceed the speed limit—
这里是…好漂亮的地方…蓝天绿树，还有很多流星掉下来。玛丽小姐正在许愿回到二相乐园……
This place is... It's so pretty... The skies are so blue, the trees are so green, and there are so many shooting stars. Miss Mary is making a wish to return to Planarcadia...
我看到粉色的团子了，好可爱。它好像也是幻造种，正在打盹呢。我该怎么办？
I see a pink blob, it's adorable! I think it's an imagenae, and it's taking a nap. What should I do?
我试试看…你好，可以打扰一下吗？…嗯嗯，它好像醒了。
Let me try... Hello, excuse me? ...Hmm, I think it's waking up.
Go pick up some stars to keep on hand.
能够被捡起来的星星，真是神秘。啊，粉团子好像醒过来了。
Stars that can be picked up, how mysterious. Ah, I think the pink blob is waking up.
什么？不要吓我啊！啊，粉色的团子好像醒了……
What? Don't scare me like that! Ah, I think the pink blob is waking up...
原来它的嘴巴能张这么大啊~等，等一下！玛丽小姐不是吃的！要被吸走了，哇——
Whoa, I had no idea its mouth could open that wide~ W—Wait a second! Miss Mary isn't food! I'm getting sucked in, waaah—
咦，我来到了一个新地方…这里有浮在天上的砖块，很多绿色的水管。
Huh? I've arrived at a new place. There are floating blocks in the sky and lots of green pipes everywhere.
还有很多乌龟和栗子一样的幻造种，我该怎么办？
There are also lots of imagenae that look like turtles and chestnuts... What should I do?
Maybe you can ask them for directions?
我试试看…你们好？吃饭了吗？
Let me try... Hey there! Have you eaten?
…它们发出了一些咕噜咕噜的声音，玛丽小姐听不懂啦。
...They made some gurgling noises. Miss Mary doesn't understand.
You can jump up and stomp on them.
玛丽小姐跳不了那么高啊！你为什么要这么说，难道说你知道这是哪里吗？
Miss Mary can't jump that high! Why would you say that anyway... Don't tell me you know where I am?
呀，它们朝我冲过来了！玛丽小姐要钻到前面的水管里去避难了！
Yikes, they're charging at me! Miss Mary's gonna dive into that pipe up ahead to take cover!
电话突兀地挂断了——以防万一，在电话亭里多呆一会吧，希望玛丽小姐一切安好。
The phone cuts off abruptly. Maybe you should stay in the phone booth a bit longer, just in case. Hopefully, Miss Mary is alright.
不久，电话再次响了起来。
Soon after, the phone rings again.
玛、玛丽小姐，现在、在泊地站。
M—Miss Mary reporting in, I'm at P—Perdido Station right now.
Welcome back to the real world.
还，还好。玛丽小姐惊魂未定，要回去休息一下。不过在此之前……
I—I'm fine. I'm still quite shaken and needs some rest. But before that...
电话被挂断了，但很快又响了起来，你没来得及接起，答录机就已经响起了玛丽小姐的声音。
The call was cut off, but it rang again shortly after. Before you could pick up, the answering machine had already started playing Miss Mary's voice.
我是玛丽小姐，我现在 在 你 的 背  后~
This is Miss Mary, and I'm~ right~ behind~ you~
玛丽速递，马上就到你身后～
Mary Express, right behind you already~
从玛丽小姐那里得到了赞许，你感到一种充实感从心底升起，熠熠生辉。
Getting Miss Mary's approval fills you with a deep sense of fulfillment, making your heart glow with pride.
电话亭静静伫立着，尽力不发出任何悲鸣。它在为你逝去的快递，献上属于灵物的悼念。
The phone booth stands in solemn silence, doing its best not to let out a single mournful cry. It's offering a Faekind's grief for the delivery you'll never receive.
就让这段宁静——再持续些许时间吧。
Let this peace last... just a little while longer.
小小玛丽给你带来的惊悚体验仍历历在目…不，应该说是历历在耳。
The horror Mini Mary put you through is still fresh in your mind... No, make that fresh in your ears.
应该不会有好事之人给它打造真实的躯体吧…谁知道呢？
Surely no busybody would go and forge it a true body... who knows, though?
在这里，你曾聆听一场盛大的冒险，并亲自迎接故事的勇士主角回乡。
Here, you once listened to a grand adventure and personally welcomed the story's heroic protagonist home.
至于那段旅途的细节，就不要深究了。
As for the details of that journey, let's not dig too deep into it.
今天我们站在这里，来缅怀一位拿电话亭开玩笑的乐子人。
Today we gather here to commemorate a Fun Lovin' soul who made a joke out of the phone booth.
乐子神在上，愿他的欢愉之魂能够消停一会，至少下次别再惹玛丽小姐了。
By The Laughter above, may his soul of Elation be soothed awhile, that he might cease his torments of Miss Mary, at the very least.
喂喂，你好，我是玛丽小姐，你为什么把我丢掉呢？我一定会去找你的。
Hey, hey! Hello there! This is Miss Mary speaking. Why'd you toss me out like that? I'm definitely gonna come find you!
我不记得我有把你丢掉啊？
I don't remember throwing you away though?
好狠心的人，不仅将玛丽遗弃在河里，还假装不记得这件事。
How cruel! Not only did they abandon Mary in the river, they're even pretending they don't remember doing it.
你是玛丽，请问玛丽是谁？
You are Mary, but who is Mary?
好狠心的人，连自己最喜欢的洋娃娃名字都不记得了。
How cruel! You don't even remember the name of your favorite doll.
你找错人了，这边挂了哈。
Wrong number. Hanging up now, bye!
别想走，电话亭的门已经自动焊死了，在我来之前，你哪都别想去。
Don't even think about leaving. The phone booth door's been automatically welded shut. You're not going anywhere until I get there.
玛丽小姐来帮你回忆一下。
小时候，我是你最喜欢的洋娃娃。但是你长大了，你狠心将玛丽小姐放在衣橱积灰。
When you were little, I was your favorite doll. But you grew up, and heartlessly left me in the closet.
然后你搬了家，你没有带走我，反手将玛丽小姐扔到了垃圾桶里，就像是扔掉了一块烂布。
Then you moved away, leaving me behind, and even tossing me into the trashcan like some worthless rag.
现在，我现在就在垃圾桶里，我一定会去找你的。
Right now, I'm in the trashcan, and I'm definitely coming to find you.
电话亭已经被上锁了…难道我是真的撞上了二相乐园的都市怪谈了？
The phone booth is locked... Could I have actually stumbled upon one of Planarcadia's Urban Myths?
电话铃声不响了，但是答录机自动响起了玛丽小姐的声音…等等，电话亭里有这么复古的东西吗？
The phone stops ringing, but an answering machine kicks in with Miss Mary's voice... Wait, do phone booths even have something that retro anymore?
你好，我是玛丽小姐，现在我就在贝洛伯格下层区。
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm currently in the Underworld of Belobog.
合着你要从那么老远赶过来啊？
Wait, so you're traveling all the way here from way over there?
所以你是在贝洛伯格的垃圾桶？
So you're in a trashcan in Belobog?
电话铃声不响了，但是答录机自动响起了玛丽小姐的声音。
The phone stops ringing, but an answering machine kicks in with Miss Mary's voice.
你好，我是玛丽小姐，现在我就在贝洛伯格下层区等电车。
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm waiting for the tram in Belobog's Underworld right now.
那真是有点太远了，在你赶过来之前，我可能要被困死在电话亭里。
That's way too far. I might end up trapped to death in this phone booth before you even make it here.
你不要着急嘛，明明是玛丽小姐才是那个赶电车的人。
Hey, take it easy! I am the one who needs to catch the train, not you.
你有没有听说过一句话叫「慢慢走，欣赏啊」，现在玛丽小姐就在一边缓慢前进，一边欣赏沿途风景。人生的路，还很长呢。

Ever heard the saying "take it slow and smell the roses"? That's exactly what I am doing right now: moving at my own pace and taking in the sights along the way. After all, life's journey is a long one.
你能不能稍微快进一下？
Could you hurry up a little?
真正的恐怖是无尽等待…
True terror is the endless wait...
Let me out. I'll find you.
你好，我是玛丽小姐，现在我就在泊地站。别急，我这就来找你。
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm at Perdido Station right now. Don't worry. I'm on my way to find you.
Oh my gosh, that was fast!
电话被挂断了。但电话铃再次响了起来。
The call's been cut off. But the phone started ringing again.
你好，我是玛丽小姐，我 现 在 在 你 身 后…
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm... right... behind... you...
玛丽速递，马上就到你身后～
Mary Express, right behind you already~
从玛丽小姐那里得到的，是来自贝洛伯格的一封信，署名垃圾桶之王。
What you got from Miss Mary was a letter from Belobog, signed by none other than the King of Trashcans.
「想你的风还是吹到了二相乐园，没事的时候常回冬城看看。」
"The wind carrying my love for you has finally reached Planarcadia. Come back to Everwinter City to visit when you have time."
我那么大个玛丽小姐人呢？
Wait, where did Miss Mary go!?
Guess we'll just have to catch up next time!
谢谢你，老朋友，我也想你。
Thanks, old friend. I've missed you, too.
千里传书信，这就是友情的重量。
Letters traveling thousands of miles, that's what friendship weighs.

你有没有听说过一句话叫「慢慢走，欣赏啊」，现在玛丽小姐就在一边缓慢前进，一边欣赏沿途风景。人生的路，还很长呢。

Ever heard the saying "take it slow and smell the roses"? That's exactly what I am doing right now: moving at my own pace and taking in the sights along the way. After all, life's journey is a long one.
你能不能稍微快进一下？
Could you hurry up a little?
真正的恐怖是无尽等待…
True terror is the endless wait...
Let me out. I'll find you.
你好，我是玛丽小姐，现在我就在泊地站。别急，我这就来找你。
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm at Perdido Station right now. Don't worry. I'm on my way to find you.
Oh my gosh, that was fast!
电话被挂断了。但电话铃再次响了起来。
The call's been cut off. But the phone started ringing again.
你好，我是玛丽小姐，我 现 在 在 你 身 后…
Hi, this is Miss Mary, and I'm... right... behind... you...
玛丽速递，马上就到你身后～
Mary Express, right behind you already~
从玛丽小姐那里得到的，是来自贝洛伯格的一封信，署名垃圾桶之王。
What you got from Miss Mary was a letter from Belobog, signed by none other than the King of Trashcans.
「想你的风还是吹到了二相乐园，没事的时候常回冬城看看。」
"The wind carrying my love for you has finally reached Planarcadia. Come back to Everwinter City to visit when you have time."
我那么大个玛丽小姐人呢？
Wait, where did Miss Mary go!?
Guess we'll just have to catch up next time!
谢谢你，老朋友，我也想你。
Thanks, old friend. I've missed you, too.
千里传书信，这就是友情的重量。
Letters traveling thousands of miles, that's what friendship weighs.
「这是一扇门」有些太过于理所当然了，问题是在于——这里只有*一扇门*，或者说，这里只剩下了*一扇门*，门前门后都完全可见，所以它是来干什么的……
"This is a door" is stating the obvious. Here's the problem: there's only *one door* here. Or rather, only *one door* remains, with both sides of it completely visible. So what exactly is it for...
也许不用思考得那么复杂——门在打开的时候是「通道」，门在关闭的时候是「屏障」。现在只需要去打开它，然后走进门里，你就是知道它究竟是何处的通道、又是何处的屏障了。

Perhaps there's no need to overthink it. A door is a "passage" when it's open; it's a "barrier" when it's shut. Right now, all you have to do is open it and walk through. Then you'll know where exactly it leads, and where it keeps you from.
不详的漩涡…或许你曾在蓝色的猫型机器人那里看到过类似的门。
An ominous vortex... Perhaps you've seen a blue, cat-shaped robot in possession of a similar door.
…唯一的差别是，它知道自己要去哪，你不知道。
...The only difference is, it knows where it's going, but you don't.
但是这又何妨呢，难不成你还会被绑架不成？去吧！
But what's the worst that could happen? It's not like you're gonna get kidnapped, are you? Go for it!
好奇心曾经害死了不少的生物，而你活下来了！这说明了你的谨慎是有道理的…但是，门就在这里，欢迎你在任何时候打开它。
Curiosity has claimed the lives of many creatures before you, but you survived! This proves your caution was well-founded... But still, the door is right here, and you're welcome to open it anytime.
仔细一看，这不是愚者们热烈讨论的大红人{NICKNAME}吗？你为什么会穿门而过呢？
Let me take a closer look. Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}, the talk of the town among the Fools? Why did you walk right through that door?
Because the door is right there.
多么简单而直接的理由，就像一名抢劫犯说「因为钱就在那里」。
What a simple and straightforward reason. It's like a robber saying "because the money was right there."
I came here to see you.
真的吗？我好开心，竟然是这种理由！
Really? I'm so happy, I can't believe that's the reason!
但是…你根本就不认识我。在你眼中，我只是「不认识的声音」。
But... you don't even know who I am. To you, I'm just an "unfamiliar voice."
哈哈哈哈，那还真是不小心啊…你以为我会相信吗？
HAHA, an "accident" you say... You really think I'd buy that?
我是「制门匠」，这里是酒馆的藏品室。而你刚才穿过的门，也是这间藏品室的藏品之一，由我亲手制作的「阿门」。
I am the "Doormaker," and this is the collection room of the tavern. The door you just passed through is also one of the pieces in this collection. "A-Door," crafted by my own hands.
阿哈的任意门，简称「阿门」。
阿门建立在伪科学之上，你可以说它的原理是虫洞、量子隧道、时空弯曲——但我们更愿意称呼它为「阿哈的伟力」。
"A-Door" is built on pseudoscience. You could say it works through wormholes, quantum tunneling, or space-time warping, but we prefer to call it "The Power of Aha."
阿门的外型可以是个衣橱，也可以是个兔子洞…但幸好，这一批丢失的门都还没化过妆。
A-Door's appearance could be a wardrobe, or a rabbit hole... but thankfully, all these doors are still free of makeup.
没错，这是我的代称。酒馆里不同的愚者们自由出入不同的位面，就是靠着阿门。
That's right, that's my alias. The different Fools in the tavern can traverse different planes freely thanks to A-Door.
而「制门匠」就是负责制作、管理和维修这些「门」的人。
And "Doormakers" are the ones responsible for creating, managing, and maintaining these "doors."
所以，你为什么要绑架我？
So, why did you kidnap me?
那只是我随口一说，你并没有被绑架，你只是舒适地坐在马桶上。
I was just kidding. You weren't kidnapped, you were just sitting comfortably on the toilet.
放心吧，酒馆的人告诉过我了，你不仅不是威胁，还是酒馆的好朋友。而我，只是想在你离开前，确认「门」的情况。
Don't worry, the folks at the tavern told me you're no threat. In fact, they said you're a good friend of the tavern. As for me, I just wanted to check on the status of the "door" before you leave.
你们简单地交换了有关「门」的情报。
You briefly exchanged information about the "door."
前不久，有好事的愚者把收藏室里低品质的「门」全都打开了，然后它们又在另一侧被好事者关上…总之，这些门就这样从酒馆里逃逸了。

Not long ago, some meddlesome Fool opened all the low-quality "doors" in the collection room, only for them to be shut again by another meddler on the other side... Just like that, these doors escaped from the tavern.
而你眼前的这扇门，是我造出来专门用来回收那些半成品的「门」。今天，它终于成功截获了一名过门的人。为了表达谢意，你被允许使用这扇阿门了。

And this door before you? I built it specifically to retrieve those half-baked "doors." Today, it finally succeeded in intercepting someone passing through. As a token of gratitude, you're now granted permission to use this A-Door door.
如果你在旅行过程中发现了「门」，也请你直接通过它，这样的话，我便可以锁定门两侧的坐标，完成门的定位。
If you encounter a "door" during your journey, please go through it directly. This way, I can pinpoint the coordinates on both sides of the door and complete its location mapping.
所以，你是打算回收这些门？
So, you're planning to retrieve these doors?
不了，就丢在外面吧，回收起来还蛮麻烦的，这世界出点乱子没什么大不了的。
Nah, just leave them outside. They're a hassle to retrieve anyway. A little chaos in the world is no big deal.
…只要能在世界毁灭者到来之前把门全部都回收了就行，应该没问题的。
...as long as all the doors are retrieved before the World Destroyer arrives, it should be fine.
需要我专门跑过来告诉你吗？
Do I need to come all the way here to tell you in person?
不用了，这些门还是有开门记录的，只要被再次打开过，就能追踪。
No need, these doors still keep access records. As long as they've been opened again, we can track them.
当然，你不会白白冒着未知的风险打开门。若我们的定位工作进展顺利，你会拿到我的奖励。
Of course, you won't be taking these risks for nothing. If our locating work goes smoothly, you'll get your remuneration.
等你找得差不多了，你再回来找我吧，我就在这扇门的背后。
Come back once you've found enough. I'll be right behind this door.
怎么了吗，门外汉，找我有事？
What's the matter, outsider? Need something from me?
可以，不过我们只能隔着门这样聊了。你知道的，这扇阿门不通到我这。
Sure, but we'll have to chat through the door like this. You know, this A-Door doesn't connect to where I am.
阿哈的任意门，简称「阿门」。它建立在伪科学之上，你可以说它的原理是虫洞、量子隧道、时空弯曲——但我们更愿意称呼它为「阿哈的伟力」。

Aha's Anywhere Door, or "A-Door" for short. It's built on pseudoscience. You could say it works through wormholes, quantum tunneling, or space-time warping, but we prefer to call it "The Power of Aha."
很简单，「制门匠」是负责制作、管理和维修阿门的人。
A Doormaker is simply someone who creates, manages, and maintains the A-Door.
鸽川水里那扇门很酷吧？嘿嘿。
You know that pretty cool door in Dovebrook's waters? That's me, hehe.
一个小建议——要是你想聊天了，二维市市内的神人还蛮多的。
A little tip: If you're looking to chat, there are quite a few colorful characters in Duomension City.
I want to claim my reward.
Let me check the door access logs.
多亏了你，我们定位到所有逃逸的阿门。这是我许诺过的奖励，请收下。
Thanks to you, we've located all wayward A-Doors. Here's the reward I promised, please take it.
现在你开过的阿门数量还不够，等你收集了足够多的阿门，再来找我吧。
You haven't opened enough A-Doors yet. Come back to me when you've found more of them.
我都发过你奖励了，你别再想讹我了。
I already gave you your reward, so don't try to scam me.
阿门是一扇传送门，要传送哪里，阿哈可不管。
"A-Door" is a teleporter, and "A-ha" couldn't care less where it teleports you to.
你有些纳闷为什么「制门匠」身旁的阿门会通向这里。
You're somewhat puzzled by why the A-Door next to the Doormaker leads here.
可能是为了更方便倾吐烦恼吧……
Maybe it makes venting more convenient...
Push open the door and enter.
推不开…似乎有什么神秘的力量正在和你唱反调——
The A-Door won't budge... seems like some mysterious force is working against you...
"You don't have the right, O you don't have the right..."
锁链被拖拽而过，机杼扭转喀哒，金属囚门相撞……
Chains dragged across the floor, gears twisting and contorting, metal prison doors slamming shut...
门后传来了一些让人背后发凉的声音。
You hear some spine-chilling noises from behind the door.
这里应该是你很熟悉的监狱，罗浮仙舟的幽囚狱。而你不熟悉的是，门的另一端为什么会在这里。
This should be the familiar Shackling Prison of the Xianzhou Luofu to you. However, what's unfamiliar is why the A-Door would lead here.
这位一直在打量着你的官方工作人员保持着微笑，她满脸写着：怎么，吃完饭没事来监狱自首来了？
The officer keeps a polite smile while sizing you up, her face clearly saying: What's this? Turning yourself in for fun?
{NICKNAME}大人，我们又见面了，我是负责这片幽囚狱的司狱赤衣。我看得出你对自己为什么会出现在幽囚狱感到疑惑，我丝毫不感到意外。
{NICKNAME}, we meet again. I am Chiyi, the Jailer in charge of this section of The Shackling Prison. I can see your confusion as to why you've ended up here, and I'm not surprised in the slightest.
幽囚狱一直都有提防着「靠着纯粹随机的方式定位到幽囚狱内部的双向传送门」，我们对这里的空间坐标做了一些调整，保证那些冒失的传送门总能到达这间专属囚室。

The Shackling Prison has always been wary of "two-way teleporters that randomly lock onto coordinates within the prison." Thus, we've made adjustments to the spatial coordinates here to ensure that rogue teleporters always deliver their subjects to this dedicated cell.
当然，这都是为了防范越狱的必要举措。
Naturally, these are all necessary precautions to prevent prison breaks.
你不会要抓我去坐牢吧？
You're not gonna throw me in jail now, are you?
如果是一般的位面旅行者，我会先抓后审。
The standard procedure for a typical dimensional traveler would be to detain and interrogate.
但我认识您，我能想象您大概是在某个世界随意地打开了一扇门，然后再恍然大悟发现自己已经在牢里了。我说的没错对吧？
However, knowing you, I'd imagine you casually opening an inconspicuous door in some other world, just to find yourself suddenly behind bars. Does that sound about right?
看来你们抓了不少传送者？
Looks like you've caught quite a few travelers, then?
我们确实抓住过一些冒失的位面旅行者，不过嘛，更多的则是策划越狱却自称是来这旅游的人。
Careless ones, yes, but more often than not, individuals who plan the escapes while claiming to be here "on vacation."
我自然是相信{NICKNAME}大人的，不过我的工作习惯促使我要再次提醒您「幽囚狱并非是一个来去自由的场所」，大人切要小心行事。

I am more than happy to put my trust in you, {NICKNAME}. But it is my professional obligation to remind you, once again, that The Shackling Prison is not a place where people walk about freely. Please be cautious in your operations here.
至于这扇传送门嘛，过些时日，我们会将其安全销毁。{NICKNAME}大人，现在您可以通过那扇门回去，不过既然*不小心*回到了罗浮，不如上街逛逛去。

As for this teleporter, we'll safely dispose of it in a few days. You may return through it now, {NICKNAME}, but since you've "accidentally" found yourself back on the Luofu, why not take a stroll around town?
没有别的事情，那么，赤衣就此告辞了。
If there's nothing else, I shall take my leave.
Push open the door and go back.
一扇阿门旁若无人地立在街边。
A lone A-Door stands nonchalantly in the alley.
外头行人络绎，而它遗世独立。
Aloof and detached from the world's busy rally.
Push open the door and enter.
就像以静默应对这个世界，它也以静默应对你。
Just as it meets the world with silence, it greets you with silence.
发出一声很酷，但也充满疑惑的*哼*！
Let out a cool but puzzled "hmph"!
别紧张，朋友。我不是什么好人，但也不是什么坏人，我是…「钟表小子」。
Easy there, friend. I'm no saint, but I'm not a villain either. I am... "Clockie."
而你现在是我的搭档，我的挚友，我最忠诚的好伙伴…「哈努兄弟」。
And now you're my partner, my dear friend, most loyal companion... "Brother Hanu."
Let out a really cool sounding "hmph"!
啊哈，你已经完全代入角色了！
Aha! You're completely in character now!
我知道你现在可能想要交流，但现在想要交流确实不太可能…不过别担心，虽然你说的话我听不懂，但我说的话你听得懂。
I know you probably have a lot to say, but that's not really possible at the moment... Don't worry though, while I can't understand what you're saying, at least you understand what I'm saying.
你眼前这扇门，原本只是一扇平平无奇的传送门。很无趣，很无聊。而我在它的数据库里导入了「克劳克影业」旗下的全部IP形象，好精彩，好好玩！
This door in front of you was just an ordinary, run-of-the-mill teleporter. So dull, so boring. But then I imported all the IP characters from Clock Studios into its database! So exciting, much fun!
现在，它能在传送的同时把人变成特定IP形象，摇身一变，成为「阿•cosplay•门」。
Now, on top of teleporting someone, it can also transform them into specific IP characters. It has become... "A-Cosplay-Door."
想象一下，假如把这扇门悄悄安装到那些大型漫展的入口…所有漫展都将变成克劳克ONLY！
Just imagine... If we secretly installed this door at the entrance of those big comic conventions... all conventions would become Clock-Studios-only!
我们克劳克粉丝的腰杆在二相乐园，从来没有挺得这么直过。
We Clock Studios fans have never held our heads so high before in Planarcadia.
真不枉我冒着被制门匠丢到宇宙尽头的风险，帮那些在收藏室吃灰的阿门们来一场说走就走的旅行……
It was worth the risk of being thrown to the universe's end by the Doormaker, freeing these dusty A-Doors in the collection room and taking them on an unplanned excursion...
Say hello to the edge of the universe for me!
发出一声正义凛然的*哼*！
哦，不要这么紧张，朋友。虽然变化的效果还不太稳定，但绝对不会有生命危险，顶多……
Oh, don't be so nervous, friend. While the transformation effects aren't quite stable yet, it's one hundred percent safe! At worst, it'll—
Let out a really cool sounding "hmph"!
很可惜，「阿•cosplay•门」成功了，但没有完全成功。
A shame. The A-Cosplay-Door succeeded, but it was a partial success.
Let out a really cool sounding "hmph"!
你知道他现在可能想要交流，但现在想要交流确实不太可能。
You know he probably has a lot to say, but that's not really possible at the moment.
发出一声充满遗憾的*哼*。
Push open the door and go back.
「学校的走廊上矗立着一扇陌生的门。没人知道它通往哪里，可打开它的人，没有一个回来…」还没见到这扇阿门，你就已经听说了有关它的怪谈。
"A mysterious door stands in the school hallway. No one knows where it leads, and those who opened it... never came back." The reputation of this ominous A-Door precedes it.
绘世学院的校园怪谈有七个，它不是其中之一。
There are seven urban legends in Graphia Academy, and it is not one of them.
Push open the door and enter.
意料之中的毫无回应。但许是受到环境的影响，你心中莫名浮动起某种微妙的情感——就好像你真是个打算逃课的学生似的。
As expected, there was no response. Perhaps influenced by the environment, an oddly peculiar feeling wells up inside you, as if you really were a student skipping class.
算了，想那么多做什么，又不会有人在门后等着抓你。
Oh, whatever. It's not like someone's waiting to catch you behind the door.
Hey, you! Stop right there, I'm talking to you!
无故逃课、擅自离校，还殴打纪律委员…你是几年几班的，学号是多少？我给你加点学分。

Skipping class willy-nilly, leaving school without permission, and beating up the disciplinary committee member... Which class and year are you in? What's your student ID? I'm logging all these to your record.
门这边是二维市，门那边是绘世学院。你从门那边来却说自己不是学生，不觉得太苍白无力了吗？
This side of the door is Duomension City, and that side is the Graphia Academy. Don't you think that's a really weak excuse for someone coming from the academy side?
家长？你是家长，我还是校长呢。
Parent? Well, if you're a parent, then I'm the principal.
你一定是二年级的吧？一般来说，这种症状出现在中学二年级比较多。
You must be an eighth-grader, right? I've heard about this infamous syndrome of yours.
国有国法，校有校规。无论你怎样巧舌如簧，都免不了受到校规的惩罚。
As the nation has its laws, so does the school its rules. Talk all you want with that silver tongue of yours, punishment will be delivered.
惩罚就是由你代替我，担任纪律委员一职，到放学为止。
And that punishment is... for you to take my place as the disciplinary committee member until school ends.
That's not a punishment. That's a reward... right?
Well, if that's what you want to believe.
原本我也是一个青春貌美的学生干部，是对逃课的学生的怨念，让我变成了这副模样。
I used to be a beautiful student leader in my prime, but my grudge against students who skip classes turned me into... this thing.
这扇门前些天突然凭空出现在学校里，搬也搬不走、毁又毁不掉，虽然没什么危险，但格外助长了学生逃课的嚣张气焰。

This door suddenly appeared out of nowhere at school a few days ago. It can't be moved or destroyed, and while not dangerous, it's definitely encouraging students to skip school with unprecedented audacity.
虽说校方已经联络了专业人士来处理，但都折腾好几天了，也没见什么成效。
The higher-ups have contacted professionals to handle the matter, but they've been at it for days now without any progress.
教导主任为了守护他岌岌可危的发际线，干脆就把压力给到我们学生会。最近我们轮流值守，但还是有不少学生蒙混过关。

The dean of students, in a desperate attempt to keep his hairline from receding further, decided to dump all the pressure on us in the student council. We've been taking turns for patrols lately, but there are still students who managed to slip through the cracks.
你战胜了我，说明你比我更强，你能抓住我抓不住的同学，更有资格肩负起纪律委员的职责。
You've defeated me, that means you're stronger than I am. You can catch students that I can't, so, you're more qualified to shoulder the responsibilities of the disciplinarian.
至于我嘛，来都来了，就去市区逛逛再回学校吧——
As for me, well, since I'm already here, I might as well check out the city before heading back...
Skipping class right under my nose?
Sorry, I can't cover this up for you.
这么快就进入状态了吗？你果然强得可怕！
Already taking up the mantle? You really are a force to be reckoned with!
好吧，那么现在换我受罚，惩罚的内容是…由我来继续担任纪律委员。
Alright then, now it's my turn to be punished, and my punishment is... to continue serving as the disciplinary committee member.
已经把这辈子有趣的事情都想了个遍，怎么还没有放学？
I've already daydreamed about every single fun thing I could possibly do in life, and class is STILL not dismissed?
Push open the door and go back.
这不是你见过的第一扇阿门，却是你见过的第一扇自带音效的阿门。
This isn't the first A-Door you've seen, but it's certainly the first that comes with its own sound effects.
你不知道门后有什么，但你知道它似乎很急切、也很执着。
You don't know what's behind the door, but you can tell it's both urgent and persistent.
许是由于久久未能得到回应，敲门声慢了下去，却越来越重……
Perhaps due to the lack of response, the knocking slowed down, yet grew heavier and heavier...
来自对面的敲击声沉寂片刻，又重新响了起来，欢欣而迫切——
The knocking fell silent for a moment, then started up again, joyful and urgent.
*knock knock knock* *knock knock knock knock knock*
Push open the door and enter.
你环观四周，却发现此处空无一人。你想起了某些二相乐园怪谈，夜深之时，伪人会敲响独居者的房门，而被拜访的住户，从第二天起会变成「另一个人」……

You look around, but find no one here. You recall a Planarcadia urban legend: In the dead of night, imposters would knock on the doors of those who live alone, and on the next day, the visited residents would become "someone else"...
你警惕起来，敲门声却不依不饶。
You became alert, but the knocking persists relentlessly.
面对你挑衅般的回应，这次的敲门声变得格外礼貌，不徐不疾、富有韵律。
In response to your provocative reply, the knocking turns surprisingly polite and gently paced, even rhythmic.
如果这扇「阿门」对面真有伪人，至少也是一位有礼貌的伪人。
If there really is an impostor behind this A-Door, at least it's a polite one.
Push open the door and enter.
你的脚下是软的，眼前是白的——
You feel softness beneath your feet, and you see white all around you...
阿门不知何时悄然退场，新晋的演员正隔着医务室的纱帘，隐约映出个似人的轮廓。
You have no idea when the A-Door had quietly disappeared. A new actor is standing behind the infirmary's curtains, casting a vague human silhouette.
你还在思考来者是谁，隔帘便被唰地拉开。
While you're still busy wondering who they are, the curtain suddenly pulls open.
应该…还是如我想的那样。
It should be... just as I thought.
看来你已经搞清楚事情来龙去脉了。
Looks like you've figured out what's going on here.
你就是我，我就是你。没错…吧？
I am you, and you are me. That's right... right?
You're asking me, but who am I supposed to ask?
我对自己的精神状况也没有那么大的信心。你也很清楚，对吧？
I'm not that confident about my mental state, either. You know that, don't you?
总之，我是推开了一扇门之后来到这里的。在脑子回过味之前，我就打算回去了。
Long story short, I got here after opening a door. Before my brain could even process what was happening, I was already planning my way back.
站在地上的你深深地看了你一眼，谢幕般朝着帘子伸出了手——
The standing you takes a deep look at you, then reaches for the curtain as if closing the final act...
怪诞演出到此为止，短暂的交汇过后，观众与演员重归原本的轨迹，而你自始至终都是你。
The bizarre performance comes to an end. After a brief convergence, the audience and actors return to their original trails, and you remain who you've always been.
无论你是过去、未来、或者是幻造出来的我，拉上帘子，我们重归各自的世界线。
Whether you're from the past, the future, or an imagenated version of me... Draw the curtains, and let's each return to our own timelines.
这是一扇阿门，但这不是重点；重点是它在的位置——就在酒馆的角落里。
This is an A-Door, but that's not the focus here. The focus is where the door's located: right in the corner of the tavern.
制门匠到底有多久没出过门了？
How long has it been since the Doormaker last went out?
Push open the door and enter.
门后隐约有声音传来。那是一阵欢快的旋律，和你在真人秀里听到的音效别无二致。
You hear faint sounds coming from behind the door. An upbeat melody, no different from the sound effects you'd hear in variety game shows.
这扇门可能会通往一个*星途璀璨*的未来。
This door may lead you toward a future of stardom.
面前有两扇门，一扇是阿门，另一扇也是阿门。
There are two doors in front of you. An A-Door, and another A-Door.
正在你疑惑之际，一阵欢快、愉悦的旋律响起。
Just as you're pondering in confusion, a cheerful, delightful melody starts playing.
噢，又一位「真真假假大竞答」的挑战者！{F#她}{M#他}能够答对题目，赢走奖池中的所有奖金，还是推开错误时间线的大门，永远迷失？让我们拭目以待！

Oh, here comes another challenger for the "True or False Quiz Show"! Will {F#she}{M#he} answer correctly and take home the jackpot? Or will {F#she}{M#he} open the door to the wrong timeline and become lost forever? Let's wait and see!
第一题：其实世界上根本没有幻造种，都是阿哈穿着玩偶头套扮演的。是真，还是假？

阿门都很聪明，而有些阿门格外聪明。

Actually, when I first embarked on interstellar travel, my teacher once asked me, "Dollie, do you believe there are two exactly identical leaves in this world?"

时间的流动并非是线性的，我曾见到过另一个与我一模一样的存在——她的眼神温柔又哀伤，似乎她经历了一切却不愿意向我透露半个字。

I'm neither Poofy nor Snowie, please remember my name! I'm Fulwish TV's reporter: Bubble Beak!
首先恭喜{NICKNAME}击败了火花，这是我从业以来，第一次看到一个既不是二相乐园原住民也没有公司编制的外地人…啊哦，一个外来谒者获胜。呵呵，还是蛮稀奇的。

First off, congratulations to {NICKNAME} for defeating Sparxie. In all my years in this business, this is the first time I've seen an outsider who's neither a Planarcadia native nor on the IPC payro— 'scuse me, I mean a Supplicant from outside — take the win. Oh-ho, quite the rare sight.
啊哦！有什么不妥吗？要做二相乐园最严厉的记者，正是我的采访风格。
Oh-ho! Something wrong? As someone who wants aspires to be Planarcadia's toughest reporter, that's just my interviewing style.
正式开启第一个问题吧！我观察到，{NICKNAME}在绘世学院的幻境中度过了两年的学生生涯，也就是说，花了整整「两年」时间才识破火花的幻境……

Let's officially begin with Question 1. In my observation, {NICKNAME} spent two full years as a student inside Graphia Academy's illusion. In other words, it took you two whole years to see through Sparxie's illusion...
…有点慢说实话。当时是怎么想的？是以*安全*为首要考虑吗？
...a bit slow, to be honest. What were you thinking back then? Was safety your top priority?
You've got the wrong read on me.
你仔细想想，火花花了两年也没给我洗脑成功，到底谁更夯谁更拉？
Think about it: Sparxicle spent two years trying to brainwash me without success. In the end, who truly holds the power, and who is simply outclassed?
I'm concerned about innocent students being hurt.
学校是打架的地方吗？我只是留了一手，不到万不得已，不打算动手。
Is the school a place to fight? I was holding back. I wasn't going to go on offensive unless I absolutely had to.
真的吗？在学校里打架的事，无名客们也不是没干过吧？我可是看过《苍天航路绒绒号》毗乃昆尼篇的……
Really? It's not like the Nameless haven't gotten into scraps at school before. I've totally watched the Pinecany arc of Fluffy Across the Blue...
You think I didn't want to hurry it up?
你以为我不想快点吗，这件事很难的，换你的话，没有十年做不到好吧！
You think I didn't want to hurry it up? This is an immense undertaking. If you were in my position, it would take you a decade to achieve what I have.
你看你看，早干嘛了，怎么现在开始急了？
Oh look what we have here? What did you think was going to happen? Why are you getting defensive?
现在进入第二个问题：《乐园早知道》栏目全程播放了火花大会的现场实况，我也看了，对于你的首战表现，我的评价是：还不错。
Now for Question 2. Arcadian Morning Report aired the entire SparxiCon event live. I watched it. My assessment of your debut performance is: not bad.
所以，{NICKNAME}考虑之后接受满愿电视台的赞助吗？
So, {NICKNAME}, have you considered taking Fulwish TV's sponsorship?
(Ask about the intention of the sponsorship)
老实说，你们只是馋我带来的收视率吧？
Be honest: You just want the ratings I bring, don't you?
呵呵，这就是商业电视台的运作逻辑，但你也能借助满愿电视台获得更高的关注度，怎么想都不亏吧。
Hehe. That's how commercial TV works. But you'll get way more exposure through Fulwish TV, too. However you slice it, you're not losing out.
对我的评价只有「还不错」？就凭你的态度……
Just "not bad"? With that attitude of yours...
呵呵，我只是个合同工，爱怎么评论就怎么评论。我不对满愿电视台的业绩负责，领导要是看我不爽可以开除我。
Heh. I'm just a contract staff. I'll say what I want. I'm not responsible for Fulwish TV's performance. If the higher-ups don't like it, they can fire me.
(See how much the TV station is offering)
你们有多少诚意？我要看看满愿电视台能给多少赞助费。
How serious are you guys? I want to see how much sponsorship fee Fulwish TV is willing to offer.
…啊哦！你是外来客可能不知道，满愿电视台是二相乐园最大的电视台，愿力要多少有多少。当然，前提是你有足够的商业价值……

...Oh! You're an outsider, so you might not know this. Fulwish TV is the biggest network in Planarcadia. They've got Wishpower coming out of their ears. Of course, that's only if you're worth the price...
好好考虑吧，{NICKNAME}，错过这个机会可就没有了。
Think it over carefully, {NICKNAME}. Miss this chance and it's gone for good.
你的提问机会也结束了，满愿电视台的采访就到这里！
And your question time's up too. That's all for Fulwish TV's interview!
Front row, second from the left.
哔哔哔，到我了到我了，《狸狸周刊》的特派记者幻太子来了啵！
Beep-beep, my turn, my turn! Paraprince, special correspondent for Furbobo Weekly, reporting in, boop!
我一直潜伏在火花大会现场，辛辛苦苦地跟拍素材，还被火花「校长」抓住现形送了我一发大点赞，{NICKNAME}是不是该奖励我回杂志社啵？

I've been deep undercover at SparxiCon, working tirelessly to capture exclusive footage. I even had a run-in with "Dean" Sparxie, who caught me in the act and gave me a big old "Like" for my troubles. Surely that's worth a special commendation back at the editorial department, {NICKNAME}?
What's wrong with being stationed at Graphia Academy?
可以，再奖励你多问几个问题。
Sure thing. As a reward, I'll let you ask a few more questions.
好的啵！好的啵！这就来提问。
第一个问题：乐园热心群众目睹列车组的丹恒先生和一名神秘男子曾出现在发生血案的鸽川区，还有传言认为，星穹列车不止有{NICKNAME}持有的一副面具……

First question: Eyewitnesses in the park spotted Mr. Dan Heng of the Astral Express and a mysterious man in Dovebrook District, the site of a recent homicide. Furthermore, rumors suggest that {NICKNAME} isn't the only member of the Express in possession of a mask.
在「火花大会」事件中，{NICKNAME}与人联手对战火花，有人表示星穹列车不讲武德！
During the SparxiCon incident, you, {NICKNAME}, teamed up with others against Sparxie, leading some to claim the Astral Express doesn't play fair.
无论是承认还是澄清，请问{NICKNAME}能否披露更多细节呢？
Whether you're here to confirm or clarify, could you disclose more details on these matters?
Since when was that against the rules?
幻月游戏的竞争规则里没有必须一对一的说法吧？这么多火花模因病毒感染者打我一个人，才是不讲武德。

Nothing in the Phantasmoon Games' rules of engagement don't stipulate a one-on-one duel. If anything, having a horde of Sparxie-meme-infected hostiles swarming a single person is what I'd call not playing fair.
再退一万步说，我单枪匹马也不是无法战胜她嘛，对吧？
Besides, even if I were to single-handedly take her on, I'd still come out on top. Wouldn't I?
有道狸！得以压制住火花病毒的扩散为优先考虑啵！
You're absolutely right! Containing the Sparxie Virus spread comes first, boop!
我无可奉告，这是绝密级消息。
哪有上来就掀人老底的？有关面具的情报我还不能透露，你自己想办法打听去吧。
Who opens by digging up someone's dirt like that? I'm not at liberty to disclose anything about the masks. If you want the scoop, you'll have to do your own legwork.
哦哦哦？这是对我的考验吗？请放心，像我这样的小区做题家狸猫，绝对会用尽全力啵！
Ohhh? Is this a challenge? Don't worry. I'm the kind of neighborhood quiz-grinder furbo who'll give it everything, boop!
Which side are you reporting for, exactly?
你到底是《狸狸周刊》的记者还是对家来的卧底啊？
Are you Furbobo Weekly's reporter, or a mole from the competition?
对不起！咱们《狸狸周刊》就是从八卦小报发家的啵！忘情了发狠了连社长都逃不过被八卦啵！
Sorry! Furbobo Weekly started as a gossip rag, after all! Once we get rolling, we don't stop, we'd even dig up dirt on our own boss if the scoop was good enough, boop!
好多人都留意到，决战现场出现了一个红色的火花「旧型号」，但是火花大会落幕后，她们一起消失不见了啵！
There have been many reports of an old red Sparxie model at the decisive battle. But after SparxiCon wrapped up, they vanished together without a trace, boop!
到底谁是真正的火花呢？如果一定要选，{NICKNAME}是更喜欢火花现在的直播形象，还是她的「旧型号」呢？我已经纠结半天了，根本选不出来哔啵！

So who's the real Sparxie? If you had to pick, {NICKNAME}, do you prefer Sparxie's current streaming persona, or her "old model"? I've been agonizing over this forever, and I just can't decide, beep-boop!
狸了个大谱！你的问题怎么全是火花？果然，你平时没少看火花的直播吧？
Holy furboly! Why are all your questions about Sparxie? I knew it! You watch Sparxie's streams all the time, don't you?
Hand over your personal account. Confiscated.
啊…如果真的要没收，请让我删除一些收藏夹啵……
Ah... If you really have to confiscate it, at least let me delete a few bookmarks first, boop...
杂志社是工作，火花是生活？
The magazine is work, and Sparxie is life?
我爱工作，也爱火花，我热爱的都是我的生活啵……
I love work, and I love Sparxie. Everything I love is my life, boop...
哔哔哔，危险危险危险。换个问题好了…啊！问这个吧！
Beepbeepbeep, danger alert. Switching questions... Ah! Let's try this one!
其实，我确实在火花粉丝群里潜伏了很久，发现粉丝们对火花吃瘪一事大为光火，扬言要「花粉出征、寸草不生」，翻出你的所有网络账号啵！

Actually, I've been lurking in Sparxhead groups for quite a while, and I discovered the fans were absolutely furious about Sparxie getting owned. They're threatening to "mobilize the Sparxheads and leave nothing standing," vowing to dig up all your online accounts!
{NICKNAME}准备怎么应对这些狂热的粉丝呢？
How do you, {NICKNAME}, plan to handle these rabid fans?
是吗？别光用键盘说，跟我的球棒说去吧。
Oh yeah? Don't just run your mouth behind a screen. Talk to my bat.
浣熊大人的球棒，恐怕比火花大人的点赞锤子还难以消受啵！
The Great Raccoon's bat is probably even harder to handle than Sparxie's Like Hammer, boop!
不能接受自己喜欢的偶像落败的人…我觉得他们都是假粉诶！作为一只聪明的小狸猫，你可千万不要被这种自称是「粉丝」的人骗了啊~
People who can't handle their idol losing? Fake fans, for sure! You're a smart little furbo, you definitely shouldn't get fooled by people who call themselves "fans" like that!
I see! That's a deep lesson for us all!
I'm reporting this to the CEO.
上告给执行官！我要告到首席执行官真珠那里。
I'm escalating this to the C-suite! I'll see to it that CEO Pearl hears about this personally.
直通首席执行官，还是浣熊大人有门路啵！
A direct line to the CEO... the Great Raccoon really has connections, boop!
我的账号也不是什么秘密吧？
It's not like my account's a secret, right?
随便翻，我在网上也叫{NICKNAME}，请认准全网唯一账号。
Go ahead and dig. All my socials are {NICKNAME}, too. It's my one and only account across the whole web.
我有预感，你要涨粉了啵……
I've got a feeling... you're about to blow up, boop...
时间差不多哩，《狸狸周刊》的采访到此结束。
Welp, that's about all the time we have! This Furbobo Weekly interview is officially wrapped.
Front row, third from the left.
二相乐园的朋友们好，恩公好~小女子停云，是仙舟《银河探索》编辑部派来二相乐园的采访记者。

Greetings, friends of Planarcadia, and greetings to you, benefactor! I am Tingyun, a reporter from the Cosmic Exploration editorial department of the Xianzhou, here in Planarcadia to conduct interviews.
Running into a familiar face so far from home, what a pleasant surprise!
是呀，瞧见恩公分外亲切，这回我也准备了不少惊喜给恩公。
It is! It's always such a joy to see you, benefactor. And this time, I've prepared quite a few surprises for you as well.
您瞧，仙舟「玉阙」的戎韬将军出使二相乐园，随行有一名记者，也方便整理各项外交事宜呀。
You see, the Seer Strategist of Xianzhou Yuque is on a diplomatic mission to Planarcadia. Having a reporter along also makes it easier to organize all kinds of diplomatic affairs.
*小声*这段冒充「仙舟第一杀手」的经历，还请恩公帮我多掩盖一段时间。
*whisper* Please help me keep my little stint as "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin" under wraps for a while longer, benefactor.
先祝贺{NICKNAME}在火花大会旗开得胜，仙舟的父老乡亲们也很关注{NICKNAME}的二相乐园之旅，想拜托小女子借此机会，替他们说上几句。

First, congratulations on your opening victory at SparxiCon, {NICKNAME}. Folks back home on the Xianzhou have been following your Planarcadia journey closely, and asked me to pass along a few words on their behalf.
但我想，转述不如一见。不妨咱们现场连线，这算不算最大的惊喜？
But I think words can't beat a reunion. Shall we patch them through live? Wouldn't that be the biggest surprise?
Whoa! {NICKNAME}, it's really {NICKNAME}! I've missed you SO much!
小桂子我有个问题想问你，听说二相乐园人多鬼多，适合直播，{NICKNAME}觉得小桂子和裳裳的捉鬼直播开到这里来有市场吗？

Little Gui's got a question for ya: I heard Planarcadia is packed with people and ghosts, perfect for streaming. {NICKNAME}, do you think Little Gui and Shangshang's ghost-hunting livestream would have a market if we brought it over?
You gotta spend money to make money.
这里流行的是虚拟主播，我觉得…要想赚到直播间的流量，得先在「乐画师」网站上找绘师约一个虚拟主播形象。
VStreamers are all the rage here. I think... if you want to rake in the clout, you'd need to commission an artist on the Joy Painter website first to design your VStreamer persona.
「乐画师」？我记下了，你可别骗我啊。
Joy Painter? Got it, memorized! You better not be pulling my leg here.
太有了！这里到处是幽灵。
Absolutely! This place is crawling with ghosts.
虽然和绥园的幽灵不是一个品种，但这里的灵异事件可不少，什么放到厕所顶部的卷纸啦、会自动写字的黑板啦，啊——看你背后……
Not the same kind as Fyxestroll Garden, but the paranormal stuff here is nonstop. Toilet paper rolls balanced on top of stalls, blackboards that write by themselves, and— Ahhhh look behind you...
哼，这招吓裳裳有用，吓我就算啦！
Hmph, that trick might work on Shangshang, but it won't scare me!
我帮小桂子推流，收入分成。
I'll help Little Gui boost the stream, and we split the profits.
我在二相乐园有了一间杂志社，能发动狸脉帮你的账号推流，收入你三我七，够义气吧？
I've got a magazine office in Planarcadia. I can rally my furbo network to push your account. You get thirty, I take seventy. Pretty generous, right?
小桂子的问题结束了，下一位是……
Little Gui's question is done. Next is...
听说与仙舟演武比试不同，二相乐园的比试以是否足够「欢愉」作为条件，彦卿有点难以想象，想请教{NICKNAME}的战术思路是什么？
I've heard Planarcadia's matches aren't like Xianzhou sparring. They're judged on whether they've enough "Elation." Yanqing can't quite picture it. Could you share your tactical thinking, {NICKNAME}?
我当二相乐园达人秀演。
I thought this was Planarcadia's Got Talent.
演就完事了，正经备战就不好玩了。
Just wing it. Where's the fun if we take prep seriously?
拿从前的经历打个比方，你对着观众大喊一声「我叫冷锋」，比拿起剑认真比试要有胜算多了，懂了吗？

Let me put it this way, if you were to shout "My name is Lengfeng!" at the audience, you'd have a way better shot at winning than actually picking up a sword and dueling seriously. Get what I'm saying?
Do I get it... I think I do.
我做好随时跑路的准备。
I'm ready to bail at a moment's notice.
笑死，根本没有对策。不光是对手，连我自己也猜不到下一步我要干什么。
This is too funny. There's no plan. Not even my opponent can guess my next move. Heck, even I don't know what I'm doing next!
但仙舟有句古话说得好：乱拳打死老师傅。这就是我的对策。
But there's an old Xianzhou saying: Even flailing fists can take down a master. That's my strategy.
这…想必那位常乐天君反倒会为此开怀吧。
Well... I imagine that Joyseeker would actually be delighted by this turn of events.
你来参加，我亲自告诉你。
Show up, and I'll tell you myself.
少年，你要学的还有很多，来参加幻月游戏吧，我亲自和你在够不够「欢愉」上过两招。
You've got a lot to learn, kid. Join the Phantasmoon Games. I'll personally show you what true "Elation" looks like.
好危险，我还是老实练剑吧。
Too dangerous. I'll stick to practicing my swordplay.
好啦！彦卿小公子的问题也结束了。恩公的回答信息满满，令人收获颇丰呐，小女子没有别的问题要问了。
Alright! That wraps up Young Master Yanqing's questions too. Benefactor, your answers were so informative and insightful. This humble lady has no further questions to ask.
That person on the wall over there.
被你发现了，我不止是绘世学院的教导主任，也是《学园之声》栏目的创始人。我的意思是说，绘世学院的校园媒体归我管。
You caught me. I'm not just the Dean of Graphia Academy, I'm also the founder of Campus Voice. In other words, all campus media at Graphia Academy falls under my purview.
First time hearing about this program.
唉，校园媒体要走出校园，还有很长的路要走。
Yeah, campus media's got a long way to go before it breaks out of the campus bubble.
I just picked one at random.
指到就是缘分，你的确很懂我们缘生幻造种。
It's fate that you picked me. You truly understand us ideogenitive imagenae.
无论如何，感谢你拯救了绘世学院。我就代表《学园之声》找几个问题问问你吧。
Either way, thank you for saving Graphia Academy. Let me ask a few questions on behalf of Campus Voice.
嗯…第一个问题：你对绘世学院的课堂怎么看？换句话说，在这座二相乐园最富盛名的学校里，有没有哪位老师或哪门课程为你留下了深刻的印象？

Hmm... First question: What do you think of the classes at Graphia Academy? In other words, did any particular teacher or course leave a lasting impression on you at Planarcadia's most prestigious school?
火花！火花！我最喜欢校长火花！
Sparxie! Sparxie! I love Dean Sparxie the most!
哦不，孩子，我帮你拨打保健室电话吧，治疗模因病毒的医生在哪里？
Oh no, kid, let me call the nurse's office for you. Where's the doctor who treats memetic viruses?
绯英老师的绘画艺术，真是神乎其迹，我特别喜欢她笔下的我。
Ms. Evanescia's art is absolutely divine! I especially love how she captures me on canvas.
飞…嘤…？是我耳背了吗？绘世学院有这位老师吗？
Efan... nesha? Am I suddenly deaf? Does Graphia Academy even have a teacher by that name?
「冲浪」是何意？如果是说《覆世沧浪图》的冲浪，年轻时我确实曾在画中尽情遨游，那番感受…我倒！现在回想起来也令人心情激荡……

Surfing? Whatever does that mean? If you mean surfing through Worldbreaker Waves... I must admit, in my greener years, I did indeed immerse myself within those painted tides. That feeling is simply... bodacious! The memory alone remains quite evocative...
就是这样，海龙主任能让我学习到<unbreak>20</unbreak>年前的网络冲浪梗…「我倒」！
Exactly! Dean Seadrake can teach me internet slangs from twenty years ago... "It was bodacious!"
What... What classes did I even take?
抱歉，上学这种事，总是学的越多，忘得越快。
Sorry, but that's how school works. The more you cram, the faster you forget.
你…哎，如此说来，是我教导主任失格了。
You... *sigh* I suppose that makes me a failure as your Dean of Discipline.
接下来是第二个问题，经过这次火花大会，你有什么校园安全上的建议要对绘世学院说吗？
Alright, second question: After this whole SparxiCon incident, do you have any campus safety recommendations for Graphia Academy?
火花能混进学校里，还有这么多学生都能变成一模一样认不出来的火花，这说明——绘世学院的校园门禁系统该升级了！

If Sparxie could slip onto campus, and so many students could turn into identical Sparxies you can't tell apart, that tells you one thing. Graphia Academy's campus security system is seriously overdue for an upgrade!
唉，升级系统的事，实施起来可不容易。要是这件事能解决，那估计就解决了。
Ugh, upgrading the system? That's easier said than done. If it were easy to fix, it would've been done already.
楼道常备水枪和灭火器。
Keep water guns and fire extinguishers stocked in the hallways.
为了把《覆世沧浪图》的景画拼凑完整，你知道我找了多久的浪花、舢板和月亮吗？
Do you have any idea how long I spent hunting down waves, sampans, and moons just to piece together the scenery in Worldbreaker Waves?
这种防火装置实在是太古老了，建议常备高压水枪和灭火器。
These fire safety measures are ancient. Keep high-pressure water guns and fire extinguishers on hand.
你提示得很对。绘世学院存在不少消防隐患，看似很危险，实则一点也不安全。
Good point. Graphia Academy has plenty of fire hazards... That sounds dangerous, and in truth, it isn't impervious.
没什么好未雨绸缪的，关于明天的事，后天就知道了。
No need to plan ahead. Whatever happens tomorrow, you'll know the day after.

Call the police! It's an aberration!

虽然不知道到底有没有用，如果社长大人准备好了的话，姑且按照它说的试一试吧。

看来有点灵验嘛！社长大人，也许现在正是探明旧报纸传说的时候哩！

Furbricato, Furbricato, what made you want to answer us all of a sudden?

胡构狸，胡构狸，如果你是怨灵，你能被我们祛除吗？
Furbricato, Furbricato, if you're a ghost, can we vanquish you?

Furbricato, Furbricato, let's get you home... Tell us, where do you live?
哩啊，怎么会？你是《狸狸周刊》的地缚灵？请灵容易送灵难，这下真得找异常防御部帮忙哩。

胡构狸，胡构狸，我的恋爱运势是不是不错？
Furbricato, Furbricato, is my love life looking good?
居然问这个问题吗？我…我是不是该闭上眼哩。

指向了「是」，社长大人的缘分要到了了吗？

你突然福至心灵，和尤狸安四目相对……
You have a sudden flash of insight and lock eyes with Joolyon...
啊啊啊啊社长大人请不要再问了哩！我只是像热爱工作一样热爱着社长哩！
AHHH! President, please, no more questions! I love you just like I love my work, okay!?
Why don't you give it a try, Joolyon?
我我我，我吗…好吧，既然社长大人这样说了。
M-Me? You want me to ask? Well, if you insist, President.
胡构狸，你不要再装神弄鬼了，快快显身，否则我会立刻联系罗浮杂俎的大网红@小桂子Guinevere 来抓你！
Furbricato, quit the ghost act and show yourself! Otherwise, I'm calling the top Ghostly Grove influencer, @LilGuiGuinevere, to come and bust you!
Enough with the tough talk, just ask already!
胡构狸，胡构狸，你到底想做什么？有什么事就冲我来，不许伤害社长大人！
Furbricato, Furbricato, what's your deal anyway? If you want a piece of someone, come at me! Just leave the Boss out of this!
O-K... "OK"!? Wait, you're actually coming for me!?
我要先下手为强哩，社长大人，请您保护好我，让我把报纸掀开看看！
I'm not waiting around for you! President, cover me! I'm gonna flip this newspaper over and see who's behind this!
啊～～且慢～～你们终、于发现我了～～
Ahhh~ Wait up~ You guys finally found me~

啊啊～～呵呵～～太久不出现，竟然现形失败了～～

Close your eyes~ Let me try that one more time~
在下是～～《狸狸周刊》隐藏员工：「胡构狸」！参见～～

啊啊～～如果老板想给我发正式带合同编制五险一金的聘用书的话～～我也会欢欢喜喜地接受哩～～

从前的我～～用尽了各种办法～～都没能让这些狸猫们注意到我～～

反而变成了《狸狸周刊》深夜闹鬼的怪谈～～
But I just ended up becoming a local ghost story about Furbobo Weekly being haunted at night~
直到{NICKNAME}到来～～发现了我的存在～～在我心里～～您就是我的「主人」哩～～
Until {NICKNAME} showed up and saw me for who I am~ From now on, you're the only "master" for me~
主人～～请狠狠地收下我胡构狸吧～～
Master! Please take me in and let me serve you~
这就是雏鸟情结吗？好可怕的黏人狸！不过《狸狸周刊》招聘新员工都是要面试的，目前还没有破格录取的先例哩……

哦～～面、试啊～～我懂的，就是让面试官高兴～～对吧～～
