好厉害！不过…你讲的很多东西我都有点听不懂。哎，要是萍萍姐来听，她肯定听得懂，我要是能和她一样聪明就好了。
That's awesome! But... I'm having trouble following many of the things you said. Alas, if Wenfry were here, I'm sure she could get it. I wish I were as smart as her.
我不是科员，但比他们厉害。
I'm not a researcher, but I'm greater than one.
诶？你不是科员，那你为什么会出现在这儿？我还以为你是从上面下来的呢。
Eh? How come you're here if you aren't a researcher? I thought you came down from up there.
你长得真高啊，感觉你一定很聪明，萍萍姐就比我高一点，但她知道的可真多……
You must be very smart given how tall you are. Wenfry is slightly taller and so much more knowledgeable than me...
啊，又是你！我认得你，上次见过你我还问你是不是空间站的科员嘛！我叫……
Ah, it's you again! I met you before, and I asked you whether you were a researcher last time! My name is...
我叫…呃，萍萍姐给我起了个名字…叫…叫什么来着？啊，是婷婷！我叫温婷婷！
My name is... um, Wenfry gave me a name... What was it again? Ah, it's Wendy! My name is Wendy!
I have some questions for you...
Why are there so many Wens on the space station?
萍萍姐说，空间站的科员都姓温，这可能是他们成为科员的一种仪式吧。
According to Wenfry, "Wen" is the official last name of space station researchers. It might be some sort of initiation ritual for them.
萍萍姐还说…能当科员的人都很聪明，我想变得跟科员们一样聪明，所以萍萍姐干脆就给我俩改了个「正式科员名」。
Ms. Wenfry also said that the researchers were all brilliant people. I wanted to be smart like them, so she gave both of us a researcher name.
萍萍姐是我最好的朋友！我们连气味都是差不多的呢，都是桃桃味的，不过她的味道要更浓郁一些。
Wenfry is my best friend! We even have a similar peachy scent, though hers is stronger.
这就是为什么她比我聪明、懂得多——虽说我们从小就在这儿，也没出过门，但她对外界的一举一动了如指掌，哎，我要是能像她一样聪明就好了……
That's why she's smarter and more knowledgeable than me. Although we've never left this place since we were little, she's able to keep abreast of things. *sigh* If only I were as smart as her...
你打听空间站的事做什么？
Why are you trying to find out about the space station?
萍萍姐说这里很无聊，我也这么觉得，她说我们可以「上去」空间站看看，不过我们还没找着路。
Wenfry said it was boring here. That's how I feel too. She also said we could go up to take a look at the space station, but we haven't found the route.
萍萍姐有空的时候会跟我讲空间站里的事，不过她不是随时都有空，所以……
Ms. Wenfry tells me about the space station whenever she has time, but she's not always free, so...
听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...
好哦，有空的话可以多跟我聊聊，我有时候也挺无聊的。
Sure thing! Come talk to me more when you're free. It gets pretty boring sometimes.
听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...
成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.
咦，你长得好奇怪，我从来没见过这么高的…呃，难道你就是呜呜伯口中的…空间站的科员？
Mm, you look funny. I've never seen such a tall... Um, are you that... space station researcher that Wubbaboo talks about?
It's not my fault I grew so tall.
我听说过，科员通常都是一种叫「人类」的物种，听呜呜伯说，照顾它们的科员是个小不点儿，跟我们差不多高。
I hear that researchers are typically humans. Wubbaboo says that their caretaker is kinda short, about the same height as us.
但没想到还有你这么高的科员，没想到「人类」的品种如此不稳定，真是令我大失所望。
I'm surprised to see a researcher as tall as you. It's disappointing for me to see the human species being so unstable.
Guess if I'll take a guess.
它发出了一声不满的叫声，但在你听来倒像是某种小型猫科动物从喉咙间挤出来的咕噜声。
It lets out a disgruntled snort, which sounds like a purr coming from the throat of a small feline creature.
它认真地闻了闻你衣角的味道，不满地皱起了眉头。
It gives the hem of your clothing a serious sniff and frowns disapprovingly.
你身上的味道好奇怪，有铁锈味、有淡淡的清香，还有…好多不同的感觉？难道这就是「科员」的味道？
The smell on you is quite strange. There's a metallic, rusty scent, a faint freshness, and... so many different senses? Is this what they call the "researcher" smell?
是了，呜呜伯说你们要经常做实验来着…原来如此…空间站上面真有意思，连气味都这么复杂，真好啊…不像我，成天困在这个破地方，什么都做不了……

Yes, Wubbaboo said you guys have to do research regularly... I see now... The space station is really fascinating, even the smells are so complex. It's amazing... Unlike me, stuck in this lousy place all day with nothing much to do...
成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.
Oh, it's you again. What's up?
是啊，这里来了个呜呜伯，我和它聊过了，它是从空间站的什么夹层里偷偷溜下来的，还给我讲了很多空间站的故事。
Yes, there's a Wubbaboo here. I had a chat with it, and it said it sneaked out from some sort of compartment in the space station, even told me a lot of stories about the space station.
呜呜伯看起来不太聪明的样子…正因如此，才会被约瑟夫那个装腔作势的家伙利用，可惜我说的它又听不进去，哎……
Wubbaboo seems a bit slow... That's why it's being manipulated by that pretentious Joseph guy. I pointed that out to Wubbaboo, but my advice fell on deaf ears...
你很想去其他舱段逛逛？
Would you like to visit the other zones?
观光？拜托，别把我当成呜呜伯那种长不大的小家伙，我才不像它一样，成天没心没肺地傻乐。
As in to sightsee? Oh, please, don't treat me like one of those Wubbaboo. I'm nothing like it, I don't spend my days goofing around.
我想清楚了，根据呜呜伯的描述，我评估过自己的智力水平，感觉和它口中的科员没什么差别，我觉得我也能当科员。

I've thought it all through. Based on Wubbaboo's description and my evaluation of my intelligence level, I don't think there's much difference between me and the researchers as mentioned by Wubbaboo. I'm sure I can be a researcher too.
我要悄悄地搞科研，等研究出成果了，再狠狠地惊艳阮•梅女士！
I'm going to secretly work on my research. If everything goes well, I'll be able to blow Miss Ruan Mei away with my result!
Why are there so many Wens on the space station?
我听呜呜伯说，照顾它的什么「界子科」科员是个叫「温得了」的小孩。他们科室的其他人，无论老少，也都姓温，这好像是一种科室传统。

I heard from the Wubbaboo that the Department of Ecolurgy researcher who took care of it was a kid named Wen Deliao or something. Many people in that department, old or young, have Wen as their last name. It seems to be a tradition of that department.
我觉得我作为阮•梅女士麾下最具潜力的生命体，未来入主「界子科」是必然的事。所以就提前改个名字，以便未来和大家打成一片。

As the most promising lifeform under Miss Ruan Mei's guidance, I believe I'll one day lead the Department of Ecolurgy. So, I've changed my name in advance to blend in with everyone else when the day comes.
Are you sure you didn't mishear the name?
我绝对没听错，它说的就是「温得了」，你不信就去打听打听？
I was sure the name is "Wen Deliao." You can find out for yourself if you don't believe me.
What kind of tradition is that?
我曾经思考过这个问题，有两种可能，要么是他们那颗星球上的人都姓温，要么就是进了「界子科」的都要给自己起一个代号，我认为应该是后者。

I wondered about that before, and I figured there are two possible explanations — either everyone on the planet has the last name of Wen, or all researchers that join the Department of Ecolurgy are required to have a codename. I believe it's the latter.
嗯哼，那就请回吧，我需要一些独处时间。
Well, you'd better take your leave. I need some time alone.
嗯好，下次再聊，下次…下次你可以给我讲讲空间站的见闻。
Sure, let's talk again soon. Next time... you can share your experience at the space station with me.
我得调整下对空间站科员的认知了，他们的智商似乎也没有比我高多少…看来我也可以当科员，我有这实力，绝对够。
I should probably change my perception of the space station researchers, they don't seem to be that much more intelligent than I am... Looks like I have what it takes to be a researcher too.
你听到了富有节奏感的哼唱，精神满满的音调让你感觉劳动真光荣。
You hear the humming of a rhythmic tune. The energetic tune makes you feel proud of your labor.
你是来找阮•梅女士的吗？她暂时不在哦，不过阮•梅女士很快就会回来啦！
Are you here to meet Miss Ruan Mei? She's not around at the moment, but she'll be back soon!
阮•梅女士不在的日子，我们也不能偷懒呀。
We can't slack off even though Miss Ruan Mei isn't here.
不用多礼，我只是来随便逛逛。
Don't stand on ceremony. I'm just here for a casual visit.
We're just doing what we should.
下次阮•梅女士回来的时候，她就能够在更舒适的环境下工作了。到时候她一定会很开心的！
Miss Ruan Mei is coming back to a more comfy working place. I'm sure she'll be thrilled!
你看到汗珠从它脸上滚落，坚定的双眼中饱含着期待。
You see beads of sweat trickling down its face, and its eyes are brimming with anticipation.
也许阮•梅看不到你的工作。
Maybe Ruan Mei can't even see your effort.
她有那么多的造物要去爱，一时间看不到我们也是很正常的！
Since she has to give her love to so many of her creations, it's perfectly normal for her to overlook us for some time!
没关系！让阮•梅女士感受到无微不至的服务就已经足够了！我相信时间一定会让她感动。
It doesn't matter! I'm happy as long as Miss Ruan Mei can enjoy my meticulous service! I believe she'll be touched over time.
也许阮•梅早就注意到你了。
Maybe Ruan Mei has noticed you for a long time.
真…真的吗？阮•梅女士创造了那么多的新生命，竟然会注意到我！那也太幸福了……
R—Really? It's hard to believe she notices me out of so many of her creations! That's amazing...
话说回来，也许这就是真的呢？不行，我要更加努力，不能辜负阮•梅女士的期待啊！
There's a chance it's true, isn't it? I must work harder to never let Miss Ruan Mei down!
那该怎么办呢……今天把一周的活都干完吧！
What should I do about that... Let me finish the work for the entire week today!
也许你不用期待阮•梅的关注。
Maybe you should stop expecting attention from Ruan Mei.
阮•梅女士是我们的创造者，我们不能离开她。
Miss Ruan Mei is our creator. We can't leave her alone.
要是我们都离开阮•梅女士，她该怎么排解自己的烦恼啊…想想就很孤单，不行，绝对不行！
How is she going to deal with her troubles without us... I can feel her loneliness just by imagining the situation. No way! I can't let that happen!
无论何时无论何地，我们永远是阮•梅女士温暖的后盾！
We'll always support Miss Ruan Mei at all times and places!
I don't have anything else to say.
Good luck and let's talk another time.
嗯嗯，感谢您的祝福！努力一定会带来好运！
Thanks for your wish! I believe good luck comes with hard work!
今天的工作还没完成呢，我还要继续加油。希望下一次阮•梅女士来的时候，会对我们的工作刮目相看！
I have to keep my nose to the grindstone to finish the work today. Hopefully, Miss Ruan Mei will be impressed by our work when she visits!
你注意到它在跟着一种奇怪的旋律哼唱着，尽管唱歌水平在你看来和帕姆有得一拼。
You notice it humming a strange tune with a voice almost as bad as Pom-Pom's.
阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~
啊，你好！我还是第一次见到…阮•梅女士以外的人，但你身上好像有熟悉的味道——呜呜！是她的味道，我闻得出来！
Hello! This is the first time I've met someone besides Miss Ruan Mei, but your scent smells familiar to me... Oh! It's her scent! I can tell!
是阮•梅女士派你来找我吗？她终于想起我了？！
Did Miss Ruan Mei send you here? Did she finally think of me!?
不是，她可能在忙别的事。
Nope. She's probably attending to some other affairs.
这样啊…也是，毕竟她那么忙……
I see... Well, she has a lot of things on her plate...
I think she's long forgotten about you guys.
它似乎快要哭了，但撇了撇嘴后又把泪珠憋了回去，使劲挤出一个并不怎么好看的笑容。
It is verging on crying, but it purses its lips and holds its tears back. Then, it forces a stiff smile on its face.
才不是呢！不许这么说阮•梅女士！她只是、她只是…只是在忙别的事，这里这么乱也不方便回来！

That's impossible! Don't ever say such things about Miss Ruan Mei! I'm sure she's just... just caught up by other matters. There's no good time for her to come back as the place is too much of a mess now!
我们的造物主很忙很忙，她在很努力地做研究，我们也要努力地工作，好好修复这里的一切…否则就是在给阮•梅女士丢人！
Our creator is extremely busy with her research. So, we have to do our best to fix everything here, or we'll be a disgrace to her!
这种事情太可怕了，我们决不能给阮•梅女士丢人！
That's such a terrifying thing to happen! We'll never be a disgrace to Miss Ruan Mei!
它一直在跟着一段重复的旋律轻声哼唱，但你觉得听多了似乎还挺悦耳的。
It has been humming the same tune over and over again, and it starts to grow on you over time.
阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~
啊，又见面了，这次是有什么事吗？
Oh, we meet again. What can I do for you this time?
What are your thoughts on Ruan Mei?
阮•梅…阮•梅女士…她是我们伟大的造物主，虽然她总是很忙，但我知道她在创造我们的时候一定倾注了很多很多的爱。
Ruan Mei... Miss Ruan Mei is our great creator. Although she's always busy, I know she must have poured a lot of love into creating me back then.
这种感觉…呃，抱歉，你没有「红豆冰」这种馅，我很难跟你解释清楚……
This feeling... Well, it's hard for me to explain to someone like you who doesn't have the filling of red bean ice...
但我感觉得到，有时候是眼泪流淌的触感，有时候是很温暖的触摸感，总之，我能感受到她在培育我们的时候留下的爱……
But I can feel it. Sometimes it's the feeling of tears dribbling down my face, and sometimes it feels like touches filled with warmth. Anyway, I can feel the love she gave when she was creating us...
Have you been waiting for her?
是的，不止是我，大家都在等她回来。不过老实说，这一层乱哄哄的，我感觉她要回来也没个下脚的地方。
Yup. Not just me, but everyone else too. To be honest, this floor is too chaotic. She wouldn't have a place to stay if she were to come back.
所以我和其他造物，还有那些勤劳的小机器人一直在努力修复这个区域。等我们把舱段修复好了，她回来的时候起码有个干净舒适的地方可以休息……

So, the other creations and I, as well as those diligent little robots, have been working hard to fix this zone. With that, Miss Ruan Mei will at least have a clean and comfortable place to stay when she returns...
你的名字是有什么故事吗？
Is there a story behind your name?
我听我们中最聪明的「贤者」说，我和绿豆酥的配方有点特殊。
According to the wisest among us, Mung Bean Cake and I are made with a special recipe.
好像是加入了一些特殊的材料，我这种口味会让人共感到「爱」的存在。但大家都说，是一些让人流眼泪的刺激性物体，并不是「爱」。
Thanks to a special ingredient, I seem to be able to make people feel the presence of love. Yet, everyone says that it is due to some tear-inducing substance, not love.
可我觉得大家说得不对，「爱」这种口味本来就是让人流眼泪的，所以阮•梅女士并没有创造失败……
But I don't agree with them. The flavor of love is supposed to make people cry, so I'm not a failed creation of Miss Ruan Mei...
好吧…回去的时候路上小心些，这附近的区域还没清理干净，外面也很危险。
Alright... Please be careful on your way back, as the nearby areas have yet to be thoroughly cleaned, and it's quite dangerous outside.
I've got to go. Talk to you later.
你要走了？好吧，没关系，我习惯了…毕竟每个人都是要离开的…没事，咱们下次再聊吧。
Are you leaving? No problem. I'm used to it... After all, separation is inevitable... Let's catch up next time.
说起来，你和我们不一样，我们都是阮•梅造物，你感受到了吗？她的爱…都凝结在这里。
You're different from us, you know? We're Ruan Mei's creations. Can you feel it? Her love... It's all here in this place.
你要是能感受到就好了，她给我们的爱，有这么这么这么这么这么多！
If only you could feel her love for us. It's sooooo much!
Aren't you supposed to call her "Miss Ruan Mei"?
Don't just keep sighing at such a young age.
它抬起头瞪了瞪你，发现你无动于衷，于是低下头去当做什么也没发生过。
It looks up and glares at you. Seeing your indifference, it lowers its head and pretends nothing has happened.
...Stop pretending to be mature when you're young yourself.
灰灰说我这口味都过时了…是不是我这口味恶心到你了，要不然你怎么还不走，你都挡着我的光了，哎……
Ashy said I was an outdated snack... Do you find me disgusting? Why are you still here? You're blocking my light. *sigh*
哎？又是你，说吧，找我是有何贵干？
Huh? It's you again. Just tell me what brings you here.
I want to ask you something...
